Hail Mary Station 13

Source

16 March 2026

Malerus updated:

  • Players are now prompted to accept server rules before joining; the prompt only appears once and is saved to their preferences file.
  • Admins can force a player to re-accept the server rules via the existing forcerules command; this now also persists the reset to their savefile.
  • Occupation picker in character creation is now a faction-grouped card grid instead of a plain list.
  • Removed the "New Player Options" title bar from the lobby popup.
  • Lobby popup is now tall enough to avoid a default scrollbar.
  • HUD changelog and github buttons no longer lose their amber color every time the tgui panel loads.
  • Bold and strong text no longer change to the wrong color on hover in browser UI.
  • rules_accepted moved from /client to datum/preferences so acceptance persists across server restarts.
  • Added tools/ss13_genchangelog.py for generating the static changelog archive from yml entries.
  • In-game Changelog redesigned as a Fallout 1 phosphor-green RobCo terminal with monospace font, scanline effect, and green glow headings.
  • Changelog header updated to Hail Mary Station branding, removing upstream Coyote Bayou references.
  • Fixed null runtime in explosion.dm when reactionary_explosions config flag is disabled.

09 September 2021

Ghilker updated:

  • added downsides to shoving too much fuel/moderator inside the machine, the cooling volume can be adjusted in the GUI to make it stronger/weaker based on the user needs

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Fixes a bug where emotes such as a carp gnash will mess up a name if the name contains a pronoun within it
  • Fixed an incorrect variable in a var that manages pronouns
  • Updated some Simple Mob examines and emotes to default to plural (they) rather than object (it)
  • two clown mobs (Clown Hulk, and Clown Chad) are now explicitly male. one Corgi type (Void) is neuter (it)
  • many animals like cows and chickens are hardcoded female, but uses neutral pronouns in examines and emotes, updated that to be explicitly she pronouns

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You should no longer lose deathnettle durability when clicking on floors or walls

TheSmallBlue updated:

  • Added the To Number circuit component.

Time-Green updated:

  • cutting open heads wont drop horns, frills etc on the ground (you could literally stick it into a human to give them frills but nooooooo you wanted to report the bug)

TiviPlus updated:

  • Fixed weather being opaque

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Wizard gets bonus points for choosing the randomized options in their spellbook. They will get 15 points worth of spells if they choose "Full random" and they will get 12 points worth of spells if they choose "Semi random".
  • Fixed the duffelbag curse and curse of hunger code in general.

19 July 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • You can now load equipment outright by double clicking the corresponding equipment button in the Select Equipment UI.

Fikou updated:

  • During moth week, teleporter accidents make you Moths

InsaneRed updated:

  • Elder Atmosian armor now takes less metallic hydrogen to craft and is better armored.
  • Most advanced tools now use balloon alert

Kylerace updated:

  • NanoTrasen has realized that its previous theoretical fix for ghost ears didn't work, not that that's a problem since ghosts don't exist but NanoTrasen has fixed its mistake.

Melbert updated:

  • Energy Guns use balloon alerts when swapping mode

Mothblocks updated:

  • Added a box of silver IDs to the HoP office on TramStation.

Seris02 updated:

  • fixed sentient diseases reinfecting when dead

TheSmallBlue updated:

  • Added USB cable support to bluespace launchpad consoles to use with integrated circuits.

18 July 2021

Helianthus00 updated:

  • Far explosions now cause far less shake and near explosions have been reduced slightly to scale with this change.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Space Dragon has received some nerfs to make fighting it and its carps fairer to the crew.
  • Fixed a bug where carp rifts without an owner could spawn infinite carp.

InsaneRed updated:

  • fixed up some issues with the ski shoes vehicle description

Kylerace updated:

  • NanoTrasen has pushed a fix for nonexistent ghost ears, allowing them to theoretically hear nearby sounds again if they existed, which they don't.

Maurukas updated:

  • One standard moth plushie has been issued to the tramstation psychologist's office.

PositiveEntropy, Meyhazah updated:

  • Adds new fire extinguisher sprites based on Tau Ceti's!

Sheits updated:

  • Replaces the old aquarium sprites

TiviPlus updated:

  • Directional lights might seem more smooth now

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Allows charging circuit shells by using inducers.
  • Allows setting the owner ID of a circuit through a shell.
  • Fixed carps losing track of who they're following if they take a path that obstructs their vision
  • Adds the module circuit component.
  • Fixed carrying being broken.
  • Fixed light explosions having 0 chance to delimb someone if they have no bomb resist.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • The implant pad will no longer incorrectly describe TRAC implants as being usable as teleporter beacons.

17 July 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where a PDA's action button icon did not properly update upon light toggle.

Fikou updated:

  • grav anomalies will no longer permanently make you unclickable
  • deletes a door from deltastation mining shuttle

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • You can now put people in coffins again after fireman carrying them.

Kylerace updated:

  • slippery things, among others will no longer stop working forever after throwing them into hyperspace

Maurukas updated:

  • A rogue decal has been purged from Deltastation
  • The toxins airlocks on Delta, Tram, Meta and Kilo can now be opened from inside the airlock

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • AI now opens the holopad with left click, and projects a hologram with right click. AI's right clicking the holopad will immediately project, no more double clicking
  • AI's right clicking any holopad while projected via the "Project Hologram?" button when presence is requested, will cancel the projection and put their camera back to where they started (moving far away from the pad will not do this, nor would ctrl-clicking the pad)
  • when an AI's presence is requested to a holopad they get a chat message that has two options, jump to the location, works as it does currently, and "Project Hologram" which will immediately project a hologram there, right clicking the pad will move you back to where you were
  • Ctrl+leftclicking on the holopad will end the holopad call directly without jumping you back to your last location (it does nothing if you are not already a hologram)
  • AI's can now examine a holopad to see the AI specific controls for the pads (need to shift+right click and examine from the menu, cant shift-click examine, issue with how the AI itself functions.)
  • when you jump to someone from their name in chat, or a location from chat such as when presence is requested, you can hit "~" or "0" to jump back
  • when you jump back to your previous location with the "Jump Back" key or to a saved location with "1-9" it stops all following, so you can jump back or jump to a location and you wont jump back to the person you tracked

Sheits updated:

  • Flight potions now work on fly people, androids and skeletons

Wallem updated:

  • Lets people wash the ant debuff off of themselves, as intended.
  • Due to a leak in Nanotrasen Brand Ant Farms during shipping, a large influx of space-ants have been inadvertently dumped onto every Nanotrasen station. Don't go leaving food around too long, and please be sure to watch your step, we're pretty sure they bite...
  • New giant ant sprite by Doshmobile

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed HTML encoding of automatic evac news alerts emergency_reason.
  • Admin Supplypod Presets can now also be loaded by double clicking their label.
  • Holopad call Holograms now move in sync with their receiver pad.
  • Fixed a Holodisk replay Hologram bug, and Hologram Rays not updating when the pad is moved.

aaaa1023 updated:

  • adds a missing space in the description of the ERT Medical Officer's plushie box.

coiax updated:

  • Ethereal players cannot erroneously revive during mafia games.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • A Charlie station fluff paper about the Supermatter is no longer misnamed "singularity generator". THERE WAS NEVER SUCH A THING AS A SINGULARITY GENERATOR. OCEANIA HAD ALWAYS BEEN AT WAR WITH EASTASIA.

16 July 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • The grammar of the box and organ box suicides has been slightly improved.
  • Attempting to performing an organ box suicide while you're immune to cold now makes you perform a box suicide with it instead.
  • Successfully performing the non-cold immune variant of the organ box suicide now causes you to die of burn damage, not brute damage.
  • A special suicide has been added to space helmets. It has a special variant for if you attempt it in a cold environment (while not immune to cold).

Mordent updated:

  • Hover effect on tgui Tabs made less visually laggy.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Added a more complex AI to carps that allow you to tell them to attack people or to follow you. These carps can be tamed with raw meat, which'll then give you control over them if you succeed in taming them. A carp will only be tamed to 1 person.

15 July 2021

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Revenants can orbit adjacent people and things with Right Click, unless they are stunned, revealed, blocked by salt etc..
  • Improved Jaunt Move checks a little bit.

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • The notification that ghosts receive when someone raises a spectral blade no longer contains an incorrect usage of the word "the"

ZephyrTFA updated:

  • Resolves my sanity as truncate now returns a valid value when it does nothing

carshalash updated:

  • Eggs now work when cracked into glasses

tralezab updated:

  • space dragons are rarer

14 July 2021

Ghommie updated:

  • Fixed the rat king's abilities being usable while dead.
  • Fixed the rat king's Domain ability being usable on cooldown.
  • Adds a safety check to the "Release Obj" admin proc
  • fixed the charge moodlet lingering after a ethereal stomach removal.

Guestify updated:

  • replaced a couple of windows with walls in kilo and delta medbay, added a couple of defib holders that can be easily accessed

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Icebox atmospherics now has a small project room with some resources.
  • Packages sent through disposals to Virology on Icebox won't end up at Xenobio anymore.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Removes the refresher crystal from lavaland loot.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Holopad incoming calls can now be rejected.
  • AI secondary attack now opens Holopad UIs.
  • Fixed connected Holopad callers not seeing their own runechat text.
  • Fixed AI hologram transmit runechat text.
  • Fixed the AI radio help message giving false info about the generic department key.

13 July 2021

Ghommie updated:

  • latejoin arrivals are less likely to spawn on top of each other now.
  • Cannon balls should no longer destroy "indestructible" walls.
  • Fixes being able to simultaneously perform an attack and a tackle as a xeno or monkey with right click and combat mode on.
  • Venus human traps and swarmers' names are now numbered.
  • Deletes a duplicate chat feedback on [mob/carbon/proc/swap_hand()]
  • Fixed ai monkeys appearing as catatonic on examine()
  • Monkeys and dogs no longer yoink items they can't reach.
  • Fixed morph speed being slower while undisguised and some old code related to it.
  • fixed the blackout station trait affecting unrelated areas like CentCom quarters.
  • Stops (blob and otherwise) mobs from falling through blob tiles on open space.
  • fixes the equipment menu lacking from the honker mech html UI because of bad copypasta.
  • restraints now use equip_to_slot() instead of snowflake code when applied, thus fixing issues such as cuffs not falling off when hit by a shrink ray.
  • Fixes inhand holder jank separating pAIs holoforms from their shells in some occasions.

InsaneRed updated:

  • fixed metastation's xenobiology's disposal piping and adds it its own cooling loop for freezers

Krysonism updated:

  • You can now carve blumpkins.
  • The pumpkin, blumpkin and their carved varieties have new sprites.

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • anti-magic now prevents you slipping from the magic flying incorporeal bananas fired by the honks staff

Putnam3145 updated:

  • Watchers no longer search 9 tiles away for stuff then throw the result away if it's more than 1 tile away

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Fixes lone stationary tanks having 5000L instead of 2500L volume.
  • Roundstart stationary air tanks now have the proper 21:79 oxygen:nitrogen gas mix that is used throughout the station.

Time-Green updated:

  • fix some moth and lizard preferences missing
  • apparently mothwings were supposed to go above spacesuits, oops

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Chat Highlighting now works with more symbols and can be case sensitive and/or match whole words only.
  • Fixed Chat Highlighting only working for the first comma separated entry.
  • Your own messages sent over a radio and dchat now properly avoid_highlighting.
  • Fixed admin observer special radio keys double sanitizing input.

12 July 2021

Ghommie updated:

  • Railings integrity has been lowered from 300 (default for structures) to 75 (grilles integrity times 1.5) and their armor changed to match that of grilles.
  • Hostile critters such as lobstrosities and giant tarantulas won't throw themselves at you after dying while charging their attack.
  • Fixes the mech mounted teleporter.
  • Fixes intrinsically paralytic mobs being cured from their paralysis just because they got a brand new (prosthetic) limb.

Kylerace updated:

  • you can no longer get infinite chems from holodeck bees

Mokiros updated:

  • Circuit board for All-In-One Grinder is now named appropriately

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • marine ert engineers spawn with welding goggles instead of nvgs so they can actually weld
  • the metastation genetics monkey pen no longer has a ' in front of its name

SpaceDragon00 updated:

  • Secure safes no longer show up as weapons (I'm labelling this as a fix because I don't know any scenarios where you'd even be able to use a secure safe as an item, so its force value seemed unnecessary)
  • PKAs and their derivatives (Ebows) now properly give info after the first shot
  • Energy guns with no charge now properly give their info
  • Energy guns that do stamina damage and regular damage now display a line in consideration of both the stamina and regular damage
  • Conditional plurals in weapon description code have been fixed
  • Added a proc to initialize a list of object subtypes keyed to their object paths
  • Turned Hits_To_Crit into a define
  • Improved the clarity of some comments, along with adding some where they were previously missing
  • A gun's weapon notes now gives you the notes of its magazine, which gives you the notes of its ammo, making it so you don't need to take out ammo to see its damage.

Time-Green updated:

  • glasses arent horribly embedded in lizard snouts anymore

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed admins getting spammy logs from arrest console circuits.

coiax updated:

  • Ashwalkers now have lungs adapted for the atmosphere of Indecipheres, and now breathe. However, if the Indecipheres atmosphere has miasma, they are immune to it.

dragomagol updated:

  • The Tram whiteship now has a chance to spawn!

itseasytosee updated:

  • Syndicate hardsuit helmet sprites will now properly update when combat mode is activated.

tf-4 updated:

  • When someone ties a neckerchief near you, it no longer tells you you did it.

11 July 2021

@Azarak updated:

  • pipes sprite fix
  • pipe sprites now uses bitmasks

KubeRoot updated:

  • Flash implant now displays its message instead of runtiming when used on cooldown

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed moth wings not showing up when you have a suit on.

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Stunbatons will now harm-baton on left-click if you are in combat mode and the baton is off

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • energy guns now have the correct icon, and no longer look like nanotrasen brand super soakers
  • the set of duplicate icons for energy guns that caused the guns to look different in map editors is no longer

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Bluespace RPED can no longer teleport chems in reagent containers, instead emptying any reagents from containers inserted into it.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed some station name html encoding for plaintext handlers like: Station Charter announcements, the World Name (SS13 window title), and in Cross Server Messages both custom and news about the crews ultimate fate.

carshalash updated:

  • Splits eggs into two reagents. Introduces Pavlova, THE great Oceanic dessert. Whipped cream is also added.

10 July 2021

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • AI intellicards can no longer be teleported out of intellicard slots on consoles using telekinesis or silicon access range

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • two floor decals that were on a wall in delta xenobio are no longer

ProtivogaSpriter updated:

  • Replaced old Mjolnir sprites with new Mjolnir sprites.

Time-Green updated:

  • fixes a plumbing harddel

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed CQC sometimes not registering attacks and grabs properly.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed and improved wabbajack polymorph logging.
  • Silicons can now toggle emitter locks with secondary attack.
  • Fixed Tram ghost magnet and other cases of observer forceMove.
  • Renamed some observer code vars for better readability. Portals check types less.
  • Fixed all clients being forced to Fit Viewport regardless of their Auto Fit Viewport preference being set to manual.

Zytolg updated:

  • There's some eye candy in the Abandoned Medbay that now suggests that it was at some point a medbay.
  • Downgrades the Chem Dispenser and Heater to their Ghetto Counterparts

read-0nly updated:

  • adds random number to carp spawned from space dragon rifts

09 July 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Observers can now interact with the engraved messages from any distance. Rate them!
  • Fixed a case where you could make more engraved messages than your soapstone had uses by queing them fast enough.

Ghilker updated:

  • fix issue with the thermomachine rotation when pulled/pushed

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Removing the Thermal Vision mutation will now remove the active vision as well

PositiveEntropy, Kryson, maxymax13 updated:

  • The Security TV, Smartfridge, and Booze-o-Mat now have new updated sprites!

Time-Green updated:

  • A majority of species features have been turned into organs. Soon you will be able to combine a moth and a lizard into one über being
  • Dropped limbs will now display horns, frills etc instead of just naked and ugly
  • Swapping limbs will now transfer those limbs features, so putting a lizard head onto a human will actually mean they get a snout and horns and everything instead of just being an awkward colored human head

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed the component printer's layout being broken.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Orbiters now transfer to changeling headslugs at birth.

YakumoChen updated:

  • You can now wear the suffering of others on your head with just a sheet of human skin!
  • Human skin hats, touched up by Krysonism

08 July 2021

AnCopper updated:

  • Added a name to clown.txt

Fikou updated:

  • properly updates the light color of the mining hardsuit helmet

Greniza updated:

  • runtime errors from weather
  • Environmental Protection Bags protect from ash storms

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Removes stuns from Voice of God.

InsaneRed updated:

  • Chaplains who worship the machine gods can now trade in 2000 favor to receive a random cybernetic implant

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • the examine text on the Seed Extractor now accurately displays the amount of seeds you may potentially get

Spookuni updated:

  • Nanotrasen has released experimental new laser lenses for laser rifles, energy guns, and illegal hellfire modkits, increasing the number of shots they can fire from full charge by roughly 20%.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Introduces the Lag Switch subsystem for when a smoother experience is worth trading a few bells and whistles for. Performance enhancement measures can be togged by admins with the Show Lag Switches admin verb or enabled automatically at a pop amount set via config.
  • Added a new config var: number/auto_lag_switch_pop

ZephyrTFA updated:

  • Rust is now a component
  • refactor almost all of the rust heretic atom procs
  • Wirebrush for advanced rust removal

07 July 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • A new ruin has surfaced on icebox. Signal pings indicated that may have been a post office, once.
  • Hologrids once again cannot be picked up, as is intended.

EuSouAFazer updated:

  • Inaccessible medkit in Kilostation dorms is now reachable

InsaneRed updated:

  • Cleaned up waste and distro pipes near sms on most maps so they dont automatically link up to sm cooling pipeline

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • meta medbay sec posts air vents are now actually connected, trimmed a line of cable that led nowhere from pharmacy
  • meta pharmacy now has medic access again, but no access anywhere for chem factory except for chemist
  • an intercom in meta-med delivery shared the same wall as an APC, moved the intercom to the top left of the room
  • Meta-station Xenobio slime computer camera can now move up and down between the left most cells, as well as drop slimes in the work area between the consoles
  • Deltastation bar's atmos alarm now correctly placed, and nudged a pipe nearby to no longer have a redundant loop
  • tram pharmacy now has medic access for when skeleton access is lifted

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • New ERT type, marines, for whatever you might want them for.
  • Tacticool armor from tgmc to compliment.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed unplaced blob overmind spawning in places it can not move.

spessbro updated:

  • made portaseeder use ctrl-click instead of a verb

unit0016 / Melbert updated:

  • Many more antagonists now shout special phrases when suiciding with C4/X4, including Heretics, Centcom Interns, Obsessed, Clown Ops, and Santa Clause.

06 July 2021

Fikou updated:

  • switchblade can now be used to butcher and slice necks
  • fixes voice of god not giving you large text
  • wisps no longer fall in chasms

Melbert updated:

  • Changelings birthed from headslugs that weren't already changelings (for example, from the icebox mutation pool) are no longer full changeling antagonists, but instead are a weaker, non-antagonist changeling variant (as they were in the past).

MeyHaZah updated:

  • Concussive Gauntlets Resprite

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed the cursed spring water double teleport polymorph machine.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Buckling to a vehicle will no longer wait until you move to set your position on the vehicle properly.

05 July 2021

Fikou updated:

  • The Nightmare's light eater can now break rocks.
  • removes the weird light from the upgraded mining hardsuit helmet sprite
  • commission plaques will no longer hide items you dropped below them
  • hierophant club dash now doesnt work on blocked turfs

Greniza updated:

  • Environment protection bags, which protect their occupants from weather, and give protection from temperature and pressure. The rare variants even have the same protection effects as a space suit.
  • Environment protection bag sprites
  • Made weather immunity consistently defines, as opposed to some strings and some defines.
  • Migrates mob weather immunity to defines rather than strings.
  • Gave atom/movable the ability to be spaceproofed and insulated to protect its contents.
  • Gave /obj/structure/closet the ability to protect its contents from weather.
  • Using wirecutters on an unlabeled bodybag no longer sends the "You cut the tag off of the bodybag" message.
  • Allows bodybags to be picked up again.

KIBORG04 updated:

  • Mafia psychologist couldn't reveal role

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • the autolathe shockwire is properly defined again, autolathes may now potentially shock you when hacking

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • nuke op and detective holsters can now be placed in armor best suit storage
  • the single missing pipe in library maintenance isn't missing anymore

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Stationary pressure tanks now properly have their base pressure at 20000kPa.
  • Stationary pressure tanks now do not name themselves as "plasteel plasteel pressure tank".

TheSmallBlue updated:

  • Added the "Split" circuitry component.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Borgs can now click on adjacent portals (with no module slot active) to use them like humans.

coiax, Timberpoes updated:

  • Adds the new Wallets! station trait. Makes everyone start with wallets with their ID card inside, along with their starting budget. Might also include a little surprise.
  • Wallets that spawn inside dorm wardrobes also have little surprises in them.
  • Wallets can now hold pills.

read-0nly updated:

  • Added temperature and pressure sensors to circuits

spessbro updated:

  • carnivory trait shows up on the plant analyzer

tralezab updated:

  • mmis can no longer possess savannah ivanovs

04 July 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Large cardboard boxes will now show a proper icon when they are open.

Ghommie updated:

  • The "Is This Thing On?" explosion calibration experiment will now accept explosions with negative devastation or heavy strength because, once again, any explosion will do!

MMMiracles updated:

  • Fixed a few errant pipe issues in Tramstation Atmospherics

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Ion carbine gun parts kits are no longer called "generic gun parts kit".
  • The "advanced" in advanced energy gun parts kit is no longer misspelled.
  • Examining stationary tanks now tells you their pressure limits.
  • Analyzing stationary tanks no longer gives you the same thing four times.

Sheits updated:

  • Inhand sprites for hydrogen fire axes now face the right way

Urumasi updated:

  • The turbine now behaves correctly if the intake is blocked.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed carps not properly being tameable.
  • Fixed the tameable component not properly being removed from a mob.
  • The RAM circuit component now allows you to select the type instead of trying to interpret it, allowing it to be used as a constant value component.
  • Made the any datatype for circuit components much easier to read in code.
  • Adds crew monitor usb connections
  • Fixed the sound emitter's frequency port
  • Fixed cooldowns for speech and soundemitter circuit components.
  • Brought the speech component more in line with other components.
  • Limited the maximum string length of a circuit component port to 5K characters to fix exploits that can create strings that duplicate in size each iteration.
  • Fixed being able to insert an infinite amount of components into a shell because of an oversight.
  • Fixed being able to interact the circuit of a locked shell.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed incorporeal movers procing containment field effects.
  • Fixed fully_heal proc curing blindness from quirks and blindfolds.
  • Fixed Create Command Report UI lacking an option derived from command_name().
  • Fixed Cross Server messages containing HTML garbage.

YakumoChen updated:

  • Adds a contraband flavor of Gallery's Peanuts to Getmore vendor

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Added a brand new upgrade to janicarts, the vacuum upgrade, which you can procure from RnD. This upgrade vacuums items from under the janicart directly into an attached garbage bag, very handy! You can remove existing upgrades with a screwdriver.
  • Janicarts no longer accidentally put the key into the trash bag when trying to insert a key with a trashbag attached.
  • You can now right-click while riding a janicart to remove the bag without unbuckling yourself, neato!

thestubborn updated:

  • Bananas can be holstered

tralezab updated:

  • PDAs now include round time.

03 July 2021

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Adds a midround ruleset that allows living players to become the blob if they are randomly selected.

aaaa1023 updated:

  • Sink frames are now deconstructable with a wrench.

dragomagol updated:

  • updated outdated references to intents in martial arts instructions

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Killing and reviving polar bears no longer makes them easier to move.

tralezab updated:

  • catwalk flooring!

02 July 2021

Cheshify updated:

  • The flashlight pens are now actually pen-sized

Melbert updated:

  • Glowshrooms created from spread now should behave like things that actually exist again.

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • added missing air alarms on Tramstation in several areas that previously had none
  • removed air alarms that was right next to each other in the same room on Tramstation
  • Tramstation toxins now has proper firelock safety, no more toxin fires breaking the windows into sci halls
  • Tramstation Kitchen Freezer now uses the proper area so the kitchen and freezer air alarms dont control the same vents

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Nuclear operatives' uplink implants now properly only show items they are allowed to buy, preventing them bypassing uplink restrictions.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • OOC heart commendations once again properly save and persist between rounds!
  • You can no longer sacrifice pAI shells as a cultist

Seris02 updated:

  • changeling legs now copy digitigrade/normal legs

Sparkezel updated:

  • Bats no longer stunlock people. Increased bat damage by 2.

Timberpoes updated:

  • The detective's scanner should now always properly output the correct data for scans and should no longer print out blank entries erroneously.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed rogue vending machines targeting incorporeal.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • You may no longer circumvent config VAS protections by proxying proc calls.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Some greyscale icons like the sombrero have had their errors fixed.

01 July 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where a relic war hammer was not able to do kneejerk action.
  • Fixed a case where a radial menu for the null rod reskin variant selection was showing one duplicate option.
  • Updated radial menu for a null rod reskin variant selection. It will now include a small button for showing additional information about each given null rod variant.

KubeRoot updated:

  • Transit tube dispenser stations are now buildable via RPD
  • Transit tube dispenser station sprite errors have been fixed. The sprites themselves have not been changed, but the names and orientation has been corrected.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Hello people who parse performance log files (yes all two of you). Empty entries will no longer cause errors, they will instead be properly represented by a 0

Malgover updated:

  • new riot armor sprites

Time-Green updated:

  • Debriding surgery efficiency has been multiplied by 8

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Adds the sound emitter circuit component.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed cyborg locker right click to lock
  • Fixed an infinite loop bug with portal teleports. The cake is a stack overflow.
  • Fixed portals layer so they appear over most other objects.
  • Fixed hand teleporter portals moving in zero gravity.
  • Portals on dense objects no longer require clicking to enter and can be walked into.
  • Portals you are standing on may be entered by clicking even with a tool in hand.
  • Removed an unused teleport arg that may cause issues with new portal code.

bloons3 updated:

  • Adds logging for impacted cyborgs during law changes
  • Adds additional cyborg logging

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Added other tickets opened by a user to the adminhelp dialogue
  • Added the $reset directive to reset a configuration entry's values to its default

tralezab updated:

  • fixes buying shuttle insurance while the shuttle is docked
  • added barticles to bonfires

30 June 2021

Fikou updated:

  • fixes singularity beacons

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Adds several list circuit components to manipulate lists.
  • Adds the table datatype that can have queries performed on it with components.
  • Adds USB connections for the arrest console.
  • Fixed race conditions happening with circuits.

29 June 2021

Arokha updated:

  • async modal message/title swapped
  • async modal not firing callbacks

RandomGamer123 and IndieanaJones updated:

  • Offering a cyborg on a cult rune now allows the cultist to transform the cyborg into a construct of their choosing.
  • Offering a cyborg on a cult offer rune no longer creates an empty soulstone and round removes the cyborg.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Knives (such as the kitchen knife, hunting knife, combat knife, etc...) are generally more effective at causing slashing wounds now. The butcher's cleaver in particular is now equal to a circular saw in terms of wounding.
  • Scalpels are an eensy bit less effective at wounding enemies wearing armor, though they are still very effective at causing bleeding.

Sheits updated:

  • Reduces the maximum weight paradox bags can hold
  • Adds paradox bag icon and belt sprites

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fixed issue which made cooked steaks inedible. You should now be able to eat griddled steaks again.
  • Obsessed antags will now recieve a chat message stating the antag's policy flavour text, if any such policy exists in config.

cacogen updated:

  • Cannabis has more believable effects

zxaber updated:

  • RD consoles now have hardware supporting ID changes by default.
  • Jaunting spells of all types (except for Nightmare) no longer allow for the user to end up inside a wall or most other dense objects. Instead, you will be moved to a valid spot on the path you took, or returned to your start location.

28 June 2021

Coconutwarrior97 updated:

  • Added funtionality so free golems get an alert from policy.json.
  • Deleted a line of text for Free golem's flavor text. Since in my opinion the spawn-in text, with the addition of the policy.json text was a bit too much.

MrStonedOne updated:

  • Added configs to disable laggy hard deletes once they lag the server too much.
  • laggy hard deletes only output once per type path.

Time-Green updated:

  • hunger mechanics are now inherent to stomaches
  • ethereal charge mechanic is now unique to their stomache and can be transferred freely

dragomagol updated:

  • removes the yellow siding tiles at Centcom

ninjanomnom & Trina (Sprites) updated:

  • Stationary tanks can now be constructed using most materials. Start the frame with a stack of plasteel.
  • Stationary tanks are no longer bigger on the inside than the outside.
  • Stationary tanks now merge together when adjacent so you can make large gas storage structures.
  • Stationary tanks share behavior with canisters and can over-pressurize and explode in the same fashion.

27 June 2021

Fikou updated:

  • fixes not being able to upload mutations from disk to dna console

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes passive vents on space tiles flooding space with whatever was being vented

SpaceDragon00 updated:

  • Reverted the normal blob's max HP and initial HP values, which were accidentally modified (Old: 30 and 30, New: 25 and 21)
  • Fixed an issue where certain strains with bonus core regeneration were regenerating faster than intended
  • Used a few unimplemented defines from the PR, like for the Strong and Resource blobs
  • Added an initial HP define that is set as a normal blob's integrity upon Initialize

Timberpoes updated:

  • Baseball bats can now be used to break kneecaps with their right click attack. This requires the target to be one of either prone, immobilised or buckled to something. If you aim for the legs and right click, you'll wind up a swing for the kneecaps. Research indicates that this isn't good for the target's legs.
  • Fixes an issue where right clicking on an ID-secured locker would unintentionally trigger twice, locking then unlocking the locker. Right clicking now correctly attempts to lock and unlock a locker only once.

26 June 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Improved radial info messages for some spider variants to better reflect their strengths and weaknesses.
  • Spider egg clusters now stop processing when they mature to improve performance.
  • Spider egg clusters were integrated into the mob spawner system. This means you will now see grown spider eggs in the ghost spawners interface.
  • Alien-banned players are no longer allowed to spawn from the spider egg clusters.

Sheits updated:

  • Made android and skeleton wings work instead of telling the user "you feel nothing but a terrible aftertaste" when they drink strange elixir
  • Made android and skeleton wings not use a mutant colour overlay like lizard wings
  • Fly wings :)
  • Added android species check

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Cigarettes heat their contents while they are lit.
  • Candy cigarettes now caramelize their own sugar. Their temperature has been reduced to ensure they don't charcoalize it too.
  • Cleaned up cigarette code a bit.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Agent ID cards can now steal accesses wirelessly from other players by right click slapping them with the agent ID card. This operation is completely covert, minus the fact you have to hold your ID card in your hand to initiate it.
  • Agent ID cards can now steal accesses wirelessly from ID cards in containers including bags, wallets, tablets and PDAs without having to open them or remove ID cards first by right clicking. You can still open containers to steal accesses from exact cards as before.

carshalash updated:

  • fixed inaccurate foodtypes/taste tags

25 June 2021

Cheshify updated:

  • The Forcefield Projector takes a second to put a forcefield down.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • QMs can now use the Nanotrasen Internal Requisition Network program on modular computers to order things remotely.
  • All people may now download the Nanotrasen Internal Requisition Network program on modular computers to request to order things remotely.

SpaceVampire updated:

  • The spare Codex Cicatrix created by the ritual, no longer comes with free charges.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Right clicking containers such as backpacks with certain items may now perform that item's action instead of opening the backpack. The behaviour has been implemented with the forensic scanner, which can now scan objects it was previously unable to in melee range, such as backpacks, by right clicking. Any items you'd want to use againt backpacks without inserting the item or opening the backpack should be reported as issues so they can be implemented.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Adds the MMI circuit component.
  • Allows inputting signals into signal ports.
  • Adds the airlock shell. The circuit has full control over the airlock.
  • Implements USB cables for the binary valve to be able to open/close the valve.
  • Adds a private channel for radios that only lets circuits with the same owner's ID to interact with it.
  • Refactors USB code to be easier to use for less experienced coders.

eeSPee updated:

  • Fixed heretic ghouls having reduced max health after being revived after deghouled
  • heretic ghouls now have a little moodlet tooltip

24 June 2021

Ed640 updated:

  • Paper bins after being stacked too high to fall over or getting burnt will no longer void your "important" paper forms when trying to add more paper afterwards.

Melbert updated:

  • Cow tipping and medibot tipping is now a component.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Admin ghosts can now use the :j speech prefix to relay messages from deadchat to their current linked body, if one exists. Perfect for keeping in touch with your deployed ERT via headset without needing to stay in your body back at Centcom!

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Adds the multiplexer circuit component.
  • Changed the drone circuit to have a lower movement delay.
  • Circuit components can now be directly inserted into shells.
  • Added the description and special details to each circuit component that can be accessed when it is inside an integrated circuit. These will have specific details, such as power usage, distance effectiveness and more.

YakumoChen updated:

  • Dynamic will no longer create malf humans for players for never play silicon in the first place.

23 June 2021

Fikou updated:

  • new mech action figures and job action figures
  • Intento leaderboard works good
  • new sprites for mech action figures

Greniza updated:

  • New turf decals for alternative tiletypes

MMMiracles updated:

  • Tramstation's Tram is now more capable of making things regret being in the way of it
  • Tramstation's Tram is now less likely to unintentionally explode

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Cigarettes with the smoke_all property actually let you smoke in everything the cigarette contains now.
  • Adds more intercoms and a new fire extinguisher to Metastation's new medbay.
  • Replaces broken valueless space cash item in old AI sat ruin with a 200 credit one

Semoro and azizonkg updated:

  • Ported fixes of SStimer subsystem from RU SS220 Paradise
  • Added a new config var: flag/log_timers_on_bucket_reset

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Specific chem dispenser recipes no longer create fonts of infinite power.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed explosions delimbing you if they're weaker

22 June 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Contractor batons will now stun cyborgs on a left click and harmbaton them on a right click, instead of stunning cyborgs if you're NOT in combat mode and harmbatonning them if you are.
  • Stunning a cyborg with a contractor baton now puts your contractor baton on cooldown, just like knocking a human down does. Don't worry, you can still easily chainstun/baton 'n' bash borgs with contractor batons.
  • Attempting to stun a cyborg with a classic baton or a telebaton will play a CLONGing noise, produce a special message, and put your baton on cooldown. Harmbatonning cyborgs with classic batons and telebatons still works, of course.
  • The code for classic batons, telebatons, and contractor batons has been doc'd slightly better and refactored a bit.
  • Some edge cases involving cyborgs who somehow both are clumsy and can wield a classic baton have been accounted for. This shouldn't affect normal gameplay unless an admin tries some REALLY weird stuff. Like, clumsy contractor cyborg level weird.

Timberpoes updated:

  • The traitor's Agent ID card has a new option available during forging called Wallet ID Spoofing. Selecting this option will automatically snap the Agent ID card to the front of any wallet, allowing the traitor to hide more valuable ID cards behind it. This is disabled when the card is unforged.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Refactors dbcore.dm to possibly resolve the crashes that happen on Terry.

carshalash updated:

  • Eggs now give 5u yolk no matter what it is cracked in

21 June 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Suspenders now uses a GAGS setup, allowing for custom recolors.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes contractor tablets breaking due to contract targets cryoing.
  • Fixed nuke ops lobby meta exploit

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Makes roleblocks in mafia actually end properly
  • Tachyon-doppler arrays now connect with servers on different z-levels.

SpaceDragon00 updated:

  • People with digitigrade legs are now properly paralyzed by the Paraplegic perk
  • Usable_limbs can no longer be set below 0, which let people walk when they shouldn't be able to

Timberpoes updated:

  • H.A.U.L. gauntlets no longer output a message about losing their grip power when you drop them to the floor.
  • Removing the H.A.U.L. gauntlets while pulling something will now stop the enhanced pulling effect.
  • Fix some runtimes with quirks and equipping silicons.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed signal ports receiving signals when a signal is not actually sent

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • The DNA console can now edit the nonhuman features of its occupants, as well as allowing injectors to apply those features. Look for the "Features" tab in the DNA console.

dragomagol updated:

  • multiple projectiles are now pluralized correctly

jupyterkat updated:

  • you can now press space or enter to select in tgui input lists
  • tgui input lists no longer break when duplicate keys are passed

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Some overlays missing from variant defibs are now properly applied.

20 June 2021

Krysonism updated:

  • Added a new machine to the robotics lab; the ectoscopic sniffer.

OHJ4Y updated:

  • Surgical aprons can now hold more medical-related items in their storage slot.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • OOC heart commendations should once again function and poll people as it should during the shuttle's return trip.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Luminescents once again use slime extracts

SpaceDragon00 updated:

  • Combat defibs no longer enable their safeties when being EMPed
  • Visible message sends its message to mobs that are also its location
  • shock_touching (Renamed to shock_pulling) now actually uses the damage value provided
  • Removed useless mob/user input for cooldowncheck
  • Added recharge_time variable to paddles for variable charge times
  • Added can_hurt, do_success, and do_cancel to reduce code duplication

Timberpoes updated:

  • Chat feedback is improved when setting down briefcase launchpads.
  • Urinals no longer alert you about the letter "i" being stuck to your hand in certain edge cases.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed being unable to add extra circuit components when an integrated circuit was removed.

19 June 2021

Maurukas updated:

  • Nitrile gloves have been restocked on Metastation.
  • Disconnected scrubber pipe on Metastation
  • Batteries are now included with defibrillators on Metastation
  • Broken power cable on metastation
  • KiloStation's fire safety budget has been reduced, resulting in the removal of some redundant firelocks
  • Restores drug vendor to Kilostation Medbay
  • Restores Crew Health Monitor to to the Kilostation medbay
  • Additional scrubbers/vents to some areas on Kilo that had inadequate coverage
  • Declutter pass of Kilo medbay, holodeck area
  • Some cameras in Kilostation now have better names
  • Misc. piping and wiring issues on Kilostation have been repaired
  • Missing air alarm added to Kilostation Botany
  • The water tank stuck in a door in Kilostation engineering has been released back into its natural maintenance habitat

Timberpoes updated:

  • Removed the fake error texture floor tiles.

18 June 2021

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Power fist no longer occasionally and randomly says it does not have enough gas when it has enough
  • Connects Delta's cryopod room to the station's power grid

17 June 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Swarmers now have a generic living healthdoll and pull icon.
  • Swarmers will now show severity of their injuries as a red screen overlay to the user.
  • Swarmer's abilities now have tooltips to clarify their use upon mouse hover.
  • Smartfridges will now show an approximate number of their stored items correctly on their sprite.
  • Smartfridges will now count maximum number of allowed items correctly.
  • Smartfridges will now show their UI only when directly interacted with.

EOBGames updated:

  • Metastation's medbay has received another revision. Stop by the next time you get hurt, and marvel at the new design!

Maurukas updated:

  • Metastation has received the correct health HUDs for its new medbay
  • Camera coverage has been improved in Metastation's medbay

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Amanitin (destroying angel toxin) is now back to its original amount of deadliness prior to human metabolisation changes.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed the tgui changelog dates sometimes being inaccurate to the source files.

tralezab updated:

  • dullahans are now considered undead

16 June 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Poutine can be made via the crafting menu in the misc foods category again.

DuffCreeper updated:

  • Allows people to now examine fire alarms to detect their thermal sensor state. Silicons can now also Ctrl+Click to enable and disable at the sensor at a whim
  • Cleaned up single letter variables in firealarm.dm

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Flipping a gun will no longer unload all its bullets.
  • Bartenders now properly have a weapon's permit for their gun.

Mothblocks, ArcaneMusic for sprites updated:

  • Bot circuits can now use USB cables to connect to computers and machines that support it. Currently, only the tram controls computer supports this, but support should roll out for other systems.
  • Bot shells now have a button that you can register to.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Wigs work when on your head again.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed the RAM component retaining its output type after the input port is cleared.

tralezab updated:

  • carbon roses can no longer mutate into carbon roses

15 June 2021

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Refactors how spans are done in code.

14 June 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Cayenne will no longer keep flickering an error sign when carrying a disk.
  • Radial info boxes will now layer properly over the radial button, so it is actually visible and clickable.

Bluetshirtguy, RaveRadbury updated:

  • Mimes have more picture words for their PDAs
  • New emojis for OOC chat and Mime PDAs

GoldenAlpharex, but actually Mothblocks updated:

  • Looking at the images in the Color Customization of the GAGS menu will no longer make you feel like you dropped your glasses.

Melbert updated:

  • There are now over a dozen new plant traits, but they're not really new. A bunch of unique plant behaviors (like holymelon's anti-magic) are now un-graftable, un-shearable, un-mutatable plant traits that show up on the plant analyzer now.
  • The plant analyzer now differentiates between traits you can mess with and traits you cannot.
  • Killer Tomatos no longer have liquid contents naturally.
  • Liquid Contents and Hypodermic Prickles are no longer compatible with one another. They already didn't work together in most cases, this just makes it so you need an extra step to make Liquid Contents Deathnettles.
  • Novaflowers now apply their on hit effects again.
  • Autodoc'd grown food / plant gene code
  • Refactored grown food / plant gene code
  • A bunch more botany grief stuff is logged now

Mothblocks updated:

  • When a midround ghost event doesn't get any applicants, a sleeper agent/syndicate infiltrator will roll in its place.

Mqiib's spritework updated:

  • Skeletons and Robots now have unique wing sprites

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • The Enhanced Interrogation Chamber's mid-interrogation messages will now actually be received.
  • The hypnoflash (and flashes in general) now work on sleeping people.

RaveRadbury updated:

  • You can select wrapping paper colors by right clicking them.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The Modify Transform -> Translate option in the VV dropdown will now remind you which way positive or negative numbers will move the sprite in question. For those of you wondering, on the Y-axis, positive moves you up and negative moves you down.
  • Dogs are now properly restricted to being able to fetch/pick up items only, and can no longer fetch you lockers and full size cars

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Neon carpets exists. Bug your local chemist or quartermaster for a supply.
  • Decals support user-defined planes and some forms of smoothing.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Adding and removing quirks using the VV dropdown is now more reliable in adding or removing the effects of quirks.
  • Refactors quirks and (hopefully) improves their code, squashing some runtimes associated with quirks on deleted mobs and increasing the performance of some quirks. There should be no player-facing changes, however any problems with quirks should be reported on the Github issue tracker since they may stem from this PR.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed wrap and charge abilities for tarantula and broodmother spiders
  • Fixed moneybots dispensing 0 credits and added a failure signal if it tries to dispense 0 credits.
  • Refactored tram code to be more robust and easier to read.

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • fixed a typo in disembowelment

bobbahbrown updated:

  • The interview system has been improved with in-chat clickable links for interviews and ability to include links in interview questions.

fira updated:

  • Made statpanel relay used mouse button when clicking on turf contents.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Most alt-click atmospheric interactions changed to use balloon alerts.

zxaber updated:

  • The space-jam ambient sound will no longer play inside the AI's core.

13 June 2021

Inept, Coiax, AdipemDragon, YakumoChen updated:

  • The release of the new cookbook, "Tiziran Cooking: a Taste of the Homeworld" has brought Lizard food to the masses! Try out some new treats, like Moonfish, Nectar Larvae, and perhaps even Headcheese at the kitchen today!
  • To coincide with the new popularity of Lizard cuisine, Nanotrasen now stocks seeds for Korta Nuts, a common ingredient in lizard cooking, in the Megaseed vendors. Botanists, you know what to do.
  • A few Tiziran fish are also available for you aquaculture lovers out there. They all like saltwater!
  • A few new snacks are also now available at the station's snack vendors, for those of you too lazy to visit the kitchen.

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Sloths can now be picked up.

12 June 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where slip mood debuff was not triggering at all. You should think about being more careful next time...

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Opening and closing job slots is now logged.

Thunder12345 updated:

  • Three new hair gradients, a pair of shorter fades and a spiky wave.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed a runtime with the comparison components.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • stimformation should not be called if no gas is actually being formed.

11 June 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Midround alien larvas start the game already in a vent instead of just on top of it. Fair chance for everyone!

GoldenAlpharex updated:

  • *me should no longer force someone else's message on your emote.

Melbert updated:

  • You can now quick-swap beakers in and out of the bio-generator (Insert a new beaker without needing to eject the old one).

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Replaces unusable TEG board on derelict with boards for a turbine setup instead.
  • The tram control console now displays an icon for science correctly.
  • You can now examine people to see if they are being strangled with durathread.
  • Cutting durathread off of someone else now produces a public message for everyone to know.
  • Durathread strangling caused by golems can now be cut off with jaws of life as well.

RaveRadbury updated:

  • New emote: *tilt "tilts their head to the side."

TJatPBnJ updated:

  • Storage items open on right-click, instead of alt-click

Wallem updated:

  • Matchbox sprite properly empties.

norill updated:

  • Fixed defibrillator paddles and wall mounts not detecting charge changes.
  • Examining defibrillators now tell you if there is a power cell inside and how to remove it

tf-4 updated:

  • The chemistry diamond is now NFPA compliant

vincentiusvin updated:

  • fixed the 2person mech crushing it's own parts

10 June 2021

Mothblocks updated:

  • Added the ability to enforce two-factor authentication onto admins.

Thunder12345 updated:

  • The remaining damage message when tending burns no longer calls it brute damage.

fira updated:

  • Fixed race condition in creation of z-levels.
  • Input system won't request in-place movements constantly anymore.

09 June 2021

Fhaxaris updated:

  • Telekinesis throwing is now logged even if you don't hit someone.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes self-use sleepers like syndie-sleepers so you can actually use them by yourself when you're inside them.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • The heroine bud can no longer be removed by click-dragging

Thunder12345 updated:

  • The drive-by landing station trait can no longer send players to space.
  • Swarmer traps are functional again

Timberpoes updated:

  • Admins will no longer accidentally toggle delaying the end of the shift off when multiple admins attempt to delay at the same time.
  • When a round end delay goes past the ordinary server restart time, admins are now required to manually end the shift through Reboot World in the Server verb tab or Reboot-World in the command bar. The shift will no longer automatically restart past this point just because an admin undelayed end.
  • Straight jackets and cargo gauntlets no longer pretend they're trying to equip themselves when you hold them in your hand and mouse over an inventory slot they can be equipped to.

cacogen updated:

  • Right-clicking a reagent container in your active hand will pick the previous transfer amount instead of the next
  • Mauna mug uses ctrl+click instead of attack_self() to toggle power
  • Resetting an object's name and description with a pen will return them to what they were before being changed, instead of their initial values
  • Resetting a sculpture's description will no longer result in a description telling you to yell at Firecage
  • All custom names in Character Settings can now either be reset to the default or randomised by leaving the text box blank
  • You can now pick a random religion in Character Settings by leaving the text box blank. Setting a religion will also set the bible name and deity if applicable

08 June 2021

Mothblocks updated:

  • The "your fingers are too big" message for shooting a gun (such as with insulated gloves on) is now a balloon alert.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed the unbearable lag on the R&D consoles.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Players with zero living time will now be caught as expected by a default config soft panic bunker.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Fake N-spect scanners, buyable via black market uplink (Tools section).
  • Bananium HONK-spect scanners, craftable from fake N-spect scanners (Crafting menu, misc section).
  • The N-spect scanner now draws power from a removable power cell when printing reports. The cell it starts with has enough power for 100 reports.

tralezab updated:

  • Robotics Two Person Mecha!

07 June 2021

ArcaneMusic, Celotajs: ft PowerfulBacon updated:

  • Modular, GAGS winter coats and sprites.
  • New, high impact winter coat sprites from beestation.

Cimika, with thanks to NamelessFairy for additional patterns and AdipemDragon for the spray icon. updated:

  • Added the ability to dye your hair with gradients by using a hair dye spray.
  • The new Colorist quirk, allowing you to spawn with a hair dye spray.

Gamer025 updated:

  • The message for new duplicate keybinds should only appear once now
  • Resetting your keybinds to classic mode works correctly now
  • Hotkey mode is now actually used when new hotkeys with a default setting are added
  • You will no longer get a duplicate keybinding conflict message for new hotkeys with no default key, they will just be silently set to unbound

Ghilker updated:

  • fix temperature pump exploit that allows the users to go over 1e8 limiter. This is done by a power usage equation that become exponential upon reaching 3e7 and will eat through the room APC charge (so no makeshift power drain).

Krysonism updated:

  • The circuit multitool has a new sprite.

ModDownloading updated:

  • audio_cooldown, a var for coders to use in new emotes to add a cooldown for sounds when the emote is used voluntarily.
  • Clapping and laughing now have 5-second audio cooldowns.

NamelessFairy updated:

  • DeusVend's name is now consistent across both the vendor and restocking unit

SmArtKar updated:

  • Fixed wrong icons in Orion Trail general market event

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Added the Internal GPS, Direction, Health, Pull and Signal Combiner circuit components.
  • Added the Money Bot shell which can dispense and receive money and also added the ability to lock shells by scanning your ID over the circuit and then over the shell once inside the shell.
  • You can now rename integrated circuits so that they appear on the attached shell.
  • Restructured the circuit components folder to be more organised.

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • The text for the surrender emote is now grammatically consistent.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Additional information was added to the greyscale configuration menu in the form of tooltips.
  • You can now randomize the colors in the greyscale configuration menu.
  • The configuration that a layer is from is now displayed in the full version of the greyscale configuration menu.
  • The full version of the greyscale configuration menu now properly displays all layer steps again.

tralezab updated:

  • Sorted the traitor panel a bit.
  • anonymous names feature content
  • any reference to ai triumvirate as "tripAI" has been obliterated. use the right case next time, jagoff
  • Moved ai triumvirate off SSTicker
  • ai triumvirate is now a singleton datum controller
  • anonymous names has two new themes and some optional enabled theme features

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Ghosts can open NT CIMS (SM monitor) by clicking the Supermatter Crystal.
  • Removed the EER from the examine text

05 June 2021

Mothblocks updated:

  • Increased the minimum pop for heretics to 18 players.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Reaction chambers no longer drop beakers when deconstructed
  • Fixes split personality sometimes switching to other person upon death
  • Gun scopes no longer work if you don't have the gun in your hands

SmArtKar updated:

  • Coniine no longer makes you suffocate even after it leaves your system

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • dynamic will no longer spawn abductors if there aren't enough applicants for a proper 2-person abductor team

mozi_h updated:

  • Fixed a small icon inconsistency with the notice board.

peptron1 updated:

  • Ghosts can now find out how much power is in the network by examining cables

04 June 2021

GoldenAlpharex updated:

  • Custom outfits will now save their ID trim.

JJRcop updated:

  • Drone tools can no longer be inserted into an autolathe.

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Shaft Miners can now access Cargo on Tramstation

Mothblocks updated:

  • Controllers for circuits now use right-click instead of alt-right-click.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Attacking something as morph no longer floods your chat with "You're already in your normal form!"
  • Fixed banana juice having x2 chance of appearing in mystery soup
  • Fixes AI screen blur not disappearing after getting creampied

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • Local insurance providers have realized that they should advertise their services BEFORE the occurrence of the very accidents they are supposed to insure against.

03 June 2021

Mordent updated:

  • Split DnaConsole interface into separate files.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Removes random camera and railing in space near xenobio on metastation
  • Switchblades' blades now actually pop out like intended

SpaceDragon00 updated:

  • Large energy crossbow now sounds like an energy crossbow

carshalash updated:

  • Makes fish affordable to common workers.

dragomagol updated:

  • newly-resprited stools and barstools are now facing tables

zxaber updated:

  • AIs should no longer occasionally have their lawset randomly and silently returned to Asimov.

02 June 2021

FernandoJ8 updated:

  • RD's liver now has the TRAIT_ROYAL_METABOLISM trait.

ModDownloading updated:

  • You can be your own character in Mafia again. Don't worry plasmamen: you don't die from fire or lack of plasma in the mafia game, so you can be a funny purple skeleton in relative peace.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Heretic's reality phase ability is no longer affected by the bag of holding

dragomagol updated:

  • railings drop rods on deconstruction
  • connected the kilo medbay lobby apc to the grid

01 June 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Notice board now uses tgui.
  • Notice boards will now properly drop their contents upon destruction.

FlamingLily updated:

  • Surgery masks no longer block surgery.

Gamer025 updated:

  • Offering an item multiple times no longer causes runtimes
  • Chairs no longer runtime when being deconstructed

Inept updated:

  • Some new holidays have been added.

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Microwaves now use Right Click instead of Alt click to turn on.

Krysonism updated:

  • The desk, green and banana lamps have been resprited.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed dynamic latejoins.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fix oversight where Dynamic can assign antag datums to the minds of players who will be forcefully returned to the lobby.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Better greyscale support has been added to datum materials allowing objects to have more complex compositions of sprites. The golden cleric mace is extra shiny now.
  • Mime shoes no longer runtime when generating their icon. This may fix some graphical oddity or do nothing at all since they get colored pure white anyway.

rasepretep updated:

  • removed the piece of code that causes carpotoxin to qdel temporal scars (hopefully I identified it correctly)

31 May 2021

Gamer025 updated:

  • Fixed some incorrect uses of UnregisterSignal
  • Organs without owner no longer runtime

Maurukas updated:

  • adds a substantial number of fire alarms to Tramstation areas that had few/none
  • Fixed duplicate PunPun in Tramstation bar
  • Fixed duplicated chemistry locker embedded in the Tramstation HPLC machine
  • The Cryopod bays on Icebox, Metastation and Deltastation have been wired into the station's power grid

Melbert updated:

  • GAGS flowers (Rainbow bunch flowers now look prettier!)
  • Rainbow bunch flowers now use GAGS instead of their old method of greyscaling

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Screwdrivers no longer cause an error icon while in the belt

30 May 2021

Mickyan updated:

  • Smoking no longer spills spaghetti from your pockets
  • Lit cigarettes no longer keep falling off
  • Removed extra "the" from item knockdown messages

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Starlight condensation now heals you on glass tiles exposed to space, multi-z stations, lavaland, and unroofed structures correctly.

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Mime crayons don't make you multicolored when you eat them.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixes AND/OR gates not properly functioning because of null inputs.

norill updated:

  • Fixed not being able to add telecomms frequency filters
  • Changed the color of command frequency in telecomms and headset GUI from blue to yellow to match chat color

29 May 2021

antropod updated:

  • Fixed reagent multiplication exploit with 1u foam

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Some screwdriver inhand icons have been fixed to not show an error
  • Some prison jumpsuit inhand icons have been fixed to not show an error

28 May 2021

Fikou updated:

  • the borg disabler cooler only is in tech places if secborgs arent disabled

InsaneRed updated:

  • the extra vent on deltastations incinerator has been removed
  • Deltastations kitchen's privacy shutters work again
  • Thermomachines across all maps have now been properly linked to waste and will work properly now. Trit huffers rejoice
  • The SM pipe on metastation will no longer connect to waste and burn up the entire mix if your newly-chosen engineer friend accidently uses a grey pipe.
  • Box whiteship now has a proper thermomachine setup for its cryo.
  • Metastations xenobiology freezer is now properly connected.
  • Icebox Supermatter setup's thermomachines are no longer connected to the injector and should no longer empty all of waste.
  • Fixes up some randomly visible adaptors on metastation toxins and connects its freezer to waste.
  • Kilostation's toxin freezers are now connected properly.
  • Deltastation's supply freezer is now connected properly.
  • Metastation's supply freezer is now connected properly.
  • Tramstation's toxin freezers are now linked up to waste correctly
  • Icebox N2 to pure pipe is now named correctly
  • Fixed the duplicate piping infront of the n2 pipe on icebox

Maurukas updated:

  • Some debris leftover from extending Kilostation have been cleared

Melbert updated:

  • GAGS Lizard Plushes. Now, lizard plushes get a randomly generated lizard color when they're made.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Embeddable items like ninja stars can once again embed in people

Skoglol updated:

  • Powersinks now generate heat when absorbing energy, and are a lot easier to counter with the SM than before.
  • Organ damage messages are now only sent if you are conscious.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Blob camera no longer falls through zlevels.
  • Added an optimization to the input subsystem.

cacogen updated:

  • Human burgers can name themselves after their ingredient sources again

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Some duplicate pipes in kilo atmospherics have been fixed.
  • Various piping improvements in kilo atmospherics.

27 May 2021

BraveMole updated:

  • Jatum handles better non-assoc list

Mickyan updated:

  • you can knock cigarettes out of people's mouths again, hooray!
  • objects that can be knocked off now have a chance to fall whenever the wearer is knocked down
  • Prescription glasses can now be knocked off. Careful where you step, those things are fragile!
  • Broken prescription glasses can be repaired using cloth or a welding tool
  • Increased point cost of Nearsighted quirk from -1 to -4

PositiveEntropy, Twaticus, AdipemDragon updated:

  • Replaces the old stool sprites with new and improved ones made by Twaticus and AdipemDragon!
  • Ports new and improved Tau Ceti bookshelf sprites!

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed UIs like the cargo chatroom console and the genetics console not opening.

norill updated:

  • fixed check plumbing admin verb

26 May 2021

FlamingLily updated:

  • Muscled Veins is now correctly labelled as muscled veins, and not threaded veins.
  • Gastrectomy now correctly has a surgery failure message

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Removed the toggle intent selection style preference

Waltermeldron updated:

  • Adds Integrated Circuits back to science. Circuit Components can be printed off and placed onto these circuits. These circuits can be placed into shells that can be printed at the protolathe.

dragomagol updated:

  • door remotes now use balloon alerts instead of chat messages

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Certain objects that were migrated to a new greyscale system could no longer be colored via washing machine. This has been fixed.
  • You can select the config again in the greyscale debug menu with admin controls enabled
  • Canister leaks are more consistent rather than jittery, but slower.
  • Fixes the jumpskirt in hand icon displaying an error

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Fixed multiple piping mistakes in Delta, Meta, and Icebox.

25 May 2021

AnturK updated:

  • Explorer drone adventures are now stored in the db instead of config

Fikou updated:

  • ai upload now doesnt lag you as much

InsaneRed updated:

  • Converts most of the equipment on mechs into ballons

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • The Research Director's plasmaman envirosuit is now labelled as belonging to the Research Director rather than the Chief Engineer.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes being unable to feed chickens for eggs

Mothblocks updated:

  • From June 23rd to June 29th, celebrates pride week w/ rainbow floor tiles.

SgtHunk updated:

  • Slaughter demons now slam their targets with right-click rather than with ctrl+shift+click.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed being able to noogie harm people as a pacifist.
  • Fixed borgs dropping their equipment when cryo'd.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Fixes the pda alert using the wrong overlay and displaying an error state
  • Water vapor can be purchased instead of shipping an empty crate
  • The express console can purchase gas canisters again
  • Gas canisters come in a large crate again

norill updated:

  • fixed backpack firefighter tank nozzle refilling not working in extinguisher mode
  • Made the action of holding firelocks open by left clicking with a crowbar less confusing by adding balloon messages describing what is happening. Changed the firelock examine text to explain that right-click opens it permanently and left-click opens it temporarily

24 May 2021

PositiveEntropy updated:

  • The cyborg toolset is now all new and improved, with a new coat of paint!

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Attacking someone with a blood filter now uses the correct verb conjugation
  • Lockers can now only be unlocked if you're next to them.

SpaceDragon00 updated:

  • Inspecting a weapon shows a warning label. By default, this shows force, throwforce, armour_penetration, and block_chance in an esoteric manner. Inspecting ammo gives information on the shot it produces, inspecting ballistic weapons lets you know their caliber, and inspecting energy weapons gives you their modes and the damage of those modes
  • Using credits on a PDA, Laptop, or Tablet now inserts the credits into the contained ID card, if there is one

alexkar598 updated:

  • Removed a proc thats used nowhere and implemented nowhere

maxymax13 updated:

  • Departmental security officer ID cards show their department on the non-department access color bar, like Lawyers or Psychologists
  • The color on the assistant trim's bar has been returned from previous ID card models.
  • The rainbow ID card has been resprited.
  • The flames ID card has been slightly improved.

tralezab updated:

  • tamable component + egg layer component, animal variety element

23 May 2021

FlamingLily updated:

  • Cleanup of surgery and organ code

InsaneRed updated:

  • Delta station toxins has been cleaned up to remove excess piping
  • The delta station toxin thermomachines are now properly linked to waste and the chamber vents should no longer connect to the output pipes.
  • The secret documents on tram is now inside the cabinet and not the safe

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed another source to the bug preventing reconnect.

tralezab updated:

  • Hop has a trapdoor

vincentiusvin updated:

  • atmospherics dept on delta, icebox, and meta got cleaned up. Pipes and pumps near the tanks got switched. Incinerator on box rerouted. Delta waste release added.
  • Removed instances of duplicated pipes in icebox atmos.

22 May 2021

Fikou updated:

  • examining the altar of gods as ghost shows you some info about the religion

GoldenAlpharex updated:

  • Minebots now drop their ores on death, they no longer bring them with themselves in the grave.
  • less "minebot armor upgrade already has reinforced armor!"
  • Minebot upgrades now tell the user when they've been successfully applied.

Kylerace updated:

  • ai detectors now change appearance when ai's come closer
  • after dying multiple times in ctf a salty centcom commander removed the ability to spawncamp

Mickyan updated:

  • Bombproof containers should once again protect their contents from being damaged by explosions

vincentiusvin updated:

  • The thermal regulator setting on thermomachines is now implicit. Alt-click interaction now reset to 20 celcius.
  • Thermomachines directly mention their heat capacity on examinations.
  • Changing thermomachine direction should be snappier.
  • Thermomachine should now display it's cooling efficiency variable.
  • Freezers should be able to hit the target temperature without hovering above it like it used to on mixes with less heat capacity. Motor heat doubled and only affects the heat reservoir side. 5 Kelvin wiggle room for motor heat from previous' 1.5.
  • Thermomachines can't pump gases into the reservoir port anymore.

21 May 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Modular Computers equip with the new integrated radio card chip can now be used as a remote signaler. Science comes equip with one.
  • Modular computer Hardware code has been documented properly.

Celotajs, stylemistake updated:

  • Almost all alert calls have been replaced with its tgui alternative, tgui_alert

FlamingLily updated:

  • Unscrewing the shell of a cybernetic now correctly checks for sharp objects when done ghetto-style

Greniza updated:

  • new sprites and flavor for the chocolate and berry cake
  • adds better descriptions to nanite programs
  • makes sensor description syntax consistently "receives a signal" (rather than "sends" or similar)

InsaneRed updated:

  • Removes the extra blast door from metastation's transit tube
  • Delta turbine has been cleaned up and changed to look easier on the eyes and give more space for atmosians to work with also adding a thermomachine for faster setup times!

JJRcop updated:

  • Maintenance Drones were moved to the Control Interfaces category.

Kangarad updated:

  • Smokers may now enjoy the higher quality in Supply to quench theyr addiction.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Dynamic rulesets now always show in the force ruleset panel.
  • Dynamic rulesets now properly sort in the force ruleset panel.
  • Changing a reagent container's transfer amount will now give you feedback in the form of text on the container itself.

Pepsiman0 updated:

  • the cakehats lost their rogue pixels

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Maintenance sections of AI satellites are now actually radiation storm proof

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Quirks sort into med records properly again

SgtHunk updated:

  • Icebox - Security Office now has the intended cargochat console.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Malfunctioning AIs no longer spawn shiftstart alongside other AIs unless multiple AI spawns are intended.

dragomagol updated:

  • the build mode copy button now has text

mGuv updated:

  • fixed issue where plumbing Reaction Chambers get stuck on "Filling"

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Greyscale items using GAGS in vending machines can have their colors chosen before vending. Not many things are capable of this yet but expect more to come.

tralezab updated:

  • Curators now start with a modular console with a preinstalled app for printing canvases

20 May 2021

InsaneRed updated:

  • Syndicate Saboteur borgs now properly come with a analyzer installed
  • Syndicate Medical borgs no longer have an emag
  • Syndicate Saboteur borgs now come with an emag.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Things like microwaves will no longer have their sound stack

dragomagol updated:

  • sentience fun balloons now work consistently again!

19 May 2021

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • The Quartermaster can now send announcements via the Requests console in their office.

Kylerace updated:

  • double rat kebabs are now double the reagents of single rat kebabs
  • rat kebabs no longer drop the metal rods when eaten unlike other kebabs to maintain lore consistency

18 May 2021

Kylerace updated:

  • i dont have the energy for a witty in-universe changelog so airhorns can honk again
  • Recyclers dont vore themselves the moment the world is created anymore.

Mothblocks updated:

  • tgui tooltips have been moved to a new system that keeps them within bounds of the screen.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Being buckled to a wheelchair no longer prevents you from using dermal button nanites, cult chat, and more.

SgtHunk updated:
