  • The Tramstation security checkpoints now have cells for easy brigging on the go.

17 May 2021

Anonymous updated:

  • You can now change emoji set with just a define. See `__DEFINES/misc.dm`.

SgtHunk updated:

  • You can now unlock/lock secure lockers with Right click rather than using Alt+click.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Cryopods can no longer be used to round remove other SSD players.
  • Cryopods no longer delete traitor objectives under certain edge cases, and can no longer be used to metagame the existence of traitors with steal objectives.
  • Cryopods now vomit out all the items of players who get vored by them, like beautiful loot pinatas.

itseasytosee updated:

  • changeling spacesuits no longer come with a battery hud

16 May 2021

Clyde-Thunderpants updated:

  • New trait, web weaver, that allow you to weave webs into cloth.
  • The genetics webbing mutation now gives you web weaver

Greniza updated:

  • moved the alkaline input of reaction chamber to fourth layer

Mothblocks updated:

  • Singularities can no longer consume themselves.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Dead and incapacitated people can no longer offer items

Timberpoes updated:

  • You can once again no longer roll multiple antags at once or antags you have disabled in your prefs.
  • Traitors and malf AIs no longer get 1 more objective than intended.

Time-Green updated:

  • geysers are now ACTUALLY plungerable

maxymax13 updated:

  • Did you know? "Vendomat" is just the name for the base vendor path. The assembly parts vendor you probably know as "Vendomat" has been given its unique own sprite and name to reduce confusion. Shop at a Part-Mart at your local Primary Tool Storage today!
  • Custom vendors now have a new sprite, with a fancy LCD!
  • Jesus-endorsed custom vendors now have a fancy UNIQUE golden sprite, rather than being a robotics vendor made out of cheese!

tralezab updated:

  • fixes span in filterrific.dm
  • simple_flying now removes itself from a mob when the mob deletes

15 May 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Beepsky smash's stamina healing and non-beepsky-related hallucinatory effects are now applied to people WITH sec-affiliated livers instead of to people WITHOUT sec-affiliated livers, restoring its previous, intended functionality.

Fikou updated:

  • ambience subsystem no longer plays to people in lobby

GoldenAlpharex updated:

  • You no longer get on the object layer when you're riding someone's back, and your layer now gets successfully reset upon unbuckling.
  • The layer difference between the person at the front and at the back (layer-wise) during a piggyback ride isn't abysmal anymore.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • The atmospherics hardsuit description was changed to better inform that it has less radiation protection than the engineering ones.

InsaneRed updated:

  • Plasmamen paramedics now start with nitrile gloves

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Security Revolutionaries will no longer become Enemies of the Revolution upon a Revolution victory.

Kylerace updated:

  • singularities will no longer eat themselves, among other things
  • After a series of thorough exorcisms, Nanotrasen would like to assure Space Station 13 that ghosts both do not exist and if they did exist can no longer affect the material plane by spamming the fuck out of squeaky noises from bananium floors

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Footsteps will no longer stack

cacogen updated:

  • Tells you a melee attack or projectile hit an object (e.g. airlock, reinforced window) without leaving a mark if it did no damage

tralezab updated:

  • rpgloot, embedopocalypse, and stickapocalypse are now datum singletons
  • THAT USE SIGNALS!
  • RPGLoot now has the curse of hunger as a bad modifier. A very bad one!
  • Duffelbag curse is now a component, attachable to any item.

14 May 2021

Fikou, PestoVerde322 updated:

  • New Altar of Gods sprites

InsaneRed updated:

  • Metastation transit tube now properly has lockdown blastdoors
  • Hopline shutters and queue shutters can now only be controlled by people with proper access and not the entire service department

Pepsiman0 updated:

  • most of the icebox maint was reworked. 3 new ladders leading to new small areas have been added around the maints, providing more ways to come back to the station from the zlevel below it. The other non maint areas that have been touched are the vacant office and the engi hallway.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • DNA activators that failed no longer give chromosomes.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Hauberoaches will no longer spam messages about trying to squish themselves every time they move

SgtHunk updated:

  • Fixed trashbags being able to be equipped on janitor wintercoats.

TaeruAlethea updated:

  • fixed cyborgs using the carbon's offset on scooters and skateboards.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Malf AI and Traitor are now unique antags with a dedicated dynamic ruleset for rolling them and different entries on the traitor panel. The roundstart traitor ruleset can no longer roll malf AIs, which is what the malf AI ruleset does in its place.
  • Geneticists finally join their fellow members of science in being unable to get the download research notes objective.

Twaticus updated:

  • New corner variants for the textured and smooth tiles
  • New normal, white and dark tile variants
  • New dark corner decal

ninjanomnom updated:

  • The woke plushie seems to have fallen asleep at some point. They've been shaken awake once more.

tralezab updated:

  • fixes udders not performing some things they should!

13 May 2021

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • You can no longer transformation sting people into Skeletons.

Pepsiman0 updated:

  • The electrolite was completely removed from the game, the electrolyzer now needs manipulators instead of the electrolites.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Adds mail to the in-game message of items that can't be sent on the supply shuttle.
  • Adds code improvements done to the cargo console to the modular computer cargo program as well.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Now you need enriched liquid electricity to grow a vatbeast

coiax updated:

  • Blazing Oil blobs can now be damaged by sprayed water from fire extinguishers, as intended.

tralezab updated:

  • CONTRIBUTING.md's example on static overlays passes integration tests now

12 May 2021

Inept, Fikou updated:

  • Nanotrasen has seen it fit to officially commemorate the commission date of its various stations- look for the commission plaques on each station today!

antropod updated:

  • fixed "remove" button in reaction chamber gui

11 May 2021

JJRcop updated:

  • Default Drone hours without config set reduced from 40 to 14. Please set DRONE_ROLE_PLAYTIME to 40 if you wish to retain old behavior.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Proximity checkers, used in the peacekeeper borg module, will now properly destroy.

tralezab updated:

  • Fixes processing items 🐀

10 May 2021

Melbert updated:

  • You no longer eat all botany plants plants in 1 bite. Apples and Potatos retain their unique 1 bite behavior.
  • Botany plants use a new formula for calculating bite size. All botany plants have had their bite modifier adjusted to match.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Changeling stings once again require you to be within range of your target and have a direct path from you to the target

Time-Green updated:

  • you can now map infinitely huge plumbing networks

Twaticus, Imaginos16 updated:

  • Resprites (almost) all base floor tiles.
  • Ports smooth tiles & textured versions of grey, black, and white tiles.
  • Dance floor item icons are no longer massive.

dragomagol updated:

  • blood filters no longer tell everyone that the listener's blood is being filtered

norill updated:

  • changed name and description of surgery room disposals to inform that they are connected to the morgue
  • made door remote work by clicking on the floor under an airlock too

tralezab updated:

  • Udders are now a component, all of it!
  • Fantasy Prefix for poisoned weapons
  • Many things that would trigger on attacking someone even if you didn't successfully land a hit now only trigger when you do
  • Poisonous is an element, no more terrible pathing /poison/ woop woop

09 May 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • On Sundays and given mail holidays, mail will not arrive on station.
  • Documented code in the holidays file.

BootlegBow updated:

  • flypeople no longer dislike moffins

Celotajs, ike709 updated:

  • ike709's code improvements from BeeStation have been ported.

InsaneRed updated:

  • Properly fixes the stray extuingisher cabinet in deltastation.
  • Fixes the lack of ai cameras in drone rooms on tram and metastation.

JJRcop, ninjanomnom updated:

  • Instead of a machinery whitelist, Drones cannot interact with machines which were touched by a being in the past 5 minutes.
  • Drones have a new machinery blacklist which currently contains the Air Alarm, and most Computers. The CE can disable this on their PDA.
  • Drones aren't blocked by simple robots anymore. (Cleanbot, Floorbot, etc)
  • Drones can now use chisels, and construct APCs, newscasters, lights, and other things placed on walls.
  • Drones now respect USE_EXP_RESTRICTIONS_ADMIN_BYPASS

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Blood cult's blood beam no longer sticks to your hand, and now fires!
  • Blood cultists can no longer walk out of a blood beam to avoid being stunned.

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Social Anxiety is more immersive
  • made social anxiety more tied to speaking, along with more affect from sanity, mood, and nearby people

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Tend Wounds and Debride Infected Flesh surgeries now tell the surgeon roughly how many more repetitions are left before the patient is fully treated.
  • Having a health analyzer in your offhand during Tend Wounds will give you precise updates on how much damage is left after each step.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Rewrite the way we handle which roles get assigned with playtime tracking.
  • Players who get MMI'd and put into borgs or AIs mid-shift now gain job playtime tracking towards Silicon roles instead.
  • Purchasing classic or mjolnir loadouts as the wizard will no longer crash the server.

YakumoChen updated:

  • Fixes magic shoes and gives them a magical twinkling star decal.

dragomagol updated:

  • a new TGUI interface for sentience fun balloons
  • added a pop_sound_effect variable to customize sentience fun balloons
  • moved the arena shuttle's area and effects to shuttles.dm

ishitbyabullet updated:

  • The lavaland xeno nest is still fixed.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • New station trait where Pun Pun starts angry, armed, and ready for a fight.

tralezab updated:

  • SStramprocess only fires on maps with trams actually present on the map

08 May 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Felinids are disgusted by raw and gross foods again.

Celotajs updated:

  • Fixed PDA overlays for GAGS PDAs

EOBGames updated:

  • Removed the gamer cube in Delta cargo.

Fikou updated:

  • moves sdql spell from debug tab to vv dropdown

Greniza updated:

  • Made the PDA painter be able to paint PDAs into standard PDAs.
  • Made the PDA painter able to paint PDAs again after 58844 did not update the painter.

Kylerace updated:

  • tram is marginally faster

Time-Green updated:

  • Miners can now discover geysers with their mining scanner for a point reward! This will discover their type and mark that geyser (with type) on the GPS system.
  • removes the ClF3 geysers
  • Adds a very rare strange geyser that has a random reagent (maintpill/strange seed style)
  • Geysers can now be activated with normal, cheap plungers

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Messages related to becoming and ceasing to be a heretic monster are now more noticeable.

tralezab updated:

  • is_flying_animal var is now an element!
  • pet bonuses are now an element
  • Added fantasy affixes to the VV dropdown for items!

07 May 2021

Celotajs updated:

  • GAGS-generated clothing can now have proper blood splatters and damage

Fikou updated:

  • centers hydroponic sprays, adds new sprites for plant-b-gone

Greniza updated:

  • New candle animations
  • New animations for altar candles

InsaneRed updated:

  • Icebox incinerator input will now connect correctly to the injector instead of the waste system
  • Fixes tramstation incinerator mix input and scrubber not getting properly connected and some random layer adapters being visible inside walls.

MMMiracles updated:

  • Tramstation now has several new cameras to help the AI look over the map.
  • Tramstation now has a public lavaland dock beside the Research wing.
  • Tramstation paramedics now have Cargo access.

Maurukas updated:

  • spammable logging in chem grenades

Owai-Seek updated:

  • BBQ Sauce can now be ordered in the kitchen console.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Syndicate uplink types can now be changed again
  • Radio uplink frequencies are now random again

SparkezelPL updated:

  • Single tank bombs no longer just delete themselves

manofpepsi updated:

  • The old delta maint is back! (with minor changes), the delta warehouse is now split into two for the drone bay.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Prevents guns that can misfire reaching 100% probability.

norill updated:

  • fixed buggy organ fridges repair rate
  • fixed upgraded organ fridges not repairing organs

prodirus updated:

  • The cursed slot machine sprite in the Greed lavaland ruin is now slightly less cursed.

tralezab updated:

  • dogs now resist before fetching or harassing, to unbuckle from stuff if they need to

06 May 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Cloth golems and podpeople can now strip people again.
  • Bananium golems are considered to be advanced tool users again.
  • Killer tomatoes no longer require the liquid contents trait to have a chance to self-animate when picked up without proper protection.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Exploration Drone's scanning dishes have less SOUL and more STYLE.

Celotajs updated:

  • You can now see in game preferences that the implant uplink takes 4 TC from you.
  • The license details in the TGUI changelog are now correct.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Td should spike slightly less, assuming harddels actually go down
  • You feel a great disturbance in the force, mob code has changed. Please report any odd targeting behavior on the issue tracker
  • h2o jetpacks will no longer leave trails of water in space

Seris02 updated:

  • many of the toggle preferences in preferences_toggles.dm going into the unsorted chat log
  • many of the role greetings from sending to the wrong chat filters/ to unsorted
  • miscellaneous other strings getting sent to the unsorted chat filter

mandosegua updated:

  • Swarmers are no longer able to eat the shuttle engines and make hull breaches in their place.

tralezab updated:

  • Cargo requests can now be discussed over #cargobus!

05 May 2021

Celotajs updated:

  • PDA icons are now generated with GAGS

Fikou updated:

  • fixed fake chasms not dropping floortiles
  • fixed borgs having their floor tiles deleted when reskinning

MadMedicineMan updated:

  • Renamed Outpost Medical on Cams

Urumasi updated:

  • Lawyers can now object by slamming the table.
  • Table slamming is now handled using signals.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Monkeys are once again capable of using guns, take back your freedom!
  • Monkey ai is now actually able to make use of guns instead of just player controlled monkeys.
  • Monkey ai will prioritize guns once they learn of what guns can do.
  • Monkey ai now understands the ancient art of throwing.
  • Monkey ai will use random objects on each other in their surroundings and in their hands.
  • Monkey ai will occasionally "gift" people things.
  • Monkey ai consumes food once in a while according to their desire.

04 May 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • An unused variable in the code for sticky tape has been removed.

Celotajs updated:

  • Moved Give SDQL Spell to Debug tab

Fikou updated:

  • chief engis and captains gloves are now not flammable

InsaneRed updated:

  • fixes the missing blast door on delta stations perma prison.

JJRcop updated:

  • The reagent gun, aka the Reagent Dartgun, has has its capacity reduced to 90, or exactly 6 shots. Down from 100, or 6.6 shots.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixed hitting a canister not cause it to leak until it's interacted with in some other wa

Maurukas updated:

  • Adds PunPun to Tramstation Bar

SpaceDragon00 updated:

  • Corrects sing/sings to singe/singes

Thunder12345 updated:

  • The engineering circuitboards are now yellow instead of orange.

YakumoChen updated:

  • Pierced Reality and Singulo toys drop on the center of tiles again, for realism.

Yenwodyah updated:

  • The supermatter sliver sprite shows up above the supermatter crystal sprite again

cacogen updated:

  • RCD repairs grilles when adding windows
  • If a grille's tile has unanchored items on it, adding a window will fail
  • Attempting to add a window to a grille with unanchored items on the tile will move 20 of them to your tile

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Gases with visuals can now be seen inside canisters

tralezab updated:

  • you can no longer copy honorbound, burdened, wizard mutations, other heinous shit

03 May 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Shattering a heretic blade as a heretic or a heretic monster to teleport a random, mostly safe location is now done by activating the blade in-hand instead of by pressing an action button. This information will be given to a heretic or a heretic monster if they examine a heretic blade.
  • Teleporting using a heretic blade now plays a glass shattering noise and produces a slightly different message (that factors in whether or not the teleportation attempt was successful).
  • Teleporting using a heretic blade is now considered to be a magical teleportation method by the game.

cacogen updated:

  • RPD can destroy broken disposal pipes
  • Securing a disposal pipe over a broken disposal pipe will delete it
  • Securing a disposal pipe over a floor tile with a crowbar in your offhand will remove the floor tile before trying to secure it

necromanceranne updated:

  • Changes the CE Insulated gloves sprite into a unique appearance, and not just infiltrator gloves but blood orange.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • You can repair canisters now by left clicking with an active welder. Deconstruction, which previously took this slot, has been moved to right click instead.

tf-4 updated:

  • PDAs will no longer flash at you over messages that you've already read

02 May 2021

Celotajs updated:

  • Chameleon sneakers and jumpsuits now work correctly
  • The roulette TGUI now looks a bit better

Fikou, TWATICUS updated:

  • You can now reskin a lot more tiles! Use iron, bronze, pod, carpet or plastitanium tiles inhand to change their sprites.

Iamgoofball updated:

  • potentially reduces overlay impact on SendMaps

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes some atmos senstivity stuff, it'll work more consistently now

Mothblocks updated:

  • Preferences are no longer dependent on gender.

maxymax13 updated:

  • Pun Pun can no longer ruin all the tile alligments of the plants in the bar, as plants no longer get offset when dropped.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • The greyscale debug menu now has improved functionality involving dirs and changing config types.

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • Adds cryopod areas to every in-rotation map. Expect to find them in dorms or recreation areas.

tf-4 updated:

  • Tram medbay storage is now wired to the grid at round start.

01 May 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • The shivering symptom has been renamed to be the "chills" symptom, per Cobby's request.
  • The shivering/chills symptom now actually chills you like it says it does instead of heating you up. fix Safe chills and safe fever should now use an infectee's species's body temperature's actual cold and heat damage thresholds, instead of just using the default ones.
  • Maxed out, unsafe chills and maxed out, unsafe fevers can now make you slightly colder or hotter than they could before, respectively.

Arkatos updated:

  • Space carps now use a new greyscaling system.
  • Fixed an issue where space carps turned grey for a moment when attacking something.
  • Light purple space carp variant is now more close to the original. Nostalgia!
  • Replaced beige space carp variant with a light red one.

KathyRyals updated:

  • Thermal is now an active mutation, that has a cooldown and deals damage to your eyes.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Prayers will show a little book next to them again

LemonInTheDark, duncathan updated:

  • Gas reactions should be cheaper in the standard case
  • Moves canisters, pipelines, and tanks to event based processing, if you see something fail to "update" when it really should let me know yeah?

Mothblocks updated:

  • Midround events will now properly poll again.

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • Anomaly research can now be researched again.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can no longer shoot yourself in the foot with gunboots

Yakumochen updated:

  • Removes nanochips from infiltrator gloves. Makes them more tacticool.

itseastosee updated:

  • The unknown narrator now properly talks in second person

maxymax13, /vg/station, Citadel Station updated:

  • 3 new variations for wooden tiles are available (large, parquet, and tiled), the same way you color titanium tiles! Remember, use a screwdriver and not a crowbar!
  • A new red planetary pattern design is available for arcade carpet!

unit0016 updated:

  • Cargo Shuttle consoles now rely a lot more on variables instead of hardcoding.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • The hotkey for dumping borg apparatus is now moved to Alt+Click instead of the nonfunctional Alt+Z. Right click for beaker apparatus spills reagent, just like with regular beakers. Z and self attack keeps the old interaction, it changes transfer volume.

30 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Some foods from sandwiches to donk pockets to candies and snowcones can now be eaten while walking.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Some hidden debug content got some new sprites, should you ever find it.

Celotajs updated:

  • The changelog re-request delay has been heavily reduced
  • Changelogs from r4407 (April 2010) and earlier have been removed, and a link to the GoonStation 13 wiki page for the old changelogs has been added to the footer in the changelog popup. This means we finally won't claim GoonStation13's changes as our own.

Foxtrot (Funce) updated:

  • Changelog no longer runtimes when it force opens on join.

Helianthus00 updated:

  • MetaStation now has some plumbing water tanks scattered around in high-demand areas for water
  • MetaStation chem lab now has two empty plumbing storage tanks

Imaginos16 updated:

  • Nanotrasen, after receiving many complaints, removed the flash that used to sit at the entrance of the science department.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • the Total Hard Deletes section of garbage logging is now separated by a :, in the same format as all the other qdel log items. Be made aware

OmegaDarkPotato updated:

  • Multiplies corazargh's metabolization by 100x so it's no longer hilariously overpowered and only slightly overpowered now. No more 4u deathmixes.

cacogen updated:

  • Universal holidays will cover every timezone by default. This means they'll start 14 hours earlier and last 26 hours longer
  • Shortens Christmas, Halloween, April Fool's Day, New Year's and Valentine's Day periods by one day. They will start 14 hours earlier but only last 2 hours longer
  • US Independence Day, ANZAC Day, Bastille Day and Waitangi Day will begin and end when they do in the countries that celebrate them

itseasytosee updated:

  • The hallucination virus symptom has had its stats buffed, check the wiki if you are interested.

29 April 2021

Balky Goat updated:

  • Removed unused sprites in robots.dmi.

ORCACommander updated:

  • Anesthetic Tank holders will now always render when loaded with an anesthetic tank and upon round load.

PositiveEntropy updated:

  • Holding a chemistry/science plumbing device and a Rapid Service Fabricator now displays actual in-hand icons for them!

RandomGamer123 updated:

  • The sheetifier now accepts photos containing hauntium.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Disco's Dead, Baby- and by that I mean, the Shuttle Catastrophe random event will no longer select Disco Inferno every single time it triggers (or selecting it at all, in fact, as it was before)
  • Wizard shielded hardsuit recharge runes are now properly consumed upon use

SgtHunk updated:

  • Silverscale pirates can now access their turrets.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Fixes lithium glitching you out of mechs, and more!
  • Fixes building things on top of objects that shouldn't be built upon.

Twaticus, maxymax13 updated:

  • Resprites x-large & metamaterial beaker. Normal beaker & reagent color sprite tweaks. Adds 1u reagent sprites back to beakers.

Urumasi updated:

  • You can copy other people's wigs with a wig.

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • There is now a menu that allows admins to give players spells that execute SDQL queries. New users of this menu should study it and its tooltips to figure out how to make the most of it.

tralezab updated:

  • No more crystal invasion event
  • reagent transferring now logs purity
  • removed delta roundstart power tools, the room no longer made sense being what it was without that so i turned it into a smoking room style.

28 April 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Due to a stabilization in mail uncertainty, crew should see SIGNIFIGANTLY less mail per minute arriving in cargo.
  • Close Examine text has been added to letters to inform players they can be used with destination taggers.

Ghilker updated:

  • HFR has more interactions with different gases, meltdown slighly more dangerous
  • damage is now calculated using cooling temperature to make it easier to control

Pepsiman0 updated:

  • fixed the ce gloves having no mob icons

SyncMercy updated:

  • Ice Box Station Telecommunication APC shouldn't drain so much at roundstart anymore

Urumasi updated:

  • The Kelvin scale is no longer regarded in degrees
  • Gas canisters now sell for the correct value.

Xen updated:

  • Blind people no longer get hallucinations from supermatter crystals.
  • Refactored the code responsible for supermatter causing hallucinations and psychologists calming the supermatter crystal.

carshalash, Sprites borrowed/stolen from Aurora's Synnono updated:

  • Risotto is now a cookable recipe in the misc category.

tralezab updated:

  • Fixes misc js and py issues in the codebase (TGUI, CBT, mapmerge) (closes every issue made by ZeWaka, bye felicia)

zxaber updated:

  • Mechs can move in space if near a wall again.
  • Mech thrusters no longer incorrectly fail if the mech is near a wall.

27 April 2021

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • The SWAT helmet is now consistent between its front, side and back sprites for coloration.

Celotajs updated:

  • Converted the changelog popup to TGUI

Fikou updated:

  • fixes transformation code runtiming (maybe fixes monkey fever???)
  • screwdrivers no longer randomize their pixel_y on initialize
  • fixes stuff made with bronze sheets deconstructing into tiles or not being able to make bronze golems
  • Build Mode Update!
  • You can now choose any from the eight dirs, not just cardinals and northwest.
  • Decals are now supported by build mode! This means that they can have any dir you want instead of always being south.
  • Areas are now filled in by default, you can still paint them manually with altclick.

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed exploit of thermomachines going over fusion temperatures and breaking atmos with INF temperature. the machine now has safeties to not go over 500000 on the red port, with safeties off it can go over but it has a chance of explosion (safeties can only be disabled after emag or EMP)
  • fix exploit where H/E pipes on walls could cool indefinitely, now the walls will melt when reaching a certain temperature
  • improved datum_pipeline.dm proc's temperature_interact code
  • allows ventcrawling between zlevels by using the multiz adapters and using the actions move_upwards and move_downwards

Ghilker, @tralezab updated:

  • smart pipes connection toggle on the RPD menu, when the connection is active (in green) the pipe is allowed to find connection in that direction
  • T-Ray goggles new mode that allows you to see an overlay of the available connections.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Blue sneakers (Paramedic) will protect you from diseases in blood pools as much as the white ones everyone else at medbay uses.
  • RD doesn't have 1 uniform to rule them all! All of their uniforms have the same armor values now like uniform variants from other jobs.
  • Jellypeople/Slimepeople can eat slime based food without getting disgusted.

InsaneRed updated:

  • fixes the misplaced fire extuingisher in the quiet room of delta.
  • fixes the pen cage lockdown buttons in xenobiology not working properly on metastation

JJRcop updated:

  • Admins get a new Show Hiddenprints drop-down option in View Variables. This allows them to easily view a log of who touched something.

Owai-Seek updated:

  • Enchiladas, Meat Buns, Hotdogs, Melon Bowls, and Oatmeal, are now recategorized. Also, Enchiladas are now tagged as GRAIN

Spookuni updated:

  • Changeling eggs should no longer take the better part of an hour to hatch from dead bodies.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Fixes service borg drinking glass duplicating reagents that it shouldn't.
  • Simplemobs can no longer use right-click verbs that they shouldn't be able to use.
  • Stops bottles from spawning in walls when the hangover station trait is in effect.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • The explosive compressor and blastcannon now actually use the bombs they are given. Both have experienced slight changes to their response times as a result.
  • The explosion severity definitions are now the right way round.
  • Most explosions now use named arguments and occur at the exploding object instead of its turf.
  • Emissive overlays and blockers now use BYONDs native image layering.

Urumasi updated:

  • Fixed an infinite RCD material exploit
  • Mindbreaker toxin will now completely suppress your Reality Dissociation Syndrome.

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • You can now change the name of your chaplain bible in the Setup Character menu. If left as its default value of "Default Bible Name", your bible will use the old naming scheme.

cacogen updated:

  • Clarifies the keybinding conflict message (the new bindings are the ones being unbound) and makes the heading less alarmist

itseasytosee updated:

  • Ethereals will no longer crystallize after being eaten.

tralezab updated:

  • fixes heretics being given an incorrect spell path, leading to heretic being given "spell" spells
  • Fixes Chameleon Projector Dummies escaping containers
  • simple animals with no attack no longer self nuzzle
  • eye and ear protection now consider blindness and deafness
  • Feedback for mutations deactivating from losing limbs
  • IAA now properly removes martyrdom when you reinstate escape objectives
  • sanity and addiction processes freeze after death
  • you can no longer skittish dive into supplypods
  • Fixes not losing burden with mutation loss
  • Borgs can once again be chainstunned
  • Issues with Reaction Chamber tgui buttons being out of reach are gone
  • Refactors Reaction Chamber Code (jesus christ it was so bad)
  • now mail doesn't get sent to... BAD recipients.
  • fixes incorrect unwrapping message (bad usage of a visible message)
  • mail recipients wasn't shuffling either. I'm fairly certain this was leading to some people always getting mail and some never getting it.

26 April 2021

ArcaneMusic, Jaw-sh, Tralezab updated:

  • The mail system from Kiwistation has been ported.
  • Cargo will gradually recieve mail crates over time, which contains letters and packages to and for the crew. Cargo should make an attempt to deliver people's mail.
  • The International Spess Mail Legion has finally convinced the universe of the evils of mail fraud.

Celotajs updated:

  • Jumpsuits, jumpskirts and sneakers are now generated using GAGS

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed a bug where the latejoin injection timer would not reset, meaning past a certain point anyone who joined would get antag, draining all the threat.
  • One-click antagonist has been removed. Consider executing midround rulesets or using the traitor panel instead.
  • Calling an ERT is now its own verb.
  • The N.E.R.D. has been moved to secrets.

Unoki updated:

  • Added new syringe sprites (Normal,Piercing and BlueSpace.)

tralezab updated:

  • Fixes mail multiplying in a hellish race to Avogadro's number

25 April 2021

Celotajs updated:

  • Computers now have a proper way of not having keyboards instead of an empty sprite

JJRcop updated:

  • Maintenance Drone playtime is now tracked.

Melbert updated:

  • Clothing such as glasses will now appear over light variant lizard snouts properly instead of cutting into it.

Moose1002 updated:

  • Dogs no longer respond to commands when dead.

Pepsiman0 updated:

  • Aft Cntral Primary Hallway is now Aft Central Primary Hallway

RaveRadbury updated:

  • added a unique message to trying to speak with a vow of silence

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Fixed a discount related, Syndicate uplink exploit.

cacogen updated:

  • The flash now has in-hand sprites for when the bulb is blown and the name and description update to reflect it too

tralezab updated:

  • heretic code is better! Half of it.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • fixed crystallizer locking up when the input port is devoid of proper gases.
  • fixed crystallizer conducting heat with the heat loop only on reactions. It should conduct at all times now.

24 April 2021

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • The Comet hairstyle now actually looks tolerable. It also isnt misaligned anymore. Sorry for that blunder.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Leeching walk now provides stun resistance when on rust
  • Rust ascension now gives a lot of immunities when on rust

FernandoJ8 updated:

  • Ordered all things not in numerical order by alphabetical order in the DNA.dm file
  • Adds the missing #define statement for the Autonomy mutation in the DNA.dm file

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Fixed the speed on the Pimpin' Ride.

InsaneRed updated:

  • Fixes the 2 missing rwindows in metastation atmos

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Research done from the Science Hub tablet app will now show up on the RD Server controller.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Examining a human should be less stuttery
  • Examining a window will show the "cannon" window rather then a half cut off thing

Melbert updated:

  • Deathnettles, Novaflowers, and similar plants now require botanical leather gloves (or biosuits/hardsuits) to hold and use instead of any pair of gloves. Additionally, Novaflowers now deal their force to their wielder instead of 5 flat damage.
  • Bluespace Tomatos and Killer Tomatos now require botanical gloves to hold and use safely, and can backfire on you if you aren't wearing them.
  • Podpeople are naturally immune to plants harming them or backfiring on use.
  • Corrected the typepath of Plasmaman botanical gloves.
  • Improves/modernizes nettle and novaflower code a bit.
  • The stabilized light pink extract now makes you a pacifist while active.

Niknakflak updated:

  • Silicons can now slowclap by doing *slowclap

Owai-Seek updated:

  • Mexican Foods now have a food tab of their own. Egg Wraps and Scotch Eggs are now under Egg tab.
  • Burritos should have the proper food tags now. Egg Wraps have had their GRAIN tag removed.

SparkezelPL updated:

  • Meta Tcomms are easier to access

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Fixed xeno nests not properly restricting interaction.
  • You can repair trophy cases with a welding tool.

Trigg updated:

  • The reactive tesla armor prototype has been given a remote firmware update. Nanotrasen denies any claims that given prototype was able to give anyone permanent shock immunity after simply being held and dropped.

Unoki updated:

  • Added a computer vendor to Kilo Station.
  • Added a computer vendor to Meta Station.

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • When selecting a sacrifice target, heretics that are also on an antag team(s) (E.G. cult, revs) will be told which of their potential targets are also on the same team(s) as them.

carshalash updated:

  • Makes gargle blaster require lemon juice instead of lime

dragomagol updated:

  • initiating deconstructing a reinforced window is now done by right clicking for each step
  • reinforced table weakening moved to attack_secondary

ishitbyabullet updated:

  • The lavaland xeno ruin can no longer get pushed around by puny fauna. This fix will not help if you hide inside to avoid a megafauna chasing you.
  • Tidied up TheBeach away mission a bit.

itseasytosee updated:

  • security bots will no longer remember you hitting them while they're off

nightred updated:

  • Meta's café laptop is no longer a shell of it's self

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Canisters can be relabeled again

23 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Painted directional windows are no longer opaque.

FernandoJ8 updated:

  • Atmospherics envirohelmet has the same fire protection as the Atmospherics hardsuit helmet. It's description has also changed to reflect this.

Fikou updated:

  • adds fullauto to saber smg's, borg l6's, tommy guns and security autorifles
  • tesla cannon sucks less
  • l6 bullets now do less damage
  • fixes full auto letting you fire in crit or spamclick

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Tank Holders can be anchored now.

Pepsiman0 updated:

  • nitrile gloves halve the use time of the syringes, pills, patches and medigels

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • You can now unbuckle others from a borg.

22 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • The achievement for grinding the rails on Tramstation has been fixed! Cheevo get!

Arkatos updated:

  • Screwdrivers now use a new greyscaling method for their sprites.

Cimika / Kathy Ryals updated:

  • Fixes the Mitosis nanite program's description.

Ghilker updated:

  • edited metastation map to use directional sprites instead of the manifold ones

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Miner winter coat can carry mining equipment on their exo slot like the explorer suits can.
  • Items that winter coats can carry on their exo slot are more consistent with their job and now you carry tablets on them too!
  • Labcoats and wintercoats that aren't from a head of staff can't carry batons anymore.

InsaneRed updated:

  • Fixes the cooldown of vog spells back to the normal timers instead of seconds
  • lowers the stun times on commands to be more reasonable for an aoe effect, sleep from 4s to 2s,stop to 4s from 6s,

KathrinBailey updated:

  • Status displays now go on top of windows, instead of underneath it.

Mothblocks updated:

  • The CE can now buy the "Build Your Own Shuttle Kit" independently.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Fixed emitters welding instantly at the cost of 20 units of fuel.

Swept updated:

  • Fixed typos in the jumbo ice cream, popsicle stick, and nogga black.

Yenwodyah updated:

  • Bardrones can do their job again

dragomagol updated:

  • Kilo medbay: wired an unwired APC, added some missing APCs/air alarms

tralezab updated:

  • Added some job ban checks to the robot factory! You'll be ghosted if you're cyborg banned.

21 April 2021

Ghilker updated:

  • players can change the thermomachines pipe color with the multitool right click when it's unanchored.
  • fixed hitting the machine with tools in some cases

Greniza updated:

  • added new icons for reverse bear trap: inhand, worn, and item icons.
  • added minor animation to the reverse bear trap sprite
  • added update_overlays() function to /obj/item/reverse_bear_trap/
  • deleted old icons for reverse bear trap.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Windoors will now properly block you after the underlying tile changes twice.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • The population locked traitor items now properly unlock in the uplink.
  • Changed harm intent to combat mode in codex cicatrix
  • Extracting or inserting eyes gives a proper message.

20 April 2021

jlsnow301 updated:

  • Players can now initiate votes using the new vote panel (assuming CentCom allows it).
  • Admins' voting list is now properly rendered

maxymax13 updated:

  • completely cleaned up all traces of old unwearable caution signs

19 April 2021

Ghilker updated:

  • better emitters and collectors code

Kylerace updated:

  • you can no longer destroy the tram control console. you cant grief as well as the tram can so stop breaking it out of jealousy

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed a lot of nonhuman species being unable to strip others.

Orchian updated:

  • worn icon for geiger counters

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Admin logs showing someone being stripped of an item will now correctly show the perp's name/ckey

SpookyTheFox updated:

  • fixed the cyborg shaker

stylemistake updated:

  • Arrow keys are grabbed by TGUI for keyboard navigation, and won't be moving your character.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • RPD's scroll mousewheel to change layer should now be snappier and more responsive. It is also no longer flipped.

18 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Ice cream vats don't needlessly say the an additional time when dispensing cones.
  • Statues can be rotated by alt clicking on them now.

CeUvI updated:

  • Resprited beakers and bottles.

Celotajs updated:

  • Stopped obscenities from appearing on slot machines

Foxtrot (Funce) updated:

  • Bone Gel Recipe works again!

Ghilker updated:

  • bluespace vendor no longer get stuck when the gas you filling with finishes midway

JosephJomama updated:

  • Bounty cubes now pay out the correct speedy delivery bonus.

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • You can now remove people's wigs via the strip menu. As a consequence, doctors can now perform head surgeries on incapacitated wig wearers.

dragomagol updated:

  • Kilostation medbay has been renovated! The security checkpoint has been moved to face the lobby, the old sec checkpoint has been made into an operating theatre, cryogenics and the exam room have traded places, and the delivery office is now a paramedic dispatch!

necromanceranne updated:

  • Armor now checks if an attack is weak against armor, and if so, multiplies any existing armor by two.
  • Hollowpoint bullets and shrapnel now follow this logic, and no longer grant someone additional armor if they have any armor at all.

17 April 2021

InsaneRed updated:

  • Adds O2 to Pure pipeline on icebox atmos and fixes air mix pipeline to take up less space and work better with smartpipes.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed edge cases where some things that could strip should not have.

16 April 2021

Anonymous updated:

  • Mailman jumpsuit no longer exposes yours back when looking at left/west.

Arkatos updated:

  • Wirecutters now use a new greyscaling method for their sprites.

FernandoJ8 updated:

  • Hangover trait applies rest rather than sleep so that the roundstart held items of MDs and plasmamen aren't lost.

Fikou, Jegub updated:

  • Adds Trader NPCs, currently unused

Ghilker updated:

  • insuls will give you the trait TRAIT_CHUNKYFINGERS (you can't shoot gun with normal firing pins while wearing them)
  • you can't use modular computers with this trait now (you can open them before putting the gloves on)
  • CE now has advanced insuls that won't give the debuff traits (on the same idea of the advanced mag boots and the suit)

Iamgoofball updated:

  • You can now put food on the IV drip again.

JJRcop updated:

  • Derelict drones have had their limits released

John Willard updated:

  • Flypeople can now use more than 1 S
  • Fly eyes are now its own eyes, rather than being attached to the head.
  • Flypeople cultists' eyes now properly glow red (More then they already do)

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Slightly changed the smoke bomb description

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The snow tiles spawned by the anomalus crystal will no longer infinitely produce cold air
  • Stormtrooper aim is now more consistently bad, the same can somewhat be said of anything that affects spread, but it's random already so who knows

Seris02 updated:

  • adds a stun time modifier (reducing the stun) to climbing tables for the freerunning quirk, and reduces the knockdown penalty for the freerunning falling down z levels

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes traumas caused by bone fractures not repairing after treatment

Time-Green updated:

  • Junkie pills quench addictions again
  • Now takes one minute to start withdrawal from addictions, down from 1 second (also made you withdraw while still using)
  • Quenching opiod addiction clears disgust, so you wont spent the next 20 minutes being vomitlocked

Trigg updated:

  • The Select Equipment menu now uses the UI owner's favorite outfits instead of the target mob's. Whoops.

norill updated:

  • You can now close airlocks by gently punching floors (not in combat mode)

tralezab updated:

  • Changes the faster fireman carrying traits on skillchips into a nitrile glove trait.

15 April 2021

Fikou updated:

  • checker and cafeteria floors can now have dirs

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Reduced how loud Space Dragon's roar is

Qustinnus updated:

  • Ethereal blood no longer shocks.
  • Liquid electricity found in food is now enriched, retaining the effect removed from the liquid electricity found in blood, which has less electrical properties. Enriched liquid electricity can also raise an ethereals blood levels

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Nanotrasen's Human Resources department would like to remind crewmembers that shattering mirrors, whether by striking them or shooting them, will bring you bad luck and probably also get you maimed. Don't do it!

Sparkezel updated:

  • Engineers and CE have NT CIMS installed on the tablets from the start

SparkezelPL updated:

  • You can no longer hit canisters with tanks

carshalash updated:

  • Gives white russians a proper ratio of creation.

14 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Clown outfits, grilling shorts, and russian officer's uniforms are no longer able to be adjusted into a purple and black trench coat.

Celotajs updated:

  • Added a configuration option for splitting the admin tab into multiple tabs
  • Interviews have been moved to the Tickets tab
  • It is now possible for administrators to split the admin tab into multiple tabs
  • Fixed flashing for non admin users

Cocacola4124 updated:

  • Fixes exploit in orion arcade machine that allowed players to steal, sell, and buy resources without being at a spaceport.

Fikou updated:

  • icebox no longer has more prisoner slots
  • because of this, you can no longer latejoin as prisoner

Ghilker updated:

  • firelocks won't close if there is an atmos holofan on their turf.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • After many issues with plasmaman prisoners escaping perma and hiding in maint, NT will supply the station with up to date envirosuits with their suit sensors locked, just like other prisoner uniforms.

JJRcop updated:

  • Maintenance Drones are once again constructable in Robotics.
  • The Drone Dispenser has not made a return.
  • New settings DRONE_REQUIRED_ROLE, and DRONE_ROLE_PLAYTIME, which determine the playtime exp required for playing drones.

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Command personnel can now use the Science Hub tablet app they start with.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Examining an AI's camera eye as a ghost will now show you their laws, the same as if you examined their core
  • Added keybinds for moving up/down z-levels, useful as a ghost on multi-z maps! These default to the page up/page down buttons (previously used as the secondary binds for switching hands and activating items in hand).

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes mannitol (and possibly neurine) from causing runtimes if no effects can be applied.

actioninja updated:

  • radials layer correctly

jlsnow301 updated:

  • The cryopod machine has been added, an IC way to reopen job slots for yourself and other players.
  • AFK and SSD players can be placed into cryopods to reopen their job slot.
  • Refactored cult sacrifice targeting to compensate for players logging out.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Monkeys can no longer get into mechs.

norill updated:

  • fixed infinite airlock electronics from deconstructing blast doors

tralezab updated:

  • added podspawning helper codewise, most code pod spawns use it
  • captains name their respective celestial bodies
  • honorbound god won't get mad anymore for JUSTICE.

13 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • You can now choose to have a fear of guns if you take the phobia quirk.

BootlegBow updated:

  • fixed grammar on computer hardware tech node

FernandoJ8 updated:

  • Atmospherics Envirogloves are no longer insulated.

Ghilker updated:

  • fix HFR corners disappearing on build
  • color adapters can connect again to all colors regardless
  • Allow the pneumatic cannon to be created with the smart pipes fitting
  • fix deltastation and icebox toxins from merging some pipes with distro/waste

Greniza updated:

  • added non-adjustable mask which allows internals, is sterile, and muzzles a patient or victim, complete with sprites
  • replaced standard sterile breathmask in anesthetic closet with above muzzle breathmask
  • adds BLOCKS_SPEECH clothing flag and reworked muzzle code and is_muzzled() function be based on flag

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Space Dragon's gust attack is now tied to right click instead of an ability button
  • Space Dragon has received numerous balance changes, most notably that Space Dragon will stall the shuttle until it loses or completes its objectives
  • Fixed numerous bugs with Space Dragon, most notably the rifts not vanishing after Space Dragon's death
  • Space Dragon now has a custom roar for dying and winning
  • Deleted now unused Space Dragon ability icon
  • Space Dragon's speed changes are now controlled using movespeed modifiers instead of direct speed adjustments

JoshAdamPowell updated:

  • skillchip implanters are now more efficient!

Kangarad updated:

  • Ashwalkers have been seen to not be affected by viruses anymore, likely due to evolution

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Some stuff that applied blurred vision and roatated things on screen wasn't working, let's fix that up shall we?
  • Rotting things are less potent, and will ramp up their effectiveness over time, rather then being all or nothing
  • Radiation related pluoxium will now only generate in gasmixes under 200K, remember to keep that sm cold

Melbert updated:

  • Slippery things in your pocket no longer make you slippery. If you want to become slippery, you need to wear slippery things on your person actual.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed humans not having any eyes.

SgtHunk updated:

  • Fixed a small typo that existed on the medical kiosk's radiation poisoning warning.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Added a new config option that makes ID cards picked up by low living hour players automatically flagged with an intern-esque title.

nightred updated:

  • Skeletons heal more when drinking milk
  • fixed reagents not metabolizing properly

12 April 2021

Celotajs updated:

  • Prevented departments from having negative or undefined open positions in the crew manifest

Melbert updated:

  • TGUI Create-Command-Report window
  • Admins can now set an announcement sound to accompany their command reports.
  • The 'anime' announcement line now functions properly again. This is not related to the above changelog line whatsoever.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Fixes some issues with not being able to mount some objects for riding

TheVekter updated:

  • Material stacks now properly update their material amounts when a stabilized metal extract adds a sheet to them.

Trigg updated:

  • Admins just got a new TGUI Outfit Manager to mess around and make events with!
  • Custom Outfits are now persistent and saved server-side, but can still be locally saved and loaded.

tralezab updated:

  • Headrevs become enemies of the state when the revolution is over!
  • Added four new sects to the altar of the gods, for some very unique deities.

11 April 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Added security level subsystem.
  • Escape pods will now re-lock again properly if security level drops below red.

Celotajs updated:

  • The crew manifest has now been converted to TGUI for lobby, ghost, AI and pAI players.
  • Improved how stat panel items are displayed

Fikou updated:

  • The Hook Shotgun now shoots its' hook on right click
  • Fixes sawn-off guns sometimes not having icons
  • Hooks no longer do magic particles
  • New sprites for Hook Shotgun

Ghilker updated:

  • Colorblind users can now examine the atmos components to read on what color they are
  • fix some ruin runtime caused by the new pipe changes

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • You can now buckle to mobs again.

Thalpy updated:

  • Adjusts Mannitol,Neurine,Ephephrine,Prohol,Oculine and Inacusate to have their own reaction profiles, purity and impurity effects
  • Improves the debug reaction tester so that reaction vars can be live edited to make reaction tweaking/creation less of a pain.
  • Tweaks converoli's threshold to not overlap with it's failure threshold

celotajstg updated:

  • Visual adjustments have been made to the job selection table.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Canisters when broken will fall in other directions than to the right
  • Canisters have been unified under a greyscale system
  • Old canister images have been removed

wesoda25 updated:

  • reborn ash walkers no longer know galactic common

10 April 2021

EricZilla updated:

  • Added new Gene Sequence Analyzer Sprite
  • Added new Hydroponics Analyzer Sprite

Ghilker updated:

  • visual fix for bridge pipe and color adapter
  • Add a better way to build the HFR with special deployable boxes, set them up in the right position (check the image on each box, it'll tell you where that box should be in a 3x3 grid.. or just examine the box)

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Fixes a material not spawning on lavaland during April Fools. (Honk related)

Timberpoes updated:

  • Motorised wheelchairs should now drop all their components when deconstruted or destroyed.

maxymax13 updated:

  • Space cash has been resprited, stacks visually show the amount of that bill rather than the combined total, and they come with little roman numerals if you're unfamiliar with the holochip color scheme. Wait, what do you MEAN people can't read roman numerals in 2561? Too late, we've already mass produced them.
  • Pinpointers get unique belt sprites.

maxymax13, sergeirocks100 updated:

  • Resprited the Dish Drive!

09 April 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Venus human traps no longer take damage from being in a cold environment.
  • Venus human traps now take twice as long to die from being in a hot environment.
  • Shoving someone into a person wearing riot gear will no longer knock the person wearing riot gear down.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Elder atmosian armor and helmets aren't flashing error messages now. Facehuggers that infest someone don't become pink/black checkerboards on your face. Chameleon kit monkey mind magnification helmets default to a red light, and if you pick the secborg hailer for your mask you get a tape recorder stuffed in your mouth.

Baldies updated:

  • Minor grammar fixes for aquarium content.
  • empty versions of graves can now be spawned in.

Ghilker updated:

  • Thermomachines can now be moved around. To do this, open up the panel with a screwdriver, then Right-Click on the machine with a wrench, after a delay the machine will be un-anchored; use ctrl-click to move the machine around. Then set the rotation of the machine by Left-Click with a wrench, screwdriver to close the panel, and the machine is functional again.
  • thermomachines can change the piping layer while constructed by hitting them when un-anchored with a multitool
  • fixed missing plasma mixer from metastation atmos

Seris02 updated:

  • adds assembly activation, voting and pull request messages to the info chat tab, adds a warning chat class to the bomb activation message

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • You can no longer buckle yourself through walls, air flaps, and a few other things that shouldn't be buckled through.

Time-Green updated:

  • fixes plumbing components letting some reagent holders not properly delete

celotajstg updated:

  • Ass scans, stamps, UI icons and other .gif and .png images have been optimized to peak efficiency.

08 April 2021

Ghilker updated:

  • layer manifolds visual fix

Imaginos16 updated:

  • Now CentCom cap, french beret and coordinator cap don't have spelling mistakes.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Player Lobstrosities can now charge using right-click.

John Willard updated:

  • Shaft Miners can now enter Cargo on IceBox, and Cargo techs can no longer enter the QM's office through maintenance.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Borgs can no longer shove or harm simple mobs using the hug module.

Thunder12345 updated:

  • Pacifists are no longer able to kill bugs with flyswatters. Bugs have feelings too!
  • Preflight checks have been reenabled on your cargo shuttle, forbidden goods can no longer be shipped to CentComm for sale.

tralezab updated:

  • One headrev is tasked with renaming the station when revolutions are successful

willox updated:

  • pop-up boxes created by clicking a verb in the stat panel get focused (again)

07 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Suicidal ethereals are less likely to fail to kill themselves from unexpected revivals trapping them
  • You can no longer attempt to commit suicide multiple times at once.

EOBGames updated:

  • To celebrate the 100th anniversary of the Battle of LV-426, TerraGov have teamed up with everyone's favourite toy manufacturer, Cuddles Corporation, to produce a limited edition (not really) Runner plushie. Get yours today from Cargo, or your nearest arcade machine!

Ghilker updated:

  • Smart pipes, simple connection logic, similar to current power cable; place and they will automatically connect (also color dependable, grey is the wildcard that can connect to any colors) add:How these new pipes work. add:-Smart pipes autoconnect to nearby smart pipes add:-They are now color coded, so they only connect to the same colored pipe, the GREY pipe is the wildcard and can connect to every other color, so be aware of this add:-ALL components spawned by the RPD can be colored (from pumps to connectors, from pipes to manifolds), if you leave them GREY they can connect to every other color. Color adapters can be colored, but they'll still connect two pipes with different colors. BUILDABLE machines are GREY (thermomachines, cryo, HFR) so be aware of this add:-Trying to go across another smart pipe will now build a bridge pipe automatically already colored of the color you choose, so you don't have to place it yourself anymore (is still available in the RPD tho) add:-ALL binary components, layer manifolds, color adapters and bridge pipe can be put ONTOP of a smart pipe, but not on another of these. Smart pipes can't be placed on top of these pipes, so you have to build them first. add:-Lcrossings can't be made anymore (sorry y'all i tryed, if someone have a way of doing them ping me on discord) add:-REMEMBER you still have 5 layers to go, these rules apply to the same layer pipes, so if you do a crossing on different layers you won't see a bridge pipe appear.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Blind crewmembers can now use stethoscopes to diagnose faulty hearts/breathing! Deaf crewmembers, on the other hand, are no longer able to.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Armless people can no longer buckle others

Thunder12345 updated:

  • View variables can now accept input from a colour picker.

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Roulette Wheel interface should no longer bluescreen for bank account-less ID cards and observers.

Time-Green updated:

  • Smoker negative moodlets now get removed when smoking

bobbahbrown updated:

  • TGS4 precompile script now installs youtube-dl if it is missing from the host on Linux platforms

maxymax13 updated:

  • Water coolers have been resprited!

tf-4 updated:

  • Removes stray pipe from Icebox cryotubes.

06 April 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Clicking on a table with a fireman carried person while not in combat mode will no longer cause you to attempt to hurt them.
  • Attempting to right click with an empty hand on someone who is either restrained or both unarmed and not in combat mode while you are targeting the mouth zone will no longer result in you slapping them in the face instead of shoving them.
  • Using the dedicated slapper item (from the *slap emote) on someone while you are targeting either the mouth zone or the head zone will now result in you slapping them in the face instead of just generically slapping them.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Chefs can now cook moffins! Yaaay moffins! Check the pastries subsection of the crafting menu to make some! Cutting up gauze and bedsheets can get you started!

BootlegBow updated:

  • gives tram a chef produce console

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Normal kisses will no longer trigger a shielded hardsuit's shields
  • Stop me if you've heard this one before: Simple bots should no longer randomly fail to respond to summons even when a path is available
  • Stripping/equipping things to a conscious braindead person (AKA a human owned by a disconnected player) will now give them a message with your visible name and roughly how long ago you touched their stuff when they login again. Touching someone's pockets or adjusting their gear other than equipping/unequipping is not logged. After 5 minutes, you'll have forgotten both their name and exactly how long ago past those 5 minutes it happened.

SweptWasTaken updated:

  • Better bucket inhand
  • Omega soap inhand

TheVekter updated:

  • Added proper logging for Holodeck misuse

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Crowbarring a firelock is changed a bit. Left clicking will let you open a firedoor and hold it in place! It will close again when you move away, though. Old behaviour is still there, you just need to right-click it.

willox updated:

  • Stat panel no longer captures input (potentially causing keys to get stuck down)

05 April 2021

Ghilker updated:

  • fix gas deletion exploit by stopping injectors, vents and scrubbers from being placed on walls

Mothblocks updated:

  • The RCD now has an option to scan the world around you for showing original walls and windows.
  • The RCD will now rebuild existing windows/windows/grilles significantly faster and with less resources.

MrStonedOne updated:

  • april fools is now 3 days long, instead of 5

Swept updated:

  • stray pixel on vanilla cake slice

necromanceranne updated:

  • The dark gygax now appears as a dark gygax, and not a gygax.
  • The nukie uplink is no longer deceptive about what equipment you get on a dark gygax.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Canisters will leak when damaged.
  • Canisters that break while highly pressured will explode.
  • Canister base pressure capacity has been reduced by 8%.
  • Canisters have a hidden pressure capacity that is up to 20% larger than the base labeled max.

norill updated:

  • Fixed air outlet injector outside of Xenobiology Lab not being powered

04 April 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • You can now print cable coils and welding helmets from science protolathes, engineering protolathes, and ghost role protolathes.

Capsandi updated:

  • Tramstation permabrig has seeds in its garden now

Fikou updated:

  • fixes lone carpets smoothing
  • adds back star carpets and symbol carpets
  • emergency meetings now dont call in mobs with no client

Ghilker updated:

  • Thermomachine have full temperature range on both modes, plus new automatic thermal regulator function.

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Emergency meetings work now

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • bureaucracy

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes toxins having unintentional lower purities.
  • Fixes oversight with eigenstasium which teleports you before saving your location (when purity is greater than 90% and ingested)

bobbahbrown updated:

  • The tgs4 precompile script now builds extools for linux deployments

tralezab updated:

  • added some helpful examines on food and components for food

03 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Teleprods do not remind you to install source when worn on the exosuit storage slot any more.
  • Pulse rifles when on your back or in exosuit storage slots show up consistently.
  • Accelerator cannons properly display their charge level when worn and do not become an error sprite when worn n exosuit storage slots.
  • Double barrel shotguns with alternate skins show up properly when in exosuit storage slots.
  • Gluttony's blessing will no longer turn you into a morph if you do not receive the entire volume of the reagent contained in the syringe at once. You weren't supposed to be sharing to begin with, you should've taken a lesson from Greed.

Melbert updated:

  • TGUI Limbgrower
  • Refactored the limbgrower to modernize the code and allow for more types of designs.
  • Limbgrower design disks. Science now has a new tech node after advanced biotechnology, "Xenoorgan Biology" which allows medbay to print new designs for the limbgrower, including various felinid, lizard, plasmaman, and ethereal organs.
  • The limbgrower now supports plumbing ducts.

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • The captain can now sometimes call emergency meetings using the communications console! Hopefully the crew will be able to sus out any imposters who might be among them!

TheVekter updated:

  • Recently-fired revolvers can now be used to ignite cigars like a fucking badass.
  • Cauteries can now be used to ignite cigars like a very irresponsible doctor.

02 April 2021

NamelessFairy updated:

  • CTF map Cruiser alien rooms are nolonger dark voids

SweptWasTaken updated:

  • Modified sectech ad line to be more lore friendly

Thalpy updated:

  • fixes eigenstates letting you get to centcom

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Fixed missing dependency for libssl1.1 in PreCompile.sh

01 April 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Poison moth wings don't have body-shaped gaps in them that show up when dismembered any more.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Mansus grasp can now be used to ignite cigars like a fucking badass.

Gandalf2k15 updated:

  • autofire code better and healthier for server

Ghilker updated:

  • Fixed some atmos issues in deltastation, tramstation and kilostation

LordVollkorn updated:

  • Chemical toxins have been adjusted to the new pH-system.
  • Even if you don't pay attention to pH-values, you can still make relatively decent toxins in small-medium batches.
  • Four new minor impurities have been added.
  • Seiver has been tweaked so pure Seiver is much easier to make now.

NamelessFairy updated:

  • Re-sprites the lightning orb powerup
  • The lightning orb HUD icon now displays after picking up a lightning orb
  • CTF map downtown's chairs/stools are now stuck to the floor

SgtHunk updated:

  • The Internal Affairs gamemode now actually works as intended, getting the target of the agent they just assassinated. Get to work, agents.
  • IAA AIs will no longer always redtext their survive objective.

SmArtKar updated:

  • CTF IDs no longer show message about holder being underage

Thalpy updated:

  • Adds the missing HPLC to chemistry on tramstation

Timberpoes updated:

  • Transparent turfs once again work properly.

maxymax13 updated:

  • fixes the CTF ghost spawner tip that was outdated before it was even typed

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Cargo gas canisters can be purchased

31 March 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • putting a PDA into an exosuit storage slot won't cause the missing texture sprite any more.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Lowered the chance of disease creation by ~60%

Timberpoes updated:

  • Improved combat and attack logging of spray containers.

30 March 2021

AnturK updated:

  • Antigravity grenades work again now.

FernandoJ8 updated:

  • Makes the Hand Drill use sound quieter and less high pitched.
  • Heart failure no longer affects those with the Muscled Veins surgery

Fikou updated:

  • adds magical passive to battle arcade's examine

Ghommie updated:

  • The flying damage slowdown movetype no longer affects floating humanoids rather than flying ones.

Hideyoshi1 updated:

  • added CTF spawner tip

Mothblocks updated:

  • Xenomorphs can now strip humans again.
  • Fixed not being able to turn on internals when stripping someone if it was on their back.

NamelessFairy, maxymax13 updated:

  • Bluespace gas vendors have been re-sprited
  • Bluespace gas senders have been re-sprited

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can now manufacture bone gel by combining 10u of bone dust (obtainable by grinding any organic arm/leg [so no heads/chests]) and 10u of carbon, then heating to 673K.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Holodeck thunderdome armor now has 10 melee and bullet protection instead of deathsquad-tier armor

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • The light eater will now gnaw the lights off of things you are holding again. Really should have tested this while I was reworking them.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fixes runtime in turf destruction that could cause transparent turfs to render incorrectly.

tralezab updated:

  • orion emag no longer produces... weeeeird messages

29 March 2021

DuffCreeper updated:

  • RPDs can now apply the unwrench upgrade by interacting with the upgrade disk

Ghommie updated:

  • Jungle fevered monkeys are once again dexterous.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • After investigation. NT found out that Plasmaman detectives were being supplied with "non-Bangproof" headsets to decrease expenses because "The bonehead's helmet protects their bone ears anyway." This misunderstanding on how the helmets work has been clarified and the Quartermaster involved was promptly fired.

Krysonism updated:

  • The fork has a new sprite.

MLGTASTICa updated:

  • refactored create_casing_pellets to not sleep
  • fixed mech hud's not being removed when leaving the mech.

Randomguy523 updated:

  • Corrected the span and a typo when a pAI gets emagged.

28 March 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Spoons are consistently rendered in the correct hand on the player's sprite, rather than floating away from the wielder's hand, or even showing up behind them. You can also see held plastic spoons now.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes jungle grass having wrong broken states

Ghilker updated:

  • delta station distro and waste no longer mix
  • atmos components and pipes now show the piping layer on examine
  • Increased internal heat_capacity of the thermomachine to increase the speed of cooling/heating
  • Added a check to stop the machine from cooling when set to heater and vice versa
  • power consumption lowered and efficiency capped
  • can use enviromental heat even with red port connected and with gas
  • remove xeno and mid-round antags spawn from atmos tanks from tramstation

Ghommie updated:

  • The apocalypse rune should no longer invisiblize human mobs from the eyes of non-cultist players.
  • Cyborg charge alerts now use the same icon states as ethereal charge alerts. I also conformally resprited the no cell alert icon state.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Moth eyes now have a unique sprite that reflects on your mob. Take care and cherish them, unless you want to look silly.
  • Moth cultists can have their red eyes now.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Things that rot will now directly attempt to infect you when you interact with them, remember to wear a mask/gloves. (A freezer will be helpful for long term storage)
  • Things that rot no longer produce miasma

Mothblocks updated:

  • tgui tooltips have been moved to a library that should fix them going off the edges of the screen.

SgtHunk updated:

  • Metastation: The nanite lab's request console is now named properly.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Even more outdated round tips have been updated. Did you know you can stick a fork into an APC?

Thalpy updated:

  • Adds eigenstasium, a new reagent that uses the new mechanics in depth!
  • Fixed a few things to do with reactions on the backend
  • refactors status effects to have a var for processing speed

Timberpoes updated:

  • Tourist bots are now significantly less chatty when waiting for a seat and slightly less chatty when waiting to be served their order.
  • AI controller now passes sane delta_time values to AI behaviours.
  • Tourists now get bored and leave after the intended 10 minutes of waiting instead of the unintended 100 minutes.

bloons3 updated:

  • Create Antag now allows for a maximum amount of antags to be selected for some options.
  • The already indestructible Syndicate Shuttle Terminal now cannot be deconstructed with tools

dragomagol updated:

  • sentience fun balloons can no longer assign ghosts to dead mobs
  • sentience fun balloons only work on mobs without a ckey

27 March 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Blobbernauts now have a generic living healthdoll and pull icon.
  • Blobbernauts will now show severity of their injuries as a red screen overlay to the user.
  • Blob core remaining health will now show in percentages and in green color. This affects both blobbernauts and blob overminds.
  • Blob power is now in orange color for blob overminds.

Ghilker updated:

  • fix missing tile under airlock above turbine in kilo station

Kryson, Qustinnus updated:

  • You can now put food on plates, and plate no longer materialize out of nowhere as you cook
  • Items no longer appear on a different layer when they're in your inventory, just a different plane.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes mined out turfs not sharing gas with their neighbors in a rare case, this most likely only effected one room on tramstation

Mothblocks updated:

  • The strip panel has been completely remodeled in tgui.

Thalpy updated:

  • Adds the HPLC purifying machine - this machine will indicate the purity of the reagent in it's input beaker and can partially purify selected reagents
  • Gives each reagent a mass
  • Fixes the debug recipe machine runtiming when hit by a beaker
  • Adds alt_click_secondary() which is called when right clicking on things with alt held down
  • added some more icons for the HPLC

Timberpoes updated:

  • When examining a player, the large ID card icon displayed in chat is now more compact.

Time-Green updated:

  • Temporarily reverts the changes made to the plumbing reaction chamber untill minichem gets added (never)

cacogen updated:

  • Paper bins show the paper inside them

26 March 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Cyborg treat dispensers now have a maximum treat storage capacity of 5 treats instead of 30 treats, and recharge their treats at a rate of one treat per 10 seconds instead of one treat per second. To compensate for this, the damage of gumballs and lollipops that have been launched from an emagged cyborg has been increased from 3 to 10.
  • Launched gumballs and lollipops will no longer delete themselves after 2 minutes (if not equipped).
  • The 2u of omnizine in each cyborg lollipop has been replaced by 2u of psicodine. The contents of normal lollipops have not been modified.
  • Cyborg cookie dispensers can now only dispense a cookie once every 10 seconds (instead of once per second). Non-cyborg cookie dispensers no longer self-recharge, but can now accept compressed matter cartirdges for reloading purposes. Support has been added for other types of RSFs to have use cooldowns.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Some outdated round tips have been updated, and should hold true to the current state of the game a little better!
  • Nanotrasen has cut costs on manufacturing station APCs as they no longer have their kitchenware proofing coating. Do not put a fork in an APC.

Arkatos updated:

  • Added new status bar support for more objects that were previously visible in the old status bar, like action buttons.

Fox-McCloud updated:

  • Plant-like mobs are now impacted and take damage from plant-b-gone and weedkiller reagents
  • Plant-like mobs can be health scanned with a plant analyzer
  • Plant-like mobs are impacted by the floral gun in the same manner pod people are

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed deltastation upper atmos missing cable and unpowered airlock
  • adds use enviromental heat button to thermomachines to let players choose if use enviromental or pipe heat distribution
  • fix roundstart room heating due to freezer not having gas in the red port on startup
  • remove double pen door from meta xeno

Horatio22 updated:

  • fixes human feet poking out of envirosuit sprites
  • gives the ventriloquist dummy a new, animated sprite

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Nanotrasen railroad engineers have done some minor repairs to their in-station tram rails.

NamelessFairy updated:

  • CTF can now selects a random map at game start
  • CTF now supports four teams
  • Gear for yellow and green CTF teams has been added
  • CTF ID cards for all 4 teams have been added - courtesy of maxymax13
  • a new CTF map, Four Side has been added
  • a new CTF map, Downtown has been added
  • a new KOTH map, Limbo has been added
  • a new CTF map, Cruiser has been added
  • KOTH capture points retain their sprites after being claimed

tralezab updated:

  • Bane AI

25 March 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Hey did you know you can charge your PDA by microwaving it?

Ghommie updated:

  • modular computers shouldn't leave behind power cells, id cards, or any knick-knack for that matter, anymore when deleted.
  • The experisi arcade experiment is now doable.

Kylerace updated:

  • NanoTrasen & Noble realized that the holodecks ability to replicate books was cutting into its bottom line, so they convinced the branch responsible for the holodeck to patch it out

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Adds some windoors and airlocks to better deal with gas movement
  • Shifts some of delta's areas around, hopefully this reduces mass fire alarm spam

Melbert updated:

  • Only ghosts can see if something is deadchat controlled. Humans are no longer clairvoyant.
  • Plant trash from grown foods (banana peels) now inherit their parent plant's traits properly again.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • AI dogs holding onto something in their mouth will drop them upon death
  • Corgis and pets in general are better about dropping equipped items when gibbed rather than deleting them

Time-Green updated:

  • Adds a plumbing layer manifold
  • Alt-click the plumbing RCD to change the creation layer

tralezab updated:

  • highlander + summon guns and magic are refactored

24 March 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The interrogation room is now it's own distinct room, with an air alarm and APC like everything else, as opposed to being blobbed together with the rest of the brig.

Arkatos updated:

  • Added right-click support to AIs and cyborgs. Cyborgs can use right click actions only if they do not have any tool selected, as to not conflict with the right click actions of the items themselves, like syringes.
  • Silicons are now once again able to start a wash cycle due to newly added right click support.

Ghommie updated:

  • Sundae, honkdae and space freezy can be filled with ice cream from the ice cream vat.
  • Ice creams cones, as well as the aforementioned treats, can hold multiple servings of ice cream now, up to three.
  • All because ice cream has been refactored into a component, and its flavours made into datums.
