JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • The Flyperson left leg has been given an extra pixel

MLGTASTICa updated:

  • fixed mech bullets hitting the mechs they're fired from

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Immovable rods triggered by admin intervention will no longer miss everything in their path

TheVekter updated:

  • Ghosts should now be able to view the crew monitor console.

23 March 2021

Fikou updated:

  • fixes mouse override icon on supplypod launchers

Ghilker updated:

  • READ ME thermomachines now have 2 ports, the green one is used as you normally do, by cooling/heating the gases connected to it, the red port is optional but it helps move the heat from the green port to the red one (and vice-versa), if no pipe is connected to the red port or there is no gas in it, the heat will be moved from the enviroment;
  • ALL the station freezers are now connected to the waste loop, where the CO2 gets collected and used to store that heat (atmos should now manage the waste pipenet more actively);
  • the best way to now use freezers is to connect their red port to the waste system (there is at least one pipe in every room)
  • Rotate the machine without emptying the content will release the gas onto the atmosphere

Ghilker, tralezab updated:

  • Add gas vendor and gas sender. The gas sender is located on round start in atmos, it has a port where you connect pipes to send the gases you want into the bluespace gas network. To this machine will connect gas vendors (or you can multitool the sender and then the vendor to do the connection), the vendors are wall mounted tank dispensers where you can decide you gas mix based on the input in the UI. The gases are not free tho (unless the atmos man that is managing the sender just set them free), you will have to pay a sum based on the gas price times the gas amounts, the sum will be taken from your card and sent to the engi department.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • New bio hood sprites.

Melbert updated:

  • Toilets now drop their cistern contents on deconstruction.
  • Some worn things that previously used to be slippery are now properly slippery again.
  • Slip component can be given a whitelist of valid worn slots. (B)Admins can now make anything worn slippery, again.
  • Midround Syndicate Sleeper Agent is now logged and messages admins when triggered.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Security officers now only get PDA'd if the new member is of the same department.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Simple bots should no longer randomly fail to respond to summons even when a path is available

Thalpy updated:

  • restores drink mixing speeds back to what it was (or slightly faster)

Timberpoes updated:

  • Admins can once again open the stat panels to look at active, disconnected, closed and resolved tickets.
  • Admins should no longer be triggered by simple bots creating Captain's Spares in nullspace.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Cleaned up scooter/skate code

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • Corrected a manufacturing defect in mind magnification helmets that allowed them to remain on the subject's head after humanization.

bloons3 updated:

  • Added semi-verbose logging to brig timers

dragomagol updated:

  • fixes icebox's json file referencing a non-existing area

22 March 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • You can no longer make infinite money off of some cargo crates improper sell values.

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • Central Command has a new closet for if the announcement system breaks. They stuffed an intern in there, he should be fine.

Cimika / Kathy Ryals updated:

  • Added the ability to call a N.E.R.D. (Nanotrasen Emergency Response Drone) team in the create antagonist verb.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes getting nothing from necropolis chests

Fikou, Rohesie, Ryll/Shaps, MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Full-Automatic Gun component! Your L6 Saws and Laser Gatling Guns have it now.
  • The Tesla Cannon! A fully automatic replacement to the tesla revolver, it shoots balls of shock.
  • Makes the Laser Gatling Gun less bad.

GuillaumePrata updated:

  • Atmos tech powercreep. Engineering wintercoats can now hold a gas analyzer like Science ones can.

Hadza updated:

  • Reverts the TK range for movable atoms (machinery, lockers, crates) from "as good as removed" back to useful

Mothblocks updated:

  • Security officers are now paired up into departments together, rather than separated.
  • DeltaStation now has departmental security officer spawners.
  • Fixed MetaStation's science officer being marked as supply.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Fixes being on a drug not stopping the effects of withdrawal when you're addicted

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Gas tanks now use object integrity rather than their own snowflaked version.
  • Bomb spawners now produce functional bombs. tweak: Tanks are no longer self-sealing.

dragomagol updated:

  • The Tram Emergency Shuttle brig now has a brig area instead of its usual area for escape checking

jlsnow301 updated:

  • New TGUI Vote Panel
  • Users can now change votes after voting.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • All gas prices have been standardized and based on a single base value, this has resulted in some fluctuations in the purchase price of various gases.

zxaber updated:

  • Restaurant customer bots no longer list imaginary countries in their names

21 March 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Stack splitting now uses right click.

Fikou updated:

  • removes medkit from ert engineer

Ghommie updated:

  • Expanded the list of orderable objects for space-italian and space-french customer bots.

KathyRyals updated:

  • Can pull things as a simplemob with ctrl click again.
  • Refactored /mob/living/CtrlClick(mob/user)

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Tramstation should lag a bit less when you drive the trolley around for fun and profit

Mordent updated:

  • Allowed tgui interfaces to be created in subdirectories

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Did you know defibs can be manually attached to medical cyborgs? The description of defibrillator now reflects this fact

TiviPlus updated:

  • Changed how cars handle some things

Tralezab, Qustinnus updated:

  • The Robot Earth Tourism Program has expanded, bringing in the polite British-Bots, who are hungry for some food that reminds them of the Empire. Bot Appetit!

dragomagol updated:

  • Borg model selection is now done by radial menu

stylemistake updated:

  • Swapped OK/Cancel buttons in tgui list input, so that it stays consistent with Windows UI guidelines (was Cancel/OK before).

tralezab updated:

  • a lot of addiction bugs, especially with nicotine

zxaber updated:

  • AIs piloting a shell when the round ends will now correctly have their laws shown on the round-end report.

20 March 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Washing machine now uses right click to start a wash cycle.

Ghilker updated:

  • the HFR now supports different gas mixtures as fuel, the GUI has been updated with the necessary informations, it will also show what gases will be produced.
  • tweaked how the HFR takes damage, made it easier to maintain at high power levels and much easier to repair

Krysonism updated:

  • The spoon has a new sprite.

Kylerace updated:

  • the holodeck is no longer so powerful that it can destroy anything and everything that dares to start existing while it's busy loading programs

MLGTASTICa updated:

  • fixed people being able to remotely eject out ID cards from bounty consoles

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • Allows you to wash away your shameful pied face

Sylphet updated:

  • Removed toasted sandwich
  • Grilled cheese sandwiches are now made on the griddle using a cheese sandwich.

Thalpy updated:

  • fixes helgrasp's lag compensator and text
  • Sets helgrasp to fire faster but last shorter

Timberpoes updated:

  • Mulebots no longer murder people just because that person dared to bump into them.

Trigg updated:

  • The Outfit Manager now updates the Select Equipment menu when an outfit is created or deleted

zxaber updated:

  • You can now download a cyborg's internal logs by right-clicking them with a mobile device running SiliConnect. Take a look if one is acting a bit strange, you might find something interesting.
  • Borg integrity (health) is now roughly shown in SiliConnect, under "Condition".

19 March 2021

Horatio22 updated:

  • Changed the height and width of enviroslacks, clown and mime envirosuits to be consistent with standard envirosuits; fixed a couple coloring mistakes with centcom and captain uniforms

Mothblocks updated:

  • Remove the voodoo doll.

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes impurities on foam, smoke and cigs.
  • Improved how impurities are handled

18 March 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Fixes the goof(s) made in another coder's anti-spider plasmaflooding PR that rendered silicons unable to interact with many machines.
  • Admins with "ai interact" mode on can now interact with any machine that is powered and not broken, regardless of other conditions, provided that the default machine can_interact() proc hasn't been overwritten in a weird way for that machine.
  • The structure of the default state of the can_interact() proc for machines has been reworked to be less awkward and painful to read than it was before.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • You can no longer use the BEPIS to rob the cargo budget blind. It now auto-starts depending on the attempted deposited credits.

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed juggernaut transformation option doing nothing.
  • Fixed artificer transformation option doing nothing.
  • Fixed adult slime transformation option doing nothing.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes the ancient bundle not working at all
  • You can no longer sentience potion humanoid simplemobs

Maurukas updated:

  • IceBox's mining mech bay has moved to the east of the cargo warehouse
  • A number of anomalous floating decals and air alarms inside doors have been in the Icebox mining base

Sylphet updated:

  • changed berry ice cream sandwich and cornuto to use ice cream cone for consistency
  • fixed broken ice cream recipes

TheBonded updated:

  • Jade lanterns can now be found in the black market uplink
  • Added the chainsaw and switchblade to the list of items available in the black market uplink.

TheVekter updated:

  • Removed the admin snowflake rocket launcher foam finger. The toy one is still around.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fixes oversight in DNA Consoles where doing a transfer from the Genetic Makeup tab had no cooldown and could be spammed to massively irradiate things.

TribesChen updated:

  • Rocket boots, a bad idea from the black market that hurls you 20 tiles in the direction you're facing. Beware of walls and people.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Removes 9x19mm as an ammo type.
  • PP-95's (the surplus gun for nukies) now use 9mm. They also have a .35 damage multiplier, resulting in standard 9mm doing only 10.5 (9x19mm did 10, so not really much of a difference).
  • Properly aligns the xenobio bloodgun with the arm when facing to the side.

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • Malt liquor is now available in the booze dispenser.
  • Reduces the price of malt liquor in the Booze-O-Mat to give some reason to buy it over other equally priced drinks that are stronger.

tralezazelart updated:

  • Orion code maybe less shit?
  • Orion Events use datums whew

17 March 2021

ATH1909 updated:

  • Gorillas (and dextrous holoparasites) can now SMASH walls, windows, tables, etc. while in combat mode, as they were intended be able to.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Pay stands won't accept funds from the cargo budget.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Blood Filtration wording is better & spelled correctly.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The station integrity score no longer over-penalizes burnt or missing floor tiles in the shift-end report.

Trigg, stylemistake updated:

  • Admins just got a new TGUI Select Equipment menu

carshalash updated:

  • Breakfast is less eggy. Boiled rice and Milo soup are both breakfast items.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Refactored ventcrawling code. No expected behavior changes except for a few texts and the ability to crawl with passive vents.

16 March 2021

Fikou updated:

  • rsf can now have a custom icon, no longer deletes stacks instantly

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The admin button to change everyone's species no longer makes everyone a traitor
  • Vending machines can no longer by thrown via TK
  • Admins lacking +BUILDMODE privs can no longer launch buildmode from the supplypod panel

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • fixed hat sprites duplicating when being thrown

TiviPlus updated:

  • Changed how mechs handle movement and other cleanup

tralezab updated:

  • A new, incredibly rare bot is in the pool.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Nondextrous simplemobs can no longer interact with atmos machineries using hotkeys.

15 March 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Clown cars are now fitted with functioning headlights! Emag them for some more high speed low drag variants!

Fikou updated:

  • the clockwork defenders name now isnt brkoen
  • fixes map template loading centering setting not actually mattering

Ghilker updated:

  • buffed space heater to have double power (from 20000 to 40000 at t1), every tier has been doubled in power as effect
  • refactored construction code to use subtype instead of deleting old cell on construction, changed attackby to use default procs and early returns
  • added documentation and variables with snake cases
  • rebalanced crystallizer recipes to a better use of the energy released to actually have an impact, healium crystal and proto nitrate crystal will create a bit more n2 on rupturing
  • tweaked the costs of some recipes of the crystallizer for more sane productions
  • changed the cooling and temperature control on the crystallizer and the UI now have the temperature bar

Ghommie updated:

  • sweet potatoes and potato wedges no longer output tator tots instead of yaki imo or french fries when processed through the food processor. Same deal for various kinds of meat slabs or cutlets outputting generic meatballs.
  • Non-admin observers can now use emoji that start with d or p at the beginning of a deadchat message without admin command warnings.

Melbert updated:

  • Adds a negative station trait: Bot Language Matrix Malfunction. Is Beepsky speaking nekomimetic...?
  • The "Slow Shuttle" station trait is now properly classified as a negative trait instead of a neutral trait.

Mothblocks, MrDoomBringer for sprites updated:

  • Adds moth tourist bots for chefs.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • fixed neckerchief not being able to be put into your bag
  • Fixes crippled non cultists being able to use cult bola

TheVekter updated:

  • Centcom is now only paying 100cr/mol for Zauker, down from 1050.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fixed various issues with the cyborg beaker apparatus code. These fixes mean it should now properly update its own icon when reagents are transferred to any beaker it is holding.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Minor wheelchair tidying

VexingRaven updated:

  • Paramedics now have access to Cargo Office on Ice Box, lost access to Delivery Office on MetaStation.

carshalash updated:

  • fixed a single letter naming issue

oranges updated:

  • Chance to mutate a monkey into a gorilla is greatly reduced

14 March 2021

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed delta station atmos from power failing in 5 minutes from roundstart
  • Fixed machine frame stacking with disposal system

Ghommie updated:

  • twohandend-required items shouldn't fall down when equipped on another slot.

Kekium updated:

  • You can now craft warning cone from plastic

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Gas will actually dissipate now. Screee at me in the issue reports if you see jank around this or breathing (Please don't ask)

ModDownloading updated:

  • Added lizard scream sound effects, because that's exactly what we need.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Mouse hover outlines will now only show if the item is on your person.

Potato Masher updated:

  • Taking Metastation's delivery chute to science and service should no longer cause bone fractures.

TheBonded updated:

  • Clear PDAs can now be found for sale in the black market occasionally.

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Cook's CQC is now set on a per-map basis, with their CQC covering their own private workplace (the kitchen and freezer) as well as the area where their tourist bots spawn. These changes also give cooks the ability to CQC a restricted area directly outside of their public service tables on Icebox, where the tourist bots spawn.

TiviPlus updated:

  • fixed bad copypaste making atvs not spark like they were supposed to
  • Wheelchair icon updates are now cleaner

necromanceranne updated:

  • Makes the ID sprites (ID, PDA, Tablet) less intrusive while still visible on the mob sprite.

prodirus updated:

  • Nicotine is addictive again.
  • New nicotine withdrawal effects. Time to feel miserable and jittery if you don't get your fix!

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • The glass of beer now uses its unused icon.

spessbro updated:

  • stops people from buying from custom vendors using departmental cards

tralezab updated:

  • Ghost pool protection now updates when you hit a button

13 March 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Spanish tourists now have the correct chance of spawning.

Fikou updated:

  • map template placing being centered is now a selection

Ghilker updated:

  • payment now consider extra fees

Qustinnus updated:

  • Fixes the critical issue of players not being able to anchor griddles

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Chameleon Skillchip has been removed from the game entirely.

dawsonkeyes updated:

  • New metal hydrogen armor sprites

drongood12 updated:

  • Helbital is properly eliminated with a dirty reaction

maxymax13 updated:

  • Items in your inventory now have an outline when you hover over them, originally from BeeStation. This can be disabled in Game Preferences.

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • The bank machine has had a makeover to put it in line with the rest of the terminals.

12 March 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Rabbits summoned by stage magic will start with 0 loaded eggs remaining instead of 10. You can still feed them carrots to cause them to generate more loaded eggs, though.
  • The speed boost from wearing the Easter Bunny head and/or the Easter Bunny suit has been nerfed, but is still present.

Fikou updated:

  • ninjas can now hijack the shuttle

Ghilker, Anturk updated:

  • fix pipes overlays when on layer other than 3

Ghommie updated:

  • refactored the voice of god. Specifically, I made the commands into singleton datums. It's also more robust against edge cases and bad text matches.
  • The voice of god spell should now work for AIs.
  • the voice of god commands themselves should tolerate the lack of whitespaces now.
  • Animals are no loner n(e)igh-immune to stuttering.
  • Silicons and animals won't keep stuttering or slurring forever after being struck by something that made them like that in the first place (such as a Blue Space Artillery).
  • Fixed the manhattan project reagent having two pound signs in its color variable.

Kathy Ryals & Timberpoes updated:

  • Pens now alert the stabbed person again.
  • Refactored attack() code pens and sleepypens.

Kush1Push1 updated:

  • Blood splatters only make your shoes or feet bloody if the tile is bloody enough,
  • Light steps trait prevents clothing from being covered in blood if you step on a bloody tile with your shoes off.
  • Blood dries over time. Usually, 3 or 6 minutes. If a splatter is big enough, it can stay wet up to 15 minutes.

Kylerace updated:

  • holodeck templates no longer have two entries each in the Template - Place verb

MMMiracles updated:

  • Adds a brand new map - Tramstation
  • Three segmented branches inter-connected via a transit system
  • 2 z-levels, with the lower being interlaced with maintenance tunnels to traverse the entire station through various ladder shafts and tram tunnels.

Mothblocks updated:

  • You can no longer alt-click and ctrl-click while inside the cryo tube.

Randomguy523 updated:

  • Fixed a typo for muted pAIs.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Dogs are no longer able to maul you from inside backpacks or lockers. Unless they're void corgis, those pups are still more than capable of doing so!

Thalpy updated:

  • adds a wiki render button for reagent entries that will automatically write a table entry for you.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Food that should drop trash should now always drop that trash, including plates dropping from prepared food, food that you have to pull out of shells and gatfruits.
  • Agent ID cards now show the same SecHUD icons that their forged trim otherwise would instead of always showing as blank.

Y0SH1_M4S73R updated:

  • Pulsing a cut open wire on airlocks will now open it. Since cutting the open wire prevents airlocks from being opened by physical contact, this allows you to make airlocks only openable using assemblies. Try connecting a voice analyzer to the cut open wire.

Zytolg updated:

  • We've untangled some pipework that lead to Kilostations scrubber network feeding into the Xenobiology Air Distribution Loop

esainane updated:

  • The Atmospherics Crystallizer will no longer do wacky things with an empty recipe when "Nothing" is selected.

nianjiilical updated:

  • Sentient Diseases can now talk to themselves, and hear what the salty-ass ghosts of their victims have to say about their experiences with Space Ebola.

prodirus updated:

  • Jumpsuits should now drop attachments such as medals or ribbons when they are destroyed instead of making the attachments disappear as well.

11 March 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Removed extra brute healing from Quadruple Sec drink for security personnel.
  • Removed extra brute, burn, oxygen and toxin healing from Quintuple Sec drink for security personnel.

Ghommie updated:

  • There is a new (backup) centcom announcer in town.
  • Uranium, bananium and bluespace golems and ethereals now properly show visual attack effects on do_attack_animation().
  • simple animals can now have their own visual attack effects instead of just punch or smash. e.g. carps bite and hivebots claw.
  • the slash attack effect now has a sprite.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Things that break pipes will cause much less game lag now. Looking at you singularity

Qustinnus updated:

  • Fixes Pwrgame icon not appearing

Zytolg updated:

  • Icebox Pipework Decongestion

necromanceranne updated:

  • Prevents martial arts warping people that they can view into their killing hands with the power of their martial prowess. And a missing adjacency check.

nightred updated:

  • Meta: Camera tags, wiring, power, and plumbing inspection completed and brought up to code.

prodirus updated:

  • Prevents Tranquility from being synthesized. No more appearing in botany plants!

tralezab updated:

  • bane back breaker fixed
  • Chefs and bartenders earn achievements for doing a good job!
  • Centcom now grades service at the end of a round.

wesoda25 updated:

  • Ethereals can once again channel power into APCs. Right click an APC with an open hand off of combat mode to do so (and to drain, do it on combat mode).

10 March 2021

Ghommie updated:

  • Fixed material exports reporting 1/2000th of the amount of material exported.

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Chef CQC now works in all of Service, to curb greytiding the robots.

Krysonism updated:

  • The butcher's cleaver has a new sprite.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Large singularities won't get clipped by darkness anymore

Lylsburg updated:

  • mafia sprite tweaked, and it now has an animation

Qustinnus updated:

  • Chefs and bartenders can rest easy now that robot tourists will no longer allow themselves to be bullied, and will use their bulky metal arms to give their aggressors are healthy dose of LOVE in form of a very tight hug.
  • New station trait that causes you all to spawn hungover after a mandatory office party

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • A bun will no longer disappear if you add an ingredient to it while it is in your hand.
  • Custom burgers will no longer disappear from adding too many ingredients.

Timberpoes updated:

  • PDA & ID Painter no longer talks about itself so much in warning messages.
  • PDA & ID Painter will now correctly paint Assistant trims and clown PDA skins instead of failing in certain edge cases.
  • Stat panel and verb tabs now have smoother size scaling to higher resolutions, switching from fixed-width buttons to a fixed number of variable-width columns depending on screen resolution.

esainane updated:

  • The atmospherics Crystallizer will now slowly improve the quality of items that will be produced while the temperature remains in the sweet spot, rather than instantly degrading to the worst quality.

spessbro updated:

  • refactored dragging to pick up into an element

stylemistake updated:

  • Stat panel: Verbs no longer wrap, and truncate with an ellipsis. All verb text is revealed on mouse over.
  • Stat panel: Nicer tab appearance in dark mode.
  • Stat panel: Fixed 4 column layout in 1920x1080 + widescreen map.
  • Status Bar returns in an epic cumback.

tralezab updated:

  • chanterelle mushrooms and chocolate are now in the produce console
  • adds a windoor to the bar, and a door to the kitchen to allow access to the atrium
  • opens the kitchen up a bit more
  • tourists now sit facing the bar on delta

09 March 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Fixes some duplicate air alarms on kilostation.

Ghilker updated:

  • lowered the grav gen sound a bit to stop IRL blood loss from ears

Ghommie updated:

  • The xenobio exports file are now included in the .dme, which means xenobiologists can exports slime cores to cargonia if they wish to again.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Remove a comment on the plasmamen security helmet falsely claiming that they protect against flashes, hopefully no more Officers will have their helmets looted at medbay.
  • Added a new ocky icky phobia, careful while talking about amongus now!

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Removes the upgraded hydrogen axe
  • Portable scrubbers are 4x stronger now. This was a bug, but I've got gbp to burn

Maurukas updated:

  • Corrects the wiring of the Metastation telecomms SMES so that the station powers the satelite, rather than the reverse.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Robotourists pay more for food now
  • Only one robo-tourist will wait at the door at any time, preventing constant spam if you only have 2 seats.
  • more variation in robo-tourist colors

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • ERT Medical Officers now come equipped with a box of plushies to give to crewmembers in crisis

Timberpoes updated:

  • Spells now ask you if you want to make them robeless in VV when adding spells. Forcing robeless means the spell can be cast without cult armour or spellcasting robes.
  • Spells have new options in VV to toggle some of the most common spell behaviours including robeless casting, cult robeless casting, whether the spell requires a humanoid mod and whether the spell requires a physical body and cannot be cast by pAIs and brain mobs.

Time-Green updated:

  • Reaction chambers properly cool/heat during reacting
  • Reaction chambers properly add buffers during reacting

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • glass bottle smashes on right click

08 March 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • There are now space tourists from south of the border. Andele!
  • The two taco recipes are now distinguished by name in game to help tell the two apart.
  • The Restaurant Holoseat Creator now uses a slightly different sprite to help it stand out.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes cayenne being invincible
  • adds the jumpsuit variants of skirts to the curadrobe

Fox McCloud updated:

  • His Grace now sounds like a toolbox when picked up/set down
  • Fixes His Grace in-hand icons not updating when he ascends
  • Windup toolbox has more *immersive latch snapping toy action™️*

Ghilker updated:

  • plastic flaps now properly update their behaviour when un-anchored and update the turf they are on so that gases can pass

Mothblocks, Fikou for icon updated:

  • The Jump to Mob button has been replaced with Spawners Menu.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • Directional subtypes to common wall mounts for mapper use

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Dogs now have all-new AI! Go throw a grenade at Ian and see what happens!
  • Added AI datum support for complex JPS pathing

SgtHunk updated:

  • The snowman head's name is now full lowercase.

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Fixed issues with monkeys unable to attack with martial arts.
  • Fixed issues when using martial arts against an alien.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Centcom ID consoles have extended template support.
  • ID cards with no registered age will no longer show null age in Plexagon Access Management.

mozi_h updated:

  • Carbon-copies can now only be removed with a right-click. HoPs, you are welcome (yet again)!

07 March 2021

Dennok, Fikou, Armhulen updated:

  • Fixes shuttle decals not working

Fikou updated:

  • Buildmode now respects your dir for turfs

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed malf AI overload ability from blowing up non-machine atmos devices (like pipes) and the HFR

Ghommie updated:

  • Hieroclub teleportation now respects unteleportable mobs such as anchored AIs and megafauna.
  • Space Dragons are now actually capable of flight.
  • Fixed the E/W sprites for durathread golems' legs being a couple pixels off.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • The slightly pixel shifted decal next to chemistry is no longer pixel shifted
  • The several windows that spawned on top of walls in cargo no longer do this

Qustinnus updated:

  • If you get qdeleted while crystalizing as ethereal, you no longer get super-owned
  • makes the game screen bigger by removing the status bar and moving the chat bar

Randomguy523 updated:

  • pAIs can now be emagged

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The foam finger rocket launcher will no longer make 5000 rockets and freeze the server when spawned

SgtHunk updated:

  • Kilostation's security office is no longer haunted by a red siding in one of the security office's tiles.

Sparkezel updated:

  • Veil fluctations returned to normal values, cult can once more place runes in maintenance and few other areas and blob has lost its aversion to books.

StoneMason / Dwight Walker updated:

  • Chav is now closer to being an actual Chav

Thalpy updated:

  • fixes organ exploits with impure libitoil and convermol
  • Improves the chemical analyser to give you details on impurity and gives an % output in line with other purity descriptions
  • fixes Multiver's purity effects

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fix bug that prevented admins toggling playtime exempt status on accounts.
  • Agent ID cards no longer wipe their own access when Reset.
  • Comms Consoles now have the ability to request codes to the spare ID safe when there are no crew members in the chain of command on the shift. This can be done without logging into the comms console.

Zytolg updated:

  • Wall/Floor Lattice cleanup.

carshalash updated:

  • Carbonation

maxymax13 updated:

  • The Syndicate's tech engineers have minorly modified the wiring on their sequencers to not obstruct the ID card clip on jumpsuits, letting you tell the whole station how much of a traitor you are.
  • You can also show them off like you can regular cards, in case the space bar asks for ID.

06 March 2021

Dex updated:

  • Juice boxes no longer turn into paper cups.

Dorsisdwarf updated:

  • Admins can now see who sent a cross-server message and from where

Fikou updated:

  • Cayenne can now pick up the nuke disk.

Ghilker updated:

  • fix multiz adapters, now they work on the same tile with different pipe layers and they keep the pipelines separated and sprite fix due to layer 1 and 5
  • thermomachines can't be built on same layer pipes

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • fixed a spacing issue

Timberpoes updated:

  • Departmental sec officers now appear on the crew manifest as sec.
  • The new ID card system no longer ignores server config settings and will respect lowpop/highpop access settings in the config. This mean that highpop shifts no longer grant players lowpop access levels when the appropriate config entries are set.
  • As I am happy with the status quo, the headmins have agreed to disable the config entry that was being ignored due to the above bug. Players should not notice any new roundstart ID access changes by the time they're reading this changelog entry and will hopefully start with maximum job access at any population level because it is intended, rather than because of a bug.

tralezab updated:

  • sashimi pays waaaaaay less

05 March 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • The definition of the transfer_blood variable (of gloves) has been moved from the file that otherwise only contains the code of damp rags to the file that defines the other variables of gloves, and has also been documented.
  • Radioactive microlasers can no longer knock out creatures who are immune to the effects of radiation.
  • The radioactive microlaser now calculates the strength of its delay effect using the intensity setting it had when you initially used it on your victim, not the intensity setting it currently has. This prevents people from "cheating out" its intensity 20 effect with only a 2 second delay and a 1 second cooldown.
  • Radioactive microlasers no longer contain twice as much metal as normal health analyzers do.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Monkey kind has rediscovered the lost art of wearing a pet collar. Celebrate with Pun Pun!

ArcaneMusic Ft. Ghost updated:

  • Scanner gates now have a set of wires that interact with assembly components. Experiment!

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Adds a new system for handling organ failure, the old system is still there for organs that havent been ported yet.
  • Liver is now using the new system for organ failure, which means that once it reaches 100 damage (liver is dead) it will give you a 1 minute warning period for you to get to medbay, after that 1 minute the effects of liver failure will slowly ramp up to comparably old levels of deadliness.

Foxtrot (Funce) updated:

  • Restaurant and Bar Holosigns are now buildable in the Service Protolathe.

Ghilker updated:

  • fix piping layer not being set, now it works, also UI value fixed for moles/s intake
  • fixed blast doors and shutters stacking exploit

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Hello lads, atmos has changed again, actually instant settling of say plasma over large spaces should be much less common, and if I've done my job right things should seem a bit more snappy

Melbert updated:

  • Meteor events now announce themselves properly again
  • Crafted foods now inherit their component food's reagents again.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Firing guns no longer runtimes

SgtHunk updated:

  • The Deltastation wall-mounted flash at the Brig entrance is now properly connected to the Brig Checkpoint flasher button.

Thalpy updated:

  • Tweaks cryostylane to use the new reaction mechanics, incorporating stasis iceblocks, freezing, temporary organ decay prevention and surgery slows. Cryostylane when added to a corpse will tint them blue and pause organ decay temporarily, while it is in a mob it will slow down all surgery applied upon them. Inverse cryostylane will freeze you in a block of ice and put you in stasis (living and dead).
  • Tweaks cyrostylane to have a more indepth reaction, where colder temperatures will cause it's purity to decrease.
  • cleans up some of holder.dm code and adds a REAGENT_IGNORE_STASIS bitflag.

Timberpoes updated:

  • All uplink kits that previously had agent ID cards that were lost to the ID card rework now have agent ID cards again.
  • Unhackable safes should no longer tell you the status of their service panel on examine.
  • Modular Computer Tablets held in the ID slot will now correctly show SecHUD icons for their contained ID cards in all scenarios.
  • Departmental Sec officers now appear as Sec members on the Crew Monitor.
  • Ghost role protolathes and circuit imprinters now have a more restricted design inventory, with fewer advanced or experimental designs relating to bluespace, quantum tech and teleportation.

Whoneedspacee updated:

  • Icebox mobs now have crusher trophies.
  • Godslayer Armor can now be crafted by gathering drops from all three icebox megafauna.
  • Adds the easy clockwork defender megafauna to the asteroid ruin.
  • The Wendigo is now a proper megafauna.

Zytolg updated:

  • Airlock Cyclelink Helpers can now function on the holodeck again.
  • Airlocks can see out to 11 tiles now

cacogen updated:

  • Changes instances of DonkCo to Donk Co. to be consistent

carshalash updated:

  • Fixes this food being a steamed muffin monstrosity

mozi_h updated:

  • Consistency: Right-click to remove paper from a folder (instead of Alt-click)
  • Tidied up folder UI code
  • Clipboards have a snazzy new look.
  • Gave clipboards some purpose in life: Edit, rename and sort to your hearts' desire! Insert a pen by just clicking it in. Rapidly pick up paper by clicking on it with the clipboard.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Stops revenants gaining obscenely large essence (AKA health + power) pools by draining dying monkeys.

prodirus updated:

  • Slimepeople should no longer be able to get to negative blood levels from toxin damage.
  • Defibrillating slimepeople should no longer multiply toxin damage and reduce blood levels.
  • People who are both toxin lovers and toxin immune should stop losing blood from toxin heals too.

stylemistake updated:

  • Icons in tgui shouldn't disappear any more.

tralezab updated:

  • No longereth can you faint when fainting would make you never wake up

willox updated:

  • merging stacks of materials no longer increases beauty more than it should

04 March 2021

Ghilker updated:

  • mines no longer get triggered by directional lights
  • removed fire alarm from inside tcomms room due to triggering on roundstart
  • fixed infinite cable restrain exploit
  • lavaland clownplanet ruin outside turfs now spawn with normal air, no longer will kill the clowns near roundstart

Kylerace updated:

  • electrified chair behavior is now a component instead of a type
  • added a dir to the electrified chair overlay feature: make any chair into an electrified chair by attaching a shock kit to them over a live cable

Maurukas updated:

  • Fixes several lavaland ruins failing to generate the correct turfs
  • Fixes xeno hive ruin using space as it's baseturf

Qustinnus updated:

  • You can no longer sentience tourist bots
  • Sentient robots are no longer invincible

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Plexagon Access Management app has been upgraded and allows Heads of Staff to demote any ID card that has a trim they'd ordinarily be able to apply as a template. This means the HoS can now demote departmental sec officers like Security Officer (Science).

YakumoChen updated:

  • A less-than-new Syndicate Special bundle reminds you of the good old days when we didn't need all those newfangled traitor items the young-uns get. We had 6 items in the uplink and we had Monkey in rotation and by god we made do.

tralezab updated:

  • The Chef now has a produce console for ordering ingredients! Botanists are still the best way to get stuff, though.
  • fixed typo on the engineering voidsuit
  • Minebots treads now make noise as they move!

03 March 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Ghost language button will now properly show next to a mafia button, instead of being half a mile away in widescreen mode.
  • Fixed Alien HUD having a language button inside a combat toggle button.
  • Fixed AI HUD having a language button hidden behind a multicamera button in widescreen mode.
  • Adjusted pAI HUD radio and language buttons to better fit their surroundings.
  • Shifted borg language button a few pixels to better fit it's surroundings.

Dex updated:

  • Survival capsules no longer get deleted when deployed at the edge of the map.

Fox McCloud updated:

  • Fixes slimes and oozes not making noise when they move

Ghilker updated:

  • portable atmos reactions now work again

Hadza updated:

  • Fixes TRAIT_NOBREATH crit damage being applied after death

KathrinBailey updated:

  • Metastation's AI satellite is now wired to the station again.

KathyRyals updated:

  • Operating computers no longer link to stasis beds.

Maurukas updated:

  • The ruin of Ratvar will now properly spawn in Lavaland

Melbert updated:

  • Moved heirloom lists to species and job datums.
  • Announced Extended shifts now send a command report listing station traits.
  • Fixed some punctuation in station trait reports.
  • Reduced some copy+paste in gamemode intercepts

Qustinnus updated:

  • French tourists now have their own audio cue

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • A recent firmware update reenabled the screens on Nanotransen brand computers.
  • Bloodsplatter no longer experiences phantom limb syndrome on people missing both of their arms.
  • Recent budget cuts have resulted in accessories no longer having magnets strong enough to pull bloodstains directly out of clothing. Washing machine usage has jumped 50% over the last week.
  • No one is entirely certain who injected the the design schema for neon error signs into the mind magnification helmet production line, but the affected units have been recalled and the perpetrator will be brought to justice.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Plexus Access Management app has had the Basic tab renamed to Trim to indicate that these accesses are available because of the card's trim. It also has an access counter so players can see they're able to change it.
  • Plexus Access Management app has had the logic for displaying the used/available accesses for any given wildcard inverted. It now shows Used/Max instead of Available/Max.
  • Wallets no longer show redundant examine text.

Time-Green updated:

  • Plumbing reaction chambers now have connects for acidic (yellow) and basic (green) buffers! You can set the UI to indicate at what pH the reaction chamber is supposed to insert a buffer into the reaction.
  • Adds plumbing bufferers. Place a bunch of them next to each other, set a threshold amount with right click and screwdriver them. Once all are above the threshold, only then will they start providing chems. Great for waiting steps and carefully dosing amounts!
  • The reaction chamber no longer pulls specific chems, and instead has a set volume it works towards before being able to react.

carshalash updated:

  • Oxidates blue cherries and makes parsnips cause Alzheimer's

mozi_h updated:

  • Folders have a snazzy new look. (Check out those colours!)
  • Rapidly pick up paper by clicking on it with a folder. Alt-click to remove an item from a folder.
  • Split and cleaned up folder code.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Restores the missing cyborg suit directional sprites.

tralezab updated:

  • tgui wizard panel
  • Japanese Tourists have been added!
  • And they brought Beef Stroganoff!

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Supermatter Monitor now shows total moles. It glows red if your SM is going to singulo.
  • Supermatter's defines have been moved into it's own file in the __DEFINES folder.

02 March 2021

Dex updated:

  • Luxury bar capsule no longer runtimes when deployed.
  • Water bottles no longer splash you when you press left mouse button in combat mode.

Fikou updated:

  • powersinks now should be centered on the tile when dropped/thrown
  • ontop flag now checks for mobs too
  • adds some flags to the admin bitflag menus

Ghilker updated:

  • xenos and random event mobs can't spawn in atmos tanks

Mothblocks updated:

  • Admins can now cancel or replace midround rulesets.
  • Admins can now correctly force midround rulesets.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • several duplicate items around metastation have been removed

Qustinnus updated:

  • Ethereals can now scream

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can now smack your hand on tables to emphasize a point! Simply ready a slapper with *slap, then click on an empty table! Doing so with a left-click lets you fire off a series of weaker slaps, while a right-click makes one big, loud slam for maximum impact!
  • Right clicking someone in combat mode as a hulk will now shove them, like it does for normal humans

SparkezelPL updated:

  • Adds new radiation collector array sprites. If an array is turned on but has no tanks, it now displays an error animation.
  • Removes "Hawking Radiation" in arrays with just radiation. It was nice to know you singulo...

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes the randomly failing unit test that sometimes happens.

Timberpoes updated:

  • ID cards have now completely changed. ID cards have limited available access slots increased by card rarity and the specific job trim. Jobs with more innate access now have more valuable ID cards. Better watch your backs!
  • Yes, this means that you can no longer mass-distribute unrestricted All Access. During War Ops, you're expected to protect the diskie and disk holder. Sec can distribute guns. Cargo can order guns. You can still get key accesses like Maint on any ID card. HoP can still create and trim special silver ID cards for high value staff members to get more access. Adapt. Overcome. Suffer.
  • Chameleon ID cards are completely reworked. Instead of copying all accesses from a card, they now open up an interface where you can select up to 5 accesses to copy over depending on the target card's access. tweak: The ID Console has been updated to reflect these new changes including a somewhat improved layout. You can apply job templates direct to cards via a drop-down interface and these templates will attempt to fill out as many accesses on the card as it can based on the card's trim and the template's wildcard setup. tweak: The PDA Painter has now been upgraded with a tgui interface. It can be used to paint PDAs the same as before, but can now also change the trim on ID cards. This procedure will remove all access levels from the ID card in the process, leaving you with a freshly trimmed blank ID card. tweak: Captain job trims now have a white star instead of a dull grey star. removed: Mining Conscript Card has been removed and replaced with a spare mining ID that holds and has the access the Conscript card gave. tweak: The Captain's Spare ID has been moved from the Captain's locker to a secure safe on the bridge. The highest ranking Command member on shift start is given the codes to this safe, generally following the chain of command. The QM is part of this and can, in exceptional circumstances where no other heads join the shift, become Acting Captain. Their ID card would be given Bridge access if they were picked as Acting Captain to allow them to access the captain's spare. If nobody in the chain of command joins the shift, the next latejoined player from the chain of command will be given the codes for the spare and promoted to Acting Captain automatically. tweak: The secure safe on the bridge is a special variant that is immune to conventional weaponry and lacks the hacking mechanic of ordinary wall safes. Maybe if you could examine it close enough, you'd find hints to its weaknesses... tweak: Examining players now shows a more detailed representation of any ID card in their ID slot.
  • Added the world's worst coder sprites for ID card overlays including PDA, Laptop and Wallet icons for when they're in the ID Card slot too. May God have mercy on your souls, for my spriting skills have none.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Adds basic cybernetic eyes to the medical protolathe and mechfab. Adds improved cybereyes (equal to human eyes) to the Cybernetic Organs tech node.
  • Fixes up a missing sprite when wearing the durathread bandana on your head.

01 March 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Janitor cyborgs are no longer capable of placing their bucket module on their own head, and feeble attempts to replace a no drop hat atop a cyborg's head will be met with failure.

Arkatos updated:

  • Emagging escape pod console will now properly allow you to launch the pod even without required alert level. Farewell, security!

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed crystallizer, now working properly, the GUI was broken when i changed name of a var, now the gui works again, also the internal gasmixture wasn't initialized anymore for some reason
  • changed some recipe to cost less, zaukerite and SM shard cost a bit less now (was intended to be changed in the main PR but i forgot)

Qustinnus, Kryson & uglykoala updated:

  • Ethereals now crystalize on death, allowing them to heal themselves unless the crystal is destroyed, but giving them a brain trauma when its succesful. tweak: ethereals now stay emagged for longer

cacogen updated:

  • Should be less likely to get inedible food now
  • Slicing penguin meat slabs into raw cutlets should work again

28 February 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Plungers on layer mode won't turn into the pink/black error sprite when worn on the face

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Pin the tail on the corgi works again.

Burgerman updated:

  • warden's police hat now no longer leaves a space before your message and people should now get Canadian conversions when they did not previously, cigarette will now convert to dart and scuffle will now convert to kerfuffle

Ghilker updated:

  • Crystallizer, a machine that converts gas mixtures into solid matter, usually crystals. Select a recipe and see the requirements to make that object. The green port is the input, the red port is the cooling/heating.
  • removed zauker gas grenade
  • added n2o crystals (releases small amounts of n2o gas)
  • added crystal cells (high power cell but not rechargeable)
  • added zaukerite and relative recipes (aestetic item/bragging rights)
  • added gas recipe datums for multiple machines support

Gurkenglas updated:

  • The chaplain's null rod can now dispel the heretic's transmutation rune. Note that as with with the Nar'Sie rune, you must stand on it.

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Poor Aim no longer blinds you, and now properly reflects the aiming capabilities of the galaxy's finest.

Thalpy updated:

  • Improved the chemistry debug tools for people to use tweak: adjusted Helbital, Libital, probital, lenturi, aiuri, hercuri, convermol, tirimol, seiver, multiver, syriniver, synthflesh and penthrite to better use the new chemistry mechanics - see the wiki! tweak: Gave Helbital, Libital, probital, lenturi, aiuri, hercuri, convermol, tirimol, seiver, multiver, syriniver, synthflesh and penthrite impure mechanics
  • added a laugh for hel
  • Improved some of the reagents code to handle this

YakumoChen updated:

  • Hygienebots can fly over tables now.

cacogen updated:

  • Watermelon slices spawned by an admin or by a map are edible

tralezab updated:

  • Restaurant Customerbots now gib into robotic gibs

27 February 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • The daemon forge's normal description and stackcrafting description have been updated to reflect the recent changes to the daemon forge.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Throat slitting combat logs are easier to understand

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where you were not able to move action buttons around.
  • Fixed a missing title header of the Microscope UI.
  • Fixed a missing title header of the R&D Console UI.

Dex updated:

  • Fixed light floors not working properly.

Ghommie updated:

  • combo streaks now reset after a while (default to 6 seconds), and not just visually, if no unarmed action is performed during that time period. Also, the combo hud now fades out, starting 2 seconds before the timed combo streak reset. Of course, the animation is halted and the opaqueness restored when the aforementioned "countdown" is interrupted.

Guillaume Prata and M. Joyce updated:

  • Fixes Plasmamen ERT not spawning properly
  • Updated sprites for the CE and CMO Envirosuits and some small fixes on others.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes certain announcements (captain's announcements, nuclear operative war declaration, command reports, etc) not playing their respective sounds.
  • Interns no longer override their superior's announced command reports.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Dynamic will now play a part in controlling random event antagonists. If a dynamic midround injection is coming too soon, or too early, then the next midround injection will be buffed. Otherwise, it'll spawn normally.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Added new station traits that gives departments / everyone death rattle implants

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Admins can actually use the Briefing Officer Outfit preference to set their preferred briefing outfit for ERT's now
  • Iron rods and pens can once again embed in targets if thrown at high speeds (like explosions)
  • Trying to use an emote while it's cooling down will now tell you how much longer you have to wait. This will only show for emotes with longer than normal wait times.
  • Disabler beams from drop pods/frag grenades will no longer cause burn wounds.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Nanotransen would like to make an official notice to all stations equipped with an SME (SuperMatter Engine) Since the last batch of crystals were shipped we have noticed an increased workplace accident occurrence rate in the engineering department. The supermatter is not made of candy. Do not lick it.

Time-Green updated:

  • fixes hardcore random paying out double on deconversion

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • brand_intelligence event no longer has 30% prob of making an hull breaking explosion and destoying the machine when converting them to rogue vending machines which means there is 30% more vending machines that get turned into rogue ones aka all the ones that got hit with the vending machine virus

cacogen updated:

  • Spawned hot cross buns (e.g. one in cafe on MetaStation) are edible again
  • Hot cross buns now use a bread slice instead of a loaf of bread (more economical)

mozi_h updated:

  • Sheets of carbon will no longer be infinite or invisible when copying.

prodirus updated:

  • Allergy suffers should now stop accumulating histamine and toxin damage while in stasis.

redmoogle updated:

  • Virology Healing Stat Bonuses Work Again
  • Virology Narcolepsy Increased Speed Works Now

vincentiusvin updated:

  • You can now check the EER of the supermatter as a ghost by examining it.

26 February 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • There are now two experiments that botany can perform that boosts botany tech and experimental surgery.

Dex updated:

  • Jukeboxes and disco balls are no longer invisible.

Fox McCloud updated:

  • Fixes some future potential sound oddities

Ghommie updated:

  • fixed a problem with room beauty not updating when movables are moved around whilst contained within another movable, or when deleted.

Qustinnus, MrDoomBringer updated:

  • The chef and the bartender can now open up their venues to tourist robots, different robots have different tastes and will come visit to buy your wares!

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Ghosts can start their messages in deadchat with asterisks again

Son-of-Space updated:

  • Completely redid MetaStation's exterior layout
  • Some of the solars on MetaStation weren't set up last shift. You'll have to build them yourselves.

SuperNovaa41 updated:

  • fixed forcing people into clown cars.

TJatPBnJ updated:

  • Abductor tongues now tell you how to attune them on examine, and in the abductor shop.

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes smashed bottles not applying their splashing effect on people
  • Reduced the lag on the chemistry recipe lookup button on the dispenser
  • fixes ice cream temperatures in the ice cream vat

Zytolg updated:

  • Gets rid of a doublepipe that was throwing a bunch of mapping errors in the bar pipenet.

25 February 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Updated radial menu for a spider selection from an egg cluster. It will now include a small button for showing additional information about given spider type.
  • You can now choose a spider from an egg cluster from a distance instead of having to be next to them as a ghost.
  • "Click to play" button on when spider egg cluster matures will now actually give you a selection of spiders to choose from instead of doing nothing.
  • Radial close button is now more obvious and clear.

Burgerman updated:

  • Powersink now needs 25 pop to buy and costs 1 more tc.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes cult wraiths creating juggernauts instead
  • fixes right clicking with crowbar not working

Gurkenglas updated:

  • Spiders on web now ignore an absence of gravity.
  • ninjaDrainAct is now used with rightclick, not toggled with HUD.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Midround dynamic injection no longer has a 100% chance of activating.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Glowshrooms now spread and decay different from before, hopefully preventing the issues they were causing with performance
  • Monkeys no longer rip apart machines from the inside

Time-Green updated:

  • Only maintenance maintpills now give you maintpill score

24 February 2021

Dex updated:

  • Push broom will no longer slip you up while sweeping slippery items.
  • Push broom now sweeps on pre move rather than moved.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes pirate captain spawning with the wrong outfit

Fikou, Floyd, coiax updated:

  • Adds the Intento! Buy it in your local library vendor!

Ghilker updated:

  • readability, docs

Kylerace updated:

  • you can no longer use holodeck items to get stuck in custom vendors and do nothing else
  • custom vendors will no longer tell you an item cant be accepted twice in a row

Qustinnus updated:

  • Adds a subsystem for ai movement

SomeAngryMiner (sprite), Qustinnus (porting) updated:

  • Ports the supermatter sprite from Beestation

Thebleh updated:

  • Assembly parts no longer fall out of their holder when being picked up.

bobbahbrown, Qustinnus, MrDoomBringer, ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Experi-sci. Some nodes in the techwebs will now require specific experiments to be done. Some will also give a discount to specific nodes
  • Active point generation has been removed from techwebs

necromanceranne updated:

  • Sticky tape no longer can be used on objects that aren't within reach.

23 February 2021

Dex updated:

  • Added a food cart to Kilo kitchen

EOBGames updated:

  • The Nanotrasen Entertainment Division has released a new card game designed to be played quickly and easily: Wiz-Off.! Join the battle at your local Fun Vendor today!

Flareguy updated:

  • Telescopic batons are now a discernible shape

Ryll-Ryll updated:

  • Implements JPS Pathfinding!! I'll do the rest of this later

Thalpy updated:

  • fixes cold reactions not reacting in a few limited cases

necromanceranne updated:

  • Shielded Robes and Mirror Shields can no longer be made from daemon forges.
  • Eldritch Longswords and True Nar'sian Hardened Armor can be made from daemon forges. True Nar'sian Hardened Armor has no slowdown, unlike the lavaland version.
  • The equipment spell now grants you a cult dagger. Still separate from the other spell so that you can acquire a dagger without being slapped with a validsuit.
  • Eldritch longswords and cult daggers have block chance (50% and 25% respectively). Cult daggers cannot block projectiles and the cult ghost longsword only has 25% block chance.
  • The cult blindfold only stuns you if you actually are stupid enough to put it over your eyes.
  • Fixes the halberd not correctly displaying the correct inhand sprites.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • atmos devices with multiple ends that is hooked to the same line can now redistribute pressure more consistently. (can connect to a single pipeline in more than one nodes)

22 February 2021

Dax Dupont updated:

  • Fixed a type in gauze falling off message.

Fikou updated:

  • adds new sprites for wizard cult constructs
  • fixes wraith jaunts being invisible
  • fixes wizard cult constructs not working

Kathy Ryals updated:

  • Atmos holofan projectors can now project up to six holograms. tweak: Swapped the engineering holofan projector in the CE locker for an atmos projector.

Melbert updated:

  • The flavor text of the lifebringers has been adjusted for clarification.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Fixed multiple high impact rulesets being chosen on Dynamic.

NamelessFairy updated:

  • A levitating light switch in Metastation toxins storage has now been attached to a wall

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Mounted seclights work again.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • fire extinguisher particles can go through machinery, lockers, crates and extinguish the air on top of them
  • fire extinguisher uses modern pass_flags code instead of shit code
  • new passflag : PASSDOOR instead of being ''''PASSMACHINERY'''' added it to xray , some sniper thing and crucible pot to have same effects as before

dragomagol updated:

  • Icebox public mining APC now uses the correct area

itseasytosee updated:

  • Rust Heritec slime people will no longer be hurt by rust

necromanceranne updated:

  • Stops the rune carver from carving on invalid targets.

theOOZ updated:

  • Better visual clarity of the health scanner's text colors.

21 February 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Limbs melted by plasma lava on icebox will not become invisible any more.

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where certain Auxiliary Base construction options were not working properly. Better get building!

Dex updated:

  • Raven evac shuttle can now early launch

General Bazelart Haffaz Aladeen updated:

  • Sorry I changed secrets panel again, it's more organized and has open spaces for some new buttons
  • Making everyone monkey from secrets panel no longer snitches to the entire server
  • Readded change all species button to only fun for you

Ghilker updated:

  • readability, docs

Imaginos16 updated:

  • NanoTrasen has now graciously created new outfits for their esteemed members of Central Command! These include new turtlenecks, a fancy coat, a new cap, and a skirt edition of the current Official jumpsuit.
  • As a result of these changes of apparel, however, NanoTrasen came to the decision to remove the old CentCom Officer Jumpsuits in favor of the Turtlenecks.

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Binary Encryption keys work in pAIs that have downloaded the encryption key software.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Adds update_appearance, update_name, and update_icon
  • The supermatter can now consume miasma in the air to power itself.
  • Mobcode is now ever so slightly more consistent

Thalpy updated:

  • Adds a new reaction lookup window to the chem dispenser
  • Adds the chemistry tab in the crafting menu for ghetto chemists, this allows users to create tabletop burners, thermometers, pH booklets, droppers, improvised chem heaters and improvised cooling sprays
  • Adds 2 new reactions - ice and universal indicator
  • Refactors part of crafting code to allow use of machinery and optimises part of the code
  • fixed addictions not applying moods and start procs correctly

Timberpoes updated:

  • The buckled, handcuffed and legcuffed alerts now work properly when clicked on.

Time-Green updated:

  • Fixes roundstart runtime from addictions
  • fix chemscan runtiming on mindless
  • Fixes reagent chambers not working

c420-o updated:

  • Added foam finger, toy and admeme version
  • added foam finger

cacogen updated:

  • Crafting menu will now tell you which colour of crayon is needed (useful for recipes like the crazy burger)

itseasytosee updated:

  • death examination are less confusing

necromanceranne updated:

  • Fixes regal pipeguns inheriting jamming from pipeguns.
  • Fixes projectile_damage_multiplier not applying to stamina damage dealt by projectiles.
  • Tidies up some of the code in living duffel bags to meet contribution guidelines.

timothymtorres updated:

  • Fixed cigarettes being lit in no-oxygen environments
  • Cigarettes can be injected with oxygen to allow smoking anywhere
  • The cigarette brand 'Space cigarettes' now has oxygen in it's default reagents (allowing it to be smoked in space)

tralezab updated:

  • New Event: Shuttle Insurance!

19 February 2021

Kylerace updated:

  • personal training units can now have toolboxes attached to them again
  • there are no longer BB's inside your guns. whatever that means

NotRanged updated:

  • Fixes hitscan beams not reflecting off of certain tiles (e.g. reflective blob) properly.

Qustinnus updated:

  • fixes has_material_type and has_material_category always returning a true value

Thalpy updated:

  • improves holder.dm readability
  • fixes explosive chems without temperature requirements to explode at any temperature

Timberpoes updated:

  • When a player is held up at gunpoint, the HUD alert is no longer permanent and will be removed when the player is no longer held up.
  • Observers can no longer click on alert icons to perform actions when auto-observing players.

dragomagol updated:

  • build mode fill tool now asks for confirmation when filling an area greater than 150 tiles

necromanceranne updated:

  • Cleans up the weirdness of Blood Halberds by bringing them under the cultblade parent, as well as making their code more compliant with contributor guidelines. Also renames them to Bloody Halberds.
  • Blood Rites now uses a radial menu to choose which spell to cast.
  • A new sprite for the Bloody Halberds. It looks more like a polearm.
  • Adds a sprite for plushies in suit storage slots.

timothyteakettle updated:

  • stops people using message all when their pda doesn't allow it

18 February 2021

Fikou updated:

  • you can now open airlocks and firedoors and stuff with a crowbar on combat mode by right clicking
  • you can now cast rituals on dynamic if the threat level is 100

Kryson, Qustinnus updated:

  • All drug addictions are now put into 5 categories: Stimulants, Opiods, Alcohol, hallucinogens, and maintenance drugs. There is no longer an addiction threshold and becoming addicted is done by gaining addiction points from doing drugs in a specific category, if you become addicted you can stop being addicted by lowering your addiction points until it reaches a low enough value.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes a very rare edgecase that could cause spawned ghosts to be unable to move

Melbert updated:

  • Tailed species now get very upset if you steal their tail from them.

Mothblocks, Qustinnus updated:

  • Hovering your mouse over things now shows their name on the top of the screen

NotRanged updated:

  • The Reactive Spines blob strain's retaliation now applies the strain's reagents, and can trigger once every 2.5 seconds.
  • Fixed and changed the Explosive Lattice blob strain. It didn't work at all, but now actually applies an AoE of light burn/brute.
  • Changed comments and descriptions of various blob strains to be more consistent.

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes reaction chambers eatting beakers, and lets users eject beakers when out of power with alt.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Viewing your playtime panel as a non-admin should no longer yell at you in chat that you have insufficient rights.

Time-Green updated:

  • Adds the auto IV! You ever wanted to feed the clown actual oceans of morphine? You can! You can technically hook up 9 of these to 1 person, so go into your plumbing RCD and have fun! You can also draw blood with it I guess
  • Changing the drip speed on an IV is now on right click instead of alt

Whoneedspacee updated:

  • You can now purchase ice hiking boots from the mining vendor.
  • You can now craft plasma lava boats from polar bear hide.
  • Icebox turfs can now be mined with your bare hands. tweak: Icebox creatures now have signals that can be tracked.
  • Ash drake armor now has cold protection so it can be used on icebox.

cacogen updated:

  • You can no longer receive 50x the value of items sold with barcodes on the Supply shuttle tweak: Sales barcode profit splits will consistently default to 50% (you can still set this to less, but there's no reason to at the moment) tweak: Sales tagger examine message improvements tweak: Sales tagger and GrandArk Exporter tablet app both tell you the valid range to set the profit split in now
  • 'Barcode tag' is now called 'barcode tag'

drongood12 updated:

  • the BRPED beam now hits exactly the object

necromanceranne updated:

  • Corrects an incorrectly set var in syndicate portable turrets that prevented them from firing.

17 February 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Replaced Construct HUD with a generic living mob version.
  • All constructs will now show a healthdoll to the user.
  • All constructs will now show severity of their injuries as a red screen overlay to the user.

Kylerace updated:

  • holodeck laser beams no longer get stage fright when their gun houses stop existing unexpectedly

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • The server's last round should be actually viewable now

TJatPBnJ updated:

  • RCD upgrades now work again

Thalpy updated:

  • fixes the lag compensator not discharging properly in reactions
  • refactored equilibrium.dm to fit as anything requirements

cacogen updated:

  • You can't return your own wayfinding pinpointer to get a costume now
  • Improves code a bit in wayfinding.dm

spessbro updated:

  • fixed some things being synthesized which should very much not

16 February 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Ethereals now always take 1.25x as much brute damage as humans do, instead of 1.25x-1.75x as much brute damage (depending on their charge level) as humans do.
  • The special alert message for reaching 0 charge as an ethereal now actually appears.

ArcaneMusic, Twaticus, coiax updated:

  • Nanotrasen reminds its crew members that the station has never orbited a Gas Giant, and is engaging in a media campaign to remind employees of this fact.
  • WAke uP ShEepLe naNotrAsen is LyINg To You wHERE DoEs THE gaS CoME from, huh?

Kylerace updated:

  • transit tubes are less sleepy now

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Lavaland and icebox can no longer cause infinite fires in rare edgecases

LordVollkorn updated:

  • The Portable Chemical Mixer has been improved. Don't know where to efficiently put all your bottles of pure precursor chemicals and medicines? Fridges and floors littered with half-filled beakers? Just print the portable chemical mixer at the medbay lathe, no anomaly core needed! tweak: It now displays pH-values. tweak: It can dispense smaller amounts (1u). tweak: It can now also be loaded with bottles, plastic bottles and condiment bottles. tweak: It can be opened and closed with CTRL+left click. tweak: It's inventory (beakers and bottles) can be accessed with a simple left click now when on the belt (when its opened). tweak: It's UI has been resized to make it easier to visually skim through the chemicals in it's list.

Mothblocks updated:

  • Changed the visual artstyle of valentine's day hearts.

NamelessFairy updated:

  • Kilo's Engi/Atmos access's air alarm is now attached to a wall
  • Kilo's maintenance gas flow meters are now attached to pipes tweak: Two additional gas flow meters in Kilo maintenance have been added tweak: An air alarm in Kilo atmospheric access has been moved one tile to the right

Potato Masher updated:

  • The entire service department can no longer access the Theater Backstage from the Service Hall. Can't a clown get some privacy?

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • The light eater is now a component
  • The light eater's esoteric effects can be dispelled if you sacrifice the armblade
  • The light eater has some additional flavortext

Thalpy updated:

  • fixes N2O to make it less difficult to react. tweak: N2O will now produce N2O gas when below 30% purity during a reaction.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Admins can now create special z-level looping rods through the Trigger Event and Smite menus.
  • Added a unqiue deadchat_control component for immovable rods. This is easily applied through the VV dropdown menu. This lets deadchat control the immovable rod by voting on its trajectory every 6 seconds. This does not make the rod loop and if admins want a deadchat controlled rod to traverse z-levels, they should var edit it to allow that to happen,
  • There's a new pair of helper procs, sit_stay_good_rod() and go_for_a_walk() which allow admins to stop a rod or send it at a specific target respectively. This was possible before with enough knowledge, but has been condensed into two helper procs for ease of access.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Adds a suppressor sprite to the sniper rifle so that it no longer shows the dreaded pink sprite of missing file.
  • Repaths toy pistols to be a child of the actual makarov and not the saber smg toy. Toy overlays are handled in the parent and not for each individual toy gun.

timothyteakettle updated:

  • you can't purge security records if not logged in

tralezab updated:

  • Pirates are now split into different variants that are all very deadly.

zxaber updated:

  • AIs can no longer shunt while activating the Doomsday Device and still expect it to finish setup on its own.

15 February 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Mothpeople now actually have their mood worsened when their wings burn off.

Bazelart at TGI Friday's updated:

  • Reactive armor is now vulnerable to EMPs while on, instead of just turning off.
  • Table armor is now more representative of getting pushed onto a table in current year
  • It's a balance thing, I guess!

BluespaceA for their glorious voice, hulk for editting updated:

  • There's a new roundend sound - bully2.ogg. Will it live longer than gondola bridge??

Elli-Skala updated:

  • Added leafy mushrooms as a plant useable to make torches
  • rebalanced the size of torches to be tiny and not bulky

Hadza updated:

  • Thorny vines now get deleted after their venus human trap bud is removed.

Kylerace updated:

  • holodecks no longer get performance anxiety when one of the items it was supposed to spawn decides to not show up to the rehearsal

SishTis updated:

  • Updated russian keyboard localization. You can now use russian letter as prefix for radio channel, like, :у for engineering.

Thalpy updated:

  • fixes reaction chambers giving free buffer on deconstruct/reconstruct

Zytolg updated:

  • Rearea's Xenobiology so that Monkey Recycler and Slime Grinder are accessable to the Slime Consoles at game start.
  • Changes some active turfs in space to inactive
  • Removes a second wire at the bridge-side door

cacogen updated:

  • Bounty cubes have GPS signals now

necromanceranne updated:

  • Makes it possible to wear the spy bug by making it actually an accessory clothing item.

spessbro updated:

  • refactored can_synth into chemical_flags

14 February 2021

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Fixes a crashing issue with valentines' day.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Syringe toggle has been replaced with left-click to inject, right-click to draw.
  • Syringes can now change transfer amount like other reagent containers.

Melbert updated:

  • updated and doc'd a bunch of procs and vars for plant genes
  • Plant gene traits now use signals instead of looping proc-calls
  • Plant analyzers can now read out the reagent contents of a tray.
  • The chemical scan mode of plant analyzers was moved to right click, and is no longer a toggle.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Admins can now spawn an unarmed horde of interns in addition to the old armed horde
  • Admins can toggle name randomization for ERT's, as well as if they'd like to be spawned in the briefing room at the time of creation
  • Admins can now force ERT's to pick the leader role from the most experienced candidates in terms of playtime
  • Menus like Create Response Team and Create Portal Storm now toggle boolean options when clicked, rather than open a popup window to select one of the two options
  • Centcom Officials are now a full subtype of ERT, rather than being a separate antagonist type with duplicated functionality

Son-of-Space updated:

  • redirects some atmos piping previously going through walls

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes cyrostyland and pyrosium

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Fixed valentine antags blocking up midround and latejoin antags from spawning.

cacogen updated:

  • Cargo pizza crate now picks randomly from a list of most pizzas (non-repeating)
  • Cargo pizza crate pizza boxes now display their tags correctly
  • New box tags for pizzas that previously lacked them
  • Pizza bomb variant that starts armed (look for the "Meat Explosion" box tag)
  • Cargo pizza crates have a 15% chance to spawn a pizza bomb (armed or a free one) once a round
  • The pizza bomb the pizza party spawner may create uses the armed variant now
  • Adds a secure pizza crate to the Ice Box cargo warehouse (kitchen access, may contain an armed pizza bomb)

itseasytosee updated:

  • Wizards now have unique construct and soulstone sprites
  • fixed some shades dropping the wrong ectoplasm

nightred updated:

  • ICEBOX: fixed Double wiring
  • ICEBOX: fixed mining mecha bay camera name
  • ICEBOX: fixed mining eva camera name
  • ICEBOX: Atmos waste line vent was moved to prevent the melting of atmos
  • ICEBOX: plating outside the station is a bit snow covered now

wesoda25 updated:

  • Round start and ghost role wizards are rarer now.

13 February 2021

Fikou updated:

  • people with conspiracy phobias are scared of gas miners

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • N2O is no longer toxic
  • Fixes the Pick Up option in the shift + right click menu not working

SgtHunk updated:

  • The lavaland syndicate base air injector now functions as intended.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • breaching missile works on windows with low bomb resistance

itseasytosee updated:

  • it is now harder for prone people to break out of grabs as originally intended

spessbro updated:

  • Removes useless defines in codex gigas code

tf-4 updated:

  • Thirteen more winter coats covering all departments and most jobs.

12 February 2021

Fikou updated:

  • every mob can climb on ladders

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can now right click to splash reagent containers, instead of switching to combat mode.
  • Splashing reagent containers is now a part of any reagent container you can spill, rather than just beakers and drinking glasses.
  • You can now right click an airlock with a welding tool to weld it while not in combat mode.
  • Removes older ID consoles completely. You will no longer be able to find the circuitboard or research it. Consider creating a computer and installing the Plexagon Crew Management app instead.
  • Fixed dynamic parameters not checking the configuration. This means that Manuel will now have slower midrounds, as was intended.

Kylerace updated:

  • slight performance improvement to clown pdas

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • BZ will no longer cause hallucinations or kill changelings at hyper low percentages of the gasmix, put some effort into your ling murder why don't you.
  • BZ now only causes brain damage when it's greater then 10 kpa of the mix, its hallucinations and effects on lings are still locked to 1 kpa or above.

Sparkezel updated:

  • Spellblade was crafted with laziness and bloodlust, not boodlust

SparkezelPL updated:

  • Sharpness now uses bitfield

TJatPBnJ updated:

  • Right clicks on a ranged attack will now call afterattack when it's supposed to.
  • You can no longer hold yourself up with a gun
  • Holding someone up with a gun will no longer cause a runtime when two people hold up the same person.
  • Having multiple people hold up the same person will no longer cause the victim's alerts to disappear when just one of the perpetrators stops holding them up.

Thalpy updated:
