  • Adds a new reaction mechanic that allows reaction to occur in an incremental fashion. This uses temperature to determine reaction rate and pH to determine purity. The hotter it is, the faster it reacts. Keeping your pH within the range (default 5-9) will keep it pure, with the further out you are affecting your purity. Reactions are also H+ consuming/producing and exo/endothermic.
  • Adds purity mechanics for reactions - if a purity extremely low at the end of a reaction then it will convert into viscous sludge or a failed chem. When a reagent is consumed; If a reagent is very impure it will inverse into another chem. This inversion will remove all of the original chem and take its place instead. If it's slightly impure then it will split into an impure chem with respect to purity. The ratio of original to impure is determined by the purity of the original when consumed.
  • Adds the following basic impure reagents to accommodate the changes above: Chemical isomers, Toxic sludge and Viscous sludge.
  • Acidic and basic buffers. These will self-consume when added to a reagent holder will other reagents in it, and alter the pH towards their respective extreme. Thereby altering the pH without affecting the volume. adds; Optional catalysts - these reagents will speed up the reaction of a certain type. Presently Palladium synthate catalyst exists and works on medicine reagents only.
  • Competitive reactions - Tempomyocin and Purity tester are reactions that compete based off temperature. Tempomyocin is a reagent that will instantly speed up a reaction based off its purity and the purity tester reagent will fizzle if the solution it is added to has anything impure in it.
  • Adds an overheat/impure mechanic during reactions - overheating your reaction past it's overheat point will reduce the yield of your product by 2% per tick, with some reactions having special explosions instead. If overly impure it will reduce the purity of all reagents present in the beaker.
  • 1 dropper and 1 bottle of acidic buffer (you can make this) to the chemist's locker. Gives chemists a starting dropper and random buffer. Added pH booklets to the chemists chemdrobe - these can tell you the pH of a beaker by ripping a sheet out of them and using it on a beaker or reagent holder
  • Adds a pH meter than can be researched and printed from the med lathe. When used on a reagent holder it will tell you a detailed breakdown of the reagents in the beaker, including pH, volume and purity. It will also detect ongoing reactions.
  • Adds pH to all reagents - the pH of a beaker/holder will be the sum of all reagents with respect to volume. pH is an abstracted potential of hydrogen that affects reactions.
  • heavily edited the chem heater into a reaction chamber, showing multiple details on a reaction, edited chem master and chem dispenser’s UI to show pH.
  • You can now use droppers and syringes directly on heaters to affect the beaker inside of it (provided there’s a beaker in there)
  • Tweaks most reagents to use a default handler. The ones omitted are ones that rely on being instant. This default has a minimum reaction temperature of 100, an optimal temperature of 500 and an overheat temperature of 900+. Their optimal pH range is 5-9; which will result in a purity 1 reagent when kept within this window. If the reaction is within a pH window of 1-4 or 9-13 the resulting purity will be dependent on the deviation from 5 or 9. <1 or >14 will create impure chems for every step. If your final purity on the end of a reaction is less than 0.15, then it will collapse into Viscous sludge. The reaction is mildly exothermic and H+ consuming.
  • tweaks chocolate milk, firefighting foam and hercuri reactions to work better with the new mechanics. These inherit the same pH windows as above but are cold reactions instead.
  • added several sound effects for chemistry
  • added melting beaker icons, pHbooklets and pHmeters
  • changed reagents code, created equilibrium.dm
  • refactored main chemistry mechanics to use reaction rates, pH and purity mechanics

Timberpoes updated:

  • Windows are now much less stubborn when you accidentally find yourself inside them (*blushes*) and will let you step off their turf to the South when you were prevented from doing so before.
  • Re-added the button to the player playtime panel that lets admins toggle a player's job playtime exemption status.
  • The wizard's immovable rod form no longer deals variable damage depending on the number of objects on the turfs it's passing through. It instead deals full damage to everything it hits and hits everything on the turf at the same time.
  • The wizard's immovable rod from can now impact with any other immovable rod to create a singularity. This probably kills the wizard. This definitely kills the rod.
  • The wizard's immovable rod from can now hit mobs that are lying on the floor.
  • The wizard's immovable rod form is now incorporeal and flying.
  • The wizard's immovable rod form is now much, must faster - Especially when hitting multiple targets.
  • The wizard's immovable rod form deals a LOT more damage to non-mobs that it passes through.
  • The immovable rod no longer deals variable damage depending on the number of objects on the turfs it's passing through. It instead deals full damage to everything it hits and hits everything on the turf at the same time.
  • The immovable rod can now impact with any other immovable rod to create a singularity. This definitely kills the rod.
  • The immovable rod can now hit mobs that are lying on the floor.
  • The immovable rod is now incorporeal and flying.
  • The immovable rod is now much, must faster - Especially when hitting multiple targets.
  • The immovable rod deals a LOT more damage to non-mobs that it passes through. feature: The immovable rod can now traverse z-level to chase its targets down when used as both a targetted smite and as an option from the admin event menu. feature: The immovable rod will subtly grow as it consumes the souls of sentients it hits.
  • The immovable rod no longer stalls on Icebox and will now spawn on the same z-level as its destination.

coiax updated:

  • Shift start messes in cargo can now include package scraps, the same sort of stuff you get when opening packages.
  • The Jolly and Depression quirks are much more active. You can expect the positive/negative moodlets to affect you around 50% of the time.
  • Goldschlager will have the same effect of gold when drunk; it is around 9% gold in SS13.
  • Goldschlager is now only really enjoyed by teenage girls, others will think it's not bad, but not great.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Fixes harpoon guns jamming because they're a child of the mosin nagant.
  • You can print more than a single sheet of tape at a time.

11 February 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Similarly to how moth characters with the family heirloom quirk have a 50% chance to receive an old lantern as their family heirloom instead of one of their job's normal family heirloom items, felinids with the family heirloom quirk now have a 50% chance to receive a toy mouse as their family heirloom.

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • Bronze now properly works within the materials system. Consistency issue where despite being a glass material, you cannot use it on grilles is fixed. You can no longer use bronze on a girder and then weld the resulting wall to turn it into a wall gear.
  • Bronze is now regarded as a sheet instead of a tile.
  • Checking for if a sheet type requires a unique girder is now a variable called "has_unique_girder". This is used on bronze and runed metal.

Fhaxaris updated:

  • Modular ID console will no longer insert/eject ID card for AI or to telekinesis players.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Fixed pre_attack, fixing RPEDs and similar.
  • Chemical scan is now on right click for health analyzer, removes it as a toggle.
  • Right clicking on your jumpsuit will now open suit sensors, rather only working if you attack it with an item.

NamelessFairy updated:

  • Chocolate bars can be made using regular milk again

NotRanged updated:

  • Automatic blob expansion now applies proper reagent strain effects when it hurts a human

Timberpoes updated:

  • When an admin makes a cyborg flash immune by giving it TRAIT_NOFLASH, that cyborg is now actually immune to flash.
  • Random corpses spawned in offstation ruins will no longer report as having suit sensors when their sensors are disabled.

cacogen updated:

  • Bounty cube announces creation over Supply with its creator and area
  • Bounty cube speedy delivery bonus of 20% for cargo if it's sent within five minutes
  • Bounty cube personal handling tip of 10% if you scan it with an export scanner while on the cargo shuttle (paid on sale)
  • Bounty cubes nag over Supply with their area, starting at five minutes with time increasing between each

deranging updated:

  • added missing "a" in the description for the Bluespace Artillery Fusor

eeSPee updated:

  • Regal rats spawn with a unique name
  • Regal rats have a new ability, domain, to replace coffer; it spreads miasma in the air, and they passively regenerate health in miasma
  • Rat kings can lick food and glasses to add rat spit, and can rummage through trash to find coins and cheese
  • overdosing on rat spit gives you the rat faction

10 February 2021

EikoBiko updated:

  • altered the wagging cat tail sprite.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Some jumpskirts/dresses have new Object icons

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can now right click with the hand tele to teleport to the last location you teleported to last time.

MTandi updated:

  • Software Downloader program UI revamp

Qustinnus updated:

  • Ambience is now in a subsystem, and plays every now and then without you having to move to a new area for it to play

RaveRadbury updated:

  • fixed a few moodlet typos
  • cleaned up some moodlet time into defines

SparkezelPL updated:

  • Hatchets have longer throw range and can embed

TJatPBnJ updated:

  • The M90 now uses right click to fire it's grenade launcher.
  • 40mm grenades are now bought in ammo boxes for 6tc rather than individually for 2tc

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes necropolis curse's stage 4 grabby hands
  • tweaked transitional ui widgets to appear smoother

cacogen updated:

  • In-spect scanner is now called N-spect scanner (the N stands for Nanotrasen)
  • N-spect scanner has a better sound effect
  • N-spect scanner description reads better
  • N-spect scanner report is now a child of paper

coiax updated:

  • All beakers, bottles and containers that have been used in the All-in-One Grinder will have a warning not to inhale the dust on examine.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Fixes pancakes not being able to be made on the griddle.
  • Fixes missing sprites for the worn_icon_state for bullets and telebatons.
  • Fixes dead facehuggers and bottles not having their worn_icon_state properly set up.
  • Fixes some missing sprites for the Possessed Sword, Moonlight Greatsword and Chain Whip nullrods.
  • Adds new sprites to the wizard ritual knife and veilrenders.

stylemistake updated:

  • Oversized tgui windows will now resize to fit usable screen area (relevant for small laptop screens).
  • All tgui windows are now resizable, unconditionally.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • cryo now inject reagents more consistently i.e. more often and in smaller amounts.

09 February 2021

Elli-Skala updated:

  • fixed space bat's damage numbers
  • Sergeant Araneus spawning already hurt

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Forcing roundstart rulesets should now work properly.

Melbert updated:

  • Added missing punctuation and removed a bad blind message from climbable things

NotRanged updated:

  • Engi ERT now gets power tools, upgraded RCDs, and pipe dispensers.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Makes station traits less common

Son of Space, Fikou updated:

  • A RIPLEY variant with its own set of sprites.
  • Mules on Meta have been replaced by a cargo hauler and a few pairs of rollerskates

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Metastation Nanite Lab now requires general Science departmental access to enter instead of Xenobiology access.

Urumasi updated:

  • You can now wear xenobio pressure-proofed jumpsuits in space.

cacogen updated:

  • Clown and mime pin mob sprites now appear correctly from all angles

coiax updated:

  • Space heaters are now purchasable from Cargo.

stylemistake updated:

  • Fixed scrolling bug with ExoFab

timothymtorres updated:

  • Venus Flytraps now take burn and cold damage.

zxaber updated:

  • RoboTact will now show borgs their logs again.
  • Fixed a hotkey conflict that by default prevents borgs from toggling combat mode using '4'.

08 February 2021

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • The issue with the autolathe software where Titanium, Plastic, Adamantine, Wood and Mythril were not accepted as autolathe inputs is now fixed. You can now make wooden toolboxes again.

Fikou updated:

  • reinforcement nukies and borgs get droppodded into their location
  • fixes contractor drop pods having the wrong icon
  • adds rare tier to maint loot, expect to sometimes find some neat stuff!

Gamer025 & nightred updated:

  • CTF no longer tries to dust the same mob multiple times which caused a lot of runtimes

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Mafia/Highlander players won't breath and are fire proof.
  • Plasmaman won't be transformed into Humans for Mafia/Highlander

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Station traits will no longer completely block the Central Command report or the automatic code blue on Dynamic.
  • Toggle suit sensors is now bound to right click.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes a bug that could cause the atmos system to lock up permanently

Melbert updated:

  • Unstable Mutagen now mutates again.
  • Fixes grown inedible foods not being squashed with liquid contents.

Melbert, sprites by Cybersaber101/Blueshirtguy updated:

  • Added mouth slot sprites for roses

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can now actually blow kisses at people with the *kiss emote!
  • The Captain's antique laser now fires more powerful hellfire lasers rather than normal lasers

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • missing detdrobe refill is orderable

cacogen updated:

  • Keybinding conflict message takes up less space

coiax updated:

  • Added sound effects to the deathrattle implant. Now, when you are informed that someone in your deathrattle group has died, you'll also hear a deathknell. RIP.

stylemistake updated:

  • IMPORTANT FIX: Game client will now properly reconnect on roundrestart!!!
  • Fixed a few cases where links in tgchat opened directly in the panel instead of the browser.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • N2O and Healium now can trigger chemical euphoria individually like it's supposed to.

07 February 2021

ATH1909 updated:

  • Using amputation shears on incapacitated, critted, dead, unconscious, paralyzed, staminacritted, etc. targets is now much faster. Jittering still penalizes the speed at which you can cut someone's limbs off with amputation shears, and that penalty now applies even if the target is stunned or in critical condition.

Fikou updated:

  • repaths plasteel tiles to iron

MTandi updated:

  • Nanite Monitoring now works with pinpointers and Lifeline
  • Pinpointers now track properly on multi-z stations
  • Stationary crew monitor now shows data from all levels of multi-z station
  • Nanite Dermal Button icon set now contains more icons, but without color options

Son-of-Space updated:

  • The beer nuke is now available on Kilo, all is as it should be. Go find it!

SparkezelPL updated:

  • Now all emp proof cells are emp proof

Useroth updated:

  • proc/reset_pull_offsets() resets the mob's offsets to their own base_pixel_x and base_pixel_x, instead of the puller's

timothyteakettle updated:

  • newscaster sanitization go brrr

06 February 2021

Couls updated:

  • Restored gorillification from irradiated monkeys

Fikou updated:

  • syndie gasmasks are small
  • fixes galoshes description
  • makes blast cannons not seem like an innocent item before a bomb is loaded
  • renames metal sheets to iron sheets

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The ninja's energy katana now uses right click to dash instead of being a toggle.

KathrinBailey updated:

  • Chameleon masks and neck slot items fit into boxes and pockets, like their counterparts they're camouflaging as almost always do.

Kylerace updated:

  • turrets made via the holodeck laser guns now stop working when the guns get deleted
  • radio uplinks can no longer become unusable due to the code frequency
  • autolathes can no longer create items for less materials than they can be recycled for

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Reinforced plasma windows now fully block superconduction, or heat movement
  • Heat from a delaminating supermatter won't leak out of the chamber on its own now, things will be a bit more spicy now.

MTandi updated:

  • Fixed NTOS File Manager renaming/deleting wrong programs when used with external disc

Melbert, sprites by Cybersaber101/blueshirtguy updated:

  • Two new plants! Roses and Carbon roses can now be grown in botany. You can even make rose bouquets!
  • Four new plant traits! Exothermic Activity in Ghost Chili Peppers, Endothermic Activity in Chilly Peppers, Auto-Juicing Composition in Pineapples, and Hallucinatory Feedback in Laughing Peas.
  • Three new plant genes! Welding Fuel in Combustible Lemons, Nitrogen in Coffee Arabica, and Formaldehyde in Corpseflowers.
  • The Plant Analyzer was re-written to unify output formatting.
  • A bunch of botany related things now use defines for their minimums and maximums.
  • Plants now almost entirely use the setter/adjuster procs to change their stats instead of doing it directly. Planted, spreading Growshrooms how have a minimum endurance of 10 instead of 0 as a consequence but they're functionally almost identical.
  • Plant analyzers now show what graft you would get from a plant or seed, as well as the yield modifier a tray has.
  • Plant analyzers now have a better description and examine text to show it as other modes you can switch it to.
  • Plant analyzers now show the stats of grafts when you scan them in addition to their plant gene.
  • Inedible grown items now gain their chemicals properly after being harvested
  • Inedible grown items now give out a proper analyzer readout on both modes
  • Replica pods now give out the actual DNA they have in them instead of 'sampleDNA' on analyzing.
  • Rose sprites, Carbon Rose sprites, and a Rose Bouquet courtesy of Cybersaber101/blueshirtguy

Pepsiman0 updated:

  • fixes the tend wounds healing the wrong damage.

Qustinnus updated:

  • You no longer need to hold shift to open the context menu as a ghost
  • You can no longer kidnap ghosts with a moving table
  • Combat mode prevents you from being pushed by movement
  • hauntium is now properly applied to the photo.
  • you can no longer shoot and melee with guns at the same time

Qustinnus, Actionninja & Goof for some audio, fikou for beeping twice updated:

  • Adds station traits: Small modifiers that can randomly be chosen each round. They are usually logged in the intercept the station receives early in the round
  • Announcement audio is now stored in a datum to make it easy to add different announcers

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Friendly commendations now track by the recipient's ckey rather than the mob they controlled at the time of commending. You'll still have to use their character name when specifying them.
  • Trying to commend an invalid target as an admin will give you proper feedback that it did not go through
  • The config entry for friendly commendations has been changed from 'COMMENDATION' to 'COMMENDATION_PERCENT_POLL'
  • You can now remove embedded objects in a patient by using a hemostat on the patient's affected limb, no surgery necessary!
  • Removed the now obsolete "remove embedded objects" surgery
  • Objects thrown at high speed (like by a hulk or amped up disposal outlet) are now more likely to embed, scaling with the speed they're flung into you at
  • Most bullets are now slightly more likely to embed
  • .357 bullets are now somewhat more likely to cause piercing wounds

Skoglol updated:

  • Removes the adrenal implant and the adrenal nanite program.

Son-of-Space updated:

  • The civilian remote now properly affects service department doors
  • Some areas are now properly affected by ai monitoring

Thebleh updated:

  • Added keybindings for enabling and disabling Combat Mode

Timberpoes updated:

  • Monkeys are once again susceptible to viruses. Some human-derived species that previously were immune to viruses due to an oversight may now be susceptible to viruses too.
  • Heretic's void cloak no longer deletes itself when you take it off after removing the hood using the action button.
  • Heretic's void cloak is once again visible on examining a player when they have unequipped the hood direct from the equipment menu.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • you tool can be deconned
  • medvendor, syndisoft and youtool no longer are unbreakable
  • youtool has a refill
  • clothesmate refill is now buyable

dragomagol updated:

  • borg organ bags are now an apparatus and drop held organs on deconstruction

esainane updated:

  • Hosts of Xenomorph Embryos now correctly receive their IMMERSIVE messages in their final moments.

tralezab updated:

  • MAFIA: Three new security roles have been added for townies!
  • MAFIA: speeds up when half the people are dead, thank god
  • MAFIA: Assistants are no longer in the game. Too boring of a role when mafia rarely starts
  • MAFIA: Lawyers didn't roleblock like half the roles in the game?!? now they do.
  • No more centcom jaunting!

05 February 2021

AnturK updated:

  • Aquarium fish now reproduce.

Fikou updated:

  • Refactors CTF pickups and mine powerup subtypes into a new powerup system!
  • simple animals no longer reset their icon file on death

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Dynamic now rolls a separate budget for round start and midround antagonists, meaning less round start antags will roll in favor of more midround ones.
  • The antag_cap value now uses an equation that scales with population, rather than a fixed array.
  • autotraitor_cooldown now uses deciseconds rather than ticks, so the older value of 450 now means 45 seconds. Set it to be 9000 if you want it to be accurate to the old value (15 minutes), or simply unset it.
  • Midround/latejoin dynamic timers are now configurable.
  • Syndicate Sleeper Agent will now give details when ti fails.
  • The autotraitor cooldown now respects configuration, rather than resetting back to 15 minutes after it is rolled.

Maurukas updated:

  • A Public mining shuttle dock has been installed near the holodeck on Kilostation
  • Kilostation's incinerator has been expanded to accommodate the HFR and provide Atmospherics with an additional work area
  • Adds a trash chute to tool storage and the morgue on Kilostation
  • Removed the nonfunctional public mining dock from Kilostation aux base construction
  • A number of small piping issues on Kilostation have been fixed

Qustinnus updated:

  • Intents have been replaced with a combat mode. For more info find the PR here: https://github.com/tgstation/tgstation/pull/56601
  • removes the test-merge only code from the combat mode commit

RaveRadbury updated:

  • fixed description for Void-Stares-Back

Son-of-Space updated:

  • Robotics can now properly use their maintenance on Meta
  • Removed an active turf in science solars

Time-Green updated:

  • Oops, maint pill consumption counter now works

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Added chat fonts that can be chosen via settings. You can also input a custom font.
  • Fixed dropdown overflow if the selected input is too long.

and Jack7D1 updated:

  • Adds new flight potion moth wings.

cacogen updated:

  • Tapes can now be turned over for double the recording time
  • Tapes can now be renamed by clicking them with a pen
  • Tapes can no longer be respooled using a pen (triggered renaming)
  • Tape and tape recorder handling sounds
  • Tape recorder play/record loop
  • Tape and tape recorder misc. improvements (see PR #56023 for details)

esainane updated:

  • Added a missing Power Cable on Ice Box, so the Bar APC can charge without intervention again
  • The Temperature Gate's description now makes it clear that the gas flows only from the input side to the output side when open.

maxymax13 updated:

  • Emergency survival boxes now have an unique blue sprite and description to tell them apart from regular boxes.
  • Added craftable normal/extended emergency oxygen tank boxes to put your emergency oxygen tank collection inside.
  • Emergency first aid kits now look visually consistent with full first aid kits.

nightred updated:

  • Icebox: Genetics monkey pen is larger
  • Icebox: Toxins area reworked layout
  • Icebox: Toxins burn chamber moved to prevent overheating Science hallway

silicons updated:

  • modular id consoles are now sanitized

04 February 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Repeated EMPs should no longer render a secborg's disabler permanently unusable.

Fikou updated:

  • adds vars for damage done by temp on simplemobs

Gamer025 updated:

  • The recycler now fully recycles items, including their contents

Kylerace updated:

  • its now slightly harder to abuse the holodeck to break the second law of thermodynamics

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes spacevines seemingly randomly dying
  • Config works again, WAIT I JUST GAVE ALL THE POWER BACK TO THE ADMIN TEA-

Low3 updated:

  • Admin Log and Show Admins in Secrets panel now render unicode characters.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixed some incorrect args for visible messages in piggybacking and bone-setting.

NotRanged updated:

  • Emitters are now hitscan beams.
  • Fixed a bug with hitscan beams and reflector boxes.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Turns the Duffel Bag Curse into a melee spell, with significant rebalances and changes to rework the spell for being a melee spell.
  • Dealing with the duffel bag is slightly more easy, but it inflicts you with a lot of fairly disruptive debuffs while attached, and not dealing with the bag will hurt quite a bit.
  • Tidies up some of the living duffel bag code.
  • Replaces improvised shotguns with Pipeguns (with a special variant for those willing to go through arbitrary bullshit to acquire it and sheer good luck).
  • Now all guns can be set to misfire and swap ammunition.
  • Misfire chance is incremental as you fire the weapon, and not a flat static chance. This can be reset by using a piece of cloth on the gun and 10 seconds of cleaning.
  • This has been applied to the detective revolver, but it only increments while using .357 bullets.
  • Guns can have damage multipliers attached for the bullets they fire. The pipegun (but not the regal version) is the first example with a 75% damage output.
  • The Ice Hermit now has a regal pipegun instead of a Mosin Nagant.
  • The bandolier fits 7.62mm.
  • You can construct receivers and rifle stocks in the crafting menu.
  • Detaches the magical rifles from the boltaction subtype, since they are just basically not using any variables attached to that subtype and made from a series of early returns.
  • Changes the carrying traits on Latex/Nitrile gloves into a skillchip.
  • Medical doctors start the round with a quick carry skillchip (was the latex glove trait).
  • Paramedics and the CMO start the round with a quicker carry skillchip (was the nitrile glove trait).

03 February 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • You can now make a damp rag from a bolt of cloth by using it on a sink, just like how you can make a damp rag by using a strip of gauze on a sink. The ability to stackcraft damp rags from bolts of cloth has not been removed.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes wizard corpses not having beards

Gamer025 updated:

  • The help emote will no longer tell you that you cant use is
  • Ghosts can now use the help emote and emotes generally behave like they normally would instead of being posted into death chat
  • Crack emote no longer runtimes when trying to be used by ghosts

NotRanged updated:

  • Changed a lot of blob code backend around, making it easier to mess with balance and work with in the future.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Adds tactical chairs
  • Floors now properly select a destruction method to use when blown up
  • you can no longer put things in a griddle wrong

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Using certain martial arts will create a combo meter when you attack.
  • Added combo meter icons.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • is_blocked_turf no longer fails to do anything
  • admin spawned holy nades work
  • holy explosion is more efficient at doing whats supposed to do

02 February 2021

AdipemDragon updated:

  • Cooks have become better at baking breads.
  • Spiderbread slice is now visually distinct from the Xenobread one.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Plasmemes and ethereals will no longer have their head or torso disappear after being augmented with a robotic replacement.

Fikou updated:

  • handfeeding dead simplemobs no longer runtimes

Gamer025 updated:

  • Wendigo will no longer runtimes when screaming
  • Wendigo will no longer runtime when it tries to teleport but has no location to teleport to

Kylerace updated:

  • holodeck doesnt absentmindedly forget to clear previous programs anymore when hit with the free lag hammer

MTandi updated:

  • Nanite programs based on triggers don't ignore rules now
  • Added a button to select how multiple rules applied in a single Nanite program (AND, OR logic)

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • fixed thermomachines still working even without power, apc off, in space etc...
  • fixed the rod duplication bug using reinforced floors and disposals. disposal ejections now properly break floor reinforcement, dropping you just 1 rod.

Son-of-Space updated:

  • The Pubbystation Monastery is now available as an emergency shuttle.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • when u choose a sac target as heretic it ll also tell the job of the sac

Useroth updated:

  • scaling coefficients for security and antagonists in the game_options.txt will now respect being disabled by being set to 0, instead of having 1 as their minimal possible value

coiax updated:

  • The chef's CQC (close quarters cooking) ability is now imparted by a skillchip in their brain, similar to Station Engineer's skillchip for wire colours.

esainane updated:

  • Space Heaters can now heat or cool to their full stated ranges, rather than being clamped to a minimum of 2.7°C.
  • Research points produced by BZ formation are now properly rate limited to a sane level.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Fixes a runtime with crates climbable element.

vincentiusvin updated:

  • tritium and h2 now uses burned_fuel for o2 consumption.
  • moved the burned_fuel amount around so its tidier.

01 February 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Vend A Trays can now be moved onto and off of tables.

Fikou updated:

  • you can now joust with friends on ridden animals, not just borgs anymore! to joust have a spear in one of your hands, ride a mob of some kind and you can knock other people off the mobs they are riding!
  • you can no longer ride goliaths without a lasso
  • you can no longer feed dead mobs
  • mechs now use base_icon_state for their icon changes

HugoOdaX updated:

  • Added blast doors and shutters to the crafting menu and blast door controllers to autolathes. As well as deconstruction steps.

Kylerace updated:

  • holodeck access flags

Low3 updated:

  • Books now properly render unicode characters.
  • Book title length bumped from 20 to 30.

Melbert updated:

  • The seed extractor will now dispense seeds directly into hands first like vending machines.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Fixes sheetifier not being able to take hauntium

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Extrovert and Introvert quirks, they add mood bonuses to the bar and library, respectively.
  • Moved \n's outside of the /span's they were next to
  • Rejoice Crew! NT has finally added locks to Deltastation's toilets.
  • NT has added locks to the Icebox toilets.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Resonators can now chain detonate fields and set matrix traps that activate upon someone walking over them.

Sparkezel updated:

  • Old heretic influences are now visible to new heretics.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Ammo calibers are defined

Timberpoes updated:

  • Hypnosis and brainwashing now have additional logging in Player Panel logs and attack logs.
  • Slaughter demons now require physical adjacency to body slam and can't body slam while phased.

Tristrian updated:

  • Added duffelbags for Science, Botany, Virology, Genetics, Mining and Chemistry.
  • Vendors have been updated to sell the duffelbags.
  • The new duffelbags can be selected in the character preferences for the affected jobs.

Valtosin updated:

  • dead guard spiders are now visible

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • Wound tending, goose suffocation, hugging, and people holding items in photographs have had their pronoun usage fixed.

Zytolg updated:

  • New Xenobiology Satellite
  • 1 Additional Slime Pen
  • The Old Xenobiology Satellite
  • Shrunk 2 Slime Pens
  • Integrated Cytology closer in to the Xenobiology Lab.
  • Slimes now are centralized around the Execution Room, and get to watch.

cacogen updated:

  • There are training bombs in KiloStation and DeltaStation security offices now

31 January 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • Some redundant code from Oztek boomerangs has been removed. This should have pretty much no gameplay effect.

Kylerace updated:

  • Nanotrasen overhauled much of the holodecks programming so that it didnt have to keep physical copies of the simulations anymore.
  • holodeck uses map templates instead of area_copy

Putnam3145 updated:

  • Removed some bits of initial gas mixes that are explicitly the one thing you are not allowed to put into initial gas mixes.
  • Added temperatures to some initial gas mixes that were missing them. This also breaks stuff, but at least it doesn't explicitly say that.

30 January 2021

Melbert updated:

  • Nuke arming and disarming is now logged

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Emotes have been audited for whether they should be seen or heard. No more hearing glares or seeing groans.
  • Mimes act out screams when their vow is active
  • If you have poor aim you now close your eyes when you shoot.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Added a config setting for logging uplink purchases.

Valtosin updated:

  • fixes stacks like wet leather not being dryable in a drying rack

Y0SH1M4S73R updated:

  • There is now a visual indicator for when you touch someone that has the Bad Touch quirk.

coldud13 updated:

  • improved cryoxadone flavour

dermondarble updated:

  • fixes misspellings of 'permanently'
  • fixes grammar with bandaging wounds on yourself

29 January 2021

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes a logging issue with hydroponics trays spawning spiderlings

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Steam rises from griddled food rather than down into it.
  • Spiritual crew get a mood boost from being in the Chapel
  • Fake moustaches are tiny and can fit in boxes

dermondarble updated:

  • stopped players from being able to eat regenerative cores

itseasytosee updated:

  • Adds a surrender button that pops up when you are at gunpoint that can be pressed to do the *surrender emote

28 January 2021

AnturK updated:

  • Aquarium and aquarium accessories. Also fish. Check out cargo to start.

Guillaume Prata updated:

  • Chief Engineer's envirogloves (Plasmaman) are insulated like the others from Engineering now.

NotRanged updated:

  • The examine text of holosign creators now show how many projections are being maintained.
  • Fixes hallucinations occasionally lasting forever due to negative values.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Adds a new material called Hauntium which you can get from photos with ghosts on them taken by the Camera Obscura, If you make items from this material, the resulting items will be haunted, attempting to pick them up may even make them hostile!
  • Cleans up AI controller code a bit based on things I missed in the first PR.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Fixed broken streaks for martial arts

Sparkezel updated:

  • Spells like lesser summon guns, blood bolt and arcane barrage work again properly.

nightred updated:

  • Monkeys are no longer able to hold items that require two hands.

tralezab updated:

  • Reactive armors that didn't have a cooldown now have one
  • Anon names post-roundstart now correctly changes IDs as well

27 January 2021

tralezab updated:

  • Department Revolt event is now... at least usable.
  • Department Revolt now hits security

26 January 2021

AdamElTablawy updated:

  • Spiders are now stuck on harm rather than help intent, meaning you can't trade places with them like other simplemobs.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The genetics camera now has the correct name.

Arkatos updated:

  • Changelings will now show correct ID job icon on security huds upon transformation, if ID was actually equipped as a part of the flesh disguise. Upon reabsorbing the flesh disguise ID, the icon will also immediately disappear, so keep that in mind.
  • Changeling flesh disguise IDs will now properly show overlays upon examine.
  • Changeling flesh disguise will now properly include suit storage slot item, if there is any.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Friendly quirk has been lowered from 4 to 2 points.

Maurukas updated:

  • Missing disposals pipe in Kilostation's robotics lab is replaced
  • Missing sci-drobe added to R&D

PotatoMasher updated:

  • Oldstation (ghostrole space station) now has proper atmos pipe layering.

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Allows tobacco products, food trash, fancy boxes, organs, and a few other things onto trays.

Son of Space updated:

  • Maintenance Botany on Meta has been restored

Son-of-Space updated:

  • Delta APCs have been replaced with their superior autoname versions
  • Standardizes KiloStation APCs
  • several invalid game states on Kilo have been fixed.

SparkezelPL updated:

  • Mosins now have 10 armor penetration and lowered wound chance
  • Russian surplus now costs 50% more
  • Due to their old age and poor maintenance Mosin Nagants can jam now, use a gun maintenance supplies on them after combat to make them keep their reliability.
  • Added gun maintenance kit, it contains gun maintenance supplies you can use to make sure your mosin doesnt jam. You can find them in russian surplus crates

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Neon carpets exists. Bug your local chemist or quartermaster for a supply.
  • Decals support user-defined planes and some forms of smoothing.
  • Emissive layers now support emissive turfs, items, and mobs as well as emissive blocking structures.
  • You can recombine stacks of carpet you split apart again. Did anyone notice that this was broken?

Timberpoes updated:

  • Dense machines once again deconstuct into frames instead of all their raw component parts.
  • The Crew Monitor should no longer stop functioning when Doctor Hilbert hangs out in nullspace, and should continue to work despite any similar errors in the future.
  • Noogies are now combat logged.

cacogen updated:

  • Painting exhibit names and descriptions are different
  • Paintings no longer tell you they're fair to middling

eeSPee updated:

  • Codex Cicatrix and Fake Pierced Reality toys.

25 January 2021

Maurukas updated:

  • Icebox turf generation no longer breaches the labor camp and mining base
  • Fixes all roundstart active turfs and genturf errors on Icebox
  • All APCs on Icebox are now located within the areas they power, not in maint
  • Removes duplicated APCs on Icebox
  • Fixes Icebox's power grid, in general

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • fixed an access issue with a table in meta toxins

Qustinnus updated:

  • climbing is now done through an element

RaveRadbury updated:

  • If you're a Clown/Mime fan and you become obsessed, you'll have them as your target. Also works for Spiritual with the Chaplain.

cacogen updated:

  • Soapstone messages at or below -5 voting score won't persist. This is to reduce the amount and increase the overall quality. If this changelog wasn't here last round you may be able to save one

dragomagol updated:

  • The Medieval Shuttle's brig now has a brig area instead of its usual area for escape checking

esainane updated:

  • If you manage to start fusion in the HFR without starting the cooling process, you can now start cooling and interact with the process as usual, rather than being softlocked. You still aren't able to disable cooling once fusion has started.

24 January 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Pre-mapped cups of lean will hold the correct amount now for sure.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes an edgecase where groups of gas could settle while on fire

Tralezab, Nabski and Coaix helping in name string additions updated:

  • Added the Wizard Academy anonymous theme
  • Wizard event requested by actionninja to enable the wizard anonymous theme as a summon events... event.
  • Themes are no longer switch cases and strings, they are now datum singletons. I really should have done this before
  • Anon names can be ran post roundstart with options to announce or not
  • Anon names won't fuck with your preferences anymore, only loading from it instead of saving to it.

coiax updated:

  • AI status displays are now controlled either by emotes (like `*happy`), or by clicking on the status display as an AI.
  • The Skittish quirk will now cause you to automatically dive into a locker/crate if you bump into it (although closets must be closed). Walk to avoid this behaviour.

23 January 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a layout for four misc icons next to the intent selection in non-widescreen HUDs.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can now noogie people! Simply get them in a neckgrab, switch to disarm intent while targeting their head, then go to town! Those without flesh like skeletons and people with augmented heads are immune to this form of bullying. Moths and flypeople, on the other hand, are extra vulnerable to it due to their sensitive antennae. Lastly, hulks are extra rough with noogies, making them deal more damage.
  • Added gunboots for admins

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fixes an exploit where machine frames could be stacked. Now when a machine frame is created on a turf it shouldn't, it deconstructs itself down into its component parts.

dragomagol updated:

  • changed references of robot module (engineering, medical, etc.) to model
  • moved robot declaration and model declaration to their own files

spessbro updated:

  • updated ntos copyright

22 January 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Crab meat is now visible yet again.

Fikou, Kryson, aceedex from /vg/ updated:

  • reinforcing the mining hardsuit with goliath hide now makes the sprite cooler

Koshenko updated:

  • TCG item scaling refactored into an element

Krysonism updated:

  • The evil crab has a new look.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes the botany gene-shear click-stacking input exploit to get around health requirements.
  • Fixes invasive spreading overtaking plants of the same type
  • Fixes invasive spreading going through windows

Qustinnus updated:

  • All quirk point values have been re-done

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Expressive Aphasia allows for "Mr." and "Mrs." as intended.

Son-of-Space updated:

  • Gives plushes on MetaStation names
  • Gave plushies names on Delta
  • Gave plushes on IceBox names
  • Gave plushes on KiloStation names

Timberpoes updated:

  • Codex Cicatrix no longer has infinite charge.
  • You can once again get addicted to chems through metabolism.

zxaber updated:

  • Transforming a human into an AI using the player panel now allows for keeping the AI at the old human's location.

21 January 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • The surgical toolset implant's circular saw and surgical drill now both have a force of 15 (as is normal for surgical tools of their respective types), instead of 10.

Borisvanmemes updated:

  • tips related to devil

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Singularities no longer disappear when hit by a projectile. Praise Lord singuloth.

Qustinnus updated:

  • dynamic threat reports are no longer perfectly accurate, they diverge and are sometimes downright wrong.

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Monkeys can use all four intents now.
  • Monkeys can use martial arts now.
  • Most living mobs can be the target of martial arts now.
  • Moved martial arts to mob/living instead of humans.

coiax updated:

  • Nuke ops can now purchase a box of "deathrattle implants". When an implanted person dies, all the other users of the implant will get a message, saying who died and where they died.

dragomagol updated:

  • Replaced some magic numbers with defines in robot code

eeSPee updated:

  • Small fixes to heretic book and rune

stylemistake updated:

  • Fixed map display in Centcom Pod Launcher UI to not collapse into a tiny square.

20 January 2021

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can no longer roll a Die of Fate multiple times before the first roll takes effect

coiax updated:

  • Spray-on insulated gloves, a BEPIS tech, now produce a visible message when disintegrating. That disintegration can be caused by absorbing a shock, or now by washing them too much.

esainane updated:

  • HFR moderator reactions which increase or decrease heat output now actually increase or decrease the heat applied to the fusion mix, rather than just modifying the number shown in the interface.
  • The HFR can now be reactivated after partial reconstruction without first needing to reconstruct the core, and will not get stuck in a state where attempting to use the interface says "Activate the machine first by using a multitool on the interface.", and using a multitool says "You already activated the machine."

remove32 updated:

  • add error handling to server build tool

19 January 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Moonlight Greatsword is now a proper sharp weapon and no longer a modified nullrod. That means no free antimagic anymore, my friends.

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • The new "Comet" hairstyle has been added, looking a bit like its namesake.

Fikou updated:

  • you cant tie bronze boots anymore spriteadd: makes the clockwork helmet not as big on the ground

KathyRyals updated:

  • Fixes a runtime with the sickly blade.

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • fixed glass plating turning invisible when damaged
  • changed some floor tile broken_state code to use a proc in initialization rather than hardcoded in
  • removed initialization override for plating.dm
  • all non-iron based tiles will no longer magically turn into iron plating when broken, instead asteroid turf will become dug and stuff like grass, dirt, water etc. will not change icon when broken
  • Added mutadone bottle to genetics and removed a random wire in xenobio maint, and raw anomaly cores in toxins launch room
  • Added a robotics desk facing science hall and replaced a wall next to rnd door with a window, as well as space cleaner in robotics medical area (to clean those dastardly oil spots the previous crew left behind 😉 ), robotics now has their missing medbot items, and 10mj cell replaced with 15mj, like old metarobo
  • robotics work area has been expanded, robo operating area is moved to the right wall and is opened up a bit, robo work floor is a tad darker
  • Added shutter access between Toxins and Toxins storage
  • Added a Pump to cytology gas pipe and a firelock to the cytology door
  • robotics morgue tray, and robotics tech fab now face the correct way

Rohesie updated:

  • Regular and material floor tile recipes no longer have the same name. You can seal your breaches with less chance of producing the wrong stack.

Thalpy updated:

  • Fixes reacted wine instantly turning into grappa by setting the grappa reaction's enzyme volume requirement to 10u instead of 5u
  • Fixes grinders giving out beakers before they're done grinding

coiax updated:

  • If you are luckily enough to revive while still inside the stomach of a laughter demon, you will be immediately ejected. Whether you will be able to get away before the demon then kills and eats you again, is up to you.

18 January 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Civilian Bounties now show the fulfillment value, instead of the value of the cube total. The UI is not lying anymore!

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • fixed a random space tile in science

Thunder12345 updated:

  • In-spect scanner now takes a few seconds to produce a report.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Exosuit console EMP logging now properly outputs the mech's occupants to chat and logs.
  • Mechs no longer runtime when exosuit consoles EMP them and will now properly play sounds and give notifications to their occupants when this happens.

c420-o updated:

  • fixed a single typo

nightred updated:

  • Able to secure grinders/cell chargers to tables.

park66665, Ghilker, Rohesie updated:

  • fixed atmos component Destroy() a little bit.

stylemistake updated:

  • Fixed broken UI in ExosuitFabricator interface.

17 January 2021

Cartographer-D updated:

  • all large guns except traitor objectives and those specifically made to be concealed are now bulky.

Gamer025 updated:

  • Update_Parallax no longer runtimes when observing a player without client

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fire alarms that have been triggered by atmos issues will now auto resolve when those issues go away.
  • Fire alarms that are being triggered by atmos issues have a blinking overlay around their frame, keep an eye out for the problem children.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Fixed showers overexposing things they washed
  • Added the ability to toggle showers' water regeneration with a multitool.
  • Bespoke materials exist
  • You can tell who's meat was used to make that chair

Time-Green updated:

  • Some assistants have started tracking everyones maintenance pill consumption. Will you hold the record?

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • Long-To-Short-Range-Bluespace-Transceiver timers changed from T1: 90s -> 40s T2: 70s -> 30s T3: 60s -> 20s T4: 60s -> 10s

cacogen updated:

  • After some setbacks in the employee navigation sector, Nanotrasen in its infinite wisdom have given the wayfinding pinpointer dispenser a personality lift in the hope of selling more pinpointers
  • Based on overwhelming demand, wayfinding pinpointers are now free. You can still refund them at the dispenser though
  • Moves some of the pointing code from the mob pointed() verb to an atom pointat() proc so everything can be made to point fingers at everything else and the animation is consistent. Now the wayfinding dispenser points like you do!

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • The holiday observed on every 4th of July is now called "US Independence Day" instead of just "Independence Day".

tralezab updated:

  • Food Cart has been completely remade to work as a mobile kitchen

16 January 2021

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Explosive lances will properly show the grenade on them at construction.

Dr. Harimoto + Zytlog updated:

  • Petri Dish Smart Fridge - Nari Harimoto
  • Cytology Area - Nari Harimoto
  • Cytology Lab (Metastation) - Nari Harimoto
  • Completly redone Science Department on Metastation - Zytlog + 10% Nari Harimoto
  • Cytology Wikibook - Nari Harimoto

Fikou updated:

  • separates malf ai from traitor dynamic ruleset

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Dynamic can now be configured when made the forced secret mode.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Atmos code has changed, again! Groups of air will equalize faster, something something go read my documentation

Manybones updated:

  • Fixed wood table and poker table construction/deconstruction

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You'll now get messages when you're bleeding telling you roughly how much blood you're losing and whether the bloodloss is getting better, worse, or holding steady.
  • Burn wounds will slowly heal their flesh as long as the limb has < 10 burn damage, the burn has no infection, and the patient is fed.
  • Hearts now decay slower, failing after roughly 6 minutes instead of 4. Livers and stomachs fail a bit faster than before now, while lungs fail a bit slower, meaning they won't all fail at the same time
  • Epipen coagulant will no longer clot all bleeding wounds at the same time. Coagulant now slows bleeding by 30%, and will only clot the wound currently losing the most blood. Determination from suffering wounds will slow bleeding by an additional 15%.
  • Renamed "Rapid Coagulating" nanite program to "Vein Repressurization". It now reduces bleeding by 50% rather than 90%, and costs twice as much.

Seris02 updated:

  • makes the manifest always have a certain department order

Timberpoes updated:

  • You can once again pay off the pirate event from the communications console without it silently failing for no obvious reason.
  • Tweaked how logging ID access changes works, added Investigate verb menu entry for id_card_changes and they are now also logged to id_card_changes.html, accessible from Current and Server Logs.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • proxy sensor grenades work

dragomagol updated:

  • Icebox xenobio maint no longer has a roundstart hole in it, no more mysterious green locker

necromanceranne updated:

  • Guns are no longer directly printable from the protolathe.
  • Gun kits to craft the various prototype firearms once printable from the security protolathe.
  • Large energy crossbows now are bulky, like most other printed weapons.
  • Crafted weapons now come with a firing pin.

15 January 2021

Avunia Takiya updated:

  • Brioche cakes don't look like errors anymore, visually
  • Brioche cakes and its slices have a specific taste now

EgorDinamit updated:

  • Ghost roles can no longer spawn as a male with female body_type and vice-versa.
  • Not every single vendor is round-start hacked anymore.

Gamer025 updated:

  • Elevators / Lifts can now move down via an elevator button and also no longer try to move when already at the target floor

Timberpoes updated:

  • You should no longer attempt to buckle people to yourself when all you really want to do is inspect their inventories.

14 January 2021

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Paintings are now unable to have no name.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Hulks now get more damage from freeze damage, take it in brute, and get the damage at higher temps than normal

Son of Space updated:

  • Completely redid MetaSec's Offices
  • pruned windows in maint by the upload on Meta

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Prevents forcing a lot of different kinds of mobs that shouldn't be able to rest to rest.

zxaber updated:

  • Communication Consoles now show up on GPS.

13 January 2021

EgorDinamit updated:

  • removes a runtime when ahealing moths
  • CE now properly spawns with an engineering skillchip.
  • removes double/triple catwalks on DeltaStation.

Ghommie updated:

  • Fixed floorbots applying floor tiles onto already tiled turfs.
  • Fixed floorbot issues with material tiles.
  • Fixed emagged floorbots spawning lattice when deconstructing floor into plating.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • A victory for revolutionaries will no longer end the round on dynamic, instead no new security and command will be allowed to join.
  • Fixed the bolts hallucination spamming runtimes.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Removes the fire alarm from meta's freezer
  • Fixes the map-gen turfs in icebox arrivals

Manybones updated:

  • Brain trauma paralysis now works in arms

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • You can now view a server's last round (not just yours specifically) via the OOC tab > Server's Last Round

Watermelon914 updated:

  • When opening the tgui list input, it'll automatically focus the first element to allow for easier navigating, replicating the behaviour from the default input box.

esainane updated:

  • Many HFR reactions and processes no longer change their behaviour based on the amount of space lag.

12 January 2021

Coastfront updated:

  • forgotten kit
  • forgotten armor and helmet.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Removes 'Goebbles' from the last name list, replaces with Gobbles and Gobbler.
  • AIs are now able to see clearly after getting un-pied
  • Flesh to stone no longer makes you bleed immune after you stop being a statue.

Gamer025 updated:

  • Borgs will no longer cause a runtime when created while an AI is present

Kylerace updated:

  • skateboards and wheelys dont move multiple tiles anymore

MrStonedOne, TiviPlus updated:

  • the MC will yield more to byond lag, reducing percieved lag

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • moves quirk stating from medhud to a button instead of being spammed on your chat

coiax updated:

  • Fixed being able to ignore some caltrops through walking.
  • Regular Capture-The-Flag players can no longer be wounded. Simulated participants in the Medieval Shuttle can still be violently murdered with wounds however.
  • Job specific benefits around food and drink have been moved into the liver. For example, a security officer starts with a liver that gains more of a benefit from donuts and Quad Sec. Steal that liver, and digest donuts like a cop!
  • Medical Doctors, the CMO and the chaplain have a new skillchip, allowing them to infer a person's career choice from examining their liver. Observers also have access to this knowledge.
  • Livers from clowns, clownops and bananium golems now honk when squeezed.
  • Fixed an oversight where clownops couldn't see each other as syndicate agents.
  • Fixed the clown operative leader not having the same traits as other clownops.
  • Runtime Station now has a small nanite lab, south of the construction area.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Whetstones will now become worn when at 0 uses instead of being either used or not used. All currently existing whetstones start at 1 use.
  • It is now possible to make a whetstone able to be used multiple times via var editing

spessbro updated:

  • fixed arcade app dispensing tickets weirdly

zxaber updated:

  • Removing AIs from mechs via intellicard works again.

11 January 2021

Azarak updated:

  • Beach Biodome (and more) will now properly have non-black sand and water

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Smokers now get their favorite cigarette brand in their notes.

Donkie updated:

  • Improved unit testing experience

Gamer025 updated:

  • Telekinesis users can now only throw items 10 tiles far, everything else (like lockers, machines, etc) can only be thrown 1 tile far
  • Skillchips are now transferred correctly when ahealing someone

Ghommie updated:

  • Fixed high pop server crashes caused by the gravity generator going out.
  • Paraplegics can once again stand up and shout! in zero G.

KathrinBailey updated:

  • Xenomorph embryos now take a static five minutes (1 minute per 5 stages) to hatch, instead of taking any time between fifteen seconds, till the end of time itself to hatch. Aka it had a 3% chance and rolled every two seconds, now it uses a consistent timer.

Krysonism updated:

  • You can now ride the banana glutton properly.
  • Bananas & peels have been resprited.
  • Fixed a bug that caused every cytological sample to contain a virus.
  • Fixed a bug that multiplied the cytology virus growth penalty and spaceacillin consumption.

Qustinnus updated:

  • squashing behavior is now an element, now anything could theoretically be squished!

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The PM9 rocket launcher now creates big plumes of fire as backblast when fired! Make sure you're not up against a wall or your friends!
  • Standard rockets for the PM9 deal more damage on impact and create flames upon exploding.

Watermelon914 updated:

  • Added new input list TGUI UI for whenever the need to select something from a list is needed. These have been applied to the Drop Bomb verb for admins and the holopad communicator.

coiax updated:

  • Psychologist immunity to supermatter hallucinations, and the ability to make it "calmer", is now provided by a skillchip, rather than innate.
  • The Research Director's knowledge of suplexing immovable rods is now in a skillchip.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • ID cards that start with syndicate access don't loose syndicate access upon modification at the ID console anymore.
  • ID cards now have sticky access, which is readded if removed at the ID console.

spessbro updated:

  • stops force defaulting to TRUE when opening large cardboard boxes and supplypods
  • fixed bvak injector appearance
  • fridge locks have been repaired

10 January 2021

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Adds a new device and security bounty. Use the new In-spect Scanner to scan areas on patrol for all new inspection bounties.
  • You can now craft new prisoner suits/skirts with cloth.
  • Removed the bounty for selling riot shotguns.
  • You can now wash uniforms with any kind of restraint to dye a jumpsuit/skirt into a prison jumpsuit/skirt.
  • Adds a bleeping sound used by the In-Spect Scanner.

EgorDinamit updated:

  • fixed a bug with fulltile pod window spawner

JohnWillard updated:

  • Flypeople eyes ignore direction when flashed

Krysonism updated:

  • Vend-a-trays can now accept any item.

prodirus updated:

  • You can now insert food items into a food processor directly from trays again.

spessbro updated:

  • civilian bounty terminals have had a hotfix
  • fixed science goggles not displaying fermenting barrel contents

09 January 2021

Krysonism updated:

  • Added a new cytology clown mob, the banana glutton!
  • Removed the old clown blob mob.
  • The cytology clown mob cell lines now have properly assigned reagents.
  • The old clown blob sprite has been partially resprited.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Chat messages that are more then text, so videos, embedded games, font changes, etc now get wiped when the chat is reloaded. NO MORE INFINITE WINGDINGS!
  • Speeds up gas movement
  • Documents the intent and finer details of the atmos system (Thanks dunc/aran/skog)
  • Fixes excited groups constantly rebuilding, this broke 4 years ago
  • Fixes superconduction just straight up not working. This means heat can leak through windows, glass doors, and a few other things. Keep an eye on your temperature
  • Most heat based behavior no longer relies on being inside a fire
  • APCs take damage in heat to prevent infinite plasma fire diffs, watch out when operating that supermatter
  • Cleans up immutable gas mixtures to make them work properly when the mix has gas in it
  • Planetary turfs no longer create a new copy of themselves each time they process. We instead use a global mmutable mix
  • Cleans up a typed for loop in reactions
  • Canisters will properly take damage from outside heat now
  • Cleans up some roundstart ATs on some ruins
  • Keeps openspace from trying to melt
  • Destroying a wall wakes up the tile beneath it to atmos, no more meteor breaches with no flow
  • Fire alarms will trigger when the area gets too cold for humans

Melbert updated:

  • Grafts of chemical genes in botany now actually work

Qustinnus updated:

  • Fixes slimes falling off monkeys

Timberpoes updated:

  • Certain ID card access changes are now game logged with an accompanying admin notification and entry in the player's logging panel under "Show All"

dragomagol updated:

  • Checking "escape on the emergency shuttle without being in custody" is done by area, not by turf

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Turning into a monkey now makes you drop all cuffs again.
  • Mimics can no longer eat an unlimited amount of stuff and are instead limited to 10 mobs and 50 things overall. This means player mimics are no longer able to cause significant lag by opening and closing themselves.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Line change to fix monkeys never devolving into humans.

zxaber updated:

  • AIs that lose power can access their APC once more (after the same short hacking delay is complete).

08 January 2021

ATHATH updated:

  • You can now turn on stun batons that have exactly enough charge left in them to stun someone.
  • Thrown stun batons can now debuff most of the types of creatures that melee stun baton strikes can.

Azarak updated:

  • Spawning equipment for nearsighted or tongue-tied people is now safe code-wise, and shouldnt do any bugs, nor will they delete your previous equipment. Also blindness doesn't call a redundant expensive proc

Gamer025 updated:

  • Fixed the examine text for death players (death players not appearing as dead)

Guillaume H. Prata / Papaporo Paprito updated:

  • NT shipped new uniform to the station. Jumpskirts can now be adjusted to expose chest/arms just like Jumpsuits already could.
  • Fix some suits that should expose only the arms fully exposing the chest. Also fix the Botany Jumpsuit having the old style when adjusted.

Melbert updated:

  • The Densified Chemicals trait in plants works again.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Nanotrasen has upgraded the defense firmware in their vending machines, they are somewhat more difficult to fight, if for some reason that was required.
  • Brand Intelligence event takes less long to convert vending machines
  • removes a useless proc override from multiz code

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Due to budget cuts Nanotransen's atmospherics department has stopped producing tanks and canisters with radiation proof internal lining. In other news, a team of scientists has recently recorded an instance of closed-chamber pluoxium formation previously thought to be impossible!

TiviPlus updated:

  • Get_hear Minor optimization
  • Optimized Getallcontents
  • Optimizes getviewsize()

Twaticus updated:

  • updated leather satchel, briefcase, secure briefcase, and mindshield lockboxes sprites

cat updated:

  • refactored ambient sounds to use global lists

esainane updated:

  • Fix a rare case where setting the HFR moderator filter to a gas not present in the moderator mix would cause parts of HFR to stop functioning.
  • Proto-Nitrate's response to Tritium now functions correctly when there was previously no Hydrogen in the air.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Centcom's cargo division no longer calls metallic hydrogen "developer's tears".
  • Library console printers no longer become unavaible after failing to print something.

kopoba updated:

  • Yellow slime core slightly brighter
  • Yellow slime core and cakehats light is 360° as it should be

nightred updated:

  • Stomachs no longer save flavor forever.

sqnztb updated:

  • Toy hot potatoes no longer inadvertently trigger allergic responses.

tralezab updated:

  • Some ways to teleport that snuck past NOTELEPORT checks are now properly checked

vincentiusvin updated:

  • Cryogenics now properly update to pipenets and can work with HE setups.

zxaber updated:

  • Extra AIs created by players will no longer lose their laws shortly after they are created.

07 January 2021

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Sleeping Carp now needs 25 pop to buy.

Dr. Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Labcoats can now carry Biopsy Tools
  • Biobags can now carry Swabs and Petridishes

EOBGames, ArcaneMusic, LemonintheDark updated:

  • The Nanotrasen Entertainment Division would like to announce an update to Tactical Game Cards, as a new ruleset has been released! (Check the full ruleset out here: https://tgstation13.org/wiki/Tactical_Game_Cards)

JohnWillard updated:

  • Flypeople pronounce 's' as 'z'
  • Flypeople arent affected by toxic food

Seris02 updated:

  • sorted some of the unsorted chat types

Sparkezelpl updated:

  • Carving knife now deals more damage on throw and can embed in your enemies.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Monkey mutation remembers your species across transformations once again.

spessbro updated:

  • Fixed SM not delamming if a brainless human was near it.
  • fixed cat genders
  • makes clown mask use a define

06 January 2021

Dex updated:

  • Added a missing ORM firelock on MetaStation

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Changed how hallucinations process internally.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The xeno attack hallucination will properly throw the xenomorph at you now
  • The tesla will actually move like it ought to, instead of ping ponging about

Melbert updated:

  • You can now make beds with blankets.
  • You can now tuck plushes into bed.
  • You can also tuck the nuclear authentication disk into bed. Sleep tight, disky.

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Telekinesis no longer teleports the Blackbox, brains from an MMI, or bodybags with all its contents, directly to you

Qustinnus updated:

  • You can now look into the gateway before you take that leap of faith

Sarvannas updated:

  • Fixed digitigrade legs not showing on a blacksuit skirt

Son of Space updated:

  • Fixed door names on Kilo Whiteship

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • fixes grammar of duffelbag spell

and SpessBro updated:

  • Civilian bounties now offer a choice of 3 applicable bounties instead of a single random one, with 2 being job specific bounties and one being a guaranteed generic bounty.

dragomagol updated:

  • Metastation: removed double light fixture in engineering foyer
  • Metastation: fixed the missing goonplaque description
  • Deltastation: removed fire alarm under pepperspray dispenser on the same tile as another fire alarm, reinforced wall hiding in a door in engineering
  • Kilostation: removed stacked water tanks on AI sat
  • Kilostation holodeck arcade cabinets now work
  • Icebox Station: removed stacked sinks in bathroom, backwards sofa in medbay break room, stacked shutters in robotics
  • Icebox Station: added winter coats to the gulag

tralezab updated:

  • Space huts are accessable from maint on all maps. Expect it to be the first thing checked when sec is looking for the cultist factory!
  • New shuttle! You unlock it by booting up the "1218 AD" holodeck simulation!

05 January 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Auxiliary Base Management Console now uses tgui.

Avunia updated:

  • No more single space area in metastation starboard maint

Dex updated:

  • Removed meat from prison kitchens. All prisoners are now on a strict vegetarian diet as part of their punishment.

Fikou updated:

  • items being able to be held by xenos is now a flag that can be applied to any item by admin

Ghilker updated:

  • rcd_create() to use early return
  • fix RCD machine stacking
  • datum_pipeline.dm code cleanup

Ghommie updated:

  • Folding and unfolding paper from afar with TK won't teleport the resulting item in your hands anymore.

KathrinBailey updated:

  • Mechs receive damage from Xenomorphs in a non-hardcoded fashion, and will take the amount of damage. Merry Christmas!

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes the plasma alert not showing up
  • Added a new alert for n2o in the air

Melbert updated:

  • Ashwalkers and Lizardpeople can now have digitigrade legs again

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Mechanical Curtains, a button only operated variant of Fancy Curtains

NotRanged updated:

  • Your current blob strain no longer shows up as reroll option
  • The blob strain selection actually gets refreshed now after rerolling

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Clowns are once again the only beings capable of controlling the clown car, it should be fully functional again
  • Infectious zombies (from romerol) can actually be wounded and dismembered (and thus decapitated) properly

Seris02 updated:

  • makes it so that chat logs respect message types

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Modular computers can log things without spamming runtimes again.
  • Fixed simple animal mecha pilots boarding mechas.
  • The toxin purge nanite programs no longer runtime when applied to simple mobs.
  • Fixed a runtime that occurred when a cyborg attempted to update the cell charge HUD element without an associated HUD.

cacogen updated:

  • The tape recorder makes sounds when you interact with it

coiax updated:

  • The nanite program "Subdermal ID" will now also scan ID cards that the host is pulling when triggered.
  • Skeleton and plasmaman stomachs now share the same code.
  • Skeletons now heal brute and burn damage from drinking milk, plasmamen only heal brute damage.
  • Hydroponics trays on examine now print messages about weeds and pests in the right order.
  • Examining a hydroponics tray by clicking it when adjacent as a human now gives the same message as when examining.

prodirus updated:

  • Tape recorder cassette can no longer be rewound with a pen if it is not unwound.
  • Tape recorder transcript should look like it has text written on it!
  • Tape recorder can now play full tapes.
  • Food/slime processor should no longer be able to turned on while empty.
  • Doorjacks should be able to hack green airlocks now /emags should not be able to hack green airlocks now

02 January 2021

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Katanas when worn on the belt slot are consistently worn on the left hip.

Arkatos updated:

  • Scrolls of teleportation no longer use outdated interface and will take you straight into a list of a possible destinations upon use.
  • Scrolls of teleportation now show number of remaining uses upon examination and also give proper feedback messages upon teleportation.
  • Scrolls of teleportation now crumble to dust when out of uses.

Azarak updated:

  • fixed the recycler eating all sorts of effects, including directional lighting

MissFox0810 updated:

  • Added playtime tracking to notes
  • Added playtime to messages SQL table

Qustinnus updated:

  • Griddles no longer spam runtimes
  • Griddles no longer eat crowbars
  • Icebox cavegen generates the correct mobs and ore on the bottom z-level again

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Fixed an issue with player logs becoming confused when someone triggers multiple events within one second (like being attacked by two people at the same time) that would cause holes in the logs
  • You can now mount animals from adjacent tiles

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Borgs can make glass floor tiles again

coiax updated:

  • Observers can now read paper documents without having to be adjacent.
  • Skeletons, abductors, etherals and anyone without a tongue can no longer taste anything, or get food/drink moodlets.
  • People with the ageusia quirk will also not get any taste messages, or get food/drink moodlets.
  • Syndicate medical borgs now have access to inacusiate.
  • The knowledge of nuclear disk serial numbers is now stored as a skillchip installed in captains, death squad members and nuclear operatives.

esainane updated:

  • HFR can now output waste gases again.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Clown-like creatures (clowns, bananium golems, clown ops) now share the ability to heal from bananas and Banana Honk
  • Bananium golems can wear clown shoes and are clumsy.
  • Clown ops now are as naive about death as a regular clown. No grimdark clowns for you!

spessbro updated:

  • Fixed core removal surgery

zxaber updated:

  • SiliConnect users can now emag their device to send anonymous messages to borgs. Remember to remove your ID before hitting send!

01 January 2021

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where a syndicate assault pod was unlaunchable.

Dex updated:

  • Added missing vents and scrubbers to toxins storage and server areas on MetaStation

Ghommie updated:

  • The cursed hot spring no longer polymorphs incorporeal critters such as unrevealed revenants.

InvalidArgument3 updated:

  • shotgun slug damage increased

NotRanged updated:

  • Cancelling a vote now leaves a log and message.

Qustinnus updated:

  • On monkey day you can now play as monkey

Seris02 updated:

  • cleaning decals in general

Timberpoes updated:

  • You can once again put oars into lava boats in order to use them to cross lava.

coiax updated:

  • Tom, the legendary prison mouse, no longer fears chewing electrified wires.

spessbro updated:

  • cats are skinnier
  • fixed vibebot connectivity issues

tralezab updated:

  • Pancakes now griddle to be cooked

31 December 2020

Azarak updated:

  • map generation will properly clean flora and rocks where it should.

Dex updated:

  • Added the missing console to the Arena shuttle

Qustinnus, Fikou for sprites updated:

  • Monkeys are now a humanoid species rather than a subtype of carbon.

iwishforducks updated:

  • Cut AI Wires maphelper for airlocks.
  • AI wires on the Space Pirate shuttle are cut by default.

30 December 2020

Ghommie updated:

  • jitteriness, melee attack animations and resting/standing up should no longer momentarily disable the floating movetype.
  • Fixed zero damage items with set attack verbs not showing chat messages anyway.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Fixed Space Dragon's overlay not being set properly on death
  • Fixed Space Dragon's color selection not limiting darker colors as it should

Maurukas updated:

  • PubbyStation subtypes of booze-o-mat and wallmed
  • ERT shuttle access on Kilostation. Interns and other livestock may board again.
  • Misplaced solar wires on Kilo have been corrected
  • Some more minor decals/grille placement on Kilo
  • Spiders will no longer spawn in space on Kilo

Melbert updated:

  • New negative quirk: 'Bad Touch'. With it, you gain a negative moodlet from being hugged instead of a positive one, and you gain a negative moodlet from headpats and grabs.
  • blind people can now feel headpats

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Kilo Station white ship shuttle dock no longer spawns a redundant mining shuttle

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The clown car can once again be driven
  • Mechs can once again open doors by bumping into them (assuming the rider has access, obviously)

Timberpoes updated:

  • You are no longer able to teleport rigged power cells across the station to remotely detonate departments using the BRPED. Rigged cells will instead explode inside the BRPED when you attempt to transfer them. That's right, you can now rig BRPEDs to explode when people use them.

coiax updated:

  • The "eye of god" only becomes unremovable when put in your eye.
  • You may now pick Implant as a preferred uplink location, meaning that if you become a traitor, you will start with an uplink implant. The cost of the implant (4 TC) is deducted from your total starting TC, because the Syndicate doesn't give freebies.
  • Admins removing an uplink from a person with an uplink implant will now destroy the implant, rather than leaving an implant that does nothing.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Replaced US Indigenous People's Day with it's international equivalent

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • The vacant offices on Ice Box and Delta are now public access.
  • The Ice Box vacant office airlock has been turned into a plain airlock to reflect the fact it no longer needs engineering access to open. It has also been renamed to reflect the fact that Vacant Office B no longer exists.
  • The Meta vacant office airlock has a name now when it was unnamed before.

spessbro updated:

  • The B.E.P.I.S market has been stabilized

29 December 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • Being incredibly confused no longer makes you immune to revolutionary conversion attempts.
  • Revheads will no longer fail their over-the-shoulder conversions if they're on help intent.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Dead bodies with a brain but no ghost actively inside the body will once again appear dead when examined

spessbro updated:

  • fixed paper mache robe's diction

zxaber updated:

  • Mech equipment works for AIs using middle mouse clicks again.

28 December 2020

Gamer025 updated:

  • Remove broken "name" entries in security techfab under "Ammo" category
  • When being hit by a thrown vendor it crushes you

Seris02 updated:

  • 2 punctuation errors

27 December 2020
