Azarak updated:

  • Rotting gibs no longer make miasma on planetary turfs, to save on processing as it quickly dissipiates into planetary atmos anyway. They'll also stop rotting after some time

Ghommie updated:

  • The ashdrake won't become enraged if all lava arena targets have gone clientless or deleted now.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Bolas will now make sounds and facehuggers now have a special sprite when thrown, as was intended.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Atmos backpacks won't go textureless anymore

Timberpoes updated:

  • Admins may now call the deadchat_plays proc on any movable atom in the game, allowing deadchat to move it around with zero effort. They should now call the generic deadchat_plays instead of deadchat_plays_goose to turn Birdboat into a deadchat controlled vomit goose.
  • The VV dropdown now contains an option to enable or disable deadchat control. This comes with an alert confirmation box to allow you to back out and chat messages to tell you the result.
  • There's now a lot more feedback when deadchat is controlling something, including telling you when command inputs are successful, telling you the remaining cooldown until you can input new commands when it fails and additional examine text detailling the control mode, commands and overall cooldown.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • sausage is crafted with raw meat instead of cooked meat

necromanceranne updated:

  • Uranium golems now no longer irradiate things around them passively.
  • Uranium golems now irradiate targets they punch, while also doing burn damage with punches. They only hit as hard a human, however.
  • Uranium golems are significantly resistant to brute, but less resistant to all other damage types compared to typical golems.
  • Uranium golems release their radiation pulse when hit by attacks. Or objects.
  • Uranium golems can now wear engineering jumpsuits, work boots and wintercoats.

26 December 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Pens worn on your ear don't remind you that you forgot to install source any more.

Dex updated:

  • Rough metal false wall is no longer invisible

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Shotgun slugs can no longer be made in an autolathe / protolathe.
  • Buckshot rounds can no longer be made in an autolathe / protolathe.
  • Frag12 rounds deal less direct damage, since they fucking explode.
  • Pulse shot rounds deal less damage.
  • Increased the cooldown on riot shotguns.
  • Removed buckshot rounds from all maps.
  • Combat shotguns start with beanbags.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The supermatter can no longer become irradiated

The Space Wizard Federation updated:

  • Artificers now have medical HUDs.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • diy dish kit has a wench

tralezab updated:

  • Secrets panel tgui-ized

25 December 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Mothpeople that consume a potion of flight and then their wings get burnt off will no longer fail to have wings after going through reconstructive surgery.

Arkatos updated:

  • Cyborg's pipe cleaner now uses a radial menu for choosing it's color variants.
  • RCL is now able to put cables down on floors seemlessly.
  • RCL radial menu will now properly show it's currently set color for pipe cleaner.

Code by Tlaltecuhtli, Sprites by Dr Doom Bringer updated:

  • wiz spell duffelbag curse

Dex updated:

  • Regular onions no longer turn into red onion slices when cut

Fikou updated:

  • gives SOUL to ancient jumpsuits

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Bodies will now tell you if someone hit DNR or not

Nari Harimoto updated:

  • Heretics who finish the Void Path and become an Aristocrat of the Void can now survive in the Void (space).
  • Heretics who research Aristocrats Way on the Void Path will no longer suffocate in their own storm when they ascend (no longer breathes).

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Chocolate milk is now made with a 3:2 mix of hot cocoa and cocoa in a temperature under 300K.
  • Hot cocoa recipe now makes 6 hot cocoa instead of making 5 instead of 6. This makes it possible to make chocolate milk by heating a 1:1 mix of cocoa and milk to over 320K and then cooling it to below 300K.
  • You can make hot cocoa with a 1:2 mix of chocolate milk and milk, useful if you accidentally make chocolate milk

silicons updated:

  • projectile/gun shootself with mouth target is fixed

spessbro updated:

  • headpikes don't delete heads anymore

tralezab updated:

  • Changing the emergency shuttle now gives the option for disabling shuttlechanging purchases/events

24 December 2020

Arkatos updated:

  • Changelings now use a radial menu to select DNAs.
  • Fixed a case where changelings could extract DNA they already had stored.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Swarmer beacon spawn time decreased from 30 seconds to a shorter timer based on the number of active swarmers
  • Swarmer drones now fire disabler beams at their target when not in melee range
  • Swarmer beacon integrity has been increased
  • Player swarmers now deal more stamina damage on melee attacks.
  • Swarmer shock traps now actually work again

Timberpoes updated:

  • Botanists get access to the uplink traitor reagent gun.
  • Uplink traitor reagent gun for CMO/Chemist/Botanist now has piercing darts.
  • All syringe guns can no longer chamber bluespace syringes.
  • Rapid fire syringe guns are now locked behind illegal tech.

coiax updated:

  • Regal rats no longer see themselves as an interloper on examine.
  • Regal rats no longer think they are consuming themselves when eating cheese.
  • Psychologists are no longer mistakenly told they have headaches when near the supermatter.
  • Cursed ice hiking boots dropped by demonic frost miners only become unremovable when worn.

23 December 2020

Azarak updated:

  • Fixed garbage collection of light fixture overlays, making the game run slightly faster
  • Light fixtures now use non-unique overlays with different variants for alpha changes

Mickyan updated:

  • Made some small tweaks to station lighting, added new preset lights for mapping

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Added a special admin-only base construction console that works anywhere on the station!

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Reagents are slightly more event based.
  • Plasma now boils properly

22 December 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Adds shrub plants and seeds, which can be obtained from the exotic seeds crate in cargo. Plant grown shrubs in-hand to plant a full hedge where you're standing.
  • The shrub seeds have replaced one of the rainbow bunch seeds in the exotic seeds crate.
  • Hedges that block sight can be trimmed with a sharp implement if you have the hedge trimming skillchip.

Dex updated:

  • Added a microwave to Kilo Station perma

Fikou updated:

  • cargo techs now have ripley/clarke mech internal access
  • fixes internal access on clarke not allowing engineers and mining

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed missing microscope in kilo station xenobiology
  • chaplain head cage no longer makes you bald

Ghommie updated:

  • Fixing a little visual issue with certain hoods, fake mustaches and similars making lizard snouts magically disappear when worn.

Rohesie updated:

  • Shades can no longer attack things while inside a soul stone.

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Reverb while you are affected by a chemical shouldn't cut out anymore.

dragomagol updated:

  • Kilo: fixed some wonky-looking pipes in the cargo mining shuttle

nightred updated:

  • fixed mob temperature damage when dead

tralezab updated:

  • Artwork can now be named again... Whoops!

21 December 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed delta station layer manifolds under floor in SM room
  • added some missing lights on delta station SM and atmos
  • added buttons and shutters to the delta station atmos testing room chambers to vent to space

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can no longer use communications consoles off a station/CentCom z-level.
  • Modular computers can now be attacked
  • Rerolling blob strains now uses a radial menu, and lets you see what the strain does before picking it.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Hulks can now throw monkeys/people with tails around by their tails! To do this, get your victim in at least a neck grab, enable throw mode, then click in the direction you want to throw. So long!
  • Carbons will now take damage when thrown at high speeds into things like windows, girders, and other solid objects, in addition to just walls and other people.

spessbro updated:

  • appendices are toxic again

20 December 2020

Arkatos updated:

  • Cyborg Boot Debug now uses tgui. Better check those endoskeletons with a multitool!

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can no longer change your body's facing direction while dead or otherwise unconscious.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • You press your ear to the barrel and hear a faint rumba beat... The blastcannon has been buffed!

Time-Green updated:

  • Fixes locker wand shooting grey lockers

broodmother spider (746) updated:

  • Lay Enriched Eggs action button icon should now update properly

uomo91 updated:

  • On Kilo Station all service jobs have access to the service lathe hallway and room again.

19 December 2020

Dex updated:

  • maid apron and captain pirate coat no longer change icon states when dragged around

Ghilker updated:

  • fix machine stacking exploit using disposable tubes

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Lavaland elite abilities now show a cooldown timer on their icons
  • Lavaland elites have have some of their stats and cooldowns changed for better balance

NotRanged updated:

  • Blob announcement timer now starts upon placing the core as intended, instead of upon spawning of the camera.

Qustinnus updated:

  • The griddle no longer leaves null objects in the griddle, causing it to seem full
  • Bonfires can now be used as ghetto griddles just like with normal grills
  • You can now deconstruct griddles

Timberpoes updated:

  • Briefcase Launchpads will no longer delete themselves from the game when you attempt to place them.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • all sec armors can store the police baton / telescopic baton

actioninja updated:

  • New filter editor for admins + development purposes

dragomagol updated:

  • phobias cannot be triggered by words in languages you don't understand

drongood12 updated:

  • Semicolon will no longer display in critical condition

jaw-sh updated:

  • sugar cookies will now spawn with a random Christmas-themed icon during the Festive Season.

nightred updated:

  • fixed simple bots passing through plastic flaps

sqnztb updated:

  • Hallucinations have slightly more variety.

18 December 2020

Azarak updated:

  • Fixed garbage collection for songs, making the game slightly faster
  • Fixed garbage collection of ghosts and lobby players, making the game run faster

Fikou updated:

  • berserker hardsuit now has mining suit levels of explosive protection

Ghommie updated:

  • Badmins and coders alike, rejoice! Global advanced proc calls have been fixed.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Nar'Sie can now be orbited directly again.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Mapped in dead bodies/gibs no longer produce miasma

NotRanged updated:

  • Airlocks take a small amount of damage and leave an examine hint when you Jaws of Life your way inside.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Icebox cavegen to have more rocks on the surface
  • AI controllers now properly check if a mob is client-controlled and dont start processing if its the case.
  • AI controllers now handle deletion on unpossesion if that's filled in as an argument
  • Dead monkeys stop attacking things

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Hanukkah and Ramadan should be correct now.
  • Space Station 13's birthday won't break after 2099.

Yenwodyah updated:

  • Spacemen that get turned into monkeys and back again will no longer be affected by their primate instincts

cacogen updated:

  • Bounty cubes now have the bounty's name, value, fulfiller and creation time in the description
  • The Bounty Cube is now known as the "[value] cr bounty cube"

prodirus updated:

  • Fixed spelling for "most affluent" roundend message

tralezab updated:

  • Hars replacing brain

wesoda25 updated:

  • Nightmare light eaters can no longer be deleted using acid

17 December 2020

150 hours of testing updated:

  • projectiles can hit all clicked things above the hit threshold layer (see: windows) when you directly click on it, even if they usually pass through
  • mechs are no longer immune to projectiles because **gee whiz, it turns out there's objects that are not items but are also not structures and machinery in the game!**
  • spiderwebs block projectiles again
  • beepsky and other non-dense mobs (vs laying down mobs) are no longer bullet sponges
  • blobs no longer have lasers pass through them, except for the core, which then soaks up the lasers. fair and balanced, right?

Arkatos updated:

  • Adaptive Paint now uses a radial menu for choosing its color variants.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Cleaving saws will no longer lose their sharpened damage boost when deactivated, and can no longer be sharpened infinitely

16 December 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • fix HFR infinite gas production
  • fix supermatter gasmix filled with 0 gases

New Zealand updated:

  • Added Waitangi Day and ANZAC day holidays

15 December 2020

KathrinBailey updated:

  • Allows damage that baked beanomorphs, monkeys and slimes deal to humans to be modified instead of being hardcoded values.
  • Allows different xenomorph types to deal different amounts of damage, if future coders or VV-happy admins will it.

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Ghosts can now see when people connect or disconnect!

Qustinnus, Kryson updated:

  • Adds the griddle, a panless stove/grill for you to bake your meat products on. Nanotrasen has decided to move away from microwaving everything
  • Burgers are now made from patties, patties are grilled on the griddle, raw patties are made by using a rolling pin on a raw meatball
  • Most meat is grilled on the griddle now instead of microwaved
  • More meatballs are gained from meat sprite: new meatball, patty and sausage sprites

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • You can dig through rock and dirt with a spoon, elbow grease, and a lot of time
  • Removed legacy code that was rendered completely useless six years ago. A round of applause for oldcode everyone!

dragomagol updated:

  • kilo: added a missing length of disposals in mech bay
  • kilo: warden's disposals now enter the loop properly
  • kilo: lawyers can no longer get into the meeting room through the infirmary

14 December 2020

ATH1909 updated:

  • Nuke disks (and other station-loving items) now make a buzzing noise when they get teleported out of your inventory due to being taken to an area they're not supposed to be in (deep space, lavaland, etc.).

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where you could get softlocked as a cyborg when trying to choose 2 different modules at once.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Job gloves no longer delete radio gloves.

Fikou updated:

  • you can now var edit gateway sprites
  • phylactery now makes items stationloving

Ghilker updated:

  • added GUI button to freezer/heater that allow the players to change setting on the fly without the need to deconstruct the machine
  • changed the name to Temperature control unit
  • freezer/heater circuitboards will build the machine starting with the freezer, no longer allow a screw to be used (you can still setup the piping layer)
  • fixed virology and incinerator disposals not leading to space

KathrinBailey updated:

  • Players can no longer us the ignore verb to gather a list of people's characters and ckeys together.

Megarop updated:

  • The suppressor sprite is positioned differently on Makarovs and APS machine pistols.
  • Suppressors no longer become shorter when you put them on an APS machine pistol.

Mickyan updated:

  • new sprites for persistent photo albums

Qustinnus updated:

  • Monkey AI is now contained in a datum, allowing for it to be applied to other mobs.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can now sacrifice a shade in a soulstone to reclaim a mechanical toolbox's SOUL

Son of Space updated:

  • Gives the DonutStation Whiteship a few more materials
  • Adds bounds to the DonutStation Whiteship and a PacMan to power it

SweptWasTaken updated:

  • fixed e and w directions on emergency tanks
  • double emergency tank has correct volume and shows up in holder
  • yellow emergency tank isn't blue when in suit slot

dragomagol updated:

  • The invisible flipped tables in the research away mission are now visible unflipped tables

prodirus updated:

  • Important objects and storage containers are now resistant to hot oil.

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • Removes the white tiles from the Ice Box kitchen hallway.

13 December 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • layer manifolds are now saner

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Space Ninja's suit cooldown now works properly.
  • Space Ninja no longer suffers from being slower than he's supposed to be occasionally.

interestingusernam3 updated:

  • Demon portals can now drop soul stones, but will no longer drop activated anomaly cores.
  • Bluespace anomaly cores obtained from ice demons are now raw cores. No more BoH farms!

12 December 2020

Azarak updated:

  • Shoes get checked for whether they actually cover your feet for purposes of caltrops and footsteps

Joe Berry updated:

  • Planetary turfs now act more like they are on a planet and return to a normal level much faster.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Fixes lava spawning when you mine rocks

prodirus updated:

  • Lizards will now be correctly disgusted by donuts.

wesoda25 updated:

  • Ash walkers no longer know galactic common

11 December 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Civilian Bounty Cubes now pay out 30% of the value of the cube, up from 10%.
  • Cargo Crates are now worth 200 credits each. Cargo crate prices have seen some tweaks as well for more uncommonly ordered crates as well.
  • You can no longer cheat the bounty system by slapping a new price tag over a bounty cube.
  • The values of cargo crates you can order are now scaled in terms of the value of cargo crates.

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • There now exists an admin outfit, better than the debug outfit for messing with things. There is also now a box with every single stabilized slime extract.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Two new binds for targeting eyes and mouth, number pad 7 and number pad 9.

Harimoto updated:

  • fixed a spelling error with a heretic spell message

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • More UI elements will now be displayed in a non-blurry font.
  • Points of interest now use an element.
  • Added a smite option to build mode.
  • Clothes now consume themselves properly.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Drying racks have feedback for dried things now

Mickyan updated:

  • changed the description of painting frames to better explain how to remove paintings and whether the frame is persistent

Qustinnus updated:

  • Lavaland is no longer generated in broken diagonals, instead utilizing a map_generator datum.
  • Bunch of unused turf paths removed

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • You can no longer recycle metalgen

nightred updated:

  • Changed the size of the xray gun

10 December 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • only anchored windows call move_update_turf()
  • singularities from stage 2 and over will unanchor windows
  • removed atmos SM room
  • added atmos testing facility
  • added SM to replace the hole left by singulo/tesla engines

Ghommie updated:

  • jitteriness, melee attack animations and resting/standing up should no longer momentarily remove the floating movement type.

Maurukas updated:

  • The NanoDrug vendor in Medbay is now property of the medical department and will handle payments correctly.

Mickyan updated:

  • Added the persistent photo gallery for distinguished employees to Metastation and Deltastation showrooms

Paxilmaniac, Maurukas and Cartographer-D updated:

  • Adds Kilostation
  • Removes Pubbystation

silicons updated:

  • projectiles now use a new hit detection system that doesn't rely on quirks in movement code to work, and is easier(?) to work with
  • pass_flags_self now handles determining if something with specific pass_flags can cross something, by default.
  • piercing projectiles (see: penetrating snipers) work again
  • projectile permutated/impacted list is reset on ricochets, meaning reflected projectiles can potentially hit something again if it pierced it the first time.

tf-4 updated:

  • removes stray lightswitch from icebox mining base

zxaber updated:

  • Vehicles no longer open firelocks when bumped into them.

09 December 2020

Timberpoes updated:

  • The roulette wheel now actually works and no longer just crashes every time you try to place a bet on a single.

Time-Green updated:

  • Acclimator will now idle when emptying, to prevent overcooking in laggy and sensitive situations

08 December 2020

Cornelius Bogfrollup Fitzgerald updated:

  • new jukebox sprites

Fikou updated:

  • Fixes hiero staff recall message not working
  • Champion's hardsuit has been reworked. spriteadd: fixes spears on suit storages not having icons

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Dynamic abductors should no longer be split up between two different ships.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The singularity, tesla, Nar'Sie, and similar have been refactored to separate behavior.
  • The alerts for singularities being loose are now handled by the singularity itself, meaning the icon will no longer be the containment field.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Refactors now keep an assoc list to keep track of how much specific do afters are running at once

Timberpoes updated:

  • ClF3 can no longer melt through walls.

itseasytosee updated:

  • Jaunting nightmares should heal at a consistent rate weather they are moving or not

thatREALLYgoodsodaflavor, StyleMistake, Qustinnus updated:

  • Implements sound environments into the game. Reverb time.

07 December 2020

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Holidays appearing on the nth day of the month like Thanksgiving will work now.
  • Columbus day is now called Indigenous Peoples' Day.

nightred updated:

  • fixed fever and chills change range to be sensible

06 December 2020

Fikou updated:

  • you can now shoot a guns with modified trigger guards as a snow golem

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Empty supplypods can now be bought from your local express console!

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Slimes will no longer treat people's names and sayverbs as orders

nightred updated:

  • Fixed gasses spawning with no temperature

05 December 2020

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Fixed an issue where Herald's mirror would look like a normal herald on being shot
  • Fixed an issue where Herald's mirror would gain the second set of projectiles at 50% health.

04 December 2020

Qustinnus updated:

  • Slays the last of old-food, making new-food the new normal.
  • Removes a rogue arg from a register signal

Urumasi updated:

  • RCD suicide now tries to place a wall and gib you

tf-4 updated:

  • Uses unused NanoDrug Plus sprite

03 December 2020

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Amputation shear suicide. Engage in medical malpractice TODAY!

Fikou updated:

  • new dark gygax sprites (cool and edgy)

zxaber updated:

  • Borg upgrades with action buttons will no longer have broken action buttons.

02 December 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • Simplemobs should be able to be properly melee attacked again. Sorry for borking it in the first place!

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • DetDrobes can be restocked again, and no longer produce a custom vendor card when disassembled.
  • Revival surgery will fail to revive patients that are husked after the surgery is started until the patient is unhusked.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Luxury shuttle's scanner gates now accept vehicles and simple animals.
  • Luxury shuttle's scanner gates are now unbreakable, and consistency charge the correct amount.

Ghommie updated:

  • Spessmen can't whisper into comms in crit anymore (excluding handheld radios and intercomms).
  • Humans with binary encrypted headsets shouldn't be able to speak into the binary channel when unconscious/critted anymore.

Mickyan updated:

  • Social anxiety can be temporarily suppressed with psicodine and happiness

Qustinnus updated:

  • Newfood now properly transfer reagents on crafting and microwaving, which is useful for things like mystery soup.
  • opening a fruit no longer tells you about the element you stepped on but the actual fruit instead.

That REALLY Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Custom pizza, spaghetti, toast, bread, and salads have returned.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Names that don't pass the IC chat filter are now more prohibited from being set in various locations including pet name tags and the character preferences menu.
  • You will now be warned when using VV auto-renaming features if the name you've chosen is blocked by the IC chat filter for any reason and will be allowed to confirm or cancel it.

tf-4 updated:

  • Makes mood messages consistently first person

01 December 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The code for determining whether or not a simplemob no sells a melee attack because it uses a weapon that doesn't have a high enough force to damage it now uses a <= in its equation instead of a <, and factors in the simplemob's damage multipliers and resistances as well.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Nar'Sie summoning runes can be erased with a null rod, or by a cultist with a sacrificial dagger after a confirmation message.

Ghilker updated:

  • gas selling now use elasticity as all other exports (diminishing returns)
  • fixed issue with HFR core cooling that destroyed gas
  • changed HFR core to use only one port for cooling
  • output temperature and coolant temperature now show the right values

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The implosion compressor now properly gives a message when the bomb is too weak, and will give it back.

Owai-Seek updated:

  • Food is now small, unless tagged to be bigger.

Timberpoes updated:

  • pAIs are now able to fully utilise installed encryption keys through their integrated transciever's menu when they have the encryption key software upgrade. The issue where pAIs are only able to change integrated radio settings when in holochassis form still persists and will be fixed in a later PR.

WarlockD updated:

  • Security Terminal and Tooltips don't use jQuery anymore

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Nanotrasen have updated their control panels mounted on canisters and atmospheric tanks to include fancy new pressure gauges, wow!

dragomagol updated:

  • Reskinned double-barrelled shotguns now appear properly on the back slot

30 November 2020

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Fixes a single typo with TB

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The quickswap hotkey and functionality has been removed
  • Updated the discord verify verb text to tell you to use "?verify" instead of ".verify", as that is the new command
  • You can no longer attempt to hijack BYOS shuttles before they have "docked" with the station

Timberpoes updated:

  • Cyborgs upgrades can be installed properly again.

nightred updated:

  • Body temperature stabilizes to the room temp in statis beds
  • Body warms up a bit faster on the cold moon of ice
  • The cryo pod now cools human core temperature

28 November 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Mobs immune to cockroaches with spikey hats now properly display that they're immune to impalement of the foot.
  • Mech ammo containers now update their material totals after refilling.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Morphs and Swarmers now have their own categories in the orbit menu.
  • Delta supermatter now has N2 canisters.

Fikou updated:

  • improves taming code
  • adds broken states to grass
  • recolored skeleton sprites

Ghilker updated:

  • reaction no longer runtime
  • division by zero runtime fix
  • add showers to atmos of icebox and pubby stations
  • fixed pubby's incinerator pipe not connected and injector not in proper area (no power)
  • moved meta's Atmospheric testing room space walls to allow smooth outside movements

IndieanaJones updated:

  • You can now find swarmer beacons and spider egg clusters using the ghost orbit menu.
  • Fixed being unable to teleport to spider egg clusters using the pop-up notification.
  • Fixed abductors being listed at round end on Dynamic despite none existing

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Improvised jetpacks can no longer be used when empty for short bursts of airtime.

dragomagol updated:

  • xenomorphs, monkeys, dogs, and parrots' strip menus are updated to be like humans'
  • humans now have matching remove handcuff/legcuff buttons in strip menu
  • parrots' inventory will now reflect headsets worn immediately after adding/removing them

prodirus updated:

  • Ageusia trait should allow you to eat with impunity again.

27 November 2020

Arkatos updated:

  • Stacking Machine Console now uses tgui.
  • Fixed a case where certain materials could not be released via Stacking Machine Console.
  • Fixed a case where some buttons in the Safe UI could be hard to press.
  • Fixed a case where certain materials could have problematic or missing behavior when interacting with stacking machines.
  • Fixed a case where certain materials could not be merged together even if they were the same.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Forced speech nanites can no longer make people faint.

Ghommie updated:

  • Nightmares and some other critters no longer delete themselves once they stop phasing.
  • Added a few pixels to the left and right sprites of the galaxy suits.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Dog beds are now properly tagged, and if your pet bites the dust, the bed will be kept in their memory.
  • McGriff's bed actually has flavor text now

LordVollkorn updated:

  • The improvised jetpack has been fixed. Don't forget that it still has to be filled with gas before usage.
  • New custom icons for the improvised jetpack

Melbert updated:

  • Fixed bees being unable to enter bags when scooped up
  • updated accidental consumption to a post-food refactor world

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Fixed an issue with underwear sometimes showing through clothes

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Engineering borgs can now replenish their stock of floor tiles from external sources.

kriskog updated:

  • Admin PM replies to an admin who has deadminned while you were typing will no longer be thrown into the void. If everything fails, the message gets printed in chat.

nightred updated:

  • Donk pockets now fit in donk pocket boxes
  • Donuts are no longer bigger than the box they came in
  • Many food items have been resized

qustinnus updated:

  • cleric mace handles are no longer affected by textures or opacity

26 November 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Pastries have been refactored for new foods.

Ghommie updated:

  • Jungle fever monkeys will now pass canUseTopic() dexterity checks and be able to use tgui machineries.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Mecha Diamond Drills can now properly gib and butcher all simple mobs.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Alerts windows have gotten a fancy new overhaul and now use modern TGUI.
  • Fixed the in-game 'Report Issue' button to use the template properly. Now more easier than ever to report a bug, try it today!
  • The show-server-revision verb, as well as the bug reporting, will now show [s]-flagged testmerged PRs to non-admins and admins alike.
  • Cleaned up the crew console code, moved sorting of sensor entries to clientside.

nightred updated:

  • Humans body temperature stabilization overhauled
  • Humans will now receive temperature alerts before they taking damage
  • Humans now take wounds and burn damage based on body temperature
  • Watchers temperature shot reworked
  • Fever and Shivers have a more reasonable cap

prodirus updated:

  • Health analyzer chemical scan should now work again.
  • Medical kiosks should no longer reset loop.
  • Crew with the smoker quirk are addicted to nicotine on shift start again.

25 November 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Regenerative black slime extracts won't duplicate megafauna any more.
  • Flat dough and pie doughs cut into the proper results again

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Stasis beds will now properly glow right above the bed, not inbetween structures.

Arkatos, original by dearmochi updated:

  • Safe now uses tgui.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • You can no longer inject infinite plasma into a light bulb with no addition effect

Ghommie updated:

  • Fixing the point emote outputting the "unusable emote" message even if actually usable.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Quick swapping items no longer deletes them.

Qustinnus updated:

  • removes a direct use of Destroy()

TheBonded updated:

  • PDAs with manifest access now properly have more protection against PDA bombs

Timberpoes updated:

  • Disassembling computers will now correctly drop the circuitboard.
  • Mecha drills can no longer infinitely stack up actions as fast as the player can click their mouse.

antropod updated:

  • Examinining head without body shows proper message if client has reentered corpse.

cacogen updated:

  • Most objects renamable with a pen can no longer have their labels erased or duplicated or names and descriptions blanked
  • Most objects renamable with a pen can now have their names and descriptions reset to default

prodirus updated:

  • More robust dish drive construction no longer allows user to simply pull out components bare handed!
  • Updated dish drive software now lets the user know if it is empty or trying to beam non-disposable items.
  • Support holoparasite should no longer have missing bluespace beacon sprites.
  • Signature macros within papercode should now work properly

zxaber updated:

  • You can no longer store tool implant tools in boxes or other container items.
  • Admins placing an APC in space will no longer create a runtime factory that breaks everything

24 November 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Lockers/Closets/Bodybags close all open inventories of items and internal items enclosed inside of itself. For real this time.
  • Hygiene Robots are now craftable and deconstructable in the same way as other simple robots.
  • Hygiene Robots must be opened in order to be emagged just like the rest.
  • Living crates now properly behave like crates when faced against plastic flaps.

Fikou updated:

  • shuttle catastrophe now cant trigger if it already happened
  • fixes active turfs on away missions

Ghommie updated:

  • squeaking objects should no longer squeak when crossed by abstract or floating objects such as directional lights.
  • All forms of phasings shouldn't be able to pass through certain restricted turfs now, not just wiz jaunts.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The verb panel is now more consistently correct.

Maurukas updated:

  • Fixed infinite gas consumption by cryogenics pods

Mickyan updated:

  • Picture frames no longer always appear empty

Qustinnus updated:

  • Moves grown food to newfood
  • Gives trash element support for callbacks for item creation override

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Foam darts and other unembeddable bullet subtypes will no longer leave ghost shrapnel when hitting people

zxaber updated:

  • Cell chargers will no longer powersink the room they're in, as they now draw all the power for the cell from the powernet directly through the APC. They still require a trickle of power on the equipment breaker, though.

23 November 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • The chef's food cart can no longer store an infinite amount of food stuff.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Paystands now properly signal out when attached to a paystand and their pay threshold is met.
  • The Nanodrug Plus now correctly deconstructs and can be refilled by it's own refill.
  • The NanoDrug Plus vendor now has a unique coat of paint to distinguish it from the NanoMed Plus.
  • Dirt graves now sound like dirt being shoveled in/out when being closed up by hand.
  • Hydroponics trays growing replica pod seeds will now correctly harvest into seeds if depowered when there's nobody being cloned..
  • False walls will only flash their opening/closing animations once when being toggled, as opposed to being a glitchy nightmare amalgam when pressed.

Fikou updated:

  • moves dough to newfood

Ghommie updated:

  • Fixed pocket spaghetti.
  • Fixed the arena shuttle not being unlockable if medals are disabled.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You will no longer get a warning when checking your mood with telekinesis.
  • You can no longer quick swap another pair of glasses with nearsighted to see perfectly.

XDTM updated:

  • Nanite machinery's screens now turn off if they're broken or are unpowered, and are visible through darkness when on.

dragomagol updated:

  • ghosts are no longer able to empty gibbers

21 November 2020

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • No more shittery with inaccessible nodes getting merged.
  • Fixes heretic brews being permanent.
  • Fixes void storm breaking after resurrecting.

Ghommie updated:

  • Being species-swapped to a species without reagent metabolism (such as android and skeleton) will set you free of any chemical addiction your previously fleshy body may have had.
  • Mk-honk banana shoes can now be refilled with bananium even if not on help intent.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Nanotrasen bounty boards no longer leave behind 95% of the machine when tasked with selling one! (Special thanks to ArcaneMusic)
  • The BSA will no longer refund all of its component parts and circuitboard when constructed.
  • Xenomorph drones and higher will once again generate plasma, allowing them to use abilities and evolve once more.
  • Things with the Xenomorph plasma vessel organ will once again heal on alien weeds.

XDTM updated:

  • Added Nanite Storage Protocols, unlockable through B.E.P.I.S. research. They can modify nanite max volume, increasing the cap or sacrificing some for extra replication rate.
  • Removed the Nanite Tinker Replication Protocol.
  • Added the Nanite Pyramid Replication Protocol to replace it. It increases replication rate if the volume is above 80% of the maximum.
  • Renamed the Nanite Offline Production Protocol into Eclipse Protocol. Functionality unchanged.
  • The Chain Detonation nanite program now scales more gradually in power with nanite volume.

itseasytosee updated:

  • The hydrogen ax is now visible in both hands

20 November 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Hardsuit Thermal regulators will tell you if your cell is keeping you warm, if the internal cell is dead, or when the cell turns itself off.

Caldony updated:

  • The sect of the Ever-Burning Candle has been officially recognised by NT and can now be practiced legally in the chapel.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • fixes the cursed heart being unable to track people inside containers.
  • fixes influence vision getting broken by replacing someone's eyes.

Ghommie updated:

  • You can now put stuff in someone else's hand through the stripping menu again.
  • Admins now have the option to remove a language from the blocked_languages list when granting it to a mob through the language menu.
  • Fixed a 18.18% chance of gibs streaking 50 tiles away... by canonizing it into an intentional 3% chance upon the request of the bunch of you on github.
  • You can't defy lack of gravity through the power of love.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Plasmamen who are gulag'd via the teleporter with non-plasmaman gloves will now be given a free pair of basic plasmaman gloves so they don't die.

ThePotato97 updated:

  • Rotating stamps on paper by holding shift and moving your mouse.
  • Fixed chat message for stamping paper.

qustinnus updated:

  • instruments work again

tralezab updated:

  • AIs can now select art from the gallery as their display!

wesoda25 updated:

  • You can now craft ladders using 15 rods. Note: crafted ladders can only be connected to other crafter ladders.

19 November 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • fixed some atmos reaction from having negative temperature

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Stuff with pockets is now properly logged

Qustinnus updated:

  • Whoever the damn bastard is who tried to take our grills. know this: we will not bend over while you take the only thing that still makes us happy. We just want to drink energy drinks and grill some hamburgers in peace. This is your final warning, try doing this again and we will assemble a lawn mower squad outside of your house at the early hours of 6AM to make sure you cannot enjoy your sunday morning in peace.

Zytolg updated:

  • Cargo, Permabrig, and some other areas now properly certified against Fires with some additional Firelocks
  • Nanotrasen has added new lightswitches as a part of the Corperate-Wide power awareness campaign
  • In an effort to cut costs for the new certifications, firelocks have been removed from Maint Doors (why were these there?)
  • Deleted some wall'D'cals leftover from when the chemfactory was located in the Mogue.
  • Adjusted firelock placement in some hallways to be more sensable
  • Relocated the Water and Fuel tanks in Tool Storage at the request of EOBGames
  • Very Minor Adjustments to Permabrig

18 November 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Spraycans check and only use a charge AFTER their cooldown timer is complete.
  • Basic wooden texture is visible to wood, material crafted objects.
  • Food trays may deposit old and new foods into the microwave and food processor again.
  • Food trays give you the switch gathering mode button when bought from a vending machine again.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • New heretic path - Path of Void- it specializes in being extremely stealthy. tweak : Removed curse of blindness replaced with mask of madness. hey it even rhymes.
  • makes void work

Fikou updated:

  • makes wendigo screech use its name in one attack text

Ghilker updated:

  • remove fusion from reactions
  • hypertorus fusion machine

Qustinnus updated:

  • misc food is now using newfood code

jaw-sh updated:

  • Pizza can now be cut with a scalpel.

maxymax13 updated:

  • Issued new design for budget cards

nightred updated:

  • fixed math in reagent holder exposure
  • fixed stomach vomit damage on food reagents
  • fixed cyber stomachs being able to eat

uomo91 updated:

  • Some things are better labeled for admin readability in player logs now.

zxaber updated:

  • NT CIMS will now send notifications if the app is closed with a supermatter selected, and the selected supermatter starts delaminating.

17 November 2020

Ghommie updated:

  • fixed a typo on the description of McGriff the pug.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Organic bodyparts once again cannot be disabled by reaching maximum damage, and are back to being disabled by compound fracture, burn wound infections, and paralysis.
  • Limbs disabled by compound fractures can be temporarily restored to working order by applying gauze to the limb as a sling.
  • Robotic bodyparts can still be disabled by pure damage, as they cannot be wounded.

prodirus updated:

  • Multiple input fields on paper should no longer lead to fields disappearing when filled. Bureaucrats rejoice!

16 November 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Used first aid and hypovolemic autoinjectors aren't invisible any more
  • Things made of edible materials are more consistently edible, and can no longer be eaten multiple times over by spam clicking them. One serving per pizza floor only, please.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Snail's shells, if removed from their body, are now destroyed as appropriate.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Movement now works even if client dir is changed

uomo91 updated:

  • Fixed "Show All" tab in player panel logs being broken.
  • Whispers display differently in logs, distinguishing them from say logs in display.
  • Player panel logs will now show all logs chronologically, so you'll see commingled say and attack logs if you're on the "Show All" tab, etc...

15 November 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Condiments work with food items more consistently, and packets don't give useless feedback.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Vending Uis work once again with no ID/viewing as a ghost.
  • Rats and Regal Rats now properly trigger mouse traps when crossed.
  • Vending machines now properly apply inflation across the market crash event.

Fikou updated:

  • adds a training machine to delta firing range

14 November 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The shocks from the shock touch mutation now ignore insulated gloves.
  • The shocks from punching or running into charged energy fields now DON'T ignore insulated gloves.
  • The shocks from liquid electricity now ignore insulated gloves.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The Medical NanoMed vending machine has been split into two, with the all new NanoDrug vending machine taking most chemical medicines.
  • Literally everything purchasable in a vending machine has had it's prices adjusted to better suit players to buy more things, while still enabling them to interact with each other using money.
  • Player passive income has been removed.
  • Departmental budgets income has been thoroughly reworked, as they no longer need to balance the whole of the crew's income off of them, making them a more reasonable resource pool scaled to the station's size or efforts.
  • Departmental income is a static value for every department, getting more funds every 5 minutes (Plus whatever's added from vending machines!)
  • Buying goods through your department's vendors now provides an 80% discount as opposed to being completely free.
  • Butchering mobs with embedded objects inside of them will now drop the embedded objects as well.

Cartographer-D updated:

  • fixed the meatball emoji

EOBGames updated:

  • Heretic has received a minor textual facelift.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Fixed Space Ninja's console hack occasionally doing nothing.

UnderARock updated:

  • Hardcore random characters will now receive points for surviving.

itseasytosee updated:

  • fixed some intentional garbling in a hijacking message

nightred updated:

  • Stomachs no longer metabolize reagents, they process them to the body

stylemistake updated:

  • TGUI will keep trying to load for 10 seconds in case of a network problem and will show a bluescreen if it completely fails.
  • This hopefully fixes the whitescreen problem.

13 November 2020

prodirus updated:

  • Old Medibot on the Authorship space ruin should now heal all damage types properly.

12 November 2020

wesoda25 updated:

  • Bathhouse ruin now has proper walls

11 November 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The code for the mutant organs of flypeople has been slightly cleaned up. This shouldn't have any effects on actual gameplay.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Pies use the new food refactor and processing component.
  • Cell rechargers now actually attempt to fill the power cell with the amount of power necessary to fill the cell, based on the APC's charge, preventing infinite energy.

Ghommie updated:

  • Added "beautiful" and "ugly" (plus synonyms) fantasy prefixes. They all affect the beauty of the item.
  • Player monkeys can now wield chairs through clickdrag and be given items to.
  • The head of Armsies and Armsy Primes is no longer invincible.
  • radial menus now ignore the anchor's current alpha, color and transform.

Gogo9001 updated:

  • fixes yellow slime cores being consumed for nothing

IndieanaJones updated:

  • New spider subtype - Flesh Spider. Unique to changeling.
  • Changeling's spider ability now creates a bloody egg cluster, which produces a singular player-controlled flesh spider per cluster.
  • Spiders have been rebalanced.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Vehicles bumping into doors will now check access on all occupants at the same time. This means that clown cars now correctly open doors immediately.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixed being unable to put scooped up mobs (ian, bees, etc) in storage containers

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Fixed various bugs involving generic material floortiles. They're actually usable now.

dragomagol updated:

  • Removed a stacked suit storage unit in mining base

spessbro updated:

  • The rats have removed and added things to maintenance

zxaber updated:

  • Cyborgs synced to a Malf AI that activates Doomsday will now have their lamps forced to a red color and enabled to at least light level one. Stealth is no longer an option. Lamp options return to normal upon Doomsday deactivation, no matter the reason, or if the borg somehow loses sync with the AI.

10 November 2020

Ghommie updated:

  • multiz disposal pipes now have construction icon states.
  • Fixed extradimensional blades not randomizing their damage output when hitting objects.
  • Poker table dismantling now respects carpet subtypes.
  • You can't perform CPR on yourself anymore.

dragomagol updated:

  • Removed a couple of stacked tables on Delta

09 November 2020

Dennok updated:

  • fixed space under placed tiles

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Fixed a bug where Space Ninja could go into infinite cooldown
  • Fixed a bug where Space Ninja could reroll an already hijacked cyborg endlessly

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Observing now broadcasts to deadchat.

Owai-Seek updated:

  • medipen boxes have their own box icon.
  • You can tell first aid, blood clot, and formaldehyde medipens apart.

Qustinnus updated:

  • The clown PDA has been fitted with a B.A.Z.I.N.G.A. module which allows it to detect comedy occurring to the owner, and plays a sound to really capture the comedy of the occurrence.

Skoglol updated:

  • Ghost role spawners will no longer screw up if you stop existing before hitting yes.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Repathed screen objects

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Valid interview configurations no longer cause errors in the config error log

dragomagol updated:

  • Reactive table teleport armor now respects noteleport zones

prodirus updated:

  • New cryomix formulation ensures crewmember's bodies stay vertical during cryostasis!
  • Luminescent eyes can now alter their color and distance while on without turning themselves off.
  • Luminescent eyes should now stop turning on again on movement!

zxaber updated:

  • Mechs no longer bump open shutters and blast doors.

08 November 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • A large derelict space ruin has had a few new doors to keep the air in a bit better.
  • Bounty boards now face the correct direction and exist everywhere that they're intended to exist.

07 November 2020

ATH1909 updated:

  • An issue with the UNREAL SORD's suicide text and effect has been fixed.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Newscasters internal scanners have been updated, and now correctly obtain crewmembers ID cards from their wallets/ID holding devices.
  • Floorbots had had a software update, preventing them from dogpiling on their target as easily as they did before.
  • Floorbots will now play a small chime when stacked on top of each other to indicate that they're moving apart.
  • Syndicate drones no longer have references to their removed mechanics.

Fikou updated:

  • You will no longer lose the mission if you go to water plants on Ice Box, comrade.

Ghommie updated:

  • You can now unbuckle others from the toolbox training machine with altclick.
  • Fixing GBJ cases where the disposal holder (the sctructure holding and moving all that was flushed around the pipenet) is forcemoved outside a disposal pipe.
  • Non-human mobs now also benefit from held id cards and some economy features (dexterity checks still apply).
  • Mechas will once again fall/walk downstair.
  • No more clickdragging one person to another that isn't you doesn't opening inventory windows.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • The Spider Clan has recently taken up the Space Ninja project again along with the Syndicate. Space Ninjas have been drastically changed as a result, becoming much weaker and more stealth oriented. As a result of cutting costs per ninja, more ninjas were able to be hired. Expect to see them around more often.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Catwalks will now properly only smooth with other catwalks

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Improvised bone wound treatments with bone gel and surgical tape applied outside of surgery no longer take ridiculous amounts of time, down from 10/20 minutes for severe/critical bone wounds to 4/8 minutes.
  • Sleeping while an improvised bone wound treatment is processing will cause it to heal about 50% faster, while laying down while awake will heal it about 25% faster. Your bones will spike with pain a bit more frequently during the healing though.

Skoglol updated:

  • Proper capitalization of RCD/RPD techs

Timberpoes updated:

  • Gondolas no longer turn invisible when given a pet collar.
  • Fixes weird lighting issues when crafting items with component parts that have lighting components.
  • Personal AI emitters now regenerate at their properly intended speed instead of 1/10th of that speed.

alphanerdd updated:

  • Made Nothing the cure for Gluttony's Blessing instead of Adminordazine.
  • Fixed the cure text so it both no longer displays a DM path, and also displays the correct cure.

cacogen updated:

  • Anyone can now download BotKeeper (tablet app). Only bots your current ID can unlock will be listed to control.

dragomagol updated:

  • Added lights to Metastation telecomms storage

necromanceranne updated:

  • Reworks the speargun BACK to being a gun! Complete with embedding harpoons! How exciting.
  • Adds new mob sprites for the harpoon gun and a suit storage sprite for the mosin nagant. Also adds a new quiver sprite.

prodirus updated:

  • Roundstart Centcomm reports on communication consoles should no longer be word soup!

05 November 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • Hypernoblium stops reaction only from 20 K and up
  • Hypernoblium formation has been changed to be under 15 K and it requires a lot of BZ as catalyst to lower the energy released by the reaction.
  • Lowered research points amount per moles from 1000 to 30
  • Hypernobilium export price lowered to 5

Ghommie updated:

  • Ripley mechas will now display the right overlays for their armor plates.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Networked Fiber blobs can now place down tiles with their nodes along with their cores and have the same movement effect as well.

Krysonism updated:

  • fixed a gulag stacking machine exploit that would let you farm points with minimal or no ores mined.

Skoglol updated:

  • Immovable rods should more consistently hit the station, will reset target if adminbused, and added more logs.
  • Stuffing people into crates, closets and pods works again.

XDTM updated:

  • Spreading nanite programs (Exo-locomotion and Nanite Sting) now properly transfer the infector's cloud ID to the infectee.

04 November 2020

Qustinnus updated:

  • All turfs now support transparency
  • Datum material floors and walls now support transparency
  • Glass floors are now destructible

necromanceranne updated:

  • Removes the now depreciated high-priority cargo bounty event, that does nothing.

03 November 2020

81Denton updated:

  • Added logging for handcuff attempts and renaming GPS devices

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • added damaged icons for the retro arcade flooring,
  • The Rod of Asclepius and mini-meteors now have unique inhand sprites.
  • Cargo consoles can once again accept crewmember's purchase requests.

Dennok updated:

  • CENTCOM cleaning staff remembered that it would be nice to clean hangars from remains of the catastrophed shuttles. Fixed shuttle catastrophe. Now shuttle catastrophes propertly.

Fikou updated:

  • adds kitchen tools to omnitool

Ghommie updated:

  • Assessing the impressiveness of artwork (such as painting) can now only be done through examine and takes a few seconds, just like how attack_hand (structures) and attack_self (items) used to.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Dynamic Mode can now spawn Swarmers
  • Swarmers have received a software update, changing some of their capabilities. Nanotrasen reports a slight increase in strange objects in the neighboring sector.

InvalidArgument3 updated:

  • new Ripley movement sounds!
  • new hydraulic clamp interaction sounds!

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The View Tracked Playtime has been updated to be made easier to read.

Krysonism updated:

  • You can now cook fried chicken.

Owai-Seek updated:

  • Garbage Bags and Paint Remover now available in service protolathe.
  • Light Replacer is now in "Equipment" tab of service protolathe.
  • Push Broom can be printed at Service Lathe

ShizCalev updated:

  • Meta's tool storage APC is now connected to the powergrid.

Skoglol updated:

  • Onetank bombs icon no longer shows a tank holder.

Timberpoes updated:

  • You can once again place hats on the heads of cyborgs in an ordinary and everyday manner, without having to throw them like you're playing a drunken party game.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Fixes mecha rotate sounds
  • makes mech silence flag instead of null based

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • The chemical bottler no longer clears reagents when its settings are changed.
  • Chemical bottlers can now fill reagents into dart shotgun rounds.

XDTM updated:

  • Fixes psychologists and unknown job titles being incorrectly bolded in the crew monitor UI.

actioninja updated:

  • lighting rotates properly with client.dir

cacogen updated:

  • Fixes ChemMaster not outputting pills to inserted pill bottle

necromanceranne updated:

  • Mechs no longer explode upon deletion. This was a reversion from previous mech code.
  • Fixes null rods that replace your hand being able to be placed into storage slots on accident.

nightred updated:

  • Meta now has more access to great coffee products and coffee accessories, we all need more latte's and maccha's, and cold brews in our lives.
  • Moved mule bots to the cargo storage
  • Moved all the tools in to the smallest room in the area, it is a mess
  • Fly people will not become full on eating that vomit
  • Vomiting now removes reagents properly

02 November 2020

Inept updated:

  • the pettiest errata ever in the chisel description

Rohesie updated:

  • The infinite table stacking exploit is fixed. One table per turf allowed only.

cacogen updated:

  • StartProcessingAtom() uses drop_location() instead of get_turf(src)

01 November 2020

EOBGames updated:

  • pea soup now requires a bowl, and obeys the laws of conservation of kitchenware

Inept updated:

  • a few wee issues on Delta

Skoglol updated:

  • Vampire blood level status no longer has excess spans.

XDTM updated:

  • Fixed nanite comm remotes not working at all.

cacogen updated:

  • Lifeform stasis units have all lowercase names now

31 October 2020

Krysonism updated:

  • Added 3 new types of fancy carpets.
  • A crate of decorative items now sometimes spawns in maintenance.

Rohesie updated:

  • Fixed an issue preventing afterattacks from happening, which broke regenerative crossbreeds, fulton packs and other interactions.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Ridden vehicles always pass any object that would normally pass through tables, such as thrown weapons and bullets.
  • Makes ridden objects more consistent with what causes you to fall off if they require hand availability, checking for the incapacitation traits.

30 October 2020

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Stripping is logged just a bit better

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fixed various shapeshifting runtimes that would affect vampries in bat form and players in ash drake from in particular.
  • Interactions with mobs in shapeshifted form and the Wabbajack force-tranformation effects (including the Staff of Change) should now make more sense and not leave behind random corpses.

VexingRaven updated:

  • Assistants no longer spawn in the chapel on Pubby

cacogen updated:

  • Settings, Ghost and Sound menus on menu bar at top are correctly capitalised now
  • Slicing food in your hand (e.g. pizza) no longer results in it "disappearing" (i.e. having the slices created inside you)

necromanceranne updated:

  • Roboticist unique labcoat! Because you're worth it! Aesthetics!
  • All other labcoats no longer utilize the oldest labcoat sprites we have for their icons!
  • The virologist labcoat no longer lies about being more resistant to biological effects! Not that bio armor does anything in the first place.
  • Some stuff that could be worn in the suit storage slot no longer shows pink! Hooray!

tralezab updated:

  • Blind messages for gunpointing and tackling are fixed

29 October 2020

Ghommie updated:

  • The reactive teleport armor will now actually teleport the owner instead of forcemoving them to the picked turf. Expect some slight changes to the item's behaviour as result.

Megarop updated:

  • Sweet pea donuts no longer cause a giant "error" sign to appear when you put them in a donut box.

Skoglol updated:

  • Removed changeling team objectives and hivemind chat channel. Now a pure solo antagonist, use pheromone receptors if you insist on teaming up.

Stewydeadmike#0068, Ghilker updated:

  • new crystal invasion mob sprites
  • old crystal invasion mob sprites

tralezab updated:

  • Capitalism (golem) and Communism (golem) are dead.

28 October 2020

Denton updated:

  • Fixed the Pubby toxins mass driver door toggle button.
  • Replaced var edited mass driver machinery with proper subtypes.

Gamer025 and ATHATH updated:

  • Refunding Lesser Summon Guns or Arcane Barrage as a wizard will now remove any instances of that spell's associated kind of projectile weapon from your inventory.
  • Non-cultists who try to fire a blood bolt from a Blood Barrage "spell"'s hand will be in for a nasty surprise.

Kylerace updated:

  • holodecks now have one less way of producing infinite cloth

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Fixed another issue with persistent dismemberment scars

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • You can now change piping layers on the RPD by scrolling with the mouse wheel.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Mobs that are in stasis now have a new visual effect.

YPOQ updated:

  • Fixed an issue that prevented split personalities from switching control.

Yenwodyah updated:

  • A few bounties that accepted/refused the wrong items will now accept/refuse the right ones.

skoglol updated:

  • Removed a duplicate table and holopad from MetaStation

26 October 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The off sprites of the new stasis bed look correctly turned off.

Azarak updated:

  • Broken light fixtures will now spark much less often
  • Added functional directional lighting. You can notice them with flashlights, hardsuit lamps, hardhats and the likes.
  • Made the static light system respect the light_on variable

Dennok updated:

  • Double evacuation fixed.

Denton updated:

  • Alien resin floors can no spread to cover up Z level transitions like stairs.
  • Added a large toner pack to cargo - six cartridges for 3000 credits.
  • Increased the capacity of large toner cartridges from 15 to 25. This should make decal/airlock painting less frustrating.
  • Added a missing bucket for the Icebox hermit ghost role.

Fikou updated:

  • adds alternate medborg sprites

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Runechat messages will now also display the icon.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • All pixel scaling prefs properly save now.

MadMedicineMan updated:

  • Canisters now display correct max. pressure

Mickyan updated:

  • Removed grab shortcut for shoe stealing, use the strip menu for your shoe stealing needs

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The Photographer quirk is now neutral and does not cost a quirk point to take. It also no longer allows you to take photos 50% quicker.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Megafauna once again gibs immortal miners

The0bserver, Stewydeadmike, and TripleZeta updated:

  • Adds 3 new plants, and 6 new recipes ,as well as a juice reagent. Check out your local Megaseed Vendor today!

Timberpoes updated:

  • Pacifists can now taunt secbots such as Beepsky. Secbots absolutely loathe pacifist scumbags and will chase down any pacifist who taunts them, informing security in the process.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Added the interview system, a 'soft' panic bunker which lets players who would normally be blocked from joining be interviewed by admins to be selectively allowed to play.

dragomagol updated:

  • Meta and Delta EVA shutters and windoors can be accessed using EVA access

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • Adds fingerless insulated gloves as a Assistant heirloom item.

zxaber updated:

  • AI combat and surveillance upgrades work properly again.
  • Mech pilots can once again open doors they have access to without exiting their mech.
  • Upgrading a MK-I Ripley to MK-II no longer deletes the equipment, and will now match the same percentage integrity that the MK-I had before the upgrade.
  • Ripleys no longer spawn with ore boxes. Go raid the mining outpost if you really need one.

25 October 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The Stasis beds on station have been given a bold, moderné new design.

Capsandi updated:

  • Nitryl decomposition reaction: requires oxygen as a catalyst, under 600k, make sure to breathe nitryl with pluoxium
  • Nitryl no longer causes burns when breathed, but will cause lung damage proportional to the amount you are breathing at a rate proportional to the amount you are breathing when it makes up more than 10% of your breath.
  • Nitryl may cause burping

Denton updated:

  • Removed a duplicate chair on Metastation.

Fikou updated:

  • alien alloy now makes abductor walls
  • gives heads eva access and lowpop teleporter access

Mickyan updated:

  • Added a visible effect to giving the best hugs while using the friendly quirk. Aww!

dragomagol updated:

  • Added vox announcements to individual say logs

24 October 2020

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • You can now high-five your fellow crewmembers! Simply have a slapper in hand (emote *slap), walk up to someone, and press the "offer item" key (default G) to offer them a high-five! Show off how well you and your crew vibe today!

23 October 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Completing a bounty now rewards a hardlight, bounty cube that must be exported for your payout.
  • Cargo no longer has static, roundstart bounties.
  • In addition, the Bounty App and Bounty Console have been removed.
  • Civilian bounties have a higher payout now, but require larger quantities of their target object, as before.
  • Cargo Tech, QM, and HOP bounties are now fully random bounties, as opposed to assistant bounties.

Azarak updated:

  • Runechat messages now won't be obstructed by darkness or lighting, or other effects
  • Flashlights now make a sound whenever they're toggled on or off
  • fixed dynamic lighting not counting for things such as emote visibility

Gandalf2k15 updated:

  • Vended items now go straight into your hand.

Kylerace updated:

  • dressers are allowed to cease existing without needless littering

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Felinids can no longer contract heart attacks and appendicitis from licking the wounds of the injured.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Shapeshifting code will no longer runtime when attempting to cast a shapeshift spell. In particular, this now enables Vampires to bat themselves up once again just in time for Halloween.

Time-Green updated:

  • Plungers can now change plumbing machinery layers. Simply use it in-hand once and then alt-click the plunger to select a layer.

actioninja updated:

  • A button to quickly fix chat if it fails to initialize in the actual output.
  • Fix chat should actually fix chat.

22 October 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • Crystal invasion triggers only between 4500 and 5000 MeV

Timberpoes updated:

  • Motorized wheelchairs now work again.
  • Cuffs no longer prevent all actions that require a progress bar to complete. This includes cuffs preventing you from resisting out of cuffs (yikers!) and cuffs preventing you from standing up after resting.
  • Container contents, including storage boxes and backpacks, can once again be dumped onto the floor.

alphanerdd updated:

  • Adds lasagna as a food item, including a craftable recipe and sprite.

carshalash updated:

  • New Alcohol Amaretto and various cocktails

tralezab updated:

  • Updates pride hammer sprites!

21 October 2020

Azarak updated:

  • Bots have now slightly less respect for authority bots
  • PDA now has sounds for interacting with it, aswell as inserting or ejecting items, such as the ID

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Adds support to anonimizing radios
  • Chapel confession intercom now anonimizes the speaker.

Fikou updated:

  • replaces instances of NanoTrasen with Nanotrasen

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • AIs can now flip again.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The sentient disease status panel is no longer a 1x1 line of letters, and works properly again.

NamelessFairy updated:

  • Gold walls actually have icons now

Qustinnus updated:

  • Improves fall-off code and moves away from byond's inbuilt falloff as much as possible.

SmArtKar updated:

  • Added new icons for ORM and mining vendors
  • Added new icons for mining and genetic scanners
  • Fixed xenomorphs being able to pick up items through /give()

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Forced dynamic rulesets no longer ignore configurations.
  • Moved dynamic forced midround/latejoin ruleset execution buttons from game panel to game mode panel.

TheVekter updated:

  • It is no longer possible to rupture someone's eardrums by spam clicking on the Jukebox's music selection while the cooldown is active.

TiviPlus updated:

  • fixed a few mech bugs
  • Moved mecha gun logging to attacklog instead of mechalog

zxaber updated:

  • Malf AIs no longer fail their survive objective if piloting a shell when the round ends.

19 October 2020

Fikou updated:

  • removes hexane
  • fixes halon's speed thing being removed by consuming tiny amounts of hexane

Ghilker updated:

  • lower amount of lavaland bz/miasma
  • lower amount of icemoon miasma

Ghommie updated:

  • SSeconomy/var/bank_accounts is now an association list of account identifiers and datums and also was renamed to bank_accounts_by_id.

JohnFulpWillard updated:

  • Flypeople can now get wounds

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • As a changeling, you can no longer readapt your mutations while in fakedeath stasis, which would cause you to stay in sleepies forever

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Dynamic midround traitor triggered by roundstart traitor ruleset no longer ignores protected roles.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Cleaned up vehicle code

farie82 updated:

  • The animal progress bar in the DNA vault UI now actually shows the progress

necromanceranne updated:

  • Fixed shuttles docking in the wrong spot when hijacked successfully.

spessbro updated:

  • Changes monkeypowder's behavior in carbons

18 October 2020

Timberpoes updated:

  • Silver soldification is now possible with 20u silver reagent and 10u carbon reagent, heated to 630 Kelvin.

nightred updated:

  • Fixed check in rags preventing smothering.

zxaber updated:

  • You can now use the Activate Held Object and Drop Object hotkeys (default Z and Q, respectively) to activate arm-implanted tools and put objects away. You must have the hand free before you can activate it this way.
  • Arm implant tools are no longer no-drop, and instead simply snap back if they get dropped. Don't sweat it, if you slip just press Z again.

17 October 2020

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Silicons can't see pierced realities or transmutation runes anymore.
  • You can no longer cheese influences by alt clicking on tiles.

Ghilker updated:

  • hexane no longer grand you dchat hearing
  • hexane makes you heat resistant (can still die due to pressure)
  • Hexane no longer deals brain damage

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Nanotrasen has replaced the broken target stakes with a new model.
  • Training toolboxes have been added! Harmless, but useful for practicing your clicking skills and bugging your crewmembers at the same time.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Shuttle navigation computers can no longer switch to z-levels the shuttle is not present on.
  • The Hilbert's orb Hotel can no longer be used via telekinesis, requires adjacency to teleport, will not teleport while incapacitated, requires you to have the item in your possession to teleport yourself and others and has new unforeseen consequences for attempting to transport the item into one of its own hotel rooms.

Yenwodyah updated:

  • Borgs take slightly longer to load people from adjacent tiles but can load people instantly from the same tile

16 October 2020

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Heretics can no longer get dagd and hijack at the same time.
  • Protection objective now works as it should.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Timers wont kamikaze anymore removesound: normal computers no longer have looping audio

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed a lot of animal masks not counting as small objects.
  • Fixed horse / pig / cow masks not being counter as face coverings in mask checks.
  • Fixed a consistency issue where picking up some cursed masks and equipping it wasn't sending the playing a message that the mask was cursed.
  • Fixed a minor inconsistency between the descriptions of cursed masks.
  • Fixed cow masks not fully covering a player's head in certain directions.
  • Admins are now able to varedit an animal masks' cursed var to change if it's cursed or not!
  • Admins can now change the phrases that cursed masks say.
  • Admins can now enable and disable a mask's speech effects by editing it's modifies_speech variable.
  • Added more animal masks to the pool for wizard mask spells!

Timberpoes updated:

  • Delta time probability code improved. This should stop the socially anxious from eternally stuttering when nobody is around. It may also impact laser pointer recharge times which could potentially have suffered or benefitted from a similar issue.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • ageusia works

15 October 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Added the Nanotrasen Internal Requisition Network (NIRN) modular computer app, for heads of staff to download.
  • Use NIRN to order departmentally-related cargo crates using your department's budget funds, without all the hassle!

Dennok updated:

  • tweaked some shuttle code
  • fixed lavaland podding

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • fixes heretic mass deletion during transmutation bug.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Abductor spawns in Dynamic actually function now

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Cyborgs can now interact with the communications console just like the AI.
  • Silicons are no longer given the option to recall. It didn't work in the first place, but now it gives a clear message.
  • The allied sectors list now properly goes down, rather than horizontal.

Krysonism updated:

  • Removed silver from the chemical dispenser and synthesizer.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Adds an emergency shuttle console to the BYO Shuttle.
  • Fixes bolt action guns having a mysterious additional bullet chambered upon initialization.

raffclar updated:

  • Monkeys will once again show missing limbs

silicons updated:

  • Shuttle hijacking has been completely reworked.
  • To hijack the shuttle, you must Alt-Click the emergency shuttle console (the one you emag) to begin the hijack process after a timed delay. You must be hijack capable to do this.
  • Each successful hack attempt (with a time based on antag role and whether or not you have the hijack objective) will push the hijack stage one step, up to 5.
  • After five successful hack attempts, the shuttle will be redirected.
  • The antagonists who can hijack include: traitor, blood brothers, wizard, nuke ops, highlanders, wizards, changelings and heretics.
  • Preserves the old hijack as the new 'Elimination' objective. Nobody but highlanders have this, and their version accounts for only their solo hijacking.

14 October 2020

CaptainZorg updated:

  • Fancier on-mob antenna sprites for antenna and mind reader mutations

Couls updated:

  • some more unused devil code

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Dynamic mode can now spawn Abductors

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The communications console has received a face lift.
  • Fixed improper radio names.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The panic bunker now supports living time, set it to 100000000 minutes today!

Rohesie updated:

  • Getting up from the ground is steamlined. Instead of going up instantly after a stun and taking 2 seconds if you had rested, you take 1 second on both conditions but you can do so while moving without interrupting it. Shove stuns have been modified accordingly in light of this.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Temporal Scarring now has separate scar slots for each of your character slots, meaning scars saved to Character 1 will no longer be loaded by Character 2.
  • Changelings now save the scars someone has when DNA stinging them, and will recreate those scars when using that disguise. These fake scars are removed when the disguise is changed or dropped, though real scars that the Changeling has suffered will remain through disguises and still need to be removed via fleshmend or carpotoxin

VexingRaven updated:

  • It is now possible to use item actions (internals!) while laying down
  • Being buckled to something no longer prevents using item actions

Yenwodyah updated:

  • You can buckle people to guillotines again

actioninja updated:

  • Increased photocopier accuracy

dragomagol updated:

  • fixed main cargo doors to include mining access

necromanceranne updated:

  • Fixes the vast majority of the problems with null rod sprites and bible sprites.
  • Null rods storage spots properly align with worn icon sprites. This includes some size adjustments. This is basically meaningless except for storage.
  • A sprite for the pride hammer in-hand.
  • New inhands for the moonlight greatsword and extradimensional sword.

qustinnus updated:

  • you can no longer cut pizza into bugged slices
  • some small foods are actually small again

spessbro updated:

  • fixes zealot's blindfold's flash protection

zxaber updated:

  • Borg tablets now correctly work when the borg is out of power (though you'll get no networking until you get that power issue sorted out).
  • Borgs that are synced to AIs can correctly view and print photos once more.
  • Adds a camera viewing app, SecurEye, available for download on laptops and modular consoles to those that have security access.
  • Camera console UIs (including for SecurEye) now have the search field locked on screen, rather than scrolling up with the camera list.

12 October 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Species without blood won't spawn with a vestigial heart any more

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Showers once again react with a 10u reaction quantity per tick instead of... 1000u.
  • Mice properly spawn during the mouse migration event.

Cobby (Ideas pooled from Anne and ATH) updated:

  • BSbodybags now inherit the weight of its heaviest item.
  • It is much easier for a conscious individual to escape the bluespace bodybag.

Couls updated:

  • You can slap people by aiming at the mouth with disarm intent

Dennok updated:

  • Fixed syndicate shuttle catalog entity, admins can now spawn the advanced syndicate infiltator during a round

Ghilker updated:

  • stimball reaction
  • ammonia crystals
  • hexane_n2o_filtering
  • all three gas crystal_production
  • proto_nitrate_plasma_response

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Reports indicate that space dragons now come in a variety of colors akin to space carps. Due to this, our researchers have started giving them names to distinct them from one another.
  • Space dragons now vomit up anything living inside them, preventing changelings and blob zombies from killing them from the inside.
