  • Carp rifts now move around every so often when fully charged, making it harder to simply box them in.
  • Random space dragons are now as common as random blobs.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Teleporter machinery now auto links with each other. This makes the old screwdriver + wirecutter interaction redundant, so it has been removed.

Kathy Ryals updated:

  • Nanotrasen has recently hired a new clothing company to design some stylish, science-themed beret ! The Research Director is provided with a free sample in his locker, and three more are available in your nearest Sci-Drobe !

Kylerace updated:

  • holodeck carpets work now

Orange man actually looked at the runtimes, Willox, Inept-At-Job figured out the symptoms, Kylerace owned a map editor, ActionNinja figured out why it was broken, and LemonInTheDark did a one line change updated:

  • Fixes a memory leak, there's a good chance that it's the same one that killed kilo.

Owai-Seek updated:

  • Serving Trays can now hold things again.

PolishUser updated:

  • HoS and Captain Laserguns are now normal sized.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Makes plasteel/plastitanium and a few other alloys actual materials.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Even more dark omens can befall anyone unlucky enough to get a cursed coupon...
  • Admins can now smite players with Bad Luck to make them rather accident prone.
  • Using mecha drills to turn living things into not living piles of gibs will no longer prevent you from doing surgery for the rest of the round.
  • Null rods will no longer banish themselves into the nether realms (never to be seen again) when you select a new null rod skin while your active hand contains anything but the null rod.
  • Latejoin chaplains should no longer have invisible bibles in certain circumstances.
  • Crafting recipes that require both bottles and reagents now craft properly when the bottle contains the reagent, without duplicating items.
  • Crafting that consumes items that have some sort of inventory should now dump the inventory contents out instead of deleting them.

VexingRaven updated:

  • Nanotrasen has performed repairs on the escape pod navigation computers and they will once again dock at the CentComm recovery ship in the unlikely event of an evacuation.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Moves the marisa robe back sprite one pixel to the left.

qustinnus updated:

  • sodium chloride is now called salt

09 October 2020

ATH1909 updated:

  • The Disco Inferno emergency escape shuttle is back, but it's admin-only now.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Science has been given a more experimentally themed set of bounties.
  • Much of the old science bounties were discontinued.
  • ...As have the glass shard and cheese honker assistant bounties.
  • Jerry the cat is now his own subtype, and cannot catch Tom the Mouse.
  • Regal rats can now heal off of cheese wheels as well as more royal cheese.
  • Royal rats can now occasionally appear during the mouse migration event.
  • Rats, when killed, spawn dead rat items that can be eaten or cooked, like dead mice..
  • Rats and mice now interact with mousetraps, albeit differently than mice do.

Couls updated:

  • adminhelping no longer removes entire admin tab
  • end of round no longer removes entire admin tab

Dennok updated:

  • Reverse wrench mode upgrade to the RPD. Attention, due to budget cuts, the mode is hard linked to the destroy mode control button.
  • replace button to shuttle panel, load button now only load new shuttle
  • shuttle template loads as shuttle
  • new shuttle console connects to shuttle on construction/spawn
  • new navigation computer connect to shuttle on construction/spawn
  • docking_port id now unique, adds count to id if id already in work
  • ports from one template now work
  • Shuttle loader no more lost big shuttles.
  • Blueprints now properly create areas.

Floof Ball#0798 updated:

  • The ability to change what type of titanium floor tiles you wish to place via shift-clicking your stack of titanium floor tiles.

FloranOtten updated:

  • fixed the direction of that board
  • added another L.

Ghilker updated:

  • SM will now delaminate faster if exposed to space

Hulkamania updated:

  • Adds stasis beds to the empty medbay on the Zeta Shuttle, now with less dying!
  • Shuttle doors were incorrectly labeled "Theta" instead of "Zeta"

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can now buy the Shuttle 667 when a cult rune is dispelled with a null rod.

Krysonism updated:

  • Pizza now uses the new food component.
  • Custom pizza has been temporarily removed as a result.

Mickyan updated:

  • Statues can be rotated by alt clicking, if unanchored

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • The orbit menu now has an Auto-Observe button! No more sifting through the lame observe menu to snoop in people's backpacks! Also, you can refresh the orbit menu now.

Owai-Seek updated:

  • Vendor refills in cargo are now in their own tab.

PKPenguin321 updated:

  • Blind people can't read wound scanner output
  • Iron falsewalls are no longer invisible.

Putnam3145 updated:

  • Pluoxium generation is back to normal.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Uranium material gives less radioactivity per unit
  • Sheets now have more material effects
  • Statues now have less material effects

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Scarves are smaller now and can fit in boxes.

Rohesie updated:

  • Admins and byond users can now set their OOC (and ASAY) color to light values and it will save in the preferences.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Sleeping carp users are no longer immune to piercing, which means they can once again use most medical supplies, but will trip on glass and such like normal people. In return, they are now somewhat more resistant to suffering wounds.
  • Medical, chemical, and wound scanners are now consistent in that they are all inaccessible to the blind. Progress!
  • Thick material checks (like syringes and such) are now applied on a bodypart by bodypart basis, rather than just depending on your suit.

TMTIME updated:

  • Clowns no longer harm themselves with toy dualsabers

Timberpoes updated:

  • Supply Consoles and Express Supply Consoles will once again be built pre-emagged if their boards used to build them are emagged.
  • Supply Consoles will now once again allow Cargonia to buy contraband when their circuit boards are appropriately configured with a multitool.
  • Dronespeak manual on KS13 is once again infinite use, and can once again only be used on drones or silicons.
  • Hilbert's Hotel Bag of Holding has been replaced with a raw bluespace anomaly core and inert bag of holding. For flavour.
  • Self-recharging basic yellow slime cores have been removed.
  • Self-recharging hypercharged yellow slime cores are no longer self-recharging. They are now a high capacity cell choice. Their capacity is above Bluespace Cells but they recharge slower than ordinary cells.
  • Motorised wheelchairs now use SIGNIFICANTLY less power and should last around 20 times as long before they run out of charge.

VexingRaven updated:

  • The kitchen cold room and medbay freezer air alarms on Metastation have been given reasonable temperature thresholds

Wallem updated:

  • Sign language users now make a visual effort to sign when their hands are full, and can't sign if they're holding an item in their one existing arm.
  • Sign language users are no longer "cured" by ling revives, regenerative extracts, or aheals.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Golems can wear a much larger variety of cosmetic clothing.

nicbn updated:

  • Tank holders have been added. You can craft them using metal rods.

nightred updated:

  • Corrected start check in blood filter surgery

qustinnus updated:

  • some cursed snowflake proc call now uses a blessed signal in trauma code

tralezab updated:

  • ups the size of eguns and lasers
  • HARS moves your brain to your chest instead of deleting it
  • This does in fact mean you can no longer heal admin traumas, roundstart quirks, and other brain oddities

zxaber updated:

  • fixed modular computer program icons not showing.

04 October 2020

Couls updated:

  • keybinding conflict alerts now wait a bit before being sent

Mickyan updated:

  • Fixes certain clothes displaying blood overlays incorrectly

Rohesie updated:

  • The rest verb works differently now: it will let you set your desired state. If you set it to resting then you'll fall to the floor as soon as you can (such as if you are buckled to a chair and are unbuckled), else you'll try to get up whenever you can. You can also get up while moving (crawling) now.
  • AIs can no longer pull things.

TheVekter updated:

  • A new dance-themed emergency shuttle has been added to the rotation. Buy it today!

03 October 2020

Fikou updated:

  • makes portal and gravity gun inhands more visible on flooring

MIK517 updated:

  • Condiment containers no longer change icon when their main ingredient changes (eg. salt saker no longer turns into flour sack when you refill it with flour)
  • Condiment bottle style can be specified when creating via CondiMaster
  • Name given to bottle created through CondiMaster now actually applied to it
  • Name given to condiment container by pen persists when container contents changed

Maurukas updated:

  • The unattended monkey has been removed from Pubby's Medbay
  • Pubby's disposals no longer jettisons recycled material into space
  • Minor issues in Pubby's pipe, power and camera networks have been corrected

Mickyan updated:

  • Paystands have visible feedback after for payment, making them usable if your id card is muted
  • lowered default volume for musical instruments

Skoglol updated:

  • Cleaned up roundend report somewhat.

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • fixed loading map templates on new z-levels causing them to be off by one turf in the x/y axes.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Removed free lag from the renderer

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • tray wearable on belt and has sprite
  • lava burns stuff inside stuff containers

qustinnus updated:

  • changes your cursor when you are holding shift to indicate you will examine

02 October 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • Morphs no longer have to wait 5 seconds between disguising themselves and undisguising themselves (or vice versa).
  • Because they don't have to drag around a heavy body made of runed metal, shades now move faster than the other cult constructs.
  • The "Avoid killing in plain sight." and "Hinder the crew while attempting to avoid being noticed." revenant objectives have been replaced with new, (hopefully) better ones.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Synthmeat works for burgers again, and colored burgers are colored once more.
  • The markings on mothpeople will not show over missing or augmented limbs any more.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The Games vendor now holds a box of "Pin the tail on the Corgi".

Couls updated:

  • You can now rebind OOC, Say and Me
  • Newly added keybinds try to bind to their defaults when added and fail if the key is already taken
  • communication keybinds
  • Communication and movement keybinds can now be properly unbound

Cyberboss updated:

  • Fixed advanced proc calls not sanitizing returned html correctly.

Dennok updated:

  • Add back Hilbert's Hotel, which once again correctly loads its stored rooms.
  • fixed a template loaded hidden things.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • fixed the bad descriptions in a few summon recipes
  • rust walker now requires a head.
  • stalker needs eyes insted of a knife.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes golem ship having rocks on engine places
  • fixes pubby chapel having centcom airlocks
  • fixes ice box having shifted lights on mining base

Ghilker updated:

  • Crystal Invasion event is no longer random and is now a delamination event. When a delaminating crystal has high power, but not enough to collapse into a tesla, it may instead trigger the Crystal Invasion event when the countdown hits 0. This gives the crew one last opportunity to complete the event and restore their crystal back to normal.

Hamcha updated:

  • Jumpskirts no longer re-sew themselves into jumpsuits when being dyed in a washing machine

Hulkamania updated:

  • Other stations will now receive your emergency shuttle request reason! Tell them just how much plasma you're breathing!

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Space Cops now spawn with a Disabler alongside their existing weapon, and no longer have Gang HUDs.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • When you get ghost images on inventory buttons, you can now hover over and out to clear it.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Glowshrooms might be a bit faster idk

MIC132 updated:

  • fixed supermatter shutters on pubby

Maurukas updated:

  • PubbyStation's medbay has undergone major reconstruction, including the addition of a plumbing area.

Qustinnus updated:

  • Fixes monkeycube size and organ callback and microwaves

Skoglol updated:

  • Aux base is now a separate access. Removed construction access from curator. Everyone else that had access to aux base before has gotten the new access, except for geneticists.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Added mapping variants for a bunch of atmos machinery.

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Airlock Painter should now paint airlocks in all appropriate scenarios where it failed to do so before.
  • The Dwarfism mutation no longer bends and breaks reality. As a result, Flat Felinid Friday is once again cancelled.
  • You can now throw a lot of throwable things over railings where previously you couldn't. Including people. Just like God intended.
  • Suit Storage Units will now correctly eject their contents in a variety of scenarios where previously they would refuse to do so.
  • Grinders and Slime Processors no longer eject their own components.
  • Cotton seeds now appear in their appropriate alphabetical place in MegaSeed Servitor vendors.
  • Wizards using the Warp Whistle will no longer become permanently immobilised.

TiviPlus updated:

  • More deletion cleanup
  • Fixes decals causing 20k runtimes and blood not cleaning

Winterous updated:

  • The biogenerator in hydroponics will now dispense botany chemicals in volumes that aren't specifically designed to upset the user.

actioninja updated:

  • Fix Chat Fixes Chat But HARDER

anconfuzedrock updated:

  • adds a new default suicide, a dance.

antropod updated:

  • Conveyor belt switches can now interact with screwdriver and wrench.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Re-styled the statpanel for an improved UI experience.
  • Put all admin buttons under one roof, now with subcategories within the statpanel.
  • Added a cross-server communication network setting to allow clustering servers into distinct groups for cross-server announcements

bobbahbrown, MrStonedOne, Jordie0608 updated:

  • Added indices to improve support of searching through the tickets table, updated schema to 5.11.

nightred updated:

  • ChemMaster got an update and the beaker is not needed to clear the buffer.
  • Icebox RD console can be reached now
  • Icebox Xeno fridge is in the cubical is now accessible
  • Icebox Xeno apc moved to stop odd power issue
  • Camera consoles now have move up down action buttons.
  • Medical scanners, and kiosk now show all addictions
  • Admin full heal/revival now clears addictions as intended
  • Families checks addicts fully now
  • NT Software Hub shows all programs that could be downloaded

qustinnus updated:

  • Ports soup, snacks, icecream, salads and meat to newfood

sergeirocks100 updated:

  • Minor fixes to Meta's permabrig.

tralezab updated:

  • Rethemed the venus human traps, soundwise
  • Rethemed the venus human traps, spritewise

wesoda25 updated:

  • Ethereal power capacity and interactions with power sources has been scaled upwards. Ethereals will now have a more significant impact upon the sources they choose to receive power from.
  • The time it takes for an ethereal to drain a power cell has been increased a little, and the time for lights has been decreased a little.

zxaber updated:

  • Cyborgs now have a Highlander module to use when said gamemode is enabled. The Highlander borg module comes equipped with a claymore, a pinpointer, and traditional garments for the occasion. Like humanoid contenders, Highlander borgs will die in three strikes.
  • AIs will become Highlander Cyborgs upon Highlander mode being triggered.
  • Humanoid Highlander contenders now get a syndicate headset, so that banter may live on even if telecomms does not.
  • Humanoid Highlander contenders are now immune to shocks, preventing them from being able to claim a cyborg killed them with an unfair shocked door.
  • It is no longer possible to succeed as a highlander contenders if other contenders are alive on the shuttle.
  • Borg tool storage huds no longer freak out if there are zero stored modules.
  • Borgs can choose their flashlight colors again.

29 September 2020

Timberpoes updated:

  • Whiteships no longer lose their GPS signal when their bridge consoles get deconstructed and rebuilt.

28 September 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The Grasp of Ash upgrade now causes Mansus Grasp to blind the people you use it on instead of causing it to fling the people you use it on away from you.

MrLostman updated:

  • Heavy armors have received a new design, from a land down under.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Arcade machines no longer require deconstructing and reconstructing in order to work.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Mining mechas refactors

antropod updated:

  • Minor fixes for Syndicate Forgotten Ship.

nightred updated:

  • Icebox Xenobiology has been expanded in new directions
  • Icebox The Research Directors office has been updated

27 September 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Moths won't have limb-shaped holes in their wings when facing certain directions if they have lost a limb any more.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Animals will now properly punctuate their eating.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes supermatter sliver throwing

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Fixed deadmins getting a worse looking Who menu.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes a bug with stacked medical items and wound treatment

Mickyan updated:

  • You may now change the sound of certain instruments with a selection of appropriate variations, similarly to the piano synth

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • The orbit menu now shows the total number of ghosts orbiting something

Timberpoes updated:

  • Any interfaces that were previously usable when they shouldn't have been are now no longer usable in those scenarios. If an interface isn't usable when you believe it should be, please make an issue report.
  • Observers can no longer order things on express supply consoles.

26 September 2020

Arkatos updated:

  • Added a search bar to the Stack Menu UI.
  • Improvements to the Teleporter UI layout.
  • Turret Control UI window height will now scale depending if you are a silicon or not.
  • Shuttle Console UI will now properly show recharging status, and will not wildly shift window upon dropdown selection.
  • Exosuit Control Console UI will now properly show multiple pilots.
  • Fixed a minor grammar mistake in the Holopad UI.

Hamcha updated:

  • Scrubber and gas filters windows are now slightly larger so all the gasses are visible without scrolling

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • admins can now edit the delays for reversing supplypods

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed a runtime caused by a DNA scanner's linked console var not being cleared properly.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Built machines capable of being opened no longer vomit out their circuit boards on opening.
  • Smartfridges and smartfridge variants no longer vend their own components.
  • The Space Dragon carp rifts now correctly charge and the space dragon can now complete their objectives again.

tralezab updated:

  • Icebox now has an elevator! I just took the trousers of every shaft miner to batter town, word.

25 September 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Mothpeople now have a preference to choose their antennae type from.
  • Mothpeople will no longer have floating antennae when decapitated.

Couls updated:

  • remove obsolete face-direction keybinds

Gandalf2k15 updated:

  • Adds a new admin shuttle call option: No recall.
  • Gives admins the option to enable or disable the shuttle.

Iatots updated:

  • You can now bash your hand on glass with harm intent. (no damage obviously)
  • Paper walls have correct sounds, paper doors are not rotated.

Mickyan updated:

  • The Freerunning quirk now lets you avoid brute damage from falling
  • Fixed falling from z-levels causing more damage than intended

NotRanged, Gandalf2k15 updated:

  • Changed explosion sound code to be more noticeable and terrifying throughout the station during siginificant explosive events.

TheBonded updated:

  • Rebalanced Plastanium windows integrity and damage_deflection

Timberpoes updated:

  • Additional language manuals available from certain space ruins. Lets you learn a new basic language from the roundstart species language pool - And if you're lucky, your friends can too.
  • Pubby and Ceres whiteships now have nav consoles.
  • All whiteships now emit GPS signals from their nav consoles. As a result, the Pubby whiteship now has a GPS signal.
  • Space exploration got a number of tweaks. Expect to see some old loot vanish and some new loot to appear in its place. New random loot spawns have been added in various ruins. More ruins have GPS signals. Space-ruin and whiteship GPS signals are no longer uniquely named.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Makes decals an element

YoYoBatty updated:

  • Wall mounted sparkers should now work

24 September 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Vatbeasts, gelatinous cubes, and sholean grapes are visible after being revived now

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • RCDing the top 2 levels of icebox's snow will create an open gap, where you can fall between z-levels.
  • Bombing an area heavily on icebox's top 2 floors can also result in chasms leading to the second level.
  • Building atop openspace on icebox no longer produces magical snow under your lattices.

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Non-motorized wheelchairs are now manufactured to be foldable.

Couls updated:

  • vis dir changes are now handled by vis_flags

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Ash ascension now deals 5 times less damage
  • Ascension achievments for heretics.
  • Flesh ascension was reworked to now allow for you to transform into armsy and into human at will.
  • Marks are now applied using the mansus grasp and procced using the sickly blade
  • You can now shatter your sickly blade, which teleports you to a random safe turf on the station.
  • Blood siphon is a pointed spell
  • you can now choose your sacrifice out of 3 random people.
  • sacrifices now give you 2 charges
  • less influences now spawn on the station
  • Changed a few summon recipes.
  • Flesh ascension now triples your max amount of ghouls
  • heretics no longer have stalk objective
  • heretics now can roll die a glorius death or hijack objective.
  • pierced realities start to appear 10 seconds after being harvested.

Floof Ball / Kathrin Morrison updated:

  • Craftable jumbo chess pieces. Have an 8x8 space on the station? Have a public match people can watch!
  • New shutter sprites. Adds windowed and radiation-proofed shutters.
  • New sofa, craftable in-game with metal like the regular sofas.
  • Sofas now have working armrests.

Investigator77 updated:

  • Large welding fuel tanks are now red instead of white. Large tanks now also have a difference in size.
  • Cell chargers, PKA Modkits, light switches and buttons have been touched up a bit.
  • The incinerator button no longer looks like just a light switch

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The "Who" verb now uses a table rather than a list.
  • The block movement key now locks turning like it used to.
  • Suit storage unit radial menus now close when you walk away.
  • Clicking a suit storage unit slot will try to put the item inside.
  • You can now use suit storage units while the power is out.

Melbert updated:

  • Minor fixes for the food storage component.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Non-gameplay impacting runtime related to antag datums.
  • Code causing antag datums to silently fail when unusual error states occur has been replaced. This will cause errors that were previously ignored to now generate runtimes.
  • Assuming direct control of mobs now appropriately updates the verb tabs. Notably, this fixes ghosts who accept offered AI roles not getting the AI verb tab, but will fix all instances of special verbs not unlocking for every other mob type too.
  • Machine boards and components are now stored in the machine contents list instead of in nullspace. This allows for new interactions with the contents of machines. To give context - C4 attached to a circuitboard that is then used to build a machine will actually explode inside the machine instead of exploding off the map in the hypothetical nullspace. Find new and creative ways to murder your friends!
  • Monkeys using bars of soap will no longer cause runtimes.
  • The AI will no longer partially state laws or potentially even state incorrect laws entirely whenever their lawset is changed in the middle of stating laws.

nightred updated:

  • You get a notice if you are unable to succumb to death
  • Icebox had many plumbing, and wiring issues fixed
  • Slicing foods now needs a tool with a sharp edge.
  • Cleaned up the gain of the no breath trait to clear moods and alerts

tralezab updated:

  • Buffed gravitokinetic stands, and they can't hurt their user anymore.

zxaber updated:

  • Added tablets to borgs. Go bug a human to get some apps installed.
  • Added RoboTact, a borg self-management app to said tablet. This replaces all borg verbs.
  • Removed all borg verbs in favor of the app.
  • Some lesser-used elements on the borg hud are now in the management app.

23 September 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • Adding a symptom to a virus that already has 4 or 5 symptoms in it no longer has a chance of removing a random symptom from that virus.

AnturK updated:

  • Added custom statues. Create carving block from 5 sheets of material then use a chisel on it.

Dennok updated:

  • Some fixes to map_template.load() to make it less runtime.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Projectiles now properly display impact messages on people as well as blood impact splatters
  • Embedded objects now properly use the "a" article rather than "the" when relevant
  • Dismemberment will no longer lead to phantom scars showing up on a person's missing limbs. Insert your own MGSV joke here.
  • Fixed some bad logic that made self-treating severe/critical broken bones with bone gel have 63%/83% base fail rates, instead of 25%/45% as intended. As such, self-treating these wounds is now far less likely to fail, though you'll still have to wait for the effect.
  • The bonuses to the above self-treatment success rates from drunkenness, morphine, and determination are a bit higher as well.
  • You can now see what wound types a detached limb is suffering by inspecting it

Timberpoes updated:

  • The AI can now move its camera up z-levels as well as down by using the option in the IC tab. If you're an AI and you can't see anything, your camera may be on the wrong Z-level. Try moving it up or returning hitting the button to return to your core.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Removed devil and affiliated shitcode
  • Mecha medical and other_equipment refactor

imsxz updated:

  • you can now pat carbon mobs on the head.

necromanceranne updated:

  • Makes the darkblade fit on your back instead of your belt.
  • Adds a whole bunch of missing sprites for: the nullrod, cult blade, spellblade, claymores and dark scythe, among others.
  • Updates the on-mobs for shotguns a little, and fixes several high powered firearms being concealable in suit storage slots.
  • Makes stunprods visible in suit storage slots.
  • Knife sprites for you belt and suit storage!

nightred updated:

  • Added request console to meta bar

tralezab updated:

  • Flower Buds now have a countdown for ghosts

22 September 2020

Donkie updated:

  • Fixed max transfer rate/max output pressure in the gui of atmos devices not working correctly

Fikou updated:

  • shades can now ventcrawl

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Sentient ice demons can no longer teleport.

Mickyan updated:

  • Fixed being unable to build scooters from manually crafted skateboards

21 September 2020

Couls updated:

  • Statpanel subsystem is now prioritized to run after the chat subsystem does

Dennok updated:

  • fixed a few random ruin map issues

Ghilker updated:

  • Added a minimum amount for healium knock down, added a warning when traces are present
  • Remove knockdown, added sleep (less intense effect) refractor: refractored sleeping debuff to take in consideration the TRAIT_SLEEPIMMUNE refractor: moved the healing effects to the reagent
  • removed oxyloss from the reagent effect
  • lowered the amount of healing done by the healium gas
  • increased the radiation amount of proto-nitrate bz response when less than 30 moles
  • increased the hallucination amount of the same reaction by a 0.2 factor

Rohesie updated:

  • Keys no longer have a lifetime of 15 keypresses, meaning you can ctrl+movement keys ad infinitum again.
  • Pressing Esc now has the same effect as releasing all held/pressed keys from the keyboard. Handy if one gets stuck.
  • Removed the old functionality in which Esc would delete what's on the input bar when not focused. Remove/backspace still does that.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Spamming the spin emote, also known as tactical combat spinning, no longer counters new flash mechanics.
  • Skeletons and other bloodless and/or heartless creatures should no longer suffer from heart attacks. This includes those whose hearts have been rendered obsolete via surgery.
  • Fixes issue where overweight characters would be eternally fat and starving characters would become eternally starving on changing species to one that doesn't eat.

20 September 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Cargo warehouse now exists in the 1st basement of icebox.
  • The QM office is now where the cargo warehouse is.

qustinnus updated:

  • fixed some foods getting the wrong reagent counts
  • fixed trash runtime

19 September 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Spinning while the emote is on cooldown will make you confused, dizzy, and eventually puke if you go too fast.

Dennok updated:

  • Return on place shuttle rotating.
  • No more shuttle crashing on rotating.

Joe Berry updated:

  • The ice hermit ruin now properly falls from orbit onto icebox.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The atmos subsystem costs represent the full use of the cost now, take a look and cry tears of blood

Mickyan updated:

  • Added new siding floor decals for mapping

Qustinnus updated:

  • Moves locking movement from being a hardcoded thing to being a customizable hotkey. The default for this is now Alt, moving movement toggle to C

SgtHunk updated:

  • Added the CRAZY Hamburger as a craftable burger, for all the cooks who live in a society. Includes flashy green smoke.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Modular laptops and tablets will no longer experience abnormal behaviour including unclickable UI elements when placed in your bag, and will now close their interfaces appropriately.
  • The upper section of the robotics mech bay room on Metastation is no longer shielded from radiation and you now have to enter the maintenance section to be safe.
  • Flashes are now more reliable and flashes hit by EMP will appropriately blind or not blind people based on whether they are facing the flash or not.
  • Hilbert's Hotel and its associated ruin have been removed from the game.
  • Severing and almost severing a body part should now always display the proper gruesome wounds messages instead of occasionally runtiming.
  • Fix a runtime related to pAI internal interfaces. Realise the actual intended look of pAI interfaces sucks. Revert intended look of pAI interfaces to how they looked when they runtimed, but without the runtime.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Optimized conveyors

Tumesuo updated:

  • Fixed a grammar mistake in the wizard greeting.

Winterous updated:

  • Gibtonite ore now respects the disturbingly flexible flow of time, and will pulse once per countdown tick, instead of 1.25 or more depending upon time dilation.

dragomagol updated:

  • Quartermaster spawnpoint on Pubbystation
  • Shaft Miner spawnpoints on Pubbystation
  • Cargo Tech spawnpoints on Pubbystation
  • Fixed Pubbystation delivery access and mining access

hannahscript updated:

  • Botanists can now make rolling paper packs at the bio generator to support dank activities
  • Bio generator interface is now 420 pixels high to prevent a scrollbar from appearing

infoman-cor updated:

  • Monkeys now examine themselves instead of self hugging.

nightred updated:

  • Runechat works better with the recorder

18 September 2020

Ghilker updated:

  • Cyrion-B is now named Zauker

17 September 2020

Arkatos, original by ShadowLarkens updated:

  • Stack menu now uses tgui.

Azarak updated:

  • Messages based on sight aren't obscured by darkness if you're right next to the source
  • As a ghost, you will not see emotes from mobs that dont have a client and are out of your range, while using ghost sight
  • Added a rest keybind! The default hotkey is U

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fixes runtime when transforming into a shade using a cursed Russian revolver.
  • Using a burning black crossbreed to transform into a slime, go ventcrawling, then transform back into a human while ventcrawling is now a lot more deadly.
  • Non-gameplay impacting runtime on holopads when the user spoke after placing a call but before it has been connected.
  • Minor runtime with no gameplay impact related to printing implant cases.
  • Apple Cakes no longer slice into Slime Cake Slices
  • EMP-shielded cameras will no longer runtime when destroyed.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Ghost Whispers preference no longer requires Ghost Ears to be enabled to hear all whispers.

nightred updated:

  • You can now remove the toner cartridge from photocopiers

uomo91 updated:

  • Plasmamen psychologists will now wear enviroslacks and medical helmets.

16 September 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Every single thing that should have a belt/suit/worn sprite, now once again correctly has a worn sprite on the player's body.
  • Admins can run a debug verb to see what things are missing icon_states on the player's worn body.

Cartographer-D updated:

  • Pubby Cargo will not go down so easily to fire. Its lights are once more controlled by man. Mining once again treads where it wishes.

Couls updated:

  • icons are back on alt clicks
  • horrible performance from alt clicking turfs with multiple objects tweak:browser should notify the SS when it's ready to receive data

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Reworks N2O - Now it is quasi-sorium that still explodes.
  • Slightly Buffs RDX - It has a slightly bigger fire radius and explosive power in low quantities.
  • Flashes now stun for shorter and the duration of the stun is based on the direction of your enemy.

Fikou updated:

  • admins can now edit the valid areas of close quarters cooking, become the next star of the close quarters cleaning!

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Using a light tube on an unfinished light fixture will no longer break it.

PolishUser updated:

  • Added breadcat pet, craftable in your local kitchen!

Qustinnus updated:

  • Moves spaghetti to new food
  • Fixes some more size problems on food
  • Fixes organs having wrong params

Timberpoes updated:

  • You will now no longer feel so eternally sad if you gain the a trait where you no longer need to breath or become a God while you are suffocating.
  • AIs should no longer experience weird interface disparities or module selection issues when assuming direct control over a shell for the first time when said shell is damaged.
  • Added two code paths to help catch and debug a runtime error in the fit_viewport verb.
  • Fixes runtime when attempting to start surgery on simple mobs and other non-humans/humanlikes
  • Fixes a runtime in the air subsystem, where deleted objects were still processed.
  • Microwaved cake batter and similar snack foods that create non-snack foods will no longer cause runtimes, meaning cakes now get filled with reagenty-goodness and are both delicious and nutritious.

14 September 2020

Putnam3145 updated:

  • made ventcrawling not intentionally obfuscated badcode

Timberpoes updated:

  • Added a confirmation prompt before harvesting a fully grown Replica Pod that has been associated with a player, but the player is not yet dead or ready to be revived. Gives you the choice of backing out or harvesting them for seeds. Functionality unchanged.

lordpidey updated:

  • The syndicate now provides a single empty syringe with it's dart gun.

13 September 2020

Arkatos updated:

  • Mass Driver Control now uses tgui.
  • Mass Driver Controls now process only when needed instead of all the time. In short, free performance for you.
  • Guide to Dank Mimery now uses a radial menu.

EOBGames updated:

  • A few little fixes on Metastation.

Ghilker updated:

  • New RPD device, the temperature gate
  • new device, temperature pump

Jimmius updated:

  • Adds door seals to the game, printable at engineering and security lathes after they've been researched. Makes airlocks much harder to smash down if you can't remove them.
  • Slightly changed how bonus health to an airlock works

TiviPlus updated:

  • Whiteship is randomly chosen

VexingRaven updated:

  • Mechs once again use power when moving and properly show errors when failing to move
  • Gygax Leg Actuator Overload button now works correctly
  • Orbital Mech Pads can once again send mechs
  • Livers once again give peptides when put in a grinder

Wallem updated:

  • Fixes some issues with sign language, such as unique mime text, drunk slurring, punctuation, and megaphones.

itseasytosee updated:

  • The hydrogen Axe now has back sprites.

nightred updated:

  • Meta Engineering lobby fixes and tweaks, added missing machine, moved lights in SM
  • Meta The bar and kitchen have had several updates to objects
  • Meta The service hall was widened by one tile
  • Meta Atmosia has a fancy new control room and a bigger storage room for projects

tralezab updated:

  • Botany is remade for ice box!
  • Security's Education room has a sparta pit on icebox
  • Countdowns use maptext.

12 September 2020

Cartographer-D updated:

  • A completely new cargo department for Pubby Station, try it out!

Dennok updated:

  • Now you know that pipe meter can be wrenched on pipes, or screwdrived to floor.

EOBGames updated:

  • A few little fixes on Deltastation.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Mappers can now use Smart Pipes, pipes that autoconnect to other pipes, like redstone! MAPPERS ONLY!

UnlimitedVanillaWorks updated:

  • fixed a few atmos item/gas typos

VexingRaven updated:

  • Health analyzers have been upgraded with the ability to alert their user when the subject is husked.
  • Defibrillators have been upgraded with the ability to alert their user when attempting to revive a husked corpse.
  • The husk status of a corpse is now visible when examining the corpse.
  • The description for synthflesh and rezadone now mention their use in restoring husks.
  • MetaStation's Departure Checkpoint telescreen is now properly connected to the station's camera network.

nightred updated:

  • Meta service overhaul the great botany.
  • Organ removal stops reagent reactions on the host

silicons updated:

  • xenobio cameras no longer runtime when they're not in their original allowed area.

willox updated:

  • sinks now refill properly after multiple uses or after wetting a mop

11 September 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • A new, familiar breed of plant has been spotted growing in the barren wastes of icebox station.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can no longer see what surgery steps are being performed on you while blind.
  • The ash walker ruin no longer contains an invisible singularity generator.
  • Alt-clicking atmos machinery will now give a chat message explaining what happened.
  • Chemicals now correctly do effects when they stop metabolizing.

Joe Berry updated:

  • Brings back icebox mining mobs from the shadow realm.

Mickyan updated:

  • Added rollerskates and skishoes, available at the library's fun vendor
  • wheelys are now a skateboard subtype and more modular
  • improvised skateboard is now it's own subtype

Timberpoes updated:

  • Various spells and abilities across reventants, wizards, genetics, heretics and others, no longer have cooldowns 10 times longer than expected.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Fixes master lint and makes hilberthotel.dm use tabs instead of spaces
  • fixed monkey shuttle

VexingRaven updated:

  • Ventilation and a security monitor have been added to the Ice Box Station security desk
  • A security officer may now spawn at the security desk on Ice Box Station.
  • Fixed the description of the door controls at the Ice Box Station security desk.
  • The AI will no longer get power/atmos/fire alarms from random ice box ruins
  • Minor refactor of area alarm code
  • Removed old admin alert for engineering losing power which was meant for the singulo
  • Air alarms, robots, and express supply consoles can now be unlocked with an ID in a tablet.

itseasytosee updated:

  • Cams in iceboxe's perma no longer reveal the door to the prisoner "reeducation" room

san7890 updated:

  • Bombmakers unite! Nanotrasen has recently retrofitted the Science department on the IceBox Station and made the Toxins Gas Storage room adjacent to... Toxins! They had to sell all of those scrubbers and gas canisters to pay for it though.
  • The RD however, is not too jazzed about his new office on IceBox, It's cut down by an incredibly slim margin, but...... What's the upside again?
  • Genetics Monkey Pen has shifted... Odd...

zxaber updated:

  • Fixed a runtime with Plexagon Access Management when the second ID slot is missing.
  • Plexagon Access Management now follows the standard for ID reading and requires you to insert your card.

10 September 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The default EMP feedback message for arm implants has been improved.
  • The gem-encrusted hardsuit no longer slows you down while you wear it.
  • Fixed a copy+paste error in the code for how synths handle their disguise species' mutant body parts.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • More cardboard box-adjacent things break down into cardboard, and are all made of cardboard.

AsphaltEvidence updated:

  • fixed drone_maint_green (M) north animation state

Couls updated:

  • Runechat no longer breaks when the tick lag is changed

Dennok updated:

  • canisters no more give runtime error on shuttle loading

Ghilker updated:

  • BETTER_DIST define to replace the get_dist() native proc
  • event crash fix by replacing the native proc with the define
  • monster damage overall reduced and boss spawning changed a bit
  • hydrogen + rads = trit
  • 5 new gases
  • Healium : made from Bz + Freon + cold, it knocks people down but have healing properties
  • Proto Nitrate : made from pluox and H2 + heat, it has different reaction with a bunch of other gases
  • Cyrion B : made from hypernoblium + stimulum around 0°C, it has heavy damage if breathed but is decomposed rapidly by N2
  • Halon : made from bz + trit + cold, it reacts with O2 at high temperature removing it and cooling the air, helping putting out fires
  • Hexane : made from bz + H2 + cold, it reacts with plasma and n2o and removes them from the air mix, filtering them.
  • stimulum no longer require plasma
  • canister sprites, gas sprites
  • crystal from gases formation and reaction
  • new metallic hydrogen recipes
  • elder atmosian statue
  • supermatter interactions
  • minor changes to fusion math to make it "easier" to start add : pluoxium can be also made without using rads (not removing the rad production one) (this also produces a minimal amount of h2)
  • lowered hypernoblium min temperature of reaction
  • metallic hydrogen production more common
  • cyrion-b bounty
  • all 5 gases are up to selling

Helianthus00 updated:

  • Corrected the directions of arcades on delta, icebox, and pubby

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Hulks can now attack monkeys.
  • The scrubbers network no longer experiences backpressure surge. No ejection of contents will occur.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Readds the tesla with some changes, it's more about killing machines and people then the hull now. Oh and it makes pretty blue light now. Power delam your local supermatter crystal today
  • You feel the universe shift, tesla code has changed.
  • Most zaps no longer generate power, excepting the sm zaps.

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • The supplypod menu no longer sucks

Qustinnus updated:

  • Allows you to use the ability of vatbeasts when riding them

Rohesie updated:

  • Things without a client or not alive, bots included, will be ejected out of the station pods (like the ones leading to the AI sat) on arrival, to prevent them being hidden in a very hard to detect location.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The blob random event can no longer occur after the shuttle has reached the point of no return

TheVekter updated:

  • Re-adds the reagent grinder to Pubbystation's xenobiology wing.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Living things should no longer hyperventilate 24/7 and will once again breathe at more leisurely pace.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Spacemen will now take 4x larger breaths
  • Various pocket and belt-sized internals tanks have had their capacities increased 3x to 4x to account for the new breathing changes

VexingRaven updated:

  • The Shuttle Catastrophe event can no longer occur to the Build Your Own Shuttle Kit.
  • Air alarm operating modes are functional again.

Whoneedspacee updated:

  • Fix ruins overlapping the station and away missions increasing world size.

itseasytosee updated:

  • light eaters make a slashing sound effect rather than a bludgeoning one

msgerbs updated:

  • The PubbyStation Monastery Shuttle will no longer maroon passengers in deep space when the emergency shuttle docks at centcom.

read-0nly updated:

  • Adds CRISPR - a gene editing method that lets you overwrite base mutations

09 September 2020

Wallem updated:

  • Adds Sign Language as a new neutral quirk titled "Tongue Tied." Comes with all the benefits and challenges of using your hands to speak to people.

08 September 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Showers no longer have the vapor reaction, as before the changes.
  • Showers no longer produce ludicrously over-scaled chemical reactions.
  • Gas chems now produce 1/4th less gas when released into the air as before.
  • The light tiles on disco inferno no longer look ugly when they burn down every shift.
  • You can now tap/rotate trading cards!

CoffeeDragon16 updated:

  • Announcements now correctly read Mother Russia Bleeds
  • Pacifists do not care about harm if it is for Scotland,

Dennok updated:

  • pipes should be displayed in a fixed order

Donkie updated:

  • Process procs now properly utilize deltatime when implementing rates, timers and probabilities, which paves way for easier subsystem tickrate adjustments.

Fikou updated:

  • adds trait injector mapping helper

Ghilker updated:

  • Ligthing aoe projectile now have a no_stun version for the boss rank
  • Crystal mobs have TRAIT_TESLA_SHOCKIMMUNE to prevent boss from hurting himself and the other crystal mobs
  • Revamped mode, announced main portals with location, close them to be able to stabilize the SM
  • Balanced mobs spawn from portal and how much damage they deal
  • Fixed grammar stuff on crystal consume announcement
  • Lowered time needed to use the crystal stabilizer to 7 second total
  • Refractored code so that the more_portals() proc gets called by the event instead of a CALLBACK
  • Added check at start of event for presence of the supermatter crystal

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Performing a head transplant will now properly preserve the appearance.
  • The crashed ship ruin now has proper meat.

Shirbu updated:

  • nightmares can now dodge beam projectiles on dark tiles
  • lasers', emitters', and disablers' projectiles, now emit light only on their own tile, instead of a 3x3 square

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Chemicals now properly acknowledge exposure. Water is wet again, synthflesh will now apply properly, space lube will now properly make floors slippery again, etc.

TiviPlus updated:

  • fixed mech icons and lights
  • Made strafe behavior better
  • fixed mechs exploding
  • fixed mech weapon cooldowns being inconsistent
  • cleaned up mech code some more
  • FIXES WEEWOO MAKING SERVER EXPLODE

YPOQ updated:

  • The arena shuttle no longer teleports people into space.

floyd updated:

  • moved cakes to newfood code
  • i fucked up some food lists because i misunderstood them, thats now fixed.
  • edible component now properly handles transfering reagents on processing, microwaving and crafting

nightred updated:

  • Delta added many fire alarms
  • Random arcade cabinets keep rotation on mapload

07 September 2020

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • Nanotrasen has updated the cooling setup of telecommunications rooms in Delta-Pattern Stations. It now makes the simulation faster.

Dennok updated:

  • passive gate max out limit pressure settings increased
  • passive gate description more precise

Maurukas updated:

  • Cryo cells work again and are no longer permanent icy prisons

Timberpoes updated:

  • Reduced Diagnostics nanite program has been removed.
  • Nanite Debugging nanite program has been added. This program causes your nanites to display their program list when scanned, but comes with a 0.1/s nanite cost.
  • Reduced Diagnostics nanite program functionality is now default behaviour. The nanite program list is hidden from nanite scanners by default. You now now to include the Nanite Debugging program to show the program list on scan.
  • Researching Harmonic Nanite Programming now confers a passive boost of 0.1 regen rate to all nanite clouds. This boost takes effects as soon as the node is researched.
  • Harmonic Nanite Programming research node now requires 3000 General and 3000 Nanite research, an increase of 1000 each.

06 September 2020

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • The blood filter can now be put in medical belts and medical aid kits
  • Spray bottles, amputation shears, and surgical tape can now be put in the medical aid kit
  • Printing and recycling bonesetters no longer creates materials from nothing

Radacitus updated:

  • Adds a new Ingredient Beacon and gives it to the Chef in-place of their Ingredient Box on spawn.
  • Adds some custom text that appears when you use the Chef and Curator Beacons.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Fixed an issue preventing zombies from being decappable. Krokodil addict zombies are also no longer immune to wounds
  • Eswords/dual sabers/armblades/light eaters/similar weapons no longer have significantly reduced wounding power and are similar in dismembering power to their old incarnations. In addition, they are moderately less hard-countered by armor.
  • Attacking a prone target will now hit the targeted limb 90% of the time rather than the standard 80% (50% less likely to hit a different limb)
  • Sutures and cauterization are more effective at patching up piercing wounds
  • Improvised cauterization (anything hot that isn't a cautery) is now slightly less efficient and requires an aggressive grab to apply to the target. No more accidentally trying to cauterize the guy you just attacked with an esword!

YPOQ updated:

  • Fixed internal martyrdom.

nightred updated:

  • Many stomach issues
  • Health Analyzers, and medical kiosk now show stomach contents

tralezab updated:

  • You can no longer earn achievements in debug mafia games.
  • And the achievement code is much nicer :)

05 September 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Wild mutation crops now carry over the physical traits from their parents.

ArcaneMusic + Kryson on Sprites updated:

  • A migratory pack of Lobstrosities have appeared outside of icebox station, be advised of their charging attack.
  • Hostile simplemobs may now charge at targets.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes organs not showing up in the limbgrower

Fikou, sprites from CEV Eris updated:

  • adds better grass sprites

Ghilker updated:

  • fix sprite jank on layer 1 and 5

Jack7D1 updated:

  • Bounty tablets can print the bounty sheets again.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Crew monitor consoles now work again.

Krysonism updated:

  • Many meats have had their sprites replaced.
  • lizard meat, meat product & synthmeat have their own steaks now.

Mickyan updated:

  • Fixed accordion not working

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Acid levels have been componentized.

TiviPlus updated:

  • Initialize will now not sleep properly

VexingRaven updated:

  • Tweaked MetaStation's vault and brig cells area.
  • MetaStation's Brig Control has been remodeled.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Orbiter components are a little easier to understand now.

lovegreenstuff updated:

  • 5 lines of code for a new mitogen reaction for the new vat-growing protein reagent that replace nutriment.

nightred updated:

  • Adding missing firelocks and afire alarms in medbays
  • Cyborg do not scream when disinfected in a storage unit

04 September 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The "plating repair tool" has been added to the game in the form of a printable upgrade for janiborgs. It's a subtype of the cautery that can repair burnt or damaged hull platings, allowing floor tiles to be placed over them once again.
  • The upgrade that adds it to a janiborg's list of tools can be printed once the Cyborg Upgrades: Utility tech node is researched.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • You can't use the civilain bounty console while depowered anymore.

Fikou updated:

  • spy glasses now use an action button instead of a verb, so they are less cryptic and someone will know how to use them
  • spy glasses are now sunglasses, removes the sunglasses from det's office so you can just take the spy ones from your locker

Ghilker updated:

  • Icebox pipe layering error

Jack7D1 updated:

  • Swarmers can no longer break walls with large pressure differences across them.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Suit storage units now use a radial menu.
  • Suit storage units now put the items in your hand, rather than on the ground.
  • Icons have temporarily been removed from the alt click menu citing significant performance concerns. They will be brought back soon.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed light eaters not consuming helmet / gun lights.

SpaceManiac updated:

  • Zipper noises are no longer played on the lobby screen when a character joins with a random-colored jumpsuit.
  • The "Fit Viewport" verb and preference now take into account a 300px minimum width for the chat, in case widescreen is combined with a narrow window.

itseasytosee updated:

  • supermatter tongs holding supermatter shards now have working in hand sprites

nightred updated:

  • The stomach is now needed to eat food or drink
  • Vomiting now empties the stomach only,
  • New surgery to filter the blood of reagents and the tool that is needed
  • Stomach pump surgery is now do able on the living

03 September 2020

Couls updated:

  • Alt clicking items in the listed turf tab doesn't open up a popup
  • Toggle suit sensors button missing

Dennok updated:

  • pressure valve max trigger pressure settings increased
  • pressure valve no more over pressurize output

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Skeletons and other boneheads can now treat their bone wounds with bone gel and slings without getting messages about their flesh being impenetrable.
  • Wigs no longer appear on the examine lists of people wearing them
  • You can emote while conscious again

nightred updated:

  • Prevents fire from becoming permanent

02 September 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • Penthrite no longer makes you immune to staminacrit.
  • Penthrite no longer has an effect on people who can't metabolize it.
  • Spam-buckling and spam-unbuckling someone to/from a stasis bed while they have penthrite in their system will no longer cause them to enter a state of permanent critical condition.
  • If you regain the ability to metabolize chems while you have penthrite in your system, you'll also regain the special traits (immunity to hardcrit, immunity to softcrit, and immunity to the effects of heart failure) that penthrite's supposed to give you.
  • Penthrite now makes you immune to the damage over time that being in crit gives you, so as to better mimic its previous/intended effects.
  • Penthrite's description has been modified slightly.

Arkatos updated:

  • Admin controlled shuttles will now redirect to an actual shuttle controls upon authorization request instead of always targeting CentCom ferry. Admin staff can now also alternatively unlock or relock the shuttle upon request.
  • Escape pods no longer start as admin controlled shuttles, they simply start locked until appropriate code level is set.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes mechpad crowbar act
  • select equipment now includes basic plasmaman outfit

Ghilker updated:

  • unlocked atmos full layer potential (now 5 layers avaiable instead of 3, not all objects can use the additional layers)
  • More flavor texts to crystal event related devices and structures to help players on what to do
  • Ability to close the portals by using the combination of Analizer+Signaler
  • Crystal monsters have now different ability but similar health and damage
  • You can sacrifice someone to the crystal to increase the spawn delay by 5 seconds permanently
  • sound effects to the destabilized crystal
  • spawned anomalies don't explode anymore
  • event will end in a reasonable time

Jack7D1 updated:

  • Puddles are now infinite sources of water again.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • The searing tool now starts as a cautery, rather than a drill.
  • It is now easier to change the flags of turrets.
  • Quick swapping a suit will now properly check suit storage.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Hello admins, I've made your view options better reflect reality, you can't crash parallax for yourself by using them now.

Melbert updated:

  • Slightly made it easier for blind people to examine things in hand / examine things closer
  • Fixed delayed blind examinations
  • Fixed blind people examining things with disabled/detached hands
  • Fixed blind people being able to reach through windows

MoonFalcon updated:

  • Allow heretic ghouls to use the sickly blade and ashen eyes

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • Lesser summon bees, a spell that summons bees

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Dying people can gasp and deathgasp again
  • Borgs can deathgasp (and normal gasp I guess) while stunned again
  • The message for disembowelment now properly displays

Timberpoes updated:

  • Click-dragging behaviour has been restored to normal. Players will no longer attempt to buckle things to other things except when they quite intend to.
  • R&D Consoles are no longer required to operate other machinery including mechfabs, omni-protolathes, omni-imprinters and the destructive analyzer. These consoles have been removed and replaced with basic modular computers.
  • The destructive analyzer has lost its material reclaimation feature. It now only destroys items and unlocks techweb nodes.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Spectral Blade - Ghosts that orbit it or the holder are no longer forced to spectate it until the end of time. Huzzah!
  • For real. Not kidding. You can answer the call to aid someone with your spooky presence and then STOP ORBITING ON YOUR OWN AT ANY TIME just like any other object.
  • Ghosts no longer receive a redundant orbit link when the Spectral Blade is raised.
  • Alien larva can no longer evolve in vents and become stuck.

oranges updated:

  • New achievements for science

tralezab updated:

  • mafia lobby now refreshes correctly!

uomo91 updated:

  • The public can now exit the labor shuttle arrivals area on Box and Delta, without having to wait for the AI or sec to let them out.
  • The gulag teleporter will now give prison jumpskirts, if the player's preference is set to jumpskirt.

01 September 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • By using a TCG card on another TCG card, you can create piles of cards in order to play against each other.
  • Using a deck if tcg cards on a table allows you to shuffle, flip, and draw from the deck as well.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Pun Pun is Pun Pun again (except in rare cases where he is not)
  • Keep an eye out for Furious George though, he's a serious loose cannon

tralezab updated:

  • New swab for netherworld critters! Make sure you put them into a different vat system than your other ones, as they do not react well with normal reagents!

uomo91 updated:

  • You can buckle yourself and others into chairs that you're right next to, instead of needing to be on top of the chair to do it.
  • You cannot pry up floor tiles in the holodeck photobooth anymore.
  • The advanced fire extinguisher now has an inhand sprite, and no longer looks like a regular extinguisher.

31 August 2020

Dennok updated:

  • ladders keep its menu opened when you use ladder

Donkie updated:

  • Converted check_obscured_slots() output to bitfield instead of list

Ghilker updated:

  • Added Crystal Invasion Event (with all the mechanics, mobs and item related)

Helianthus00 updated:

  • Added 2 new subtypes of gas meter so that they work on layers 1 and 3
  • Deltastation: Fixes some broken gas meters to be on the correct layer
  • Icebox station: Fixes some broken gas meters to be on the correct layer, as well as relocating the random ones in maint to actual pipes
  • Pubbystation: Fixes some broken gas meters to be on the correct layer

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • H2O is a bit more spicy in the sm, and plux is now a danger rather then a gift, filter it out you nerds.
  • You feel a great shift in space, the spice rock has changed

Timberpoes updated:

  • NanoTrasen has stopped supporting Standard cyborg modules, citing spiralling costs with managing legacy hardware and ancient upgrades.
  • Fixed runtime error introduced by Delta's new cap office maintenance APC.
  • When hacking cyborgs, the Module Reset wire is now far more obvious.

TiviPlus updated:

  • fixed overlay lighting sometimes displaying offset
  • Mech refactor

30 August 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Showers now preform a touch reaction, not a touch/vapor reaction with piped reagents.
  • You can now build water recyclers in lathes, as intended.

Ghilker updated:

  • Pressure Valve (a device that allow gas flow in a pipenet if the input pressure is higher than the set pressure)

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can now spray paint anything you want again.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • You can no longer increase your view range by messing about with ghostroles

Qustinnus, 4Dplanner updated:

  • Adds map_generator datums, which will handle terrain generation for a specific area
  • Adds a jungle generator datum, which uses rust-g noise to generate 3 layers of perlin noise to make a somewhat coheisve and seamless jungle based on height humidity and heat.

YPOQ updated:

  • Silicons and parrots can speak into their radios again.

oranges, kryson updated:

  • Added a medal box for the Head Of Personnel
  • Added the OrdoM memorial medal for paperwork excellence

qustinnus updated:

  • burgers now composition based
  • you can now grind bread again
  • you can now auto-eat things with edible component
  • food trash element, for dumping trash when u eat food

29 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • Blob spores from gold slime core and hostile life reactions are now marked as being independent, meaning that they can now drag things, but can no longer freely walk through blob tiles.
  • Independent blob spores and blobbernauts can now speak over blob chat like overmind-dependent blob mobs do.
  • Blob spores can no longer damage the environment, for realzies this time. This change does not affect blob zombies.
  • Removed an unused variable from tech nodes (and the unused proc that references it).

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Admins can now spawn the Teambuilding machine for assign teams, like Red or Blue, quickly!
  • Sinks and showers can now have reagents piped into them.
  • Using metal sheets on reagent dispensers will now produce a plumbing-enabled supply tank for station use.
  • Added a new stock part, the water recycler, used in building showers and sinks from scratch.
  • Hydroponics trays are now plumbing enabled. Water and nutrients will be sorted into their appropriate slots when piped in.
  • Sinks and showers now have internal water reservoirs, and start filled with water.
  • Showers and sinks must be constructed from a frame, then finished with a water recycler. remove: Hydroponics hoses have been removed in favor of actual plumbing between machines.

Donkie updated:

  • Fixed regular pump on map icon north/south being misaligned by 1 pixel

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Rust_spread will no longer lag servers into oblivion
  • Changed a few flavour texts to better represent lore.
  • Rustbringer's oath now properly only heals while on rusted tiles.

Helianthus00 updated:

  • Deltastation: made a maint area below the captain's office

Krysonism updated:

  • granting a mob sentience, with the sentience potion also tames it.

Melbert updated:

  • You can now remove items from food storage by clicking on them on grab intent.
  • Componentizes food storage from food/snacks/store.

TiviPlus updated:

  • A bunch of 1 and 0 use the true/false define now and changed up a bunch of returns

VexingRaven updated:

  • Plasmaman Supply Kit description now properly lists the envirosuit gloves it contains

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • A vulnerability in the AI chamber anti-abduction foil lining has been fixed.

actioninja updated:

  • Automatic glide size adjustment for smoother movement

27 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • You can now print stethoscopes from autolathes and medical protolathes.

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed an issue where the Shuttle Console UI could become unusable.
  • Fixed an issue where certain shuttle statuses did not properly show on the Shuttle Console UI.
  • Fixed an issue where Syndicate Shuttle Consoles did not restrict nuclear operatives properly.
  • Fixed an issue where Labor Shuttle Consoles did not restrict crew properly.

Coul, actioninja, monster860 updated:

  • New Status Panel!

Donkie updated:

  • Footprints and bloody shoes major update. Hardsuits and bare feet can now get bloody as well. Improved blood spreading behaviour.
  • Shoes will no longer get bloody while wearing something that covers them.

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Electric bolts no longer explode shit.
  • Electric bolts no longer lag the server as a result.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You will now be able to succumb through the use of a button on your HUD.

Kylerace updated:

  • All holodeck sims now 9x10,
  • All stations can accommodate the enlarged holodecks
  • added skatepark sim
  • added space checkers sim

Melbert updated:

  • Bees, if placed in a container, will pop out at the next person to open it

OnlineGirlfriend updated:

  • wedding crate
  • tuxedo, wedding dress, veil, cummerbund, craftable bouquets

Qustinnus updated:

  • undress the clown and swab his clothing, I wonder what kind of gross cell samples they have.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Quickswapping clothing now properly unequips the swapped-out clothing, removing any traits they granted while worn
  • You can now grab your own bleeding limbs to slow your bloodloss! Target your bleeding limb and click on yourself with grab intent and an open hand. This won't speed the clotting, but you'll lose blood more slowly.
  • You can now juice/grind banana peels to act as makeshift coagulant. hahaha ewwwwww
  • Most wound treatments (besides manipulating dislocated limbs) now respect thick clothing, so you can no longer suture through space suits.
  • Scars are a bit less noticeable, and it takes twice as much scar severity to reach a state of "absolutely fucked up" when examined. They're also a bit more varied in description.
  • Whetstones now make things sharp edged instead of pointy edged, so they'll now deal slashing wounds instead of piercing (which means sharpening a cleaver or knife won't make it suddenly suck at hacking people apart). They also increase wounding power!
  • Romerol zombies can now be wounded properly
  • Using sutures to treat slashes and pierces now correctly consumes the sutures. You can also no longer use unopened regen mesh for treating wounds.
  • You can no longer repeatedly disembowel people who have already lost their guts.
  • Execution and gunpoint shots now increase the wounding power of the shot as well as the damage, and apply their bonuses to each pellet fired rather than just one
  • Piercing wounds make further wounds slightly easier to deal
  • Hellguns now cost 2250 credits instead of 2000
  • You can no longer punch yourself while holding someone up to trigger the charged shot
  • You can no longer purposely fail executions or gunpoints to spike the damage in a loaded round for later

TheVekter updated:

  • Admins will now hear a sound and get a screen flash when someone tries to rename the station.
  • Fixed an exploit involving distance checks and the Voting Box.

VexingRaven updated:

  • fixed grammar of "its" in several item descriptions.
  • fixed grammar of plasmaman suits' descriptions.
  • A few tweaks have been made to DeltaStation's surgery atmos piping
  • Added a missing air alarm in DeltaStation's Surgery Room B
  • Added an air alarm in DeltaStation's surgery observation area

nightred updated:

  • New rats can spawn for the king when some die.

stylemistake updated:

  • tgchat: External links starting with "www" now open properly and don't break the panel.
  • Unthickened hrefs.log (no more ping hrefs)
  • Thickened tgui.log (logs actions, interacted object and mob location)

26 August 2020

Arkatos updated:

  • Shuttle Console now uses tgui.

Donkie updated:

  • Fixed cyborg advanced mop being available for all cyborgs modules

Jay Smith & Michael Trauf updated:

  • The Portable Chemical Mixer no longer requires an anomaly core.

Qustinnus updated:

  • adds a helper to see if something is edible

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Reagent exposure methods are now bitflags. There have been some additional changes to reflect and take advantage of this.

floyd updated:

  • action speed modifiers

tralezab updated:

  • goodbye bedsheet icon state you will not be missed

uomo91 updated:

  • Lawyers with jumpskirt preference will now actually spawn with a lawyer jumpskirt.

25 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The Summon Equipment spell, which formerly asked you to choose between its two possible effects whenever you casted it, has been split into the Summon Combat Equipment and Summon Ritual Dagger spells.
  • Summon Combat Equipment can now only be used on cultists, as its description implies.

ATHATH and Rohesie updated:

  • Slavers (and particularly strict employers) have begun using anti-teleportation implants to keep their slaves (and wagies, respectively) from using teleporters to escape their grasp.
  • The staff (and sec force) of the currently-disabled (on /tg/) space hotel ruin now spawn with anti-teleportation implants.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Your sector has upgraded the BSA with a new specialty lens, Remote Economic Punishment Bombardment.

Thebleh updated:

  • RCDs can build doors over firelocks again

uomo91 updated:

  • To change the ammo type the detective's revolver can fire you must now use a wrench instead of a screwdriver, removing the need to take out or destroy its firing pin, and you must be holding it to do so.
  • When the detective's revolver misfires from using 357 ammo, the chambered round will actually be spent now.

24 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The robotic limbs of androids now have the damage reduction values that normal augmented limbs do.
  • The amount of favor received per point of cell charge for a cell sacrificed to the Technophile chaplain sect has been multiplied by 10 (1 point of favor per 3,000 points of cell charge -> 1 point of favor per 300 points of cell charge).
  • The amount of favor required to perform the Rite of Synthetic Conversion has been multiplied by 2 (500 points of favor ->1,000 points of favor).
  • The amount of time required to perform the Rite of Synthetic Conversion has been reduced from 1 minute to 30 seconds.

Bald People updated:

  • Bull terriers are now added into the game. Buy one at your local cargo department today.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes nukie base fake glass smoothing
  • shuttle navigation consoles can no longer dock at tiles that the shuttle is on
  • border firelocks will now be opaque after closing, regular now wont be opaque on spawn

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Various blob reagents have received changes. Distributed Neurons and Networked Fibers have been nerfed, while the rest have been buffed or stayed the same.
  • Blob spores can no longer damage the environment. This change does not affect blob zombies.
  • Reflective blobs are now capable of taking more damage.
  • Reroll Strain now offers a blob 5 choices, up from 3.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Power no longer get fuckey when a ship moves with connected machines

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • disposable sentry gun deployment system, a toolbox that transforms into a turret when attacked with a wrench

Qustinnus updated:

  • When using tools you no longer smash the fuck out of whatever you're fixing.

Rohesie updated:

  • Refactored health status procs to improve quality and allow easier reaction to change events.
  • You can use the normal say verb while on crit, and it will be automatically converted into a whisper in soft crit, or just not work while unconscious, without risk of accidentally succumbing.
  • You can only whisper-succumb by explicitly whispering while in hard crit. Use the succumb verb otherwise.
  • Martyrdom mutation works only when on hard critical, the owner will no longer die by taking a nap.
  • Pets and some pushover bots (don't try it on beespky) can now be shoved away. No need to beat them up any longer.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Gripper glove tackles now disable throw mode when you hit something (whether it's a person, a window, or whatever)
  • You can no longer suffer head wounds from bad rolls on tackling other people, but you can if you hit an object/wall
  • Tackling solid objects/walls is now slightly less prone to maim you

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed the broken circuit board in delta's electronic marketing den.

TemporalOroboros updated:

  • Added defines for the damage flags. Please use them!

TiviPlus updated:

  • Removed a var for bloodcrawling

dragomagol updated:

  • Removed the get red/blue secret documents traitor objective

nightred updated:

  • Icebox medical security check point has power

tralezab updated:

  • some really dangerous "you're fucked" events don't trigger on ghost roles...
  • and some events have been forbidden from centcom. stop messing with my events on the OOC zlevel!

23 August 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Megafauna no longer can be teleported by chilling or regenerative bluespace extracts.

Arkatos updated:

  • Augment Manipulator now uses a radial menu. Get augmenting!

Fikou updated:

  • fixes shuttle catastrophe working when shuttle docked or is flying to centcom

GuyonBroadway updated:

  • Traitors can now purchase Large EMP bombs from the uplink.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can now sign your name on paper again. Remember: %s.
  • Being polled as a ghost for things like imaginary friends will now show the player's real name, rather than their displayed name.

tralezab updated:

  • when admins change the emergency shuttle timer, it gives a way more accurate estimate.

uomo91 updated:

  • Waving a picket sign now animates the user and displays a runechat emote.
  • You can wave picket signs less often, making them less spamable.
  • Bookshelves do not show shelves inside anymore when you crowbar them out.
  • Toolbelts can now hold pipe painters.
  • Borg renaming is now logged in game.txt

22 August 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Invasive spreading on plant trays now correctly updates the tray's name with the new plant's species.
  • Plants mutated via wild mutation now spawn at the correct size based on the mutated seed's potency.
  • Plants getting random reagents due to high instability now properly upgrade instead of stack.

EOBGames updated:

  • Gamers, rejoice, as Nanotrasen has finally recalled faulty stocks of arcade carpet, replacing them with new authentic carpet. Just add pizza stains and spilled soda for the authentic arcade experience!

Fikou updated:

  • fixes foreigner quirk giving galactic uncommon to felinids

Guestratem updated:

  • Fixed the missing sprite for the PKA

Guillaume Prata and M. Joyce updated:

  • Added Command outfits for Plasmamen
  • Added Centcom outfits for Plasmamen
  • Moved some items away from the right hand in outfits to make it more Plasmamen Friendly for future projects.
  • Icons for Centcom and Command Plasmamen gear.

Iamgoofball updated:

  • The ORM no longer receives benefits from upgrades.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • There is now an animation for shaking someone.

Rohesie updated:

  • Smooth movable lighting system implemented. Projectiles, sparks, thrown flashlights or moving mobs with lights should be much smoother and less laggy.
  • Light sources no longer stack in range, though they still do in intensity.

TheVekter updated:

  • The obsessed trauma now includes a policy config option like other antagonists.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Runechat messages now overlap (roughly) based on the time at which they were said, this means newer messages will be on top of older ones.

nightred updated:

  • Delta removed an extra intercom in toxins
  • Slime People can swap between their bodies more freely.

21 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • You can now activate an away mission's exit gateway regardless of whether or not the station-side gateway is still open.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Resist now correctly makes you stop, drop, and roll.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Gas overlays are more smooth now, but will display things a little more subtly.
  • Gas overlays have the proper amount of detail now

Qustinnus updated:

  • refactors bread

Radacitus updated:

  • Added a chemical recipe for Stabilizing Plasma

Timberpoes updated:

  • Removed the Blood Contract from the game.

20 August 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Medical bounties will no longer accept tier 1 cybernetic organs, but will still take tiers 2 and 3.
  • Newscasters no longer chirp in your ear every 5 minutes for a news update, but will still provide regular updates if you check the Station Announcements channel.
  • Station inflation has been rebalanced, with roundstart balance staying in the ballpark of 200% until the first paycheck, and now using averages to determine how high inflation should be.
  • Market crash and CRAB17 both lock down market prices of vending machines until their event ends.
  • The Civilian Budget now gets more pay as more civilian bounties are completed over the course of the shift.

Dennok updated:

  • Lift platform that works like moving catwalk
  • Lift now on MultiZ debug station

Fikou updated:
