  • adds bonesetter to omnitool settings
  • fixes to shuttle smoothing

Guestratem updated:

  • Added a word to fix messaging with the slot machine.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Fixed Swarmer Barriers not working

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Voice analyzers will no longer accept any message when nothing is recorded.
  • Disarming a monkey is now the same as disarming a human.
  • Monkeys can now be shoved into humans and vice versa.

msgerbs updated:

  • Fixes broken span classes in mutation loss messages and other locations.

nightred updated:

  • Meta bar access
  • Meta kitchen has an air alarm again

tralezab updated:

  • Highlanders now keep their race if it won't be a problem

19 August 2020

ATH1909 updated:

  • Fixed an exploit that made it possible to use more shuttle curse orbs in a single round than you were supposed to as a blood cultist.
  • Increased the number of shuttle curse orbs that can be used in a single round from 2 to 3.
  • Added better feedback for shuttle curse orbs.

ATHATH updated:

  • The expanded medkits that medical doctors start the round with now come with epinephrine medipens (the kind normally found in white medkits/roundstart internals boxes), not emergency first aid kit medipens (the kind normally found in emergency first aid kits from oxygen lockers).

ATHATH (and ShizCalev) updated:

  • The in-hand crafting menu for runic metal now mentions which cult structure makes which cult items.
  • The descriptions of cult structures now remind you which cult items they can create, but only if you're a cultist or an observer.

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Hydrating monkey powder no longer circumvents bluespace harmonic limitations.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The Heck Brewing Factory now has wires outside of it's walls.
  • Runtime station now comes equip with plumbing, modular computer, and newscaster equipment.
  • Plants now show their maximum reagent capacity on plant analyzer examine with reagent mode on.

Bampotio updated:

  • adds floral somatory to botany belt storage

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • Nanotrasen has "accidentally" had a virus implanted in their nanite servers which somehow caused some nanite programs to be less effective.
  • Numerous bluespace artilery units have been recalled following incidents of their components being made out of air. This manufacturing defect has been fixed.

Donkie updated:

  • Cleaning system is now more intuitive. Scrubbing action = forensic wiping, only spraying = forensics kept.
  • Cleaning machines (janicart, etc) and the cleanbot will now get rid of forensic evidence

Fikou updated:

  • shuttles should now smooth properly with heaters and engines

Guillaume H. Prata updated:

  • Hypernoblium now turns into a reagent when inhaled, which stops the combustion if on a Plasmaman system.
  • Plasmaman interaction with Hypernoblium in the air, stop combustion and extinguishes if they are already on fire.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Messages sent by yourself no longer highlight.
  • Calling a proc while another admin is calling one will no longer wait for the first to finish. You will simply just have to call it again.
  • Hitting animations now correctly have more randomness when hitting above or below.

Krysonism updated:

  • Botany can create a new type of medical stack: mourning poultices. This item converts brute and burn into oxy and can even be used on corpses.

Melbert updated:

  • organs no longer have interactions for being found in food they shouldn't be in
  • Blinded people can no longer use camera consoles
  • Blinded people can no longer activate all types of advanced camera consoles, including navigation consoles (They were already not intended to be able to use them)
  • adds a machine interaction flag for machines that require the user not be blind to use

Rohesie updated:

  • Mechs no longer block sight. It's a non-trivial cost for the lighting system with little to no gain.

Skoglol updated:

  • Adds nekomimetic.

TheSmallBlue updated:

  • changed cult communion text

Timberpoes updated:

  • The Hierophant Club has received a number of changes. It is no longer able to attack at range or mine and instead has been given a 5-tile range instant teleport on a 15 second cooldown. It still retains the teleport beacon functionality.
  • With so much bloat removed, the Hierophant Club has shrunk down to the size of an ordinary item and can now fit nicely in most backpacks.
  • Runtime in wounds system fixed for projectiles that can't wound. As a result, non-woundy weapons will now complete code execution and apply appropriate damage. In particular, this fixes the DRAGnet not dealing stamina damage on net mode, may fix other weapons too.

TiviPlus updated:

  • isdiagonaldir macro

Wallem updated:

  • Recent surveys show 1% of nanotrasen employees have been misinformed on the concept of baseball.

WarlockD updated:

  • Replacing damaged eyes actually fixes your eyes.
  • You cannot fix your eyes by just putting on glasses
  • Added day counter to the round time

Ziiro updated:

  • xenos can now climb ladders properly

actioninja updated:

  • better impaired vision overlays

floyd updated:

  • resisting is now on atom level so it can be used on mobs too

kriskog updated:

  • Check antagonists now has a button to force war for nuclear operatives.

nightred updated:

  • Prevent duplicate vent and scrubber names in the air alarm interface.
  • Slapping the floor with glass will shatter the glass.
  • Removed beaker teleportation
  • Lattice now smooths with plating
  • Meta service area request consoles have been fixed up.

stylemistake updated:

  • tgui: Pressing Ctrl+F will no longer make you flip (or trigger any other custom keybind on F).

tralezab updated:

  • Flyperson biology has been more defined... to be less defined. Good luck, CMO!
  • Goodbye corporate species. I can't even pretend like you were good at all.
  • Clown's Tears now takes bananium sheets instead of ore to craft.
  • station stuck component now has a murder mode, that doesn't gib.
  • skeleton ghost role on away missions can no longer go stationwide. They'll collapse the moment they enter the portal.
  • moved all those fuckin' ghost role spawners out of corpse.dm and into ghost_role_spawners.dm
  • cleaned up stationstuck component a ton.
  • New Event: Shuttle Catastrophe
  • species no longer have organs they do not use!
  • fixed a few typos with plasmamen envirosuits
  • fixed all the typos where people say "availible" instead of "available"

uomo91 updated:

  • Nanotrasen software division has fixed an issue with station holodecks creating invisible tables and floor decals.
  • Tool belts can now hold airlock and decal painters inside them.
  • Holsters should now hold appropriate weapons and their ammo types.

zxaber updated:

  • If anyone noticed that you were sometimes unable to examine a modular computer with no primary ID slot, that's been fixed now.

18 August 2020

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The ash drake fight is winnable again, and the game will no longer die when he goes into the lava arena attack.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • missing areas and directional windows on pubby's chapel

nightred updated:

  • fixed ore silo deconstruction steps

17 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The text of the "recall your teachings" button of the sleeping carp martial arts style has been updated to account for the nerfs that sleeping carp has received since it was written.

Bald People updated:

  • Various away missions now have minor fixes.
  • The horrific experiment structure has it's icon_state restored
  • SnowCabin has been changed a bit. No more empty void of despair!

Helianthus00 updated:

  • New piping in layers 1/3 to Lavaland
  • New piping in layers 1/3 to Icebox
  • New piping in layers 1/3 to Delta
  • New piping in layers 1/3 to Meta
  • New piping in layers 1/3 to Pubby

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Skull Echo now correctly encodes its speech.

Rohesie updated:

  • Basic armor and detective vest and on-mob security helmet sprites updated using BeeStation's assets.

Winterous updated:

  • Station AI cores are now stored in a tin foil-lined room, in response to reports of mysterious teleporting AI thieves.

nightred updated:

  • Removed hidden racks, less torture on station.

silicons updated:

  • freon should not have you stuck immobilized anymore

stylemistake updated:

  • tgchat: Unread message count is now smarter and won't increase on other tabs if you have already read the same message in the active tab.
  • tgchat: Admin PMs are now properly annotated and can be filtered into separate tabs.
  • tgchat: Fix: Highlighted message overlay no longer blocks clicks. Clicking a highlighted `(F)` link should work as it should.
  • tgui: Fixed NTOS bluescreen due to calling `.includes()` on a stylesheet href which could be null on certain browsers.
  • tgchat: Chat schema bumped to version 5. All chat-related settings were reset to avoid breakage.
  • tgchat: Fixed adminsay to no longer show up as [object Object].

16 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • A secret cabal of mice have definitely not been controlling people wearing special admin-only chef's hats. Move along, citizen.

Arkatos updated:

  • Bible now uses a radial menu for choosing its skins
  • Small UI changes and cleanup of the Bank Machine and TTV UIs.
  • UI window resizes for the Point Claim Console, Bank Machine, Gravity Generator, Portable Turret, Turret Control Panel and TTV UIs.
  • Fixed an issue where ignore heads of staff setting for the Portable Turret was actually inverted in functionality.
  • Fixed two typos in the Probing Console UI.

Fikou updated:

  • Caedite eos. Novit enim Dominus qui sunt eius.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Organs will now show where to put them when you examine them.

silicons updated:

  • Baystation instruments are here!
  • Existing instruments have been rolled into the new unified instruments system.
  • A sound subsystem has been added, SSsounds. Use it for persistent channel management.

15 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • You can no longer store 5 million live mice inside of a chef's hat.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Virology civilian bounties can now be completed again.

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • Nanotrasen has removed their outdated teslas, singularities, TEGs and Mrs. Pacman generators from their servers and warehouse.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Swarmers are not able to teleport their subdued targets again
  • Removed references to Consturction in the Swarmer Beacon

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • ACTUALLY fixed circuitboards disappearing when disassembling machines.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed Arnold pizza not checking for TRAIT_NODISMEMBER, resulting in a message being sent to the user even if they were fine after eating it.

nightred updated:

  • Fixed some shuttle wall smoothing

14 August 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Fixes a runtime associated with the new ARD.

Arkatos updated:

  • pAIs now use a radial menu to choose their holochassis skins.

CRITAWAKETS updated:

  • Nanotrasen has fixed the missing connectors on their lattices and have removed the ultraviolet paint from their operating tables.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes goliath tentacle crusher trophy not working

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Request console announcements no longer double encode. This means, for example, you can use apostrophes.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Tesla coils max efficiency rate has been dropped from 400% to 85% to help prevent the below
  • The tesla coil can no longer make infinite energy

Maurukas updated:

  • Revival surgery now puts ghosts back in bodies

SteelSlayer updated:

  • Photocopiers now use TGUI
  • You can insert any type of toner cartridge into photocopiers, and regardless of the currently inserted toner's charge level.
  • Toner cartridges can be ejected from photocopiers at any time

kingofkosmos updated:

  • added personal versions for combat messages (e.g: "You whip John Smith!" instead of "Devin Spock whips John Smith!")

13 August 2020

Angust updated:

  • Aggressive spreading space vines no longer deal friendly fire.
  • Aggressive vines now only harm when buckling you or actually spreading to your tile.
  • Aggressive vines can no longer deafen/explode you, but will deal heavy damage and wounds instead.
  • Most injuries from aggressive spreading vines are now mitigated by melee armor.
  • Aggressive vines will no longer hurt dead people.
  • Aggressive vines now cause sound effects and messages when they hit someone.
  • Getting hit by aggressive vines will now register in the round's attack log.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Added the Account Registration Machine to the computerized record-keeping node, from the security lathe.

Fhaxaris updated:

  • Flipping your gun no longer overrides every other action. They now happen simultaneously.

Time-Green updated:

  • Adds a Chemical Beacon and a Chemical Recipient. They can be used to teleport chemicals over a long distance, altough the Chemical Recipient must be researched and printed in the medical protolathe. Simply use a multitool on the Recipient and then on any subsequent Chemical Beacons.
  • Reworked plumbing RCD code a bit to support every object, not just subtypes of the abstract plumbing machinery class

spessbro updated:

  • Office supplies bounties
  • slime core exports
  • humanlike meat exports
  • cloth, sheetzza, meat and durathread exports
  • very profitable contraband tail exports
  • high value export for [REDACTED]

zxaber updated:

  • The Fission360 app can now detect nukes and nuke disks on other Z levels (though it won't start tracking until you're on the same level).

12 August 2020

Fikou updated:

  • fixes ice box pods landing 3 tiles away
  • fixes wrong path on ninja pinpointer objective

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Removed reinforcement chromosomes, AKA mutadone resistance.
  • You can now craft cable restraints directly from the radial menu.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • If you attach something to a grenade's boom wire it won't instantly trigger on pulse, instead using the same timer used for inhand activations.
  • The voice analyzer now says something when it triggers, and plays a short whirrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr sound. The time between parse and trigger has been increased to 2 seconds as well. Oh and they can't be used when whispering.
  • If you are "in" something, and talk, runechat will be displayed as if the thing you are in talked.

MrStonedOne updated:

  • Interface assets (js/css/images) can now be managed using an external webserver instead of byond's one at a time file transfer queue.
  • Adds admin verb `toggle-cdn` that allows admins to disable the external webserver asset transport and revert to the old system. Useful if the webserver backing this goes down (thanks cloudflare).
  • New config file, resources.txt, (must be loaded by an $include statement from the main config)
  • The `external_rsc_urls.txt` config has been moved to the main config system.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • pistols missing sprites when loaded no longer do that
  • spiderlings not getting flattened by a fly swatter in one hit
  • replaced jetpacks in eva on icebox with those random things that were on the floor for some reason
  • some strange area mistakes on meta xenobio

WarlockD updated:

  • Paper working with stamps again
  • Paper works with doors now, become the next Martin Luther!
  • Dead people cannot write on it if they have the page up
  • Page goes away when you walk around

nemvar updated:

  • Added a new option for clients fps: "Recommended". Setting fps in the options to -1 now sets it to the recommended value. Byond version higher or equal to 513.1523 should be used.
  • Due to interal byond workings the recommended value for fps is currently 40. Another good value is 100. 60 is not advised.

nightred updated:

  • Icebox turbine is wired up to safety code.

tralezab updated:

  • made the admin keycard doors more plain and straightforward in what they do.

11 August 2020

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • Medicated sutures no longer yield more polypyr than it takes to make them when ground
  • Aloe cream now automatically repeats when healing
  • Aloe cream is no longer referred to as "medical stack" in the description

Fikou updated:

  • you can now make extendohands with a right and left arm
  • byos now mentions that you can buy shuttle engine crates after buying it in its description
  • magboots now update speed

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Advanced medibots now have a distinct sprite.
  • The moodlet for giving CPR will now also give to users of defibrillators.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Trading cards will now ZOOM AND ENHANCE in your bag properly.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • you can no longer place force fields on the same tile as yourself to become god for 30 seconds

Timberpoes updated:

  • The security camera console will now correctly track when viewing moving cyborg cameras.
  • Some things on the station may allow for more advanced interaction when used alongside telekinesis when they previously did not.
  • Intercoms can now be remotely viewed via telekinesis.
  • Those with an unnatural attachment to life will no longer succumb to critical wounds when whispering.
  • Orbital Mech Pad Consoles can now be successfully linked to multiple pads. In particular, this means you can now properly teleport between all pads in Ice Box's multiple mining outposts as well as add new locations to teleport to.
  • Pinpointers are no longer indestructible be default. The Nuke Pinpointers are still indestructible.

actioninja updated:

  • big slapps

uomo91 updated:

  • Nanotrasen has fixed a supply chain problem with green stockings.

zxaber updated:

  • Added support for modular PC expansion bays, or hardware bays designed to be used by nonessential hardware. Devices have a limited number of bays (tablets less than others).
  • The AI card slot, printer, and APC-siphoning recharger are now expansion bay hardware.
  • AtmoZphere, the modular PC atmos scanner, now requires a new expansion bay hardware item - the sensor package. Certain shift-start tablets have been adjusted to reflect this.
  • Modular PC card readers have been split -- The primary ID card reader, which comes pre-installed on nearly all devices, and a secondary ID card reader which is an expansion bay hardware and will need to be purchased separately. Certain shift-start devices have a secondary reader pre-installed.
  • Buying a tablet from the Laptop/Tablet vendor, and paying extra for the nano printer, will now attach the correct printer rather than attempt to stuff a laptop printer into a tablet and silently fail but still take your cash.

10 August 2020

ArcaneDefence updated:

  • Pacifists can no longer harm people with baseball bats, powerfists, hierophant clubs, flamethrowers, pneumatic cannons, or syringe guns mounted on mechs.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Bounties now properly give less profit when completed, but decrease the number of items needed with high inflation.
  • The station target rate has been lowered at a base, to improve the impact of inflation.
  • Civilian bounty beacons take less time to deploy.

Arkatos updated:

  • Service cyborgs are now able to properly set a pipe cleaner cable color for their art needs.
  • Service cyborgs can now cancel color choosing input for pipe cleaner cables in case they have changed their minds about it.
  • Object reskins now use a radial menu.

Fikou updated:

  • You can no longer use singularity hammers to move cult floors or use crates to pick them up

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • CPR will now automatically repeat, but you can no longer do it multiple times at once.
  • You will now hear the sound and receive a distinct message when the supermatter explodes while you are safe.
  • Offers will now be retained if the potential taker moves.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • Large fuel tank, able to be ordered from cargo if you're into that sorta thing
  • Replaced some fuel tanks in engineering with their larger variants
  • subtype of plasma floors that can't be crowbarred
  • replaced all the floors on disco inferno with these new crowbar proof floors

Rohesie and Kathy Ryals updated:

  • The Honkworks 5.0 cartridge's software has been updated to be able to hack machines, computers and airlocks to make them honk for a while.
  • Added a new sound_player component to be able to play any sound with any signals.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The Longtimer quirk has been removed
  • Temporal Scarring has been reworked. Rather than drawing from one of five random slots each round, you now have 3 slots that you will go through sequentially, so if you survive a round with a bunch of scars, they'll be with you 3 rounds from now.
  • The commendation config option no longer breaks the roundend sequence when enabled
  • You can now mend damaged clothing with cloth. I swear, this time you really can.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed nations and banners not using the global job lists for their job checks.
  • Fixed a scenario which could cause floorbots to end up with negative tiles in their inventory.
  • Fixed floorbots not stopping the process of replacing tiles after turning off replace tiles while they're in the middle of replacing tiles.
  • Fixed a couple things not sending out signals when their icons were updated.
  • Machines will now properly drop their circuit boards again.

Timberpoes updated:

  • As part of a recent employee ethical treatment audit, a mob of angry lizardperson housewives successfully ambushed and dismembered the auditor, wearing his bones as new adornments. As the thirteenth auditor lost this quarter in a similar manner, NanoTrasen executives voted unanimously to not mutilate lizardpeople employees and will once again tolerate them expressing their individuality by no longer replacing their tails with generic variants and pulling out all their spines.
  • Observers can now look at the Skill Station interface without a tgui error.

TiviPlus updated:

  • refactored a bunch of /area stuff

WarlockD updated:

  • Blackmarket uplink is now buildable again
  • Other crafting items should also work now

YPOQ updated:

  • Fixed an issue that caused diseased mobs to not be deleted properly.
  • Fixed being unable to use the implosion compressor after failing an implosion.

ike709 and bobbahbrown updated:

  • Admins can now see your bans on (some) other servers.

tralezab updated:

  • Mafia Lobby System reworked
  • Mafia panel redesigned
  • Mafia Trials have a bit more depth
  • Mafia misc. tweaks
  • Mafia misc. fixes
  • removes mecha pilots and elites from the summoning pool
  • You can no longer beetlejuice yourself!

uomo91 updated:

  • Nanotrasen's pet budget has increased, and missing pets have been dispatched to various departments.
  • Nanotrasen's signage department has funded the design and placement of signs for the Lawyer's office and courtroom.

08 August 2020

Fikou, MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Mecha Orbital Pad! Available in your local Mechbay

Timberpoes updated:

  • Camera consoles can now see through Cyborg cameras.
  • The AI's camera network now includes the integrated cameras on their cyborgs.
  • The Advanced Camera Console camera network now includes the integrated cameras on cyborgs.

uomo91 updated:

  • Petting more animals than just cats and dogs now makes you happy.

07 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • A special interaction for trying to put a mushroom on an Arnold pizza has been added.
  • Arnold pizza references its source material more accurately/often now.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Belt, back, and suit sprites have been added for many clownish and magical items.

Arkatos updated:

  • Shapeshift spell now uses a radial menu for choosing transformations.

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • All medical staff can now enjoy doctor's delight without getting hungry

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Survival medipens work properly on station now.

Fikou updated:

  • lightbulb removing skillchip
  • the demonic hierarchy now shares the same factions
  • slaughter demons and imps spawned by admins or other sources that arent player controlled will attack people
  • slaughter demons and imps were repathed
  • makes pierced reality not upper case and changes the text when touching one

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Syringe guns will now show if they are loaded or not.
  • Syringe guns now play a sound when giving them a syringe.

Melbert updated:

  • NanoTrasen has added braille support to literally everything. If a blind person has an empty hand, they can now shift-click examine (or right click -> examine) nearby things via touch after a short timer.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Observers can examine immovable rods to see how many mobs/sentient mobs/sentient carbons it has penetrated
  • Immovable rods can now cause piercing wounds to the chest

ShizCalev updated:

  • You can no longer sharpen dual energy swords.
  • Skill chips can no longer be removed with edaggers and eswords while they're turned off.
  • Guns can now be sawn-off with dual eswords.
  • Sawing-down a gun will now require an item actually be a saw / esword / plasmacutters, instead of just any sharp item that doesn't have a tool type.
  • Fixed pAI doorjacking cable not spawning.
  • pAI cards will now actually flash when new personalities are available!
  • Fixed latejoin AIs not having a circuit board in their core structure.
  • Tweaked the opacity of the glass HUD to make it a little easier to see the icons / text.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fix skillchip runtime. Fixing this means skillchips as part of jobs will now appropriately activate when the player spawns in with a job.

Time-Green updated:

  • Rumors are a recipey for metalgen has been discovered! Although it's very secret and very random (you can find a paper in some ruins with the recipey, it resets every three days).

TiviPlus updated:

  • Cleaned up some refs
  • Lazylisted some mob lists

Whoneedspacee updated:

  • The RCD's functionality for directional windows has been enabled.
  • Cyborgs can now install RCD upgrades.
  • The RCD's functionality for windowed doors has been enabled.

silicons updated:

  • Supermatter anomalies no longer drop usable cores.

tralezab updated:

  • New admin button: Ghost Pool Protection! It lets you enable and disable which sources ghosts can rejoin the round, minus their physical bodies getting revived.

zxaber updated:

  • Most NtOS programs have been renamed.

06 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • You can now use the mind transfer spell to swap bodies with an animated statue again.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Confusion will no longer continue to confuse after being cured.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Roboticists and engineers rejoice. NanoTrasen has decided to cut back on training costs through leveraging emerging technologies. All roboticists and engineers start with tiny little microchips implanted deep in their brains that unlock forbidden knowledge about wire assignments.
  • Roboticists with their job skillchip can now identify cyborg wires while engineers with their job skillchip can now identify airlock and APC wires. Highly select blueprint-based knowledge implanted directly into your brain.
  • The Research Director and Chief Engineer now have a box containing a couple of spare copies of their respective department's skill chips tucked nearly away in their secure lockers. Feel free to implant yourselves - As the most competent and highly respected members of your respective departments, we're sure you're earned it...
  • Traitors not left out of the loop either, they can now purchase a highly advanced Syndicate skillchip for 4TC that contains data a number of key skillchips. This so-called "chameleon" chip will enable you to inflitrate other departments or take full advantage of the powers the skillchips have to offer; just remember to extract your own job skillchips first at any library before going undercover if you want your own chameleon chip to work.
  • Changelings rejoice, for you now absorb the skill chips of your targets when you transform. Beware, though - You'll lose all your existing ones in the process. A truly double-edged armblade.
  • Delta and Pubby now have Skill Stations in their respective libraries, next to the games vending machines.
  • Skill Station has recieved a fresh coat of interface paint.

Time-Green updated:

  • fixes plumbing becoming invisible (hasnt ever happened on live)

05 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • Snowballs deal a moderate amount of stamina damage instead of a mediocre amount of brute damage now. In other words, having a snowball fight with your friends won't hospitalize them anymore.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • You can no longer create infinite vend-a-trays.
  • Food trays now drop their contents when fed into an autolathe.

Fhaxaris updated:

  • New transparent GUI in Game Preferences -> UI Style: Glass.

Fikou updated:

  • black market uplink crafting no longer consumes your headset
  • the cat crate cat no longer has a 50% chance of not existing
  • removes parent_type on map preloaders

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Riders will now correctly turn with their vehicles.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • You will keep your angle when you drift through space now. Oh and immovable rods do the same, so things might get a bit more messy then usual.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed mobs wearing insulated gloves being unable to open electrified doors by walking into them (they had to click it to open.)
  • Fixed aliens being unable to open electrified doors that were unpowered / on cooldown.
  • Fixed simple animals doing damage to electrified doors even if they were shocked by them.
  • Fixed being unable to open electrified doors with the jaws of life when the door was unable to shock the user.

Timberpoes updated:

  • When hacking wires, all interfaces will now show a notice box at the top telling you which wire configuration you're attempting to hack.

nightred updated:

  • Ear damage does not spam you now

04 August 2020

Krysonism updated:

  • Syringe & dart projectiles now handle reagent transfer effects as intended.
  • Also fixes reagent transfers from various other sources such as sleepy pens, cryo tubes and drink bottles.
  • As a result of the fix; Standard sized syriniver filled syringe projectiles no longer overdose the victim in one hit, unless they already have poor liver health.

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • water vapor canister to delta's janitor closet
  • a single very fancy yellow square decal under said water vapor canister

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed a runtime caused by trying to wash carbons who weren't holding anything.

carshalash updated:

  • Rubberneck now includes shock immunity due to containing grey bull.

03 August 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The ammo boxes in the comms agent base now use the same ammo type as the magazines that are literally in the same crate as them. In other words, they're compatible with stetchkins now.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Getting your paycheck will no longer cause vending machines and other machines to mass-open the UI.
  • Bounty Pads no longer spontaneously combust when sending bonfires.
  • The armored bounty hunter now spawns with a backpack like the rest of them.
  • Hook Bounter Hunters now correctly spawn their outfit.
  • Plasma Tank Suit sprites.

Krysonism updated:

  • A new heretic node to replace rust wave: entropic plume.
  • A small rune visual effects appears 70% of the time when a tile is rusted.
  • Removed the rust wave node.
  • The ash man and rust walker nodes now link to the correct nodes.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Lots of mob emotes will actually work now. Observe your local Runtime today

LemonInTheDark, Stylemistake updated:

  • Added an atmos subsystem control panel to the debug menu, don't press buttons if you don't want to freeze atmos/show a bunch of colored tiles. It shows excited groups, not active turfs. Fair warning, displaying shit will cause a mite slowdown, so don't just leave it on in the background all the time.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed the Saber SMG and Tommygun's empty chamber indicators not appearing.
  • Added support to pixel offset suppressors, allowing you to have ones that extend outside of the gun's 32x32 icon.
  • Removed a number of unused overlays being added to ballistic guns.
  • The C20r's empty indicator is no longer covered up by the fire select indicator.
  • Fixed admin deleted suppressors not properly updating a gun's weight.
  • Varediting a ballistic weapon's vars which have icons associated with them will now make the gun update it's icons.
  • Setting your firemode to burst will now say "3-round burst" instead of "3-rnd burst".
  • C20r's description now correctly says 3 round burst instead of 2 round burst.
  • Ballistic weapons with non-open bolts will now correctly spawn with a full magazine.
  • Hooked up delta's perma APC to the power grid. honk.
  • Fixed a runtime caused by singularities pulling turf without plating.
  • Singularities will now strip away mineral plated turf.
  • Fixed singularities creating new tiles for turf that had destroyed plating.
  • Made the notification for the malf AI overload ability a little less vague about what was destroyed.
  • Pets will no longer breed with their children.
  • Pets will no longer breed infinitely despite having a ton of children around.

SomeguyManperson updated:

  • hypersensitive and apathetic apply their modifiers after moodlets are accounted for rather than multiplying total mood per moodlet

02 August 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • When 2 plants are crossbreeding, if they share a reagent, one plant can now accept and upgrade their production % from the other.
  • Cabbage no longer wild-mutates into producing humans as a byproduct

Arkatos updated:

  • Drones now use a radial menu to choose their skins.

Fikou updated:

  • survival pod stasis beds no longer become invisible when you screwdriver them

KathyRyals updated:

  • Fixed a runtime caused by an improperly affected variable in space cleaner code.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Moths can eat your shoes again

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed BEPIS boards being invisible.
  • Fixed a runtime causing NPC AI processing to briefly break if one was deleted in the middle of the subsystem's processing.

Timberpoes updated:

  • CentCom scientists and engineers have upgraded airlock doors throughout NanoTrasen stations. When constructed, airlock doors now automatically configure themselves based on location, adopting unique wire layouts in different station areas. Pray your CE knows how to read his blueprints, pack your marigolds and joyride a cyborg into a new age of departmental security.

Time-Green updated:

  • Laughter demons now release their victims where the demon died

nemvar updated:

  • Mafia achievments now display their correct icons.

nightred updated:

  • Runtime in family heirloom corrected

tralezab updated:

  • heretic no longer loudly announces admin deconversions

01 August 2020

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Pulsing the power wire no longer shocks you repeatedly until you close tgui.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Hot ice is worth what it should be again.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Cleaned up a bucnh fo AI/PAI card code.
  • pAIs that are able to hack things will now have an icon representing such.
  • pAI will now put their hacking cable in your hand when deployed.
  • Fixed AI cards not sending the icon update comsig.
  • pAI holograms can no longer push and pull things.
  • Fixed pill presses somethings spawning a billion bottles on the ground.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • trashbag bounty works

nightred updated:

  • The defibrillator reacts properly to telekinesis

tralezab updated:

  • plasmamen are once again gulag safe

zxaber updated:

  • The NtOS home screen has been updated with disk and ID eject buttons.

30 July 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • You can now store a dead mouse inside of your chef's hat. Y'know, in case the living mouse you keep in there dies.

AnturK updated:

  • Learn new skills at your local library. Usefulness not guaranteed.

Arkatos updated:

  • Gun locker now uses a radial menu.

Asha108 updated:

  • Changes to the Lavaland Syndicate Atmospherics department.
  • tier 3 canisters to atmos and plasteel to storage room crates
  • added filter and connectors, i.e. toxins, in expanded atmos
  • Removed old, useless tier0 canister

Couls updated:

  • Recent reports have seen increased rates of infection from reused glasses. Cleaning them with soap or rags drastically decreases chance of infection.

Dennok updated:

  • Sheetifier and Vend-a-Tray has proper named circuit boards
  • Cable hubs no more can be created by handcraft. Cuble hubs available only in cable radial menu.
  • cyborg endoskeleton now check all parts for completion
  • Move cable radial menu to attack_self.
  • Move recipe crafting to radial menu chose.
  • Return of ability to take part of cable coil via alt click.
  • refactored light overlay to vis_contents in case to make it unclickable and less load
  • now lihgts has light overlay, again. But now it unclickable.
  • Now engines correctly rotate on shuttle rotating.

Donkie updated:

  • Fixed mobs/items/turfs not being predictably washed by the various methods on board
  • Fixed showers not properly reducing clothing radioactivity
  • Refactored the cleaning/washing system

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Raw prophet's seeing range decreased by 1 so that people dont lag so much.
  • Raw prophets telepathy was replaced by mansus link
  • Raw prophets now get a long range blind spell.

Fikou updated:

  • neurotoxin and some other bullets no longer get embedded in you
  • some cool effects are added when you hit with an energy weapon or neurotoxin

Gamer025 updated:

  • Skillchip adapter chip thats increases your slot count 1 but also takes 1 slot

Helianthus00 updated:

  • Deltastation: Added a new and improved permabrig

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can now only use the emergency shuttle console once per 5 seconds.

Melbert updated:

  • user feedback for cyborgs trying to use modules while buckled to things

Paxilmaniac updated:

  • a third spawn point for miners on meta so they don't spawn inside one another

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Heads (the bodypart) are a bit easier to wound once they've hit max (200) damage than they were before. They also have a bit less inherent wound resistance, but protective headgear now has wound armor to compensate
  • Zombies now have the frail trait, making them much easier to wound and dismember
  • Plasmamen are now slightly harder to wound, since they're already simpler to dismember than normal humans and much harder to treat
  • RPG loot quality numbers now increase/decrease wounding power

ShizCalev updated:

  • Cleaned up some unused procs and makes is_blocked_turf a turf proc.
  • Fixed a minor runtime if a seed's mutatelist was empty.

TheVekter updated:

  • Supermatter tongs are no longer rendered invisible once you pick up a supermatter sliver.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Fixed chasms deleting living victims without killing them first.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Documented timer subsystem, minor refactoring to improve code quality

nightred updated:

  • Fixed meteor shield interaction not having the expected outcome.

tralezab updated:

  • Mafia Achievements

uomo91 updated:

  • Pubbystation now has a Commissary, in the southwest primarily hallway.
  • Nanotrasen has decided to make the Commissary accessible to those without maintenance access.

29 July 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The third law of the reporter lawset no longer obligates you to interfere with Mining and Xenobiology.
  • The fourth law of the corporate lawset no longer obligates you to depower/shut down Cargo.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Added the "Check Timer Sources" debug command to help isolate problematic cases of addtimer.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes a cyborg runtime error
  • middle mouse click to cycle modules for cyborgs works properly again

Memedoktor updated:

  • adds positive moodlet for chaplain eating holymelon

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Non-emagged mediborgs will no longer embed people with lollipops. Emagged borgs, on the other hand..... well, they can. Fun!
  • Spears and other embeddables are now somewhat less effective at causing damage and bloodloss

ike709 and bobbahbrown updated:

  • Admins can now see your bans on (some) other servers.

nightred updated:

  • Prevents showing AI law changes after revival
  • Clown ops reinforcements spawn properly

oranges updated:

  • disappointment has been reworked

28 July 2020

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Fixed a bug where you could not start messages with an ellipses.
  • Fixed not being able to sing over comms.

Skoglol updated:

  • Statues can now properly not cast spells.

Time-Green updated:

  • Instabitulari is called synthflesh again

27 July 2020

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Stepping on an unopened bag of chips will pop it and ruin all the chips inside
  • Added 2 unit tests for wounds

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed a minor runtime caused by ghosts pressing the lookup / lookdown keybind.
  • Supermatter slivers thrown by bombs / mass drivers will now consume a mob if they're hit by it.
  • Fixed an exploit allowing jaunting mobs to consume supermatter slivers on the ground.
  • Fixed simple animals (ie gorillas) not being consumed by supermatter slivers after picking them up.
  • Fixed an exploit allowing you to kill jaunting mobs with supermatter slivers held by tongs.
  • Objects and mobs that have move resist set to INFINITY will no longer be moved by a singularity.
  • Varediting a solar array assembly's anchored var will now correctly update its pixel offsets.
  • Smartfridges will now drop boards set to the type of fridge they were when deconstructed.
  • Fixed survival pods, black boxes, and drying racks potentially dropping basic smartfridge boards.
  • Newly constructed survival pods will no longer say that they're old and dusty.
  • Fixed "your MMI was unable to receive your mind" being sent to emagged borgs when self_destructed via a robotics console.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • The "See runechat emotes" preference now works as intended.

nightred updated:

  • Sheetifier now deconstructs properly
  • Fixed guardian runtime on ghost disconnect

26 July 2020

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The "Disk, Please!" achievement will now be granted to any nuclear operative who holds up any conscious non-nukie holding the disk, rather than needing the Captain. Good luck!

Skoglol updated:

  • Express supply console has had emagged pod amount reduced slightly and now has a cooldown.
  • *crack has a new sound effect.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Cybernetic Stomachs are now correctly categorised under Cybernetics in the Exosuit Fabricator.

WondaMegapon updated:

  • Telecommunication machines now use a TGUI based interface
  • Removed HTML based telecommunication machine code
  • Telecommunication machines can have their interfaces viewed without a multitool
  • Telecommunication machines now log changed settings

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Runechat now runs under its own subsystem, this should improve performance and allow for finer control over its performance.

lordpidey updated:

  • Arcade toy companies have found a surplus of promotional balloons from an old boyband and put them in the prize rotation. Warning: balloons may only be partially inflated, and may incite security forces to arrest you.

25 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Adds a metric ton of belt icons.
  • Paper cash, when stacked, now displays an icon scaling with it's appropriate value.

Donkie updated:

  • Fixed being able to cheese the voice analyzer by using multiple consecutive whitespaces

Indie-ana Jones updated:

  • Swarmers have changed tactics. They now utilize a swarmer beacon for spawning, and have received a number of other changes.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Fixed several edge cases where some reagents would prevent metabolization.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Anyone with an antag datum now is shown as an antag to admin features like (?|F)
  • You can now properly repair mangy/shredded clothing with cloth

Timberpoes updated:

  • AI integrity restorer program now appropriately restores the integrity of AIs.

nightred updated:

  • Titanium does not devolve in to iron when it rusts

24 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The BEPIS has been moved to the Cargo Bay from Science, and it's prices have been adjusted to roughly late-game proportions for most players.
  • The Rolling Tables and Mauna Mug BEPIS techs have been merged into one.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Ash ascension no longer kills user.

Galdar02 updated:

  • Winter Boots and Coats can now be acquired from Clothesmates

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • You can now take off clothes while in stasis.

Maurukas updated:

  • All maps now receive a blood crate and surplus limb crate in Medical.
  • All maps now have a chemical locker in the Pharmacy or in Plumbing.
  • The last chemistry wardrobe locker has been removed from DeltaStation.
  • IceBox blood freezer not spawning the correct number of blood bags.

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Routing protocols for contractor pods have been fixed - they should no longer send victims to mysterious crystal filled rooms

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Licking wounds on other people will automatically contract any diseases they're carrying. This is a one way transmission vector, you cannot contract disease from a felinid doctor in this way due to the partially antiseptic nature of cat saliva or whatever
  • You also cannot lick wounds if your mouth is covered or if you do not, in fact, possess a tongue
  • Your clothes and items will no longer be covered in distressingly human looking blood when bashing borgs to bits
  • Introduces piercing wounds, a new type of wound mostly related to pointy things like bullets. Piercing wounds cause bleeding that does not clot over time, as well as when that limb is hit.
  • Skeletons and plasmamen can now suffer bone wounds!
  • Dismemberment is now integrated with wounds! Simply apply a critical bleeding wound and a severe bone wound, keep whacking, and pop! Sharp weapons will cut through to bones on limbs with critical bleeding wounds, allowing you to still dismember with just a sword or axe.
  • A few projectile types, namely buckshot and shotgun slugs, have had their damage reduced slightly to account for their new wounding abilities. Buckshot may take three shots to crit now, but you can also blast peoples limbs off! Cool!
  • Health analyzers now tell you if a humanoid is missing a heart, lungs, liver, or stomach (and they need them to survive)
  • Formaldehyde replaces calomel in paramedic belts
  • Having brute damage on a limb no longer causes bleeding. Bandages now apply to all wounds on a limb, rather than be applied per-wound. Gauze also stops bleeding from dragging, but this wears out the gauze faster
  • Wounds that have their removal requirements met while the patient is on a stasis bed will now be cured of their wounds as expected. In addition, burn wounds will slowly recover while stasis'd if they have flesh regen/sanitizer applied
  • Examining a bleeding dead body now reflects that dead bodies don't actually bleed, saying their blood is pooling instead
  • Coagulant is now slightly less effective per bleeding wound for each bleed wound on a patient

Sirich96 updated:

  • new stunbaton sprites

YPOQ updated:

  • Fixed an issue that prevented throwing hats onto heads.

nightred updated:

  • Only living mobs can buckle to borgs
  • The golden bike horn now works after round end,

zxaber updated:

  • AIs disconnecting from a shell will be left looking at the shell rather than their core.

23 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Civilian bounty pads, when submitting a bounty that the department can't pay for, will allow you to submit it later.
  • Fixes 2 duplicate bounties between security/assistants.

Coul updated:

  • All keybinds send signals when pressed

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes cyborg slot cycling (and a runtime)

Nebulacrity updated:

  • Updated the reality fractures (Heretic influences) to have nicer sprites.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed display cases going invisible when you put things inside of them.
  • Fixed the pedestal for open display cases being glass colored.

Skoglol updated:

  • electrolysis reaction now outputs 4.5u of reagents instead of 30u.
  • Removed forcesay on getting hit in classic mode.

nightred updated:

  • Fixed medical records for quirks.
  • Quirks settings trigger after spawn now.

tralezab updated:

  • More roles added for mafia!
  • Should have (outside of adminbus) way more balanced role lists in mafia now.
  • general improvements to the game have been made as well :)

22 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • early plant mutations from 30+ instability
  • The Implosion Compressor now has an updated sprite.
  • The photocopier now has a 5 credit cost to use.
  • There is now a uniform component for simple payments.
  • You can now make copies of paper with the photocopier again.

Coul updated:

  • visible message when someone takes the item you offer them
  • cleaned up some spans and offer messages

Donkie updated:

  • Prevent being able to finish a reinforced girder using regular metal, making the added reinforcement disappear.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Fixed colorful reagent, red powder, and quantum hair dye breaking metabolization.

Melbert updated:

  • You can no longer use broken cyborg slots by being fast at clicking
  • Removed a bunch of deprecated cyborg code involving taking toxin and oxygen damage
  • Refactored part of cyborg inventory code

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Corpses buckled to chairs can no longer tackle

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed a minor runtime caused by a mob being deleted while in a coma.
  • Converted everything to use setAnchored() as opposed to setting the anchored var directly. This means that COMSIG_MOVABLE_SETANCHORED can now actually be used reliably to track if an object's anchored var has changed.
  • The refactor also means that varediting the anchored var will now properly update most items' other states that rely on it being set a certain way.
  • Fixed bookcases having the incorrect icon when they're unanchored.
  • Fixed bookcases not automatically picking up spellbooks / storage books when made/spawned.
  • Fixed bookcases not dropping spellbooks / storage books when deconstructed.
  • Fixed a runtime causing emags to not properly emag airlocks.
  • Fixed a runtime caused by a target being deleted by a gun's projectiles.
  • The light eater will now eat -even more- lights.
  • Fixed a runtime when using the peacekeeper borg's Hyperkinetic Dampener Field.
  • Player/pAI controlled MULEbots will now use power when they move.
  • Player/pAI controlled MULEbots will now turn off properly if they ran out of power while moving.
  • MULEbot's power levels now show up on the diagnostic HUD.
  • Players controlling a MULEbot will now see their power level and current load on the status panel.
  • Player controlled bots (ie securitrons, ED209's, MULEbots, ect) will now get a chat notification when they're turned on/off.

Skoglol updated:

  • Fixed a simplemob AI issue that prevented them from processing.
  • dead people can no longer slimelink
  • Re-added old keybinds for quick equip, set new default for suit storage slot if none was set yet.
  • Savefile version minimum bumped to 32.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Revenants are no longer deaf.

Winterous updated:

  • Changed some text for Medbots, including fixing incorrect message after updating research. Contributor's brain irreparably melted from hurdles.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Improved SIGN macro performance

nightred updated:

  • Family heirloom moods clear on loss of the quirk.
  • Fixed the location of an Engineering sign on Meta
  • Fixed up plumbing issues in security for Meta

21 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • We got hydroponics belt and suit sprites.
  • We also got engineering tool mirror sprites.

Dennok updated:

  • look_down verb that allow look down
  • look_up and look_down verbs don't interrupt by move, until you step under/over transparent turf.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Ash ascension spells now deal actual damage.

Fikou updated:

  • changes morphine description to be more accurate

Melbert updated:

  • Items hidden in bread, cake, and cheeses can now have unique interactions when someone bites into it them.
  • Sharp objects like shards of glass, ammunition, beakers, bottles, syringes, pills, organs, and more will now have unique interactions if you somehow manage to accidentally bite or swallow one that was hidden in food.
  • You can now insert sharp objects into food containers (bread, cake, cheese) if you're on disarm intent.

Mickyan updated:

  • Spraypaint can no longer be applied to any object type

RaveRadbury updated:

  • New insect phobia

Rohesie updated:

  • Emotes now show on runechat. You can disable them on your prefs.

Skoglol updated:

  • Arrhytmic knife now updates movespeed every time it processes, as intended.
  • Arrhytmic knife movespeed change brought more in line with other speed increasing effects.
  • Moth week start date fixed
  • Added a few new buildmode modes. Outfit, to quickly apply or remove outfits. Delete, to quickly delete any atoms. Slightly overhauled the copy proc used here and in supply pods, now compatible with most mobs.

Winterous updated:

  • Large water bottles (made from plastic) now have the same starting and optional transfer volumes as large beakers.

zxaber updated:

  • Hulk arms no longer break with punching things unintended to break hulk arms
  • Hulk arms no longer break when punching machines (but still take a small bit of recoil damage).

20 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Icebox NE Maintenance has fewer unnecessary pipes and wires, as well as less space.
  • The Civilian Bounty Pad and Console have been added to every map. Using your ID on the console will allow you to aquire a civilian bounty, which can be sent away for additional profit similar to cargo bounties.
  • Midround, the widely unstable space market can occasionally briefly completely collapse, resulting in vendor prices skyrocketing for short periods of time.
  • For admins, there are new debug items to fiddle with the economy.
  • Several new small bounties have been added to accompany the new sets of civilian bounties per job.
  • The Coin mint has been removed from the code and all maps.
  • Miasma Exports have been nerfed from 10 credits/mol to 2credits/mol when sold.
  • EXPERIMENTAL: Crew now start with higher starting balances, but lower passive income throughout the round.
  • A new economy mechanic has been added, the inflation value. In short, if player accounts hold more money than the station should probably have at a given time, the prices of vendors will go up. If vendor prices are unreasonably high, spend money with cargo or vendors.
  • Adjusted the Telepad sprite into the 2020s. sound: Telepads now make a whoopy teleport sound.

Cobby updated:

  • You can now tend wounds on all healable mobs if they are organic!

Fikou updated:

  • you can no longer cheat over the spraycanning clothes black restriction

Gamer025 updated:

  • You can no longer enter book or author names that are too long for the database to store

Maurukas updated:

  • Fix hidden pipes and unpowered devices in Icebox turbine.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Discord urls updated since the old one is being depreciated.
  • The client playtime panel is now sorted alphabetically as opposed to the order in which they were added to the list.
  • Defibbing someone will no longer work if their chest is covered by thick clothing. Used to just check to see if they had a spacesuit someone on their person (even if they weren't wearing it / only had it stuck to their hands.)
  • Defibbing someone will now actually require you to hold the shock paddles for the entire duration of the process. No more defibbing someone if you were disarmed during the charge time.

stylemistake updated:

  • tgui: Fixed a very rare case of exceptions thrown due to bugged localStorage. No more NTOS bluescreens.

tralezab updated:

  • landmark cleanup on mafia

19 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Mice can now be stored in chef's hats.

Caldony updated:

  • the microwave will no longer be turned on infinitely when the power is cut off while it's still on

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • All methods of changing text output, like singing (%), whispering (#), radio (;) and languages (,) all now work together in any order.

OmegaDarkPotato updated:

  • Increases the amount of Aiuri in burn patches to 2u to match the quantity of Libital in brute patches.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Be on the lookout for new types of cockroaches wearing miniature 19th century Prussian headgear!

Skoglol updated:

  • Adminhelps has gotten a little bit smarter. Improved handling of target dis- and re-connections, admin->admin PM now opens a ticket, players can no longer close their own tickets.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Roboticists rejoice. NanoTrasen has heard your cries for help. They've seen CCTV footage (recorded by the AI) of you all staring enviously at geneticists, lording around their shiny, polished, usable DNA Consoles. Cry no more, for you can now please your Silicon Overlords and robust those Machine Cultist Chaplains in high definition glory with a beautiful new interface added to Exosuit Fabricators.
  • Depowered and/or non-interactive tgui interfaces are now approriately non-interactive.

carshalash updated:

  • Reintroduces module type to AI shell name

18 July 2020

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Fix admin pref for ignore cult summons

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed AIs / borgs sometimes singing and whipsering their ion laws to you like they're sweet nothings of death and doom.
  • Fixed a runtime caused by a mob's client disconnecting while boosting around with a jetpack.

Skoglol updated:

  • Teleporters can now turn any organic living species into a flyperson. Practice good teleporter safety.

16 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Added Star Cactus, a new mutation of lavaland cacti.
  • Added the Prickly Adhesion plant trait, enabling embedding on plants, but is mutually exclusive with liquid contents.

ArcaneMusic Ft. Kriskog updated:

  • Plants above 30 instability when harvested have a (instability/3)% chance of producing a wildly mutated product instead of their own.

Coul updated:

  • cleans up mech backstabbing code

Donkie updated:

  • Added label to canisters indicating their pressure rating

GulDreggrod updated:

  • new regal rat resprite!

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed things like Nar-Sie and CRAB-17 spawning outside the station on icemoon maps.
  • Fixed filters/radiation overlays not being added/cleared properly on action buttons.
  • Fixed cult barriers not getting deleted properly.
  • Added some sanity checking for varedit values.
  • Fixed a scenario which would cause the cultist reveal rune ability to break.
  • Fixed sheets of glass / other materials that don't have a valid false wall type being consumed without doing anything when you try to construct a false wall with them.
  • VScode will now always default to LF line breaks for new files.

Skoglol updated:

  • Agent card once again disallows IC banned words.

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Random events no longer trigger after emergency shuttle departure. No more Sentient Disease spawning right as the round ends.

jdawg1290 updated:

  • text files now use lf line endings

nightred updated:

  • Added door hints to the Meta service area

stylemistake updated:

  • tgui windows should load faster after an initial load, if using the fancy mode. Please report any breakages.
  • Fixed a bug in tgui that prevents observers from observing UI updates.

tralezab updated:

  • Obsessed can't win by lynching their target after they're dead.
  • a small wiki link at the start of a mafia game

15 July 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • A new hotkey for quickdrawing/quicksheathing items into/from your suit storage slot has been added! It defaults to Shift+Q.
  • Corrects some minor capitalization oddities.

Donkie updated:

  • Improved user experience when dealing with canister frames

Fikou updated:

  • you can now get a circuit from destroying the lipid extractor

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Fixed SWAT and Armored beat cops spawning without a weapon.
  • Fixed the Syndicate Ship Captain outfit not having a jumpsuit, ID, or belt.
  • Armored fugitive bounty hunters now correctly start with an extra tank of plasma in their hand.

LemonInTheDark, TetraZeta for the sprites updated:

  • Adds hot ice slush, grind some hot ice to make it, it'll melt down to plasma if you heat it to 30c.
  • Adds hot ice coffee, mix 1 part hot ice slush with 2 parts coffee to make some. Careful it's kinda cold.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • Fixed a runtime when log_wound wasn't passed a wound or a victim to apply it to.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Readded the button to toggle the plasmaman helmet's welding visor.
  • Fixed the throw button's icon not updating properly if the mob caught something while their client was disconnected.
  • Fixed Factory Error Synths not getting their glowy eyes
  • Fixed admin help tickets not logging the name of the admin who generated a ban.
  • Fixed a minor runtime when cameramobs are ghostized.
  • Fixed a scenario where ice demons wouldn't fire at you if they were unsuccessful in finding a spot to teleport to.
  • Fixed putting on a damaged suit and then it taking more damage afterwards spamming runtime logs with a warning.
  • Fixed another minor pellet cloud runtime when no mobs were hit and a non-mob target was deleted.
  • Tagging an area already tagged by your gang will now say so, instead of generically telling you it's tagged by "a" gang.
  • You can no longer hide your codex in your pockets while gathering research points with it from a reality tear. You have to actually hold it for the full duration now.
  • Corrupted power cells will no longer get reset if you remove plasma from them.

nightred updated:

  • Meta security airsupply is now in tune

uomo91 updated:

  • You can now also leave Deltastation's medbay without bugging a doctor to let you out.

13 July 2020

Angust updated:

  • Glowshrooms now spread properly again.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Vend-a-trays can now be made in the service lathe.
  • Roundstart Vend-a-trays can now be registered to either chefs or bartenders, respectively.
  • Plant reagents are now properly displayed if they've reacted within a plant using a plant analyzer.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Maint Tar a new recipe was found by assistants!...
  • ...Then some Janitor found out how to refine it into Sludge...
  • ...After that the chemist created a purified version of it.

Iatots updated:

  • clown ops can buy the bioterror bundle, as they can already buy all the pieces individually and could use a bundle.
  • clownops can buy the tactical naptime bundle!

Inept updated:

  • Mafia has been updated with a new map: Vampire's Castle! In this creepy castle map, Vampires and Changelings clash to find out who's the superior bloodsucking monster!

Jay Smith updated:

  • Mirrored sprites for various bags (when equipped into the suit storage slot) have been added.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Fixes revenant contamination, what idiot let this through, pth, I spit on him.
  • Cleaned up some of the radiation traits and bitflags

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Admins can use the "Reverse Dropoff" with supplypods to easily move/teleport things from one place to another! Fun!
  • Fixed some input messages in the supplypod menu not showing properly
  • Gondolapods work again!

Skoglol updated:

  • Split personalities will no longer roll for catatonic mobs, nor swap to a logged off player.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • monkey caps drop on the floor if no ghosts got polled

12 July 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • To sacrifice someone on a sacrificial altar (such as the ones found in the healing fountain ruin), you must now alt-click the altar, not normal-click it. The default descriptions of sacrificial altars have been updated accordingly.

Alterist updated:

  • Upgraded Cybernetic Lungs (Tier3) now have improved oxygen absorption, same as Cybernetic Lungs (Tier2)
  • Added 3 tier of Cybernetic Stomachs, researchable by R&D and buildable in the Medical Lathe.

Angust updated:

  • fixed space vines / kudzu growing slower from better (lower) production speed
  • random event space vines buffed to have 1-6 production instead of 5-10 to compensate

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Icebox Maintenance, and Icebox Service Hallway have been rearranged to be more spacious.
  • Bounty boards are properly responsive, and are mapped on icebox dorms as intended.

Dennok updated:

  • Separate BLOCK_Z_FALL flag to BLOCK_Z_OUT_DOWN, BLOCK_Z_OUT_UP, BLOCK_Z_IN_DOWN, BLOCK_Z_IN_UP
  • Now lattice can support spaceman
  • Catwalk block uplifting from below
  • now posting in shuttle propertly fails

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Voiceless dead are now longe INVISIBILITY_ABSTRACT, god i hate bugs
  • Ascension will make you greentext

Fikou updated:

  • Bounty hunter hat sprite works again.

Jay Smith & MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Replaced faulty sprites for various bags and the Portable Chemical Mixer in the belt slot
  • Replaced the DNA probe's old sprite (Hypospray) with a unique sprite
  • New icon and sprites for the DNA probe
  • Belt sprites for the Portable Chemical Mixer and various bags

Kathy Ryals and ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Plant mutation chances at 80+ instability is now a sliding scale.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • The tesla/sm will ground bolts less jankilly now
  • Wires will no longer burn if they're under a tile that's on fire
  • Reinserted some old checks for if something is over/under a tile

LoserWasTaken updated:

  • blood cleave does only one wound instead of 3 now

Maurukas updated:

  • Added reconstructive surgery for moth wings, requiring synthflesh
  • Magical healing and aheals now restore moth wings

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes railings blocking bullets and immovable rods from a certain direction.

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Nanotrasen's Transportation and Logistics Subdivision has spent the better part of their budget developing a brand new model of Supplypod. Internal investigations have revealed the only real differences are almost purely aesthetic.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • As an admin ghost, examining another ghost twice quickly will pull up clickable links to their info in chat
  • Examining someone who has examined you within the last second will give you both a small message saying you made eye contact. Having your face obscured by a helmet or mask will prevent the other person from noticing, no matter who looked first.
  • Those with social anxiety may find eye contact to be stressful, and those who foster unhealthy obsessions over other crewmembers may outright staredown their prey.
  • Throwing people really hard into vending machines is not advised if you don't want to clean them up afterwards. Things are considered thrown really hard if: You're throwing them as a hulk, the person you're throwing is a dwarf, and/or if you're throwing someone from a neckgrab
  • You can now adjust the speed disposal outlets eject contents at with a multitool, and emag the disposal outlet to amp the speed up even further!
  • Player controlled medbots are no longer permanently crippled when tipped over
  • New admin smite for knotting someone's shoes if possible

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed radiation immune mobs getting irradiated.
  • Plasmamen who have acquired the fireproofing trait will no longer get spammed with messages saying they caught on fire.
  • Stacks will now update properly when you varedit their amount. It's clamped to max_amount, so make sure to change that too if you want to increase the amount beyond it.
  • Fixed some constant runtime spam when defib rechargers had their defib destroyed.
  • Fixed a minor runtime when examining paper twice.
  • Cleaned up arcade machine examine-more messages a little.
  • Map placed headpikes will now have heads... and pikes!
  • Fixed headpikes having the wrong mob name.
  • Fixed a minor runtime when removing a monkey's sentience helmet.

Skoglol updated:

  • Parrot possession now works.
  • Fixed some glowshroom runtimes.
  • Wendigo no longer spams admin messages.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • conveyor switches now have a wire that can be pulsed with signalers/other assemblies to active it

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Resource and Factory Blobs can only be placed on station where they count towards critical mass.

YPOQ updated:

  • Fixed an issue that prevented AIs from tracking players in areas they have not yet viewed.

silicons updated:

  • cameras no longer crash the server

tralezab updated:

  • Fixed up Mafia maps, at least in all the ways I caught!
  • mind mag helms losing their icon sometimes

uomo91 updated:

  • You can now leave Metastation's medbay after being treated without bugging a doctor to let you out.

11 July 2020

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed the field generators in Delta's Singulo area being anchored but not secured.
  • Fixed field generators continuing to function after being uprooted by a mob.

Timberpoes updated:

  • Fix being unable to orbit player characters and antags from the observer orbit menu.

nemvar updated:

  • Barrel melon description now makes a bit more sense now.

tralezab updated:

  • Cargo can purchase monkey sentience helmets under the science tab!

09 July 2020

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • You can no longer infinitely spawn heretics summons

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Added surgery related unit tests and adds TEST_ASSERT, TEST_ASSERT_EQUAL, and allocate to unit tests.

Melbert updated:

  • Fixes an infinite loop / infinite camera shake in the Bubblegum hallucination

Timberpoes updated:

  • Ghost orbit menu can now orbit things with weird metadata in their names like medibots and MULEBOTs.
  • Ghost orbit menu search bar looks prettier.
  • Ghost orbit menu no longer auto-closes when you select something to orbit. Indirectly buffs voyeurs.

nightred updated:

  • fixed destructive analyzer item visual not being removed when destroying items

zxaber updated:

  • Borg machine conveyance has been repaired, to the delight of any "alternative"-functioning AIs that wish to onboard new silicon employees.

08 July 2020

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The bounty board has been added to all standard NT stations, for making and paying out bounties for credits made by crew members across the station. Available as a standalone machine, as well as a modular app.

Fikou updated:

  • fixes labor camp beacon sprite
  • manly dorf now doesnt turn on dorf mode with alcohol tolerance

FloranOtten updated:

  • Space Cops now come equipped with appropriate environmental protection.

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Fixed cryo cells locking up those with prosthetic limbs.
  • Fixes tend wounds not healing and brain surgery not curing traumas.

Melbert updated:

  • Mech vs Mech combat system for toy mechs! Hit a toy mech with another toy mech, or attack a player holding a toy mech with a toy mech, and you can initiate battle between toys!
  • Each toy mech now has its own health stat and special attack move for use in mech vs mech combat. Discover them all!
  • Suicide act for mech toys. If you wanted to take part in the toy mech battles yourself.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Added more examine text to bots.
  • Fixed player controlled statues being able to speak.
  • Fixed nonhuman that aren't able to speak being able to cast spoken spells
  • Fixed a minor runtime caused by removing a laser pointer's diode while it's still turned on.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • votes now play a beep noise when they get started

Wayland-Smithy updated:

  • Blob mobs from an overmind now see critical mass progress as a status.

oranges updated:

  • Where some names might previously have been accepted, they will now be rejected, this should not affect any regular names in use

tralezab updated:

  • Removes the 9 assistants 3 changeling setup, yech.
  • Lotta bugfixes for mafia!
  • Mafia now alerts you when starting a game!
  • grammar + better text for some roles at better times of the game
  • LET THERE BE MAFIA DOCUMENTATION!

07 July 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The description of eldritch essence has been modified to make what it actually does more clear.
  • Eldritch essence and unholy water both now actually use the metabolization_rate variable.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Added a new mutation of geraniums, called Fraxinella, AKA Burning Bush.
  • Added a new mutation of watermelon, called Barrel Melon, which has the new trait Auto-Distilling Composition. (Sprite provided by Kryson)
  • Walking Mushrooms now have a new graftable gene, Occulary Mimicry.

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Nitric acid is slightly better
  • Meat hook is now a 11tc cook traitor item. It can no longer be aquired from necropolis chests. sorry miners!

Fikou updated:

  • servicelathe can now print airlock painters, decal painters and spraycans
  • explorer suits now have space suit level heat protection

Jared-Fogle updated:

  • Donut boxes will now accurately show what donuts are inside.
  • Fixed a bug where when teleporting naturally (such as going through a z-level in space), if you were pulling someone that was then pulling another person, only you and the person you were pulling would make it through.
  • Removed the healing skill, and by effect dissection surgery and the legendary healer's cloak.

Jay Smith updated:

  • The Portable Chemical Mixer now uses proper vortex anomaly cores instead of raw ones.

Kathy Ryals updated:

  • Nanotrasen finally realized they forgot to ship the mandatory anomaly compressor and two anomaly cores to Icebox.

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Removed the research modes from tesla coils and radiation collectors.

Orchian updated:

  • Added a new traitor item for HoP and QM, the OCD

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed gas canisters having a misplaced flashing icon when they are close to empty.
  • Fixed inducers not working on a couple items with internal powercells.
  • Fixed a scenario where mobs would accidentally be kicked off a vehicle if they were handcuffed.
  • Added support to kick a mob off a vehicle if the vehicle is restrained.
  • You can now unlock bots by alt-clicking them when their maintenance panel is open.
  • Optimized a good chunk of MULEbot code, fixing things such as it rebuilding it's overlays/icons 5 times every second while moving to a destination. Less free lag!
  • Fixed MULEbots closing crates when the crate doesn't actually get loaded onto it.
  • Fixed the maintenance hatch on MULEbots visually closing for a moment when emagged.
  • Paranormal MULEbots will no longer briefly turn into a normal MULEbot when emagged.
  • Fixed interface exploits involving paranormal MULEbots carrying ghosts.
  • Fixed MULEbot blood tracks sometimes facing the wrong direction.
  • Player controlled MULEbots will now leave bloody tracks if they've run over a mob.
  • Fixed players riding MULEbots sometimes appearing underneath it instead of ontop of it.
  • Fixed AI's making a chiming noise when they receive a remote notification from a MULEbot. Now only the AI will hear the notification's sound.
  • Fixed MULEbots dropping mobs off at their current location instead of at their dropoff point.
  • Fixed a minor runtime related to MULEbots dropping off deleted items/mobs.
  • Fixed mobs having the wrong height offset when riding MULEbots.
  • Fixed mobs sometimes ending up underneath MULEbots while riding them.
  • Fixed mobs not falling off MULEbots when stunned / incapacitated.
  • Fixed inducers not recharging MULEbots.
  • Fixed MULEbots leaving bloody tracks in space.
  • Fixed MULEbots leaving multiple blood tracks in the same spot if they failed to move.
  • Fixed hacked MULEbots spamming messages about knocking down a mob when they didn't actually do it.
  • Fixed MULEbot commands not resetting when they were turned off.
  • Fixed MULEbots not turning off properly when their maintenance hatch is opened.
  • Fixed MULEbots not turning off properly when they ran out of power while moving.
  • Fixed MULEbots flashing their external warning lights while they're turned off when their avoidance wire is cut.
  • Fixed mobs being able to walk right over MULEbots when they turn off.
  • MULEbots will now try to put their powercell in your hands when you remove them with a crowbar.
  • Fixed the interface for MULEbots briefly looking like you turned it on successfully even though it was out of power.
  • MULEbots will now provide feedback if they fail to turn on due to their maintenance panel being open.
  • MULEbots will no longer flash and beep when their wires are pulsed if they don't have power.
  • MULEbots will now actually flash when their external warning lights are pulsed.
  • MULEbots will now flash when they beep / buzz.
  • Added a bit more examine text to MULEbots.
  • Fixed an exploit involving coins and mints that could crash the server.
  • Fixed buckled mobs sometimes appearing over what they're buckled to.
  • Renamed the "Paranormal MULEbot" to simply, "GHOULbot".
  • L6 Saw's inhands work again.
  • Fixed a couple exploits involving the L6.
  • Guns with a magazine + a round in the chamber won't appear empty anymore.
  • Energy based guns are no longer missing textures when worn.... Again.
  • Touched up and added a few worn / inhand icons for some energy based guns.

TetraZeta, NecromancerAnne updated:

  • A new sprite for the Marisa outfit.

TheVekter updated:

  • NT has approved orders for all members of Cargo to spawn with NTOS-capable tablets.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • AI laws no longer include HTML on tgui displays

nightred updated:

  • Service hall's deliveries windoor access has been fix

zxaber updated:

  • The thermal vision modules found on certain Syndicate cyborgs is functional once more.

06 July 2020

ATHATH updated:

  • The default chem capacity of most grown plants is now 100u.

Anturk + Arm + other summer ball contributors code, trollbreeder + fikou + jerryderpington mapping updated:

  • Mafia minigame added for ghosts

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Vend-A-Trays are now operated through a UI.

Arkatos updated:

  • Jukebox now uses tgui.
  • You can now set a volume of a jukebox songs.

Disco updated:

  • [Icebox] SM exterior cooling pipes have had unnecessary thermal shielding removed

EdgeLordExe updated:

  • Added Extreme Medcine Allergy, a new quirk that gives you 2 points!
  • CHEMS METABOLIZE AGAIN

Inept, KathyRyals updated:

  • A few minor map fixes, hot from the oven.

Jay Smith & Michael Trauf updated:

  • Portable Chemical Mixer (Requires a vortex anomaly core to activate)
  • Unique sprites for the Portable Chemical Mixer
  • Added Portable Chemical Mixer to the Medical Techfab

LemonInTheDark updated:

  • Contaminated objects will now glow bright green until cleaned, remember to quarantine rouge free golems.
  • Buffed rad goggles in general, the text lasts longer, is brighter, and will show more then twice as far away
  • Fixed the text from radiation goggles not showing above mobs
  • The APC control console is now tgui rather then html. It should be a lot more usable. I've made other changes, you won't notice.

Melbert updated:

  • Brain Tumor damage is now paused when in stasis.
