  • Cleans up some scattered hud removal procs and puts them into their respective antag datum file so when the player loses the antag status, they lose the hud
  • Refactors antag hud adding and removing procs. Moves them into the base antag datum file. The new procs can dynamically assign a hud from given arguments. Cuts down on copy and paste
  • Refactors the clown mutation adding and removing procs for antags. Merges it into a single proc in the base antag datum file.

Time-Green updated:

  • Reaction chambers now don't break after certain reactions, like meat creation.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • adds a missing space in split personailty radio
  • actively made research methods creates research notes that can be slapped on the rnd console to convert into points on demand

actioninja updated:

  • Suit storage, tank dispenser, and GPS have been tgui-nextified
  • Learning to bake cakes doesn't break the entire crafting ui anymore

carlarctg updated:

  • Colorful reagent and quantum barber thing also have random colors on init. spriteadd: Adds unused syndie pill sprite, can't be selected in chemmaster but it's there if you need it for stuffs.
  • Regenerative Jelly dyes your hair purple when it enters your bloodstream. spriteadd: Also tweaked some existing reagent colors around, like uranium going from silver to dark green.

stylemistake updated:

  • New Radio interface.
  • New Ore Redemption Machine interface.
  • New Solar Tracker interface.

zeroisthebiggay updated:

  • floor decals in science.
  • floor decals in science.

04 November 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • Multiplied the speed at which AI integrity restorers heal intellicarded AIs by 5.
  • Made AI integrity restorer consoles automatically turn on an intellicard's subspace tranceiver when they heal a conscious AI inside of said intellicard.
  • Multiplied the speed at which wiping an intellicard deals damage to an AI within that intellicard by 5.
  • TRIES TO FIX MILK FOR THE THIRD TIME
  • PLEASE GOD LET THIS WORK
  • Buffs the maximum amount/volume of milk that a skeleton, bone golem, or plasmaman can have in their system before it starts to drip off of their bones to >10u instead of >=6u.

Anonmare updated:

  • Service cyborgs have a drink manipulator - Rejoice!
  • The service cyborg shaker has more options available - show the bartender why his job will be automated away

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Plastic can now be used to make cheap, plastic floor tiles.

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where singularity hammer would throw around ghosts.
  • Clones will now have a same blood type as the original body.
  • Fixed several issues with some clothing items, where no sprites would show when worn or on the ground.
  • Barmaids and Bardrones are now only invincible if they inside escape shuttle.
  • Purple gloves now correctly show their sprite when worn.

Cobby updated:

  • Achievements are now moved to the OOC tab, effectively removing the personal tab

Couls updated:

  • ports TGMC's custom hotkeys
  • round-start riot and telescopic shields now have regular integrity
  • people now face west properly when they crawl west
  • restored airlock painter inhand sprites

Denton updated:

  • Updated the multi Z debug map with multi Z wiring/piping/disposals and stairs.
  • Added missing destinations for refugee hunter shuttles.
  • Added two EVA crates to the space cop shuttle.
  • revive() with admin_revive = FALSE no longer calls fully_heal(admin_revive = TRUE).
  • Added airlock bolt/unbolt logging to the combat log.

Fikou updated:

  • the chief engi hardsuit now has 100 rad protection
  • the monastery shuttle can now be used as a mining shuttle

Firecage updated:

  • Toolbelts can now hold RCDs, RPDs, Inducers, and Plungers.
  • Medical belts can now hold Plumbing Constructors, Plumberinator, and Plungers.
  • Grenadier belts can now hold cherry bombs and combustible lemons.
  • Bio bags can now hold both organs and body parts(except heads).
  • Construction bags can now hold camera assemblies.
  • Organ Smartfridges can now hold limbs of any variety.
  • Trash bags can now pick up livers, lungs, and stomachs.
  • Objects can now once more be washed within sinks.

Ghommie updated:

  • wooden barricade walls should break turf lighting no more.

IndieanaJones updated:

  • Elites who win their freedom can re-enter their tumor to despawn themselves, letting the tumor be re-activated to spawn a different elite.
  • A renamed pulsing tumor uses its new name in messages now.
  • Pulsing tumors now use their popped sprite after spawning an elite.
  • Boosted elites are now warned against being friendly with crew.
  • Broodmother's tentacles do 30-35 damage from 20-25.
  • Fixed the Broodmother being unable to create children.

JStheguy updated:

  • ID cards, budget cards, and wallets have new sprites. Emags have been reverted to their old look.

MCterra10 updated:

  • Med Kiosks no longer runtime when no ID is equipped.

Neo-0 updated:

  • Holoparasite summoners now properly dust when their guardians are cremated

Neotw updated:

  • You can now remove an upgrade from a security camera as it should

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Mutually exclusive Clown and Mime Fan perks
  • Clown and Mime pins
  • Clown pin and Mime pin

Rohesie updated:

  • Fixes ID console duping issues. Includes some ID containers, such as PDAs, tablets and wallets, into the swapping behavior when an ID card is being removed and the item is being held.

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • The station's new Orion Trail arcade machines now detect certain antisocial behaviors and can warn security and medical personnel about unhinged gamers.
  • Shotguns now knock people backwards when fired directly on someone at point blank

Skoglol updated:

  • Dynamic: Scaling now even more accurate.
  • Dynamic: Fixed false positive configuration warning.
  • Dynamic: Roundstart revs should work again.
  • Janitors once again start out with the holosign projectors. Holobarrier projectors now locked behind tech, printed at service lathe.
  • Janitor holobarriers no longer block things, only conscious and running carbons.
  • Mimes can no longer send invalid emojis.

TheVekter updated:

  • Added a Nanite research laboratory to PubbyStation.

Time-Green updated:

  • fixes duct networks in the > 50 glitching out when unwrenching

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • paychecks are a % of budget instead of fixed numbers
  • pill chemfactory bounty

XDTM updated:

  • Added the Distributed Computing nanite program, which slowly adds research points over time.
  • Added the Neural Network nanite program, which adds research points over time as well, but scales in efficiency for each mob that is currently running the program, breaking even with Distributed Computing at 12 hosts.
  • All of these programs only work on complex mobs (humans, monkeys, xenomorphs) and only have 25% efficiency on non-sentient mobs.
  • Nanites now have their own research point type, gained over time based on the amount of mobs with active nanites.
  • Basic nanite programming is much cheaper and no longer requires basic robotics.
  • All other nodes had their cost split into normal and nanite research, lowering their impact on the research progression for other departments.
  • Nanites who aren't regularly syncing to a cloud console have a chance of encountering software errors over time.
  • Xenomorphs no longer lose nanites when evolving.

actioninja updated:

  • Atmos machines now use NumberInput: Slick in ui setting of values
  • role and race restricted items should show up in the uplink again.
  • Language and Crafting tgui-next
  • Oatmeal Cookies actually show up in the crafting menu
  • Chemfactory machines tgui-next interfaces
  • Debug chem synthesizer tgui-next interfaces
  • bsa can pick targets again (again)

anconfuzedrock updated:

  • Boxstation has a large chemistry room in maintenance similarly to metastation, and the old chemistry was made into the apothecary.

bandit updated:

  • The turrets on the derelict are less fucky.
  • 30 new emoji have been added. Mime buff, mime now OP.
  • The mime's PDA now lists all emoji pictures in the PDA in alphabetical order without having to click.
  • Vomitgeese no longer spam you when refusing to eat food.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Fixed duplicate client and location logging for suicides and deaths.

carlarctg updated:

  • the gods are now able to delight your palate with an assortment of species-related treats
  • medical wrench costs 20 moneys
  • riot shotguns have a long fire delay before rechambering, combat shotguns have a medium fire delay

genessee596 updated:

  • Cap Guns and boxes of spare caps can be printed at hacked Autolathes

py01 updated:

  • Ablative trenchcoat sechud works, and the icon doesn't break when you flip the hood up.
  • Lootdrop spawners support nested lists, allowing for easier to modify loot tables.

stylemistake updated:

  • Old tgui windows are resizable again.
  • Placebo-tier performance improvement of window dragging.
  • Fixed selection loss on NumberInput on some browsers

zxaber updated:

  • Bolted AIs can no longer be teleported by launchpads.

28 October 2019

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The Clerics Den ruin no longer has any atmos differences at roundstart.

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed an issue where getting creampied twice would render you immune to a further creampieing.
  • Profits from selling returned items now goes to relevant department instead of it always being service department.
  • Returned vendor items will now be free for the workers of the relevant department, and prices will now properly reflect their true value.
  • Fixed an issue where certain items would be unable to dispensed from a vendor.

Detective-Google updated:

  • Coworkers are now encouraged to show affection [WITHIN LEGAL LIMITS] by holding eachother's hands!

MCterra10 updated:

  • Metastation Surgery B APC no longer runtimes

XDTM updated:

  • Sensor nanites (most of them) can now be installed as internal rules to programs, using their current setting. Rules must be met for the program to stay active, but it won't affect triggering.
  • The Nanite chamber can no longer install/uninstall programs, although it can still view them.
  • Instead, the nanite chamber can now easily destroy nanites from a host.
  • Viral nanites now disable cloud sync, if they don't modify Cloud ID, making them always effective.
  • The Mitosis program now also works while connected to a cloud, although it will still generate errors in case the cloud sync stops working.

nemvar updated:

  • Xeno and changeling impregnation times now get stopped by stasis. Also fixes a bug where they were growing up almost twice as fast as intended.

26 October 2019

4dplanner updated:

  • spectral blade should now behave better

ATHATH updated:

  • Renames the explosive kind of "black powder" to "gunpowder", to avoid confusion with the kind of "black powder" that dyes things black.

AnturK updated:

  • You can now specify amount spawned in spawn verb in "path:amount" format.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Adds a new Lavaland Ruin, the Elephant Graveyard.
  • You can now learn to create several bone statues, and a new, dangerous shovel. The only thing stopping you are the consequences.

Arkatos updated:

  • Added missing broken chameleon tie to broken chameleon kit.
  • Fixed an issue with a chameleon tie being invisible.
  • NASA jumpsuit now has proper sprite icons.
  • Fixed an issue where chocolate jelly donuts icons were invisible.
  • Fixed an issue where you could get an extra monkey from a monkey cube by using it on a toilet.
  • You will now always leave fingerprints on toilets when you use them. Detectives, get on that!

Cobby updated:

  • Multiver now only provides unique medicine bonus to purging toxins, not other medicines (still deletes medicines slowly)
  • Multiver now considers alcohol "toxins" for the purpose of chem removal
  • Multiver has less base damage, still scales down with medicines (EPIN YOURSELF)
  • Multiver pills have more... well... multiver

Denton updated:

  • Plumbing smoke reactions no longer spam admin notifications.

Dingo-Dongler updated:

  • Paper can now be attached to wrapped packages.
  • genetics console combines with success, not succes

IradT updated:

  • Removed a lot of stuff from Head of department lockers.
  • moved RCD from Autolathe -> Protolathe

Jdawg1290 updated:

  • Field Generators now block gasses and shield floors from melting when active

Kaffe-work updated:

  • moved vampire blood counter into status bar
  • vampire blood loss is now 1/3 of previous value

Neotw updated:

  • You can put water bottles in chemistry bags again

Qustinnus, Willox & AnturK updated:

  • Achievements are now datums

Ryll/Shaps updated:

  • New opportunities for (unpaid) internships are available at CentCom for those willing to face danger and earn glory for your company!

Shaps/Ryll updated:

  • You can start messages with asterisks in deadchat now

Shapsy updated:

  • Characters with albino skin now always look pale when examined.

Skoglol updated:

  • Fixed some pointing inconsistencies in darkness and across walls. If you can see it, you can point at it.
  • HUD default no longer clockwork.
  • Dynamic game mode panel can now be accessed from the Check Antagonists window.

StonebayKyle updated:

  • Destructive analyzer no longer breaks when an item with no materials is placed inside.

Time-Green updated:

  • Material objects have a better color

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • mortar juices

TooFewSecrets updated:

  • Disablers are now more effectively stopped by all forms of body armor. Performance against unarmored targets is unchanged.

actioninja updated:

  • Replaced the shuttle manipulator ui with a tgui-next version
  • Refactored tgui-next's initial open resulting in it now opening 2-2.5x as fast
  • Codex Gigas and Cargo Express Console now use tgui-next
  • material explosions with a <1 light impact no longer get logged. Less spam.

bandit updated:

  • Request console announcements, like the ones in Head of Staff offices, have deadchat broadcasts.
  • Humanizing a monkey no longer yeets any buried smuggler's satchels from the tile invisibly onto their person.
  • Major victory for Nanotrasen! The Space Wizard Federation is no longer turning geese into vomiting necromancers.

cacogen updated:

  • Pacifists no longer crush cockroaches when stepping on them

carlarctg updated:

  • candy cigarettes don't have broken sprites anymore

defiantGrace updated:

  • makes toilets constructable
  • makes sinks constructable

genessee596 updated:

  • An empty, generic gas tank that is craftable at an Autolathe used for transporting gasses.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Body targeting should work without any initial interaction again

py01 updated:

  • Debug uplinks automatically show all role and species restricted items.
  • Increased spread on dual wielded energy weapons.

stylemistake updated:

  • Improved tgui-next render performance by about 2x-2.5x.
  • tgui-next interfaces initialize earlier and load faster (by about 28%).
  • Removed clockwork cult theme from tgui-next.
  • Tgui will no longer spawn outside of your screen.
  • Fixed a bug with titlebar missing on old tgui.

wesoda25 updated:

  • gasp noises are no longer a thing
  • chaos and meat donuts no longer can have sprinkles

24 October 2019

Cenrus updated:

  • Reagent Synthetizer is now spelled correctly

Fikou updated:

  • The clown planet has returned into orbit of space station 13. We see it now turned into a more planetary shape, and seems to be guarding some beast...

Skoglol updated:

  • Fixed a bug causing dynamic to not run any rulesets.
  • Even more dynamic fixes

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Birdboat now has a chance to be controllable by dead chat, think twitch plays pokemon but goose and deadchat.
  • Deadchat controlled singularity variant.

Urumasi updated:

  • Removed relic water bottle from necropolis chests
  • Water bottles now show the correct material they're made of

bandit updated:

  • Bank accounts should display the correct names for non-humans who join as command roles when Enforce Human Authority is enabled.

spookydonut updated:

  • cryocell ui converted to tgui-next

stylemistake updated:

  • New ChemMaster interface.
  • New ChemHeater interface.

tralezab updated:

  • The mime's PDA messages are silent now!

23 October 2019

Indie-ana Jones & Meyhazah updated:

  • New lavaland ruin: Pulsating Tumor
  • New lavaland enemies: Lavaland Elites
  • New Lavaland Elite: Goliath Broodmother
  • New Lavaland Elite: Pandora
  • New Lavaland Elite: Legionnaire
  • New Lavaland Elite: Herald
  • Added lavaland elite sprites and pulsating tumor sprites
  • New lavaland loot sprites
  • Elite ability sprites

RaveRadbury updated:

  • Lawyer ID color changed to reflect that Lawyers report to the Head of Personnel

Skoglol updated:

  • Syndicate lavaland base no longer uses gas miners, and their atmos should now be usable every round. Some repiping done in the process, non-functional tank consoles gone.
  • Most input windows now have sorted lists of choices.

Skoglol, TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Dynamic now has a more threat based scaling of the individual solo antag modes, instead of only scaling amount of modes to threat. This should make for a somewhat less chaotic jumble of rulesets, with later picked ones supporting the initial one instead of overshadowing every time. Old style chaos still possible though.
  • Dynamic: Configs now work.
  • Dynamic: Second and third rulesets rolling now has a threat-based probability of rolling instead of always doing so.
  • Dynamic: Rulesets should now fire more consistently.
  • Dynamic: Round-ender rulesets now (properly) cant stack below 90 threat. Several bugs fixed.
  • Dynamic: Fixed bugs related to forcing normal rulesets.
  • Dynamic: Revolutions will not end the round on a station win.
  • Dynamic: Revolution should now end properly.
  • Dynamic: Revolution will no longer make ineligible players revheads. Borgs, get back in line.
  • Dynamic: Wizard summon events/guns/magic disabled.
  • Dynamic: Blood cult ruleset is now 35 cost by default.

StonebayKyle updated:

  • The E.X.P.E.R.I-MENTOR now develops research from newly discovered strange objects.

bandit updated:

  • Ghosts can't use security cameras anymore. Get off your ghost hindquarters and go there yourself.
  • Simple animals with hands (gorillas, drones, etc.) can now drag themselves onto crates.
  • Restoring the holodeck safeties works again.

carlarctg updated:

  • armory has a reflective trenchcoat
  • you can still get the vest from cargo but it's not the objective anymore

genessee596 updated:

  • Removed all departmental budget cards except for cargo card
  • Cargo now gets 500 credits per paycheck
  • Cargo can't amass infinite money from other departments

nemvar updated:

  • Ghosts can no longer receive a detailed readout of a persons moodlets with the observe verb.
  • Having no skill whatsoever in a thing now returns the worst possible skill modifier. Basically... PKAs now have a cooldown again.
  • Starting to earn XP towards the first level of a skill no longer tell you that you got better at the skill since you factually didn't.
  • Fixes formatting when viewing skills.

stylemistake updated:

  • Replaced npm with yarn for more deterministic installs in tgui-next.
  • tgui dev server can now show real stack traces using source maps.

willox updated:

  • air alarm in medical lobby is no longer a Space air alarm
  • tgui-next interfaces can be scrolled without clicking on them on Windows 8.1+ and higher.

22 October 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • Bolts of resurrection now instantly kill the undead instead of fully healing them.
  • Bolts of death now fully heal the undead instead of instantly killing them.
  • Hellbound people can now be healed by magical bolts, provided that they aren't dead (yet).
  • You can no longer overdose on water.
  • Skeletons and such should now be properly able to process milk (for realzies this time).

SerJanko for epic asteroid sprites and qustinnus updated:

  • parallax can now sometimes have asteroids or unidentified space-gas

Urumasi updated:

  • Salicylic acid is now spelled correctly

XDTM updated:

  • Added a new nanite program under Mesh Nanite Programming: Dermal Button. It gives an action button to hosts that signals their nanites when pressed.
  • Added the Reduced Diagnostics nanite program: it disables the program list when scanned by portable nanite scanners, in return for a minor increase in replication speed.
  • The functionality has been removed from the Stealth program, but they can easily be stacked together if needed.
  • Viral Nanites now have a 100% chance to work, but only pulse every 7.5 seconds.
  • Stealth nanites grant immunity to viral nanites.
  • Spreading nanites now have a higher chance to infect, but only pulse once every 5 seconds.
  • Accelerated Regeneration now heals 0.5/s, (from 1) but only costs 0.5 nanites/s (from 2.5).
  • Mechanical Repair now heals 1.5/s (from 1/s).
  • Mind Control is now a Triggered program that costs 30, has a 180s cooldown, and lasts 60 seconds.
  • Mind control can now be triggered with a comm remote to input a custom objective.
  • Added the Happiness Enhancement and Happiness Suppression nanite programs, which boost or suppress the host's mood while active.

actioninja updated:

  • Wire ui displays wire functions when you have alien multitools again

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Objects will once again properly report when they do not contain materials.

carlarctg updated:

  • flash powder stuns borgs

nemvar updated:

  • The surgery B APC on metastation now has the correct name.

21 October 2019

carlarctg updated:

  • Candy cigarettes! Fun for the whole family. Reports of addiction are punishable by permanent retirement.
  • The Carp Classic representative was found practicing 'isometric exercise' in the Cigarette Poisoning Meeting's bathroom window.

stylemistake updated:

  • Fix vanishing of supply catalog in supply console.

20 October 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • the three skeleton-like races now get healed by milk properly (and get damaged by and overdose on bone hurting juice properly)
  • makes a few minor edits to some of the messages from bone hurting juice

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • An old monastery from a previously abandoned sector of space has recently resurfaced in some regions surrounding the station.
  • Latent scans of the surrounding systems have picked up trace signs of new, smaller cult constructs, however these signatures quickly vanished.
  • In other news, scavengers in your sector have been seen occasionally with classically recreated maces, so autolathe firmware has been upgraded to accommodate this.

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • You can now put items inside a medical first aid kit that's inside a bag again

Couls updated:

  • people now crawl in the direction their heads are facing

Denton updated:

  • Blood cultists can no longer draw runes inside survival pods and lavaland ruins. This kills the survival pod space base.
  • CentCom has recently outfitted all supply shuttles with teleportation blocking shielding. Supply shuttles also will no longer leave with disposal pipes and bins inside them.

Fikou updated:

  • You can now make bronze windows and airlocks

Firecage updated:

  • The Wizard Academy Teacher ghost roll can now be ignored for the entire round when it pops up, plus it now spawns in the Wizard Academy away mission instead of the Wizard Lair.

Fox McCloud updated:

  • Fixes being able to exploit fully upgraded destructive analyzers to multiply materials

JDawg1290 updated:

  • Doors now properly toggle obscurity. Windoors will not obscure floors ever.

KetasDotepasto updated:

  • Splitter sends chemicals both ways.

Krysonism updated:

  • Added lots of new donuts
  • 3 new dishes cooked with the new plants.
  • Added a nugget box. I'm lovin' it
  • You can no longer make cherry donuts.
  • Tea powder is less toxic and tastes better.
  • Regenerative mesh, a new burn healing medical device.
  • Sutures, a new brute healing medical device.
  • Medicated sutures, a new medical device created by a chemical reaction.
  • Cellulose reagent, used to make the new sutures, can be heated to produce carbon.
  • White kits now contain the new medical devices instead of bruise packs and ointment.
  • Most bruise packs and ointments have been replaced with the new devices.

Mickyan updated:

  • Mood HUD will now display the correct colors

PepperPrepper updated:

  • Back sprites for the pulse rifle

Qustinnus updated:

  • Basic skill framework, only applied to mining at the moment. Use a pickaxe or drill to become more efficient and mine faster.
  • New ruin; the very strong rock. If you become good enough at mining maybe you can crack it open.
  • nerfs mythril mat

Skoglol updated:

  • Fusion should now react like before, even with the heat cap.
  • Vault controller has been updated to tgui-next.

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Microwaves work again with items that do not have custom materials.

Time-Green updated:

  • Fixes a bunch of plumbing bugs
  • Moves the plumbing RCD from autolathe to medical protolathe
  • You can now built plumbing machines without ducts in-between, if you so wish

Twaticus updated:

  • Various edits to the new plumbing area, abandoned bar, and the surrounding maintenance.

YakiAttaki updated:

  • Added xeno immunity trait
  • made skeletons immune to facehuggers

actioninja updated:

  • Removes a stray 0 in the crayon ui

carlarctg updated:

  • Scientists have been spotted asking coworkers about the whereabouts of their donuts.

carshalash updated:

  • Added Triple sec to margaritas so they taste less awful.
  • Rebalanced certain alcohol values.
  • Changes recipe to fit the other frozen .dm, makes grape snowcone taste less like berry.

nemvar updated:

  • You can now properly apply arguments when adding components/elements via the VV dropdown.
  • You can no longer start a neck slice with an item that does not have any force.

nianjiilical updated:

  • Adds 5 new colored bioluminescence traits for plants.
  • Holy melons, omega weed and moonflower now have colored bioluminescence.
  • Adds a new bioluminescent mutation for cherries.
  • Adds a new bioluminescent mutation for grass, with matching glowing astroturf tiles.
  • Tweaks glowberry and glowcap bioluminescence to be consistent with other types.

qust updated:

  • mining skill doesnt runtime on corpses anymore

stylemistake updated:

  • Lots of code improvements for tgui-next

willox updated:

  • apothecary shutters can be properly controlled with the wall buttons

zxaber updated:

  • Renamed the pump in front of the SM door to "Engine Coolant Bypass" on all maps but Pubby to help make the function of this pump more clear.

18 October 2019

Akrilla & Skoglol updated:

  • Coin press has a fancy new UI, QoL changes, and actually takes in ore/sheets from the right (floor arrows make sense).

Archanial updated:

  • Added new camera to Medbay Surgery B

Firecage updated:

  • The leather crafting menu is no longer blank.

Shadowflame909 updated:

  • Zombie-Powder is now instant upon ingest. Delayed upon touch and injection.

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • You can now pull anything up stairs.
  • Anchored objects no longer fall down openspace.
  • Catwalks block falling when on openspace.
  • Falling on to the SM crystal now dusts you.
  • Falling on groundless turfs no longer damages you.
  • You can use the RCD on openspace now.
  • Gravity generator now affects all station z-levels.

WarlockD updated:

  • Geiger counter will display the correct contamination values now

actioninja updated:

  • Fixed an href exploit related to shuttle docking
  • cargo console should be even more responsive
  • buy privately button on the cargo console properly triggers a ui update

carlarctg updated:

  • The intern that's been injecting Growth Serum into Monkey Energy cans has been fired.

nemvar updated:

  • You can craft with sand and ash again.
  • Soda cans work again
  • The pipes above the new chemistry area on metastation work correctly again.
  • There is no longer a hole into space in meta maint.
  • The plumbing reaction chamber now responds correctly to power changes.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • UI elements that were broken like body selection are now usable again

smallveggiepaws updated:

  • Flamethrowers emit dim light when lit.
  • Lit flamethrowers inhand sprite animated. Smokey.
  • Flamethrowers make a sound when you light/extinguish them.

16 October 2019

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • Fixed seiver removing much more radiation than intended

Fikou updated:

  • you can now mend cavity surgery with an advanced cautery
  • changing mode on power drill now gives you the correct message

Jdawg1290 updated:

  • Non-dense atoms can now obscure (prevent interaction with) turfs.

MadoFrog updated:

  • The shrine maiden's outfit has been added to the costume vendor.

Skoglol updated:

  • The fusion reaction is now soft capped to a temperature of 1e8.

Time-Green updated:

  • Plumbing equipment is now available through the medical protolathe. It's under medical machinery boards
  • Add's a new chemistry area on metastation for chemical factories. It's located left of main surgery.
  • Chemistry has been turned into the Apothecary. It's basically normal chemistry, but Medical Doctors have acces aswell.
  • The smoke machine is now plumbing compatible. Put this knowledge to good use. sprite: Thanks to @CRITAWAKETS for the plumbing RCD sprite!

carlarctg updated:

  • The new carpets now have recipes! Try not to ingest them, as they may have funny effects..
  • oil is flammable

15 October 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • Your wish that the wishgranter grants you can no longer be "To Kill".

AarontheIdiot updated:

  • Mosin Nagant requires two hands now

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • Cargo can now buy portable air pumps and portable scrubbers
  • Iron sheets build the normal metal table again

Fikou updated:

  • shotguns are now "heavy" weight class.

Fox McCloud updated:

  • Fixes spawning process for tendrils and mobs resulting in clumping of lavaland fauna

Jdawg1290 updated:

  • Coronary bypass heart graft can be completed with mechanical pinches properly

Nemvar, Carlarc, and Bobbahbrown updated:

  • reflector vest covers arms, reflect chance from 40 to 50
  • reflector vest has ARM BANDS

ShizCalev, TheMythicGhost updated:

  • Nanotrasen's Department of Supernatural Defense fires the newly built Wave Motion Gun at Reebe, destroying the Clock Cult.
  • After reverse engineering technologies found after the annihilation of Reebe, Bronze chairs now have incorporated Ratvarian A E S T H E T I C auto-spinning technology.
  • Due to the annihilation of Reebe, the clockwork structures and turfs that fell to lavaland alongside Ratvar's corpse have lost their power becoming mere bronze, but the spear seems to have been touched by holy energies.

spessbandit updated:

  • Event announcement code has been slightly refactored.
  • Forcing an ion storm should announce 100% of the time now, instead of 33%.

stylemistake updated:

  • New React-based TGUI, which is INCREDIBLY FAST.
  • New Acclimator interface (@actioninja).
  • New AI Airlock interface (@actioninja).
  • New Air Alarm interface (@stylemistake).
  • New Airlock Electronics interface (@actioninja).
  • New APC interface (@actioninja).
  • New Atmos Alert Console interface (@actioninja).
  • New Atmos Control Console interface (@actioninja).
  • New Atmos Filter interface (@actioninja).
  • New Atmos Mixer interface (@actioninja).
  • New Atmos Pump interface (@actioninja).
  • New Borg Panel interface (@actioninja).
  • New Brig Timer interface (@actioninja).
  • New Bluespace Artillery interface (@actioninja).
  • New Gas Canister interface (@willox).
  • New Cargo interface (@actioninja, @stylemistake).
  • New Cellular Emporium interface for changelings (@actioninja).
  • New CentCom Pod Launcher interface (@actioninja).
  • New Chem Dispenser interface (@stylemistake).
  • New Crayon interface (@actioninja).
  • New Disposal Unit interface (@actioninja).
  • New Thermomachine interface (@willox).
  • New Wires (hacking) interface (@actioninja).
  • Old TGUI interfaces are dynamically loaded if new TGUI interface was not found. This might increase load times while we are undergoing the transition.
  • Scrubber list is more compact, using chemical formula notation for common gases.
  • Slightly more native-looking title bar in new TGUI.
  • Window scrollbars are now themed to match TGUI color scheme.
  • New TGUI hopefully fixes all previous window dragging and resizing issues.
  • Very robust UI development pipeline, with hot module replacement and live log collection.

zxaber updated:

  • The Memento Mori now removes its action button after activation, rather than leaving the button behind as a delayed gatcha suicide ability.

14 October 2019

Firecage updated:

  • All dogs, including pugs, are now capable of eating snacks and dancing around.
  • Puppy Ian is now capable of eating and dancing.

Kaffe-work updated:

  • fixed sprites on guns with both bayonet and toggle-able lights removing the bayonet when toggled.

PKPenguin321 updated:

  • If you somehow manage to get a container into a another container that is smaller than it, like a bag in a box, you're no longer able to put things into that bigger container (such as the bag in the box).

Qustinnus updated:

  • You now get the correct material from deconning tables and chairs
  • Objects now get the correct amount of materials
  • Plasma mat doesn't send warnings on equip
  • Plasma alloys dont explode anymore
  • no more mat duping for now hopefully

13 October 2019

4dplanner updated:

  • shades now heal properly upon re-entering a soulstone (previously they would temporarily heal, then take back all the damage next time they were hit)
  • shades summoned from a soulstone are no longer invincible

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • Added a new condiment, BBQ sauce.
  • Added a new recipe to make BBQ Ribs.

Arkatos updated:

  • Only silicons with a valid PDA will now get PDA-related verbs.
  • You will now only receive positive effects of hearing good music if you can actually hear the music.

Bald People updated:

  • Witch hunter outfits are slightly different. You may notice the difference. Maybe.
  • The centcom armor and old captain armor sprites no longer look like they were poorly recolored. Admins can finally have more options for Centcom now!

Couls updated:

  • blindness spell now only blinds you temporarily
  • drinking carrot juice no longer permanently blinds you

Fikou updated:

  • powertools now change behaviour instead of being completely different items

Fox McCloud updated:

  • Fixes AI swarmers just sitting in their base doing nothing
  • Fixes being able to mech-punch other mobs, as a pacifist
  • Fixes being able to hurt people, as a pacifist, by throwing them into a wall or other mob

Ghommie updated:

  • non-alphanumeric graffiti decals will no longer display as "letter".

MCterra10 updated:

  • Welders now consume fuel when they destroy an object
  • Split personalities can now communicate with an action button
  • The nitryl gas reaction now uses pluoxium as a catalyst

Skoglol updated:

  • Random name/body/age/gender when roundstart antagonist preference added.
  • Random gender will now have a chance of picking "Other".
  • KS13 air tank injector now on and maxed.

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Throwing objects to openspace works correctly.
  • Non-living objects can now go up stairs.
  • You can no longer deepfry openspace.

Toxicby updated:

  • Seiver, a chem favoring radpurging (cold temps) or antitoxin (hot temps) based on temperature (NOTE: NOT ATMOS TEMP)
  • Fiziver is now removed in favore of Seiver. Seiver uses old Fiziver recipe.
  • Multiver is now geared towards chem-purging, and the unique-med mechanic is more rewarding than just amplifying the effects. Lowered toxin damage.
  • Syriniver is now geared towards tox-healing. Lowered chem-purging and make it nondiscriminatory barring itself. Musiver has even lower chem-purging and is completely nondiscriminatory.
  • 2 multiver bottles in the Medivend were replaced with syriniver since they now have more distinct functionalities.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • The maintenance doors to the brig on DonutStation can now be accessed by the security door remote.

carlarctg updated:

  • atmos and captain gas masks no longer have floating pixel
  • sawn off shotgun has inhand
  • singulo hammer is now black

nemvar updated:

  • Removed health analyzers from medkits. Removed the ability to print health analyzers from autolathes.

willox updated:

  • removed duplicate goliath_hide definition

12 October 2019

Anonmare updated:

  • fixes a missing space, allowing Tend wounds (Burn, Exp) to actually unlock properly

Fikou updated:

  • advanced retractor/hemostat description now doesnt mention a hemostat and another hemostat or a retractor

SynnGraffkin updated:

  • CentCom has deemed use of the holodeck's emergency medical module unsafe, as it allows for procedures to be carried out by untrained crew members. If emergency medical procedures are needed, do not tamper with the machines and have your station's AI or cyborgs unlock the safeties.

YPOQ updated:

  • Bubblegum will spawn at the proper rate again

YoYoBatty updated:

  • Frozen water vapour should freeze turfs and contents properly

imsxz updated:

  • turrets are now able to drop guns on deconstruction properly

kingofkosmos updated:

  • The health analyzer's body part damage list is now a bit easier to read.

loserXD updated:

  • being shoved now shows you the correct shover

nemvar updated:

  • You can now crush soda cans on other people.

willox updated:

  • frozen food crafting category is now visible
  • space freezies, sundaes, honkdaes, and icecream sandwiches moved to frozen food crafting category
  • chili and ice chili bounties can now occur
  • removed many duplicate member variables

10 October 2019

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • A medical kiosk now exists in medbay at shift start on all maps.
  • Medical kiosks now have a T2 Upgrade, showing brain traumas and radiation levels.
  • Players can now multitool the kiosk to change the cost to get scanned, up to ludicrous levels.

09 October 2019

Denton updated:

  • Fixed a bug where players were unable to spray/paint over splotches of dark paint.
  • Added an infinite spraycan for admins to spawn.

Fhaxaris updated:

  • You cut slice peoples throats now. Select the head on harm intent while they are sleeping, in critical, or neck grabbed.

Fikou updated:

  • unanchoring/anchoring the grill no longer attacks it once
  • medical wrench now makes you G L O W
  • chainsaw kind of weapons and the mecha drill and the CLAMP can now be used with 100% accuracy for surgery
  • surgery tools now work on defines, and advanced surgery tools now switch the tool behaviours instead of creating new items
  • chaplain things now cover proper stuff

Firecage updated:

  • Rainbow slime extracts, when they have more than one use, are no longer deleted when injected with plasma or slime jelly.

PKPenguin321 and jdawg1290 updated:

  • The chances of failing a surgery step have been changed. Now surgery will go slower the worse the surgery conditions are, capping at 2x the original surgery speed. Any time remaining after capping the surgery speed is converted to the odds of failing the surgery.
  • Example: A surgery takes 10 seconds. In bad conditions, it now takes 30, but we cap it at 20. The 10 seconds lost to the cap become the chance to fail, so it also has a 10% chance of failing.
  • When you fail a surgery, the message you get will be a bit more informative as to your odds of succeeding if you try again.

Qustinnus updated:

  • You can now give your ass acute radiation poisoning
  • floydmats now apply to all objs / items
  • you can now make tables and chairs out of any material
  • beauty no longer runtimes like crazy
  • glass and silver are back to normal values after accidentally changing them

Urumasi updated:

  • Added caps to plastic bottles that prevent spilling when screwed on.
  • Added a relic water bottle to the lavaland chest pool.
  • Reagent fill code has been moved to reagent_containers and made more generic

cynic716 updated:

  • abandoned crates
  • look it's just a big loot table change check the pastebin also I had to define a couple reagent bottles but the compiler didn't scream about it so it should be fine.

py01 updated:

  • Mass-Purrbation now affects mutant species. Nya!

qustinnus updated:

  • protolathe & mech fab no longer applies effects
  • sheets only have 1% of the radioactive power of normal radioactive material

spessbro updated:

  • Removed all reagent container outputs from biogen designs, replaced with reagent designs that feed into the container currently placed in the biogen
  • all plant nutriment produce 30u instead of 50 for the same biomass price

08 October 2019

Mickyan updated:

  • The way mood and sanity is displayed on the HUD has been changed
  • Sanity level will now be displayed by color changes, while facial expression displays current mood
  • Clowns should watch their step around gardening equipment, those rake handles can be unpredictable
  • IV drips can be set to slowly transfer reagents

Skoglol updated:

  • Drones and dextrous guardians can now drop things again.

bandit updated:

  • Nanotrasen has added 0.01% more seasonal charm to their arcade machines.

carlarctg updated:

  • Atmos techs now have their unique gas masks
  • captain does too
  • captain hardsuit finally fireproof if worn with captain gas mask
  • removes useless spare analyzer from atmos locker

07 October 2019

Couls updated:

  • refactored blindness code

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • High amounts of radiation will no longer deal extreme amounts of burn damage.

actioninja updated:

  • New sound effect for table slams and head slams
  • table slams knock down for 3 seconds instead of stunning for 4
  • table slams deal 10 brute and 40 stamina damage.
  • Head slamming: neck grab someone then click a table to smash their head against it, dealing 40 brute to the head and 60 generalized stamina, as well as knocking down for 3 seconds. (stamina doesn't stack with normal damage)

spessbro updated:

  • monkey powder
  • added about section chemical reactions
  • monkey cubes grind into monkey powder
  • gorilla cubes grind into monkey powder and strange reagent

06 October 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • The way that a virus's transmission-based infection vectors are determined has been altered.
  • The sneezing symptom now spreads the virus in a cone, instead of in all directions.
  • The sneezing symptom now has a very special threshold effect that requires the virus to have a stage speed of 17 (yes, 17, not 7) in order for it to be activated.
  • The coughing symptom now spreads the virus in a 1 tile radius square around the host without any thresholds needing to be met.
  • The coughing symptom's resistance 3 threshold (the one that make hosts drop small items) is now a resistance 11 threshold.
  • Other alterations have been made to the thresholds and threshold effects of the sneezing and coughing symptoms.
  • Various descriptions have been updated.
  • The name of the viral DNA activator symptom has been changed to "dormant DNA activator", to avoid confusion with the viral self-adaptation and viral evolutionary acceleration symptoms.
  • The dormant DNA activator symptom now activates as often as it should.

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The Redcoat uniform now has sprites, and can be obtained by washing a denied stamp on an undersuit.

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a case where cleanbot would not clean anything else but trash with a "clean trash" option turned on.
  • Fixed a case where cleanbot would never clean dead mices.
  • Fixed a case where cleanbot could get infinitely stuck in one place when cleaning trash.

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • Fixed typos in ethereal meat taste description and sleeping carp's stomach knee

Denton updated:

  • CRAB-17 will no longer spawn in areas like the solar array or the engine chamber. This should decrease pink Wojak levels considerably.

Fikou updated:

  • meteorslugs now do a teeny tiny stun and a long knockdown instead of stunning for a long time, but do slightly more damage
  • you cant spray through thick clothing anymore
  • some mobs now delete on death
  • soulstones now cant absorb ungodly beings with no SOUL
  • fixes cards against space doing a centcomm instead of centcom

Floyd / Qustinnus updated:

  • You can now appreciate rooms for being very well decorated.

MCterra10 updated:

  • plasmaglass shards now weld into plasmaglass and not regular glass

MacBlaze1 updated:

  • Added Lenturi
  • Adjusted healing of Lenturi to be 3, but you get 1.5 slowdown while the chem is in your system.
  • You get 0.5 stomach damage after the chem leaves your system each time.
  • Removed itchiyuri

Meyhazah updated:

  • New sprite for the space dragon

Skoglol updated:

  • Slight mapping improvement to KS13
  • KS13 now has mother drone board, a dronespeak granter and a drone printer.

Twaticus updated:

  • 8 new carpets and fancy tables
  • exotic carpet crate

Vanadiom updated:

  • Crevice Spike and Franciulli now ACTUALLY sober you up.

actioninja updated:

  • fixed some issues with tgui interfaces regenerating on every click instead of on first open
  • APC UI autoupdates correctly
  • Bluespace Artillery can select targets again
  • Pickup and drop sounds are just under half the volume

and Twaticus for sprites (thank you too tralezab and whoever else helped) updated:

  • Adds the Grill, which can be powered by coal and wood, increases food nutritional value, taste, and adds grill marks.
  • Adds a new drink, Monkey Energy, works as fuel for the grill and increases your speed if you're a monkey, also adds a new reagent, Char, which works the magic in the grill.
  • Coal now turns into CO2 at high temperatures and is now a stack

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Washing a lawyer's jumpsuit with a bluespace crystal or telecrystal will dye the suit into an exciting galactic suit!

carlarctg updated:

  • crayons once again have powder but it doesnt recolor, for your green burger crafting needs
  • halved firefight carry delay with latex or nitrile gloves

04 October 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • The name of the viral DNA activator symptom has been changed to "dormant DNA activator", to avoid confusion with the viral self-adaptation and viral evolutionary acceleration symptoms.
  • The dormant DNA activator symptom now activates as often as it should.

Arkatos updated:

  • Hulk punches will now properly push away cyborgs. Better get out of the way!

Bumtickley00 updated:

  • Cryo cell shortcuts: alt-click toggles the doors, ctrl-click toggles the power

Dawson1917 updated:

  • Secways have less armor and no longer move as fast as running. They're now 25% faster than janicarts.

Firecage updated:

  • Syndicate Medical Cyborgs and Syndicate Saboteur Cyborgs can now receive certain cyborg upgrades which normal Medical Cyborgs and Engineering Cyborgs can receive. The Pinpointer, RPED, Circuit Manipulator, and the Surgical Processor.

Floyd updated:

  • The roulette wheel now understands how power works

Floyd & ActionNinja updated:

  • Some things now make sounds when picked up, thrown, or dropped.

Kerbin-Fiber updated:

  • Changed the Station's Donksoft Toy Vendor with a more station coloured look

Mickyan updated:

  • Dwarves with wings no longer lose the ability to walk over tables by closing their wings

NoxVS updated:

  • New chaplain armor using unused crusader armor

actioninja updated:

  • Cable layers, ctrl click on a cable coil to switch the layer you are placing on
  • Cable bridges can be used to connect layers or connect machines to layers other than yellow

carlarctg updated:

  • Biosuit buff! Biosuits can carry most of what you'd expect them to have (Large tanks, guns and etc for security suits, telescopic baton for CMO suit, cane for plague doctor suit), and they also have less slowdown.

nemvar updated:

  • Removed non functional code that's supposed to make acid reduce armor values.

03 October 2019

stylemistake updated:

  • Fix tgui on IE8 by applying es3ify globally

02 October 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • Click+dragging someone onto yourself while on harm intent as a cyborg should now only search them, not buckle them to yourself (for realsies this time).
  • A bottle of sugar has been added to the roundstart contents of the Virology smartfridge(s).
  • Fixes and moves around some on_stage_change() and Start()-related things for virus symptoms and (sentient) diseases.
  • The inorganic biology symptom should work properly now when bought by a sentient disease.
  • Reagents from plants are now a minimum of 1 instead of hard-adding 1 (now 50% = 50% instead of 51%)

ArcaneMusic updated:

  • The Medical Kiosk is now obtainable from the Biological Technology tech.

Denton updated:

  • Cultists that attempt to use purified soul stones now burn their hands.
  • Cursed Russian revolvers now spawn non-cult soul shards.
  • Chameleon projectors can no longer scan invisible items, like the stealth box or mime spells.
  • Holographic animals can no longer reproduce.
  • Fulton packs no longer try to send people to destroyed beacons.
  • Boxstation: The toxins burn chamber sparkers have been replaced with a floor mounted igniter.

Fikou updated:

  • rainbow bunch reagents are ok again
  • fixes the pulse rifle arcade exploit

GuyonBroadway updated:

  • Turns out making chocolate hot or mixing it with milk does not make it any less lethal to cats.

Irafas updated:

  • Turretid button to toggle borg shooting works
  • Turrets now can shoot borgs when toggled to
  • Turrets use bitflags instead of several vars

Rockdtben updated:

  • Conveyor belts animate again.

Skoglol updated:

  • Replaced portable air mix tanks with standard oxygen tanks.

Urumasi updated:

  • Tweaked and renamed iscatperson() to isfelinid()

kopoba updated:

  • Adamantite shield get his 15 damage back on pickup

nemvar updated:

  • Race changing while from a race with wings to one without them now properly removes the effects.
  • Removing the floor with an RCD now costs mats once again

willox updated:

  • Hacked cargo consoles can sell contraband again

zeroisthebiggay updated:

  • the donut station supermatter engine doesn't delam roundstart.

15 September 2019

4dplanner updated:

  • dead livers no longer runtime

14 September 2019

ATH1909 updated:

  • Changed the default name of /datum/reagent/colorful_reagent/powder to "mundane powder" (from "crayon powder"), to better reflect that it can't color anything (its subtypes still can, of course) and that /datum/reagent/colorful_reagent/powder isn't found in most crayons anymore.
  • Changed the names of the subtypes of /datum/reagent/colorful_reagent/powder so that they no longer mention crayons/"crayon powder".
  • Changes the wordings of the descriptions of /datum/reagent/colorful_reagent/powder and its subtypes to be less weird (and to mention that invisible powder and mundane powder can't color anything). This change should also make the description of mundane powder no longer state that it can color things the "none" color.

ATHATH updated:

  • Omega weed has lost its haloperidol, capsaicin, barber's aid, itching powder, and histamine chemical production traits. In exchange, it's received the nicotine production trait as an additional chemical production trait. The chemical production traits that were in omega weed before this change but were not mentioned in the above list are still in omega weed.
  • The list of chemical production traits of rainbow weed has been changed from 15% mindbreaker toxin and 35% lipolicide to 5% colorful reagent, 3% psicodine, 10% happiness, 10% mindbreaker toxin, and 15% lipolicide. This should make ingesting rainbow weed change your character's color, but should also make 100 potency rainbow weed highly addictive.
  • The extradimensional orange has received the 15% haloperidol chemical production trait that omega weed used to have.
  • The base damage dealt (before modifiers) by stepping on a d4 without shoes on is now 1d4 damage (dropped from just a flat 4 damage).

Dingo-Dongler updated:

  • Slimes and jellypeople pass nanites to their offspring.

Fikou updated:

  • the bone spear is an itty bitty tiny bit stronger

Mickyan updated:

  • Medical staff now spawns with a first aid kit with increased capacity and basic surgery tools
  • Fixes fire extinguisher being able to be emptied from storage slots

qustinnus updated:

  • adds Knight's Armour made out of any materials add; new ruin found in lavaland protected by dark wizards, I wonder what they're guarding

12 September 2019

Arkatos updated:

  • Fixed a bug where refunding Lightning bolt wizard spell did not also remove relevant mob properties connected with the spell.

Fikou updated:

  • the recycler when not emagged wont grind any mobs anymore

Krysonism updated:

  • You can now craft a bronze bust depicting economist Karl Marx.

Twaticus updated:

  • Byond membership ghosts now have directional sprites

actioninja updated:

  • support for equip sounds, with jumpsuits and toolbelts serving as a proof of concept

11 September 2019

4dplanner updated:

  • blood drunk eye slowdown nullification should work properly on the first step now

ATHATH updated:

  • The cooldown time between each removal or addition of a symptom for sentient diseases has been brought down from an agonizingly long 2 minutes to a more reasonable 1 minute.

AdamElTablawy updated:

  • Changeling adrenalin ability now improves stamina regeneration by -10, rather than a measly -1, to reflect stamina based combat

Akrilla updated:

  • Removes flashbang protection from helmets.

Fikou, hippie guys that i stole and modified code from updated:

  • you can now sleep to restore some health

GuyonBroadway updated:

  • Coco now does not force puking on application and causes less disgust but is more aggressive with it's organ damage.

MacBlaze1 updated:

  • fixed turrets firing at silicons constantly
  • fixed turrets shooting at heads when on loyalty check

Mickyan updated:

  • Added inhand sprites for photo albums
  • Fixed a grammar mistake with the photographer quirk's photo albums

Twaticus updated:

  • missing plasma spear inhand
  • plasma spear back sprite
  • inhand megaphone sprites

actioninja updated:

  • Reinforced windows take 9 less seconds total to deconstruct
  • Reinforced windows now have 80 armor instead of 90, which is approximately one minute of sustained beating with a toolbox.

anconfuzedrock updated:

  • The fire axe instakills windows again.

cacogen updated:

  • The font size of all text in the chat window now scales
  • High volume is a slightly smaller
  • Admins have slightly larger OOC text

kevinz000 updated:

  • vv renaming is fixed.

zxaber updated:

  • Mechs removed from the game via means other than damage no longer leave a wreckage.

10 September 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • The OD effect of the earthsblood chemical now deals no damage before cycle 26, a net 1 point of toxin damage per tick (factoring in the toxin healing from earthsblood's normal effect(s)) from cycles 26 to 100, and a net 3 points of toxin damage per tick (factoring in the toxin healing from earthsblood's normal effect(s)) after cycle 100.
  • The pacifism trauma application part of OD effect of the earthsblood chemical is less shitcode-y now and should now work on monkeys (and other carbons with brains) too (instead of just on humans).

Anarcho-Capitalistabital-by updated:

  • In General, Buffs healing thoroughput of C2s. You can stop paying your cloners overtime now!
  • The roundstart C2 methods are now diluted with a new reagent, Granibitaluri.
  • The borghypo now can switch to "microdosing", which is 2u transfer via AltClick
  • Granibitaluri is a C3 (no downside!!!) that tops off your brute THEN burn damage if they are at or below 10 damage.

Denton updated:

  • Killer tomato activations are now logged in the game log.

Detective-Google updated:

  • the syndicate now stock a chameleon kit in their dropship.
  • someone fumbled the stetchkin in the caravan ambush in shipping.

Dingo-Dongler updated:

  • Fixes uranium/holy water and small plasma activation of self-sustaining rainbow slime extracts
  • injecting blue slime extracts with water now creates foam, not fluorosurfactant

ExcessiveUseOfCobblestone updated:

  • Plasma now "boils" at 50C. This means you will need to heat the liquid form up to make it into a gas (previously you could just splash it)
  • containers that halt reactions (IE cryostasis beakers) will keep reagents at a set temperature.
  • Plasma will no longer summon gas whenever transferring via syringe. AKA you can now do xenobio again.
  • Plasma can no longer be cheesed grenade-style by heating the beaker. It will now require reaction/pyrotechnics.
  • Reagents now have the framework to perform different effects on temperature change.

Floyd / Qustinnus updated:

  • The science department now gets a mood bonus for petting borgs.

MacBlaze1 updated:

  • increased volume of pepper sprays to 50
  • adds knockdown of 3 second for no protection, 3 for no mouth protection
  • Changes bluring and blindness of eyes
  • Replaces Paralysis with blind
  • vastly decreased the scope of pepperspray protection.
  • New variable for pepperspray protection, PEPPERPROOF, decides if you can be pepperproof with certain equipment
  • Rebalanced Gygax part diamond cost numbers to be the same but now in gold AND silver.

Medbotby updated:

  • Medbots do not idle while stationary because they see a hot babe across the medbay
  • Medbots do not take you down with them upon deletion, resulting in no heals from the little buggers for the rest of the round

Mickyan updated:

  • Photos stored in photo albums will no longer occasionally be destroyed by explosions
  • Added new floor line decals for mappers to decorate the station

Quartich updated:

  • Adds a new event to the Orion Trail - Old Ship

ShizCalev updated:

  • Fixed DNA scanners breaking if you spammed the print injector button during it's cooldown.
  • Crab rangoons are no longer invisible.

Skoglol updated:

  • Stam crit made more reliable against stamina regen drugs. Upon first entering stam crit, some extra stamina damage will be applied.
  • Unblocked donutstation incinterator door.

SpaceManiac updated:

  • Clicking "increase line height" once will no longer forever ruin the chat for Wine users.

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Dynamic now loads server specific configurations from a defined configuration file.
  • Antagonist preferences and bans work correctly again in dynamic.
  • DYNAMIC_CONFIG_ENABLED has been added to game_options.

Tlaltecuhtli updated:

  • Loading items into the custom vending machine is possible again.

Trilbyspaceclone updated:

  • Cakes/Tarts/book
  • new cake/tarts/books sprites

Twaticus updated:

  • Blackberry Strawberry cake slices now have an icon
  • inhand wood sprite

actioninja updated:

  • fixed an issue where the random jumpsuits was occasionally rolling an invalid item resulting in a broken item
  • fixed the generic red suit not having correct icons

bgobandit updated:

  • Nanotrasen has approved a new bar concept The Goose.

cacogen updated:

  • Can lock attributes on character creation (e.g. hair style, eye color) screen so when character is randomised on the screen using "Random Body" or spawns randomised using "Always Random Body" they stay the same
  • Removed random name enforcement when using "Always Random Species" as it discourages its use and manually chosen species don't have this naming restriction
  • Having "Always Random Body" on on the character creation screen won't constantly refresh your character anytime you change an attribute. Same for "Always Random Name" for your name and "Always Random Species" for your species.
  • Can selectively spawn with random gender, age, backpack style, jumpsuit style (i.e. suit or skirt), maybe a couple of other shits I forgot that weren't previously affected by "Always Random Body"
  • Changed all instances of the word hairstyle as multiple words in the code to a single word due to autism and because I think it's more intuitive as a coder for the word to be spelled properly
  • Adds defines for all randomisable features
  • Changes/shortens some character creation variables for clarity and ease of repetition
  • The existing "Always Random" stuff is now part of a list that covers all randomisation
  • Fixes chameleon ID card job overlays not showing up after selecting an ID that doesn't use them
  • You can reset (delete) the forged name/assignment on an ID so you can chameleon change to IDs with a generic name instead (e.g. captain's spare ID).

carlarctg updated:

  • halved syndicate combat defib recharge time
  • it also has new sprites

nemvar updated:

  • Various morph fixes.
  • Changelings can perform other alt click actions while having a sting collected once again.

wesoda25 updated:

  • Flashbangs now stun for 1/10 of their former duration, with a knockdown as long as the old stun.

zxaber updated:

  • Strafe mode now works correctly on Honk and Odysseus mechs
  • Odysseus and Gygax mechs can now move and turn in one step if they're not set to strafe mode. This can be overridden with Alt to turn in place.

06 September 2019

ATHATH and ExcessiveUseOfCobblestone updated:

  • Earthsblood's healing has been changed; its burn and brute healing rates have been increased, but its oxygen, stamina and clone healing rates have been lowered.
  • Earthsblood heals you less before its 26th cycle in you, but also deals less brain damage to you before its 26th cycle in you as well.
  • Earthsblood now gives you the pacifism trait temporarily while it is in your system.
  • If you are a human, the earthsblood overdose effect now, in addition to its previous effects, gives you a pacifism brain trauma with a resilience of TRAUMA_RESILIENCE_SURGERY. If you already had a pacifism brain trauma with a resilience of TRAUMA_RESILIENCE_BASIC (for some reason), it will increase the resilience of that brain trauma to TRAUMA_RESILIENCE_SURGERY. This pacifism brain trauma is NOT taken away when the earthsblood chem leaves your system.
  • After its 25th cycle in you, earthsblood has a 10% chance per tick of on_mob_life to make you say a random hippie-related message.

Dawson1917 updated:

  • Tweaked combat glove descriptions to more clearly state that they're shockproof.

Fhaxaris updated:

  • cybernetic heart will restart after 20 seconds instead of stopping forever
  • cybernetic heart takes damage from emp like other cybernetics
  • heart injects epinephrine on crit instead of unconsciousness

GuyonBroadway updated:

  • Felinids now have a very adverse reaction to chocolate products.
  • You no longer purge your entire system of food in a single puke

Qustinnus updated:

  • you can no longer exploit the pet park for unlimited happiness

plapatin updated:

  • mime's invisible box lasts for twice as long now

zxaber updated:

  • It's no longer possible to pull the Durand shield away from the Durand.

03 September 2019

ATH1909 updated:

  • The regenerative coma symptom has a new resistance 4 threshold effect! Said threshold effect will give hosts of the symptom's virus the TRAIT_STABLECRIT trait if its threshold is met.
  • An obscure, probably never reported before bug that may or may not exist involving sentient diseases and the self-respiration symptom should be fixed now (if it even existed in the first place).

ATHAHTH updated:

  • Androids and synths have been added to the lists of races available from pride mirrors and magic mirrors.

ATHATH updated:

  • The confusion symptom now noticeably confuses you.
  • The confusion symptom's transmission 6 threshold effect now actually affects how much the symptom increases your confused value by (instead of affecting the cap that the symptom can bring it to, which is plenty high enough by default).
  • The dizziness symptom now actually makes you noticeably dizzy (and has a cap for how dizzy it can make you).
  • The dizziness symptom's transmission 6 threshold effect now makes your screen look "druggy" all of the time (only once its virus reaches a high enough stage, of course), instead of only occasionally.
  • The hallucigen symptom's stealth 4 threshold effect now continues to give you positive messages instead of bad ones at stage 5. Before this tweak, meeting that stealth threshold would actually cause bad messages to appear MORE often at stage 5 than if you hadn't met it.
  • Pretty much completely reworked the narcolepsy symptom so that it now uses the "drowsyness" (yes, that's how it's spelled in the code; no, I don't know why it's misspelled like that in the code) status effect instead of a confusing mess of ticking counters that rarely actually put you to sleep.
  • The narcolepsy symptom's transmission 7 threshold effect now only requires transmission 4 no longer causes its virus to occasionally deal negligible amounts of stamina damage. Instead, it now causes the host to periodically yawn, spreading its virus whenever they do so.
  • The narcolepsy symptom's resistance 10 threshold effect is now a stage speed 10 threshold effect.
  • The narcolepsy symptom's activation frequencies have been tweaked a bit to make the symptom less threatening (albeit still quite potent) without its stage speed 10 (formerly a resistance 10) threshold effect.
  • The nacrolepsy symptom now adds 0 to its virus's transmission stat (upped from -4).
  • Fixed a bug that could cause the confusion symptom to lower your confusion value if you had a high confusion value when it activated.

Akrilla updated:

  • Removes crayon eating colour changes from the crayons in crayon packs. Rainbow/mime unaffected.
  • Sprays cans have a cap on how dark you can make objects. Art is uneffected.

AnturK updated:

  • Voting boxes are now buildable from 15 metal sheets.

Dingo-Dongler updated:

  • Some foods can now be dunked in drinks. Dip your breakfast donut in some robust coffee today!

Fhaxaris updated:

  • riot darts now do stamina damage again
  • removed duplicate code

Fikou updated:

  • You can now create snow golems! They have ice powers, but take more damage from burns, heat and fire.
  • The Chaplain and Geneticst now have family heirlooms, forgotten no longer!

Skoglol updated:

  • Removed the static spawn maint sunglasses from metastation.
  • Pulling a locker now slows you down.

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • added passive vent to the arsenal of atmospheric devices.

Time-Green updated:

  • A pill press, reaction chamber and splitter have been added to the not-yet-existing plumbing arsenal.

Trilbyspaceclone updated:

  • Chameleon neckties/cloaks

cacogen updated:

  • Updated changelog header
  • Made Pax chems' descriptions read better

nemvar updated:

  • refactored digital camo into an element.
  • Antiglow now properly antiglows.
  • You can now mix antiglow
  • Glowy now glowies correctly.
  • AIs can track people again.

qustinnus updated:

  • missing techpriest icon added

zxaber updated:

  • fixed being able to Convert a Ripley MK-I to MK-II without a battery and breaking things.

02 September 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • Made the alkali perspiration symptom's water reaction explosion effect much easier to proc.
  • The alkali perspiration symptom's stage speed 8 threshold effect now also increases the potency of the explosion effect to a "heavy" level on the host's tile, in addition to its previous effect(s).
  • The alkali perspiration symptom's water reaction explosion effect can now occur in both stage 4 and in stage 5 (instead of only in stage 5).
  • Fixes a bug that would cause the alkali perspiration symptom's water reaction explosion effect to trigger the alkali perspiration symptom's Alkali_fire_stage_5() effect a second time in a single cycle.
  • Slightly modifies the alkali perspiration symptom's threshold effect descriptions to be slightly more clear about what its threshold effects actually do.
  • The Mutate spell's effects are now permanent (until/unless you forget or otherwise lose the spell) if you purchase it five times.
  • The Soul Tap spell now costs 1 wizard point instead of 3.
  • Nars-Ians no longer eat each other's souls
  • The chance per tick of Life() that Nars-Ian will try to eat the soul of another pet near it has been increased from 5% to 100%.
  • When Nars-Ian eats a pet's soul, they will now set that pet's hasSoul value to FALSE.
  • Added another comma to one of Ian's possible descriptions.

Akrilla updated:

  • Boxing glove knockouts only affect other boxing glove wearers.

Cobby updated:

  • Operating computers can now be built to sync with all nearby stasis beds within it's LoS and provide them with advanced surgeries.

Dawson1917 updated:

  • ED-209's will retaliate when you throw things at them.
  • ED-209's no longer take damage from electricity.

Fikou updated:

  • the windup toolbox now has some more "realistic" sounds
  • the windup toolbox now rumbles again
  • all borgs now have fire extinguishers

Kurgis updated:

  • Beepsky now bumps around on its wheels when patrolling for crime.

TheChosenEvilOne updated:

  • Motorized wheelchairs.

Time-Green updated:

  • Adds advanced DNA injectors to genetics. You can now put multiple mutations in an injector

Touches Medbay... Again... updated:

  • Keep their pants on! Now Tend Wounds can be done through clothing!
  • It is less effective to perform Tend Wounds with clothes on.

actioninja updated:

  • changeling and chameleon should properly copy mob overlays again.
  • prison jumpsuit has correct sprite

bgobandit updated:

  • Graffiti by a non-tagger counts as bad art.

bobbahbrown updated:

  • Dynamic mode ruleset will now respect your player preferences when selecting antag candidates
  • Fixed 9 instances of incorrect not-in-list expressions.

cacogen updated:

  • HoP can now delete the latest ticket
  • HoP ticket messages should now be visible when the ticket is held
  • Added condiment bottle reagent overlays for reagents without special bottle sprites
  • Made it so you can rename or change the description of condiment bottles with a pen
  • You can no longer tell the main or only reagent in a condiment bottle through the description. This is in line with other reagent containers.
  • Fixed some typos/punched descriptions up a little
  • Sprites of roundstart condiment containers (e.g. salt, milk, flour) are no longer static and change based on the reagent with the largest volume as well now
  • Sugar comes in a bag rather than a bottle
  • Bottles will turn into flour, rice, milk or soymilk containers if they are the largest reagent in them
  • Condiment packs exist again

nemvar updated:

  • All mobs can now switch hands with middle click. This mostly affects gorillas, dexterous stands and monky.
  • Ling sting code has been migrated over to signals.

wesoda25 updated:

  • Purified Artificers description no longer mentions Nar'sie

30 August 2019

Fikou updated:

  • people turned highlanders now turn human too

Lett1 updated:

  • Genetics has discovered a new mutation: Autotomy!

Skoglol updated:

  • Toxins and incinerator burn chambers on all maps now has a console which allows you to read off gas mixture inside.
  • Toxins and incinerator have been remapped slightly on some maps to fit the new computer. Some welder/water tanks are gone, added another radsuit on box and meta.
  • Incinerator outputs have had the space pump and injector maxed.
  • The incinerator plasma tanks have been rotated on some maps. Notably, box station' no longer outputs into a wall.
  • Xenobiology now has two droppers.

actioninja updated:

  • Pubby SM no longer has a spot where the cooling loop mistakenly links to distro

bgobandit updated:

  • You can no longer give the AI laws containing words in the game's chat filter.

nemvar updated:

  • A new mutation. Anti-Glow. Same as Glowy only the exact opposite
  • Pets that nuzzle people no longer nuzzle themselves.
  • You can fix internal control damage for mechs again.
  • Trays now scatter their contents when used for attacks, like they are supposed to.

29 August 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • The toxin healing from the fiziver chem has been brought down to a much more sane level and metabs 25% as fast as previous.
  • The fiziver chem's damage-multiplying effect now gains potency at a much faster rate (under most normal/sane circumstances), but caps out at making you take 3x as much brute, burn, oxygen, and stamina damage as you normally would.
  • The fiziver chem now properly undoes its modifications to the stamina_mod value. Before this change, taking a 10u pill of fiziver could render your body over 2.5x as vulnerable to stamina damage for the rest of the round.
  • The fiziver chem's overdose effect is no longer incredibly pathetic. Instead of dealing a pitiful amount of damage and then completely purging the fiziver chem from your system, the fiziver chem's overdose effect now has a 50% chance each tick to deal 0.2 brute damage and 0.2 burn damage (which will, of course, be amplified by the normal damage-increasing effect of fivizer).

ATHATH and glubtok (mostly glubtok) updated:

  • The plasma fixation symptom now correctly/actually heals you while you are standing in visible amounts of plasma gas.

Akrilla updated:

  • Stun baton's delayed stun is now a delayed knockdown of five seconds applied after 2 seconds, with the slowdown still remaining.
  • The confusion effect given by the baton is very slightly increased.
  • Adrenels and stimpacks has the same interaction with batons that pump-up does.

Fikou updated:

  • hulks no longer slow from damage
  • the rest of the helmets i could find now share the same armor as their suit counterparts
  • the flagellant hood (the head part) now has 0 armor instead of negative

JJRcop updated:

  • Organic Slurry reduces back to welder fuel if not consumed by the affected mob.

MacBlaze1 updated:

  • Changed the eye damage of aiuri to .25 from 1, does not change healing.
  • Changed toxin conversion of instabitaluri to 66% from 75%, does not buff healing.
  • Changed eye damage giving rate of aiuri and toxin conversion of instabitaluri

Shirbu updated:

  • replaces Sanguibital's bleed rate stacks with bleed damage instead

bandit updated:

  • Fixed an erroneous message with ignoring a player's OOC messages.

carlarctg updated:

  • photo albums are now small-sized!

nemvar updated:

  • Replaced the agent in the BVAK injector with a fungal TB vaccine.

penterwast updated:

  • Purifying a soul stone now deconverts cultists inside of it.

stylemistake updated:

  • fixed wonky window dragging when using fancy tgui in some special cases

zxaber updated:

  • Borgs can now examine their hypospray tool to get a summery of the currently loaded chem's effects.

27 August 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • The "yuck" chem now only starts to purge itself once you start stun-vomiting.

MMMiracles (Donutstation) updated:

  • The southern/north-west parts of maintenance has been revamped to include more things to dig through and places to hide from authority.
  • The atmos tanks have had an extra layer of space added between the windows between them and maintenance.
  • The permabrig has had a small B-ball court added as well as an N2O release system.
  • Tweaks and additions to the various department excess storage rooms through-out maintenance.
  • The AI core now has a more proper internal defense against ranged attacks, the tri-ai spawns have gotten similar treatment as well.
  • The few maintenance-facing windows have been beefed up to their stronger plasma variants.
  • More directional signs to help those in finding some departments.

RandolfTheMeh updated:

  • Cybernetic and Upgraded Cybernetic ears, which are hardier versions of normal ears. Regular ones reduce deafness/damage by 10%, and upgraded ones reduce deafness/damage by 50% but cost more resources.

Skoglol & Naloac updated:

  • Make Kosmicheskaya Stantsiya 13 great again! No I mean it, go do it. The derelict has gotten a slight overhaul, and it is now more feasible.
  • Derelict drones has had their laws laxed slightly while on the derelict. It should now be harder to be forced into breaking them.
  • Drone shells are now mob spawners and show up in the ghost spawner window.

actioninja updated:

  • Washing machines now support arbitrary dye color
  • Washing machines now dye nearly every item.
  • lots of backend changes to clothing overlays, report any issues
  • new station ship ambience

bandit updated:

  • Medical scanners now have animated sprites. Thanks Michiyamenotehifunana of Polaris.

cacogen updated:

  • You can pick up plant gene disks with plant bags now. Useful for filling the disk compartmentaliser quickly.

carlarctg updated:

  • syndicate shielded hardsuit's blue shield has been replaced with a red one

giygaslittlehelper updated:

  • Crabs have their own meat and recipes!

nicbn updated:

  • New sounds for crates and closets.

redmoogle updated:

  • Fixes pipe sprite issues with layering

25 August 2019

actioninja updated:

  • replaced the pubby outlet injector with the correct type so it expels gasses at the correct rate

24 August 2019

ATHATH updated:

  • Adds a Morrowind reference that occurs if you try to kill a divine plushie.
  • Moved the robotic voiceboxes from the contraband section of the mostly-unused RoboTech vending machine to the contraband section of the RoboDrobe vending machine. Unfortunately, this meant that the price of techpriest robes had to be increased.

Akrilla updated:

  • Money bags can be unloaded straight into ID cards.

Fikou updated:

  • Adds a new null rod option, the ancient spear.

MacBlaze1 updated:

  • New explosion for the strength of 1 and above, weaker than the maximum explosion right now.
  • Made strength 2 the threshold for the maximum explosion for single tanks.

Mickyan, actioninja updated:

  • Skateboards have received a substantial overhaul
  • Bumping into objects will no longer instantly throw you off the skateboard, instead it will cause knockback and a severe amount of stamina damage.
  • Added ollies! Land on a table to do a sick grind! Both actions consume a moderate amount of stamina.
  • Added skateboard jump and roll sounds by actioninja
  • Performing tricks or bumping into things at low stamina will still make you fly off the skateboard!
  • New board types are available at the library's games vendor
  • Skateboard speed can no longer be adjusted

Wjohnston sprites and Mey Ha Zah for some help getting those sprites into a sane form updated:

  • the flight potion now works with lizards

cacogen updated:

  • Canadian father figure expresses his disappointment with recent events

carlarctg updated:

  • traitor stimulants syringe is now traitor stimulants medipen, no changes otherwise

loserXD updated:

  • add/remove mutations in VV dropdown menu

nemvar updated:

  • The sonic jackhammer can no longer destroy walls.
