  • Tesla movement is now completely random.
  • Clock Cult mode will no longer end if all the cultists die. The round will not end until the Ark is destroyed or completed.
  • Chain reactions between explosives will now properly trigger explosives located in an individual's bag.
  • The wrench-anchoring time of the smoke machine is now doubled to 4 seconds.
  • Smoke Machine smoke is now transparent.
  • The smoke machine has taken its rightful place in the chemist's office.
  • Smoke machine will no longer operate while moving/unanchored.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Nanotrasen brand "Box" model stations have received approval from CentCom to be retrofitted with the latest in Xenobiology equipment. You will now find a chemmaster, a chemical dispenser, and a dropper within the Research Division's Xenobiology lab.
  • C4 will no longer appear underneath objects on walls.
  • Plastic explosives will no longer be invisible after being planted.
  • The security bombsuit's sprite has been updated!

SpaceManiac updated:

  • Grammar when examining objects has been improved.
  • AI eye camera static is now correctly positioned on Lavaland.
  • Fixed many instances of "the the" when interacting with objects.
  • The tracking implant locator now works on the station again.

WJohn updated:

  • An old cruiser class vessel has resiliently stuck around, and may do so for the foreseeable future.

WJohnston updated:

  • Due to age, the abandoned ship's engines are now considerably slower when bringing it place to place. This does however mean that the ship now has a more gradual takeoff, with no sudden jolt to knock passengers off their feet.
  • Black carpets no longer have an ugly periodic black line in them. Regular catwalks are now totally opaque so you won't accidentally click on space when trying to place wires or tiles on them.
  • Boxstation's guitar white ship is no more.
  • Metastation's white ship stands in its place!
  • Metastation's white ship has a couple of weak laser turrets to protect the cockpit from space carp.
  • Boxstation and metastation now have some plating under the grilles near the AI sat's transit tube to prevent players from deleting the tube by landing there.

WJohnston & ninjanomnom updated:

  • Plastitanium walls smooth, fancier syndicate shuttles!
  • Infiltrator shuttles have been moved out of the station maps and made into a multi-area shuttle.
  • Titanium and plastitanium have explosion resistance (requested by Wjohn)

XDTM updated:

  • Blood and vomit pools can now spread the diseases of the mob that made them! Cover your feet properly to avoid infection.
  • Virus severity now changes the color of the disease HUD icon, scaling from green to red to flashing black-red.
  • Contact-based diseases no longer spread by simply standing near other people; it requires interaction like touching or attacking. Bumping against people/swapping with help intent still counts as touching.
  • Advanced viruses now have another infection type, "Fluids"; it's between blood and skin contact, and will only be transmitted through fluid contact.
  • Two "hidden" infection types have been removed. Overall this means that making a virus airborne is a little bit easier.
  • Species who cannot breathe can no longer be infected by breathing.
  • Internals now properly work if set to 0 pressure, and will prevent breathing gas from the external atmosphere.
  • Viral Aggressive Metabolism is now properly inactive when neutered.

Xhuis updated:

  • Cogscarabs can now experiment more freely with base design during non-clockcult rounds with infinite power and the ability to recite scripture!
  • The Ark of the Clockwork Justiciar is now registered as a hostile environment.
  • Clockwork scripture now has one progress bar for the entire recital instead of multiple ones for each sentence in the invocation.
  • Ocular wardens no longer have a burning hatred for revenants and won't attack their corpse endlessly anymore.
  • Stargazers can no longer be built off-station, even in new areas.
  • Integration cogs no longer emit sounds and steam visuals when active.

armie updated:

  • mob spawners are no longer possessable

deathride58 updated:

  • *slap

duncathan updated:

  • Scrubbers and filters no longer allow for infinite pressure in pipes.

improvedname updated:

  • 9mm doesn't longer appear in traitor surplus crates

kevinz000 updated:

  • Flightsuits now allow proper pulling experimental: Moved now has an argument for if it was a regular Move or a forceMove.
  • Instead of dumb sleep()s, follow trails now use SSfastprocess for processing!
  • Mobs now float while flying automatically!
  • Flightsuits can no longer be safely shut off if you're still barreling down the hallway. experimental: Flightsuits should be less shitcode. Hope this PR doesn't blow anything important up!
  • Fixed trying to clear beaker in pandemic when the beaker is already removed causing a runtime.

kingofkosmos updated:

  • Alt-clicking on a computer now ejects the ID card inside it.

nicbn updated:

  • You can now clear bullet holes in walls using a welding tool.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Radiation has been completely overhauled.
  • A new radiation subsystem and spreading mechanics.
  • Walls and other dense objects insulate you from radiation.
  • Geiger counters now store the last burst of radiation so you can view it at your leisure or show it to someone. Examine it.
  • Geiger counters can check mobs for contaminated objects. Scan yourself before you leave to make sure you aren't carrying dangerous radioactive items.
  • Geiger counters have realistic sounds and the radiation pulse spam in chat has been replaced.
  • Radiation is more deadly and causes burns at high intensities, WEAR YOUR RADSUITS.
  • However residue radiation is far slower acting and kills you with toxin.
  • Engineering holosigns have a light amount of radiation insulation.
  • Rad collectors are nerfed. No more supercharging with pressurized plasma. No more collector spam either.
  • Engine output is a lot more stable as a result of collector changes.
  • Monkeys need more rads and take more time to turn into gorillas.
  • Over 100% on the DNA computer means your subject is now taking damage.
  • The asteroid escape shuttle has no stabilizers and throws you around when it moves
  • Shuttles no longer rotate ghosts of players who prefer directionless sprites
  • 2 Years later and cameras work on shuttles now, probably.
  • Buckled mobs when on a rotating shuttle should now rotate correctly
  • Fixes shuttles gibbing in supposedly safe areas
  • Mobs that didn't move during shuttle launch would not have their parallax updated. This is fixed now.
  • The custom shuttle placement highlight now works for multi area shuttles.
  • Directional windows shouldn't leak air anymore
  • Windows only block air while anchored
  • Fixes camera mobs being considered a target by radiation
  • Cables can no longer be contaminated as well
  • Buffs radiation cleansing chems
  • Toxin damage per tick from radiation is halved
  • Contaminated objects keep track of what contaminated them
  • Radiation pulses over 3000 are logged now

spessmenart updated:

  • The captains sabre no longer looks like a rapier.

07 October 2017

Antur updated:

  • Liches will no longer lose their spells when reviving.

AnturK updated:

  • Wigs are now available in AutoDrobe

Cobby updated:

  • Players will now be notified automatically when an admin resolves their ahelp.

Cyberboss updated:

  • The shuttle may now be configured to be automatically called if the amount of living crew drops below a certain percentage
  • Fixed a rare case where creating a one tank bomb would result in a broken object
  • Fixed many cases where forced item drops could be avoided by not having an item in your active hand

DaxDupont updated:

  • No more roundstart tips about gangs. You can finally start to forget gangs ever existed.

Incoming5643 updated:

  • The rarely utilized secret satchel item persistence system has been fixed and made more lenient.
  • In case you forgot how it works: if you find or buy secret satchels, put an item in them, and then bury them under tiles on the station you or someone else can find them again in a future round with the item still there! Free satchels can often be found hiding around the station, so get to burying!

JJRcop updated:

  • Hosts can now lock config options with the @ prefix. This prevents admins from editing the option in-game.
  • Admin volume slider moved to its own menu for better visibility.

Joan updated:

  • Fixes Vanguard never stunning for more than 2 seconds.
  • Ocular Warden base damage per second changed from 12.5 to 15.
  • Ocular Wardens no longer count themselves when checking for dense objects, which decreased their overall damage by 15%.
  • Ocular Wardens now only reduce their damage by 10% per dense object, and only do so once per turf. However, dense turfs now reduce their damage with the same 10% penalty.

Kerbin-Fiber updated:

  • Wood is no longer invisible

Kor updated:

  • Nightmares now have mutant hearts and brains, with their own special properties when consumed or implanted in mobs. Experiment!
  • You can now tell when someone is in soft crit by examining them.
  • Nightmares now have a chance to spawn via event.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Fixes cogscarab sprites not updating
  • Blobs now take damage from particle accelerators

MrDoomBringer updated:

  • Nanotrasen, as part of their new Employee Retention program, has encouraged more station point-makery by adding the "Cargo Tech of the Shift"! The award is located in a lockbox in the Quartermaster's locker.

MrStonedOne updated:

  • The MC will now reduce tick rate during high populations to keep it from fighting with byond for processing time.
  • Added config options to control MC tick rate
  • Admins can no longer manually control the mc's tick rate by editing the MC's processing value, instead you will have to edit the config datum's values for high/low pop tick rates.

Naksu updated:

  • Removed some of the free lag
  • Updates to station name are now reflected on Cargo's stock exchange computers.
  • Gutlunches will now once again look for gibs to eat.
  • Bees now come with reduced amounts of free lag
  • Pyrosium and cryostylane now react at ludicrous speeds.
  • Made atmos tiny bit faster
  • Tweaks to atmos performance

Qbopper updated:

  • Moved a locker blocking an airlock in Toxins maintenance.

RandomMarine updated:

  • Simple mobs should no longer experience severe hud/lighting glitches when reconnecting.

Robustin updated:

  • Blood cultists can now create a unique bastard sword at their forge
  • Blood cultists can no longer obtain a hardsuit from the forge
  • Emotes (e.g. spinning and flipping) will now properly check for consciousness, restraints, etc. when appropriate.
  • The Cult's bastard sword should now properly store souls and create constructs.
  • Neutering a disease symptom now produces a unique ID that will ensure the PANDEMIC machine copies it properly.

ShizCalev updated:

  • You now have to unbuckle a player PRIOR to shaking them up off a bed or resin nest.
  • Wizards will now have the correct name when attacked with Envy's knife!
  • Space ninja energy katanas now make a swish when drawn!

Supermichael777 updated:

  • The detectives gun has been restored from a system change that nerfed knockdown in general. We need to have a serious discussion about anti revolver hate in this community.
  • The PDA default font has been switched from "eye bleed" to old-style monospace. Check your preference.

Thefastfoodguy updated:

  • Silicons can no longer take brain damage
  • Antimatter shielding that can't find a control unit won't delete itself anymore

WJohnston updated:

  • Boxstation and Metastation's white ships now have navigation computers, letting you move them around in the station, deep space, and derelict z levels.

XDTM updated:

  • Added the H.E.C.K. suit, a guaranteed loot frop from Bubblegum.
  • The H.E.C.K. suit is fully fire (and ash) proof, and has very good melee armor.
  • H.E.C.K. suits can also be painted with spraycans, to fully customize your experience.
  • Despite spending centuries inside a demon king, H.E.C.K. suits are most definitely safe.
  • Fixed a bug where Viral Aggressive Metabolism caused viruses to be cured instantly.
  • Fixed a bug where viruses' symptoms would all instantly activate on infection.
  • The CMO now has an advanced health analyzer in his closet! It can give more precise readings on the non-standard damage types.

Xhuis updated:

  • Runed metal and brass are no longer invisible.

Xhuis and Y0SH1_M4S73R updated:

  • Servants of Ratvar now spawn in as the actual race set on their preferences, with plasmamen getting the gear they need to not immediately die.

Y0SH1_M4S73R updated:

  • Gygax overdrive consumes at least 100 power per step

YPOQ updated:

  • Jaunters equipped on the belt slot will save you from chasms again.

kevinz000 updated:

  • Wormhole event wormholes now actually teleport you.
  • portals now actually teleport on click.

kingofkosmos updated:

  • You can now see construction/deconstruction hints when examining airlocks.
  • Beds, chairs, closets, grilles, lattices, catwalks, tables, racks, floors, plating and bookcases now show hints about constructing/deconstructing them.

nicbn updated:

  • Paperwork now uses Markdown instead of BBCode, see the writing help for changes.
  • Changed the drop, throw, pull and resist icons.

29 September 2017

Kor updated:

  • Gunfire can now leave bullet holes/dents in walls. Sprites by JStheguy.

RandomMarine updated:

  • You can now light your cigs with people that are on fire. The surgeon general is spinning in their grave.

Robustin updated:

  • Hacking a secure container with a multitool now takes longer, but no longer has a chance to fail.

XDTM updated:

  • Nurse spiders can now set a directive that will be seen by their spiderlings, when they get controlled by a player.
  • Spiders' actions are now action buttons instead of verbs.
  • Wrapping stuff in a cocoon is now a targeted action!

kevinz000 updated:

  • The syndicate have recently begun sending agents to extract vital research information from Nanotrasen.
  • Timestop fields will now stop thrown objects experimental: Timestops will now be much quicker to react.

kingofkosmos updated:

  • You can now find out if an item uses alt-clicking by examining it.

28 September 2017

RandomMarine updated:

  • Air tanks (o2+n2) now have a different appearance from oxygen tanks.

Robustin updated:

  • Revheads no longer spawn with chameleon glasses or a spraycan, instead they will start with a cybernetic security HUD implanted into their eyes.

Xhuis updated:

  • Ian has recently communed with unspeakable horrors and may now be warped by their power if Nar-Sie passes near them.
  • In order to fight back against their ancient foe Ian, Poly has struck a bargain with Ratvar and will be transformed into a machine by their presence.

Y0SH1_M4S73R updated:

  • AFK players count as dead for the assassinate objective.

27 September 2017

Arianya updated:

  • Lesser ash drakes no longer drop ash drake hide when butchered.

GLA Coding updated:

  • Cells must now be installed in mechs when being constructed, this step is always before the application of internal armor.
  • Combat mechs now get stats upgrades from their scanning modules and capacitors

Improvedname updated:

  • Adds racial equality to color burgers

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Implant Chairs now also support organs

Naksu updated:

  • Fixed jump boots breaking if used when you can't jump, such as when inside a sleeper.
  • Removed meteor-related free lag.
  • Syndicate MMIs will now properly transfer their laws to newly-constructed AIs

Pubby updated:

  • Bluespace pipes to atmospherics, which create a single pipenet with all bluespace pipes in existence.

23 September 2017

Armhulen updated:

  • Rare Spider Variants have arrived! Every spiderling has a rare chance of growing up to a rare version of their original spider type!
  • Special thanks to Onule for the sprites, you're the best!

JJRcop updated:

  • Suiciding with a ballistic gun now actually blows your brain out.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Taking the beaker out of a cryotube now tries to put it into your hand
  • Removed some spawn()s from secbot code
  • Using a soulstone on somebody now transfers your languages to the shade
  • Zombies now stay dead if they suicide
  • If a zombie suicides, they now rip their head off!
  • pAIs now transfer their languages to bots
  • Support Holoparasites must be manifested to heal

Robustin updated:

  • A zombie's automatic self-healing is stopped for 6 seconds after taking damage.
  • Deconverted revs will now always get a message, logs will now include more details.

YPOQ updated:

  • Pet persistence works again

22 September 2017

AutomaticFrenzy updated:

  • Mice spawning finds the station z level properly

CPTANT updated:

  • Knockdown and unconcious now let you regenerate stamina damage.
  • Sleeping regenerates more stamina damage.

Naksu updated:

  • Admin ghosts can no longer unintentionally make a mess of things.

20 September 2017

PopNotes updated:

  • Airlocks animate faster. This doesn't change the time it takes to pass through an airlock, but it does visually match up much better so you don't just appear to glide through the airlock while it's half-open.

Pubby updated:

  • Atmos pipenets are less glitchy

TehZombehz updated:

  • Several new plushie dolls are now available in toy crates.

18 September 2017

More Robust Than you updated:

  • Blobbernauts are healed quicker by cores and nodes

Naksu updated:

  • OOC for dead people is now (re-)enabled at round-end
  • Fixed chemfridges being unable to display items with dots in their name

Pubby updated:

  • Traitorbro gamemode

Supermichael777 updated:

  • Airlocks now check metal for upgrades using the standard get_amount() proc instead of checking the amount var, this means it is compatible with cyborgs.

TungstenOxide updated:

  • Swapped the action of purchasing a pAI software and subtracting the RAM from available pool.

Xhuis updated:

  • Brave Bull now increases your max HP by 10, up from 5.
  • Tequila Sunrise now makes you radiate dim light while it's in your body.
  • Dwarves are now very resistant to the intense alcohol content of the Manly Dorf and can freely quaff them without too much worry.
  • Bloody Mary now restores lost blood.

16 September 2017

Basilman updated:

  • Gondolas are now procedural generated.

Mey-Ha-Zah updated:

  • Updated the knife sprite.

Naksu updated:

  • Evidence bags will no longer show ghosts of items such as primed flashbangs after the flashbang inside explodes
  • Prevents dead monkeys from fleeing their attackers or escaping His Grace only to be eaten again
  • Corgis can no longer be targeted by facehuggers
  • Removed unused vine floors and their sprite.

Robustin updated:

  • Due to budget cuts, airlocks that control access to non-functional maint rooms and other abandoned areas now have a chance to spawn welded, bolted, screwdrivered, or flat out replaced by a wall at roundstart.
  • Dice will now roll when thrown

YPOQ updated:

  • Ninja adrenaline boost removes stamina damage
  • Depowered AIs can no longer use abilities or interact with machinery
  • The doomsday device will again periodically announce the time until its activation
  • Crafting stackable items results in the right stack sizes

14 September 2017

BeeSting12 updated:

  • Deltastation's and Metastation's armory now starts with three riot shotguns!

Fun Police updated:

  • Removed some of the free lag.

Kor updated:

  • It is possible to multitool the cargo computer circuitboard for contraband again

ShizCalev updated:

  • Holding a potted plant will no longer put you above objects on walls.
  • Replaced leftover references to loyalty implants with mindshield implants.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Shuttle transit parallax should be working again

13 September 2017

BeeSting12 updated:

  • The stetchkin APS pistol is smaller.
  • The 9mm pistol magazines can be purchased from nuke op uplinks at two telecrystals each.

Kor updated:

  • Added Nightmares. They're admin only currently, so as usual, make sure to beg admins to be one.
  • The Chaplain may now choose the Unholy Blessing as a null rod skin.

KorPhaeron updated:

  • Added Jacob's ladder to the necropolis chest

Lordpidey updated:

  • Centcom roundstart threat reports are fixed, and can now be used to narrow down the types of threats facing the station.

MrROBUST updated:

  • Mechs now can be connected to atmos ports

VexingRaven updated:

  • Changeling Augmented Eyesight ability now grants flash protection when toggled off
  • Changeling Augmented Eyesight ability can now be toggled properly
  • Changeling Augmented Eyesight ability is properly removed when readapting
  • The syndicate have once again stocked the toy C20r and L6 Saw with riot darts.

Xhuis updated:

  • You can now use metal rods and departmental jumpsuits to craft departments for each banner.
  • The lavaland animal hospital ruin has been remapped, including more supplies as well as light sources.

11 September 2017

Anonmare updated:

  • Altered pressure plate crafting recipe

Basilman updated:

  • A strange asteroid has drifted nearby...

Firecage updated:

  • The NanoTrasen Department for Cybernetics (NDC) would like to announce the creation of Cybernetic Lungs. Both a stock variety to replace traditional stock human lungs in emergencies, and a more enhanced variety allowing greater tolerance of breathing cold air, toxins, and CO2.

JJRcop updated:

  • Admins can now play media content from the web to players.
  • Adds a volume slider for admin midis to the chat options menu.

Jay updated:

  • Goliaths can be butchered again

Joan updated:

  • While below 0 health but above -30 health, you will be able to crawl slowly if not pulled, whisper, hear speech, and see with worsening vision.
  • The previous softcrit got reverted, for changelog context.
  • Standard attacks, such as swords, hulk punches, mech punches, xeno slashes, and slime glomps, will no longer damage clothing.

Kor updated:

  • People in soft crit will take oxyloss more slowly than people in full crit if they remain still.
  • People dragging themselves in critical condition will now leave blood trails. This will rapidly deal oxyloss to you.

MrStonedOne updated:

  • Admins may now show the variables interface to players to help contributors debug their new additions

Naksu updated:

  • Added TGUI interfaces to various smartfridges of different kinds, drying racks and the disk compartmentalizer

Pubby updated:

  • Escape pods and PubbyStation's monastery shuttle are back in commission

Robustin updated:

  • Golem shells no longer fit in standard crew bags.

Supermichael777 updated:

  • Stands now check if their user got queue deleted somehow

VexingRaven updated:

  • Hearty Punch once again pulls people out of crit.

Xhuis updated:

  • Various grammar in the Orion Trail arcade game has been tweaked.
  • You can now kill yourself in fun and creative ways with the hierophant club.
  • Common lavaland mobs now have rare mutations! Keep an eye out for rare Poke- err, monsters.
  • The hand drill and jaws of life now have sprites on the toolbelt.

YPOQ updated:

  • Windoors open when emagged again

as334 updated:

  • Added a mass spectrometer to the detective's closet

basilman updated:

  • penguins may now have shamebreros, noot noot

02 September 2017

Frozenguy5 updated:

  • Added new station prefixes, names and suffixes!

Tortellini Tony updated:

  • Round-end credits can now be toggled on or off in the server game options.

XDTM updated:

  • The Disease Outbreak event now can generate random advanced viruses, with more symptoms and higher level as round time goes on.

01 September 2017

Fury McFlurry updated:

  • Added more halloween costumes.
  • Among them are a lobster suit, a cold villain costume and some gothic clothes

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Finally fucking removed gangs

MrStonedOne updated:

  • Player notes can now be configured to fade out over time to allow admins to quickly see how recent notes are. Server Operators, check the config for more info

Pubby updated:

  • The multiverse sword is toast

YPOQ updated:

  • Pouring radium into a ninja suit restores adrenaline boosts.
  • Adrenaline boost works while unconscious again.
  • Energy nets can be used again!

30 August 2017

CPTANT updated:

  • Hacked AI module cost is reduced to 9TC

Cobby & Cyberboss updated:

  • A stealth option for the traitor microlaser has been added. When used, it adds 30 seconds to the cooldown of the device.

Cyberboss (unwillingly by Kor's hand) updated:

  • You no longer take damage/are as heavily blinded in crit while above -30HP
  • Whispering in crit above -30HP will not cause you to succumb
  • You can now hear in crit above -30HP

Joan updated:

  • Cult blades have updated item and inhand sprites.

Kor updated:

  • Added Shadow Walk, a new form of jaunt that lasts for an unlimited amount of time, but ends if you enter a well lit tile. It is planned for use in a Shadowling rework, but feel free to hassle admins to test it out in the mean time.
  • Slime people can consume meat and dairy again.

Lzimann updated:

  • Ghosts now have a way to see all available ghost roles! Check your ghost tab!

MMMiracles updated:

  • Cerestation has been decommissioned. Nanotrasen apologizes for any spikes of suicidal tendencies, sporadic outbursts of primitive anger, and other issues that may of been caused during the station's run.

Naksu updated:

  • fixed portable chem dispensers charging 50% slower than intended when initialized.
  • fixed portable chem dispensers getting faster charging rate every time refreshparts() is called

Pubby updated:

  • Crew-tracking pinpointers to replace laggy crew monitoring console functionality
  • Crew-tracking pinpointers in medical vendors and the detective's office

RemieRichards updated:

  • AltClick listing now updates instantly on AltClick
  • AltClick listing no longer reveals obscured items

ShizCalev updated:

  • The singularity now poses a threat towards asteroids as well as stations.
  • All power systems will now report their wattage values in Watts, Kilowatts, Megawatts, and Gigawatts. Gone are the days of seeing 48760 W total load when working with an APC!

kingofkosmos updated:

  • You can now unbuckle out a chair/bed by moving.

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Fixed a problem with shuttles being unrepairable under certain circumstances.

26 August 2017

Cyberboss updated:

  • Added the credits roll

Iamgoofball updated:

  • Plasmamen now hallucinate with blackpowder in their system

Joan updated:

  • Geis bindings no longer decay faster if not pulled by a Servant, but last for 20 seconds, from 25.
  • Geis bindings will decay slower when on a Sigil of Submission, and, if being pulled by a Servant when crossing a Sigil of Submission, will helpfully remove the pull.
  • Removing Geis bindings is no longer instant and can be done by any Servant with a slab, not just the initiator.
  • Geis no longer prevents you from taking actions, but you remain unable to recite scripture while the target is bound. In addition, dealing damage to a bound target will cause the bindings to decay much more rapidly.
  • You can now remove sigils by hitting them with a clockwork slab for a small refund.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Lowers the chance for monkeys to become gorillas
  • Holoparasite prompts now have a "Never For This Round" option

Naksu updated:

  • fixed inconsistent grammar between machines that derive from /obj/machinery/chem_dispenser
  • touched up some chat messages to include references to objects instead of "that" or "the machine" etc., also removed references to beakers being loaded in machines that can accept any container

23 August 2017

Cobby updated:

  • Planting kudzu now has a short delay with a visible message to users around you. Hit-N-Run planting is no longer possible.
  • kudzu bluespace mutation and spacewalk mutation are removed.

Cruix updated:

  • The syndicate shuttle now has a navigation computer that allows it to fly to any unoccupied location on the station z-level.

Ergovisavi updated:

  • Slightly increased the radius of the atmos resin launcher, and resin now makes floors unslippery

Pubby updated:

  • Gorillas
  • Irradiating monkeys can now turn them into hostile gorillas

Shadowlight213 updated:

  • The amount of time spent playing, and jobs played are now tracked per player.
  • This tracking can be used as a requirement of playtime to unlock jobs.

ShizCalev updated:

  • Morphlings now have to restore to their original form before taking a new one.
  • Morphlings will no longer have combined object appearances

Supermichael777 updated:

  • Boss tiles have been reconstructed out of an unstoppable force.

TehZombehz updated:

  • Nanotrasen Culinary Division has authorized the construction of pancakes, including blueberry and chocolate chip pancakes. Pancakes can be stacked on top of each other.

19 August 2017

Anonmare updated:

  • Raised airlock deflection by one point

BeeSting12 updated:

  • The meth explosion temperature has been raised.

FrozenGuy5/PraiseRatvar updated:

  • Nerfs L6 SAW Hollow Point Bullets from -10 armour penetration to -60 armour penetration.

Joan updated:

  • Deathsquads no longer get shielded hardsuits.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Blobs can now sense when they're being cuddled!
  • Fixes mining hardsuit heat_protection
  • RCL icons are now better at updating

NewSta updated:

  • Fixes the wiki button
  • Fixes a typo in the wiki button description

XDTM updated:

  • You can now click on symptoms in the Pandemic to see their description and stats

Xhuis updated:

  • The station's explosion now uses a new (or old) sound.
  • Adds smart metal foam, which conforms to area borders and walls. It can be made through chemistry by mixing foaming agent, acetone, and iron.
  • Smart metal foam will create foamed plating on tiles exposed to space. Foamed plating can be struck with floor tiles to turn it into regular plating!
  • The chat message has been removed from *spin. I hope you're happy.

nicbn updated:

  • Nanotrasen redesigned the area power controllers!
  • Thanks Xhuis for the contrast tweak on APCs

14 August 2017

Joan updated:

  • Ported CEV-Eris's APC sprites.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Fixes a typo in the blobbernaut spawn text

WJohnston updated:

  • Adds an ore box and shuttle console to aux bases on all stations.

Xhuis updated:

  • The Resurrect Cultist rune now works as intended.
  • Cyborg energy swords now properly have an icon.

kingofkosmos updated:

  • Canisters don't flash red lights anymore when empty.

13 August 2017

JStheguy updated:

  • Laptops now have actual sprites for using the supermatter monitoring instead of defaulting to a generic one.

Joan updated:

  • Belligerent now has a visible indicator over the caster.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Mulligan and non-continuous completion checks will not consider afk/logged out people to be "living crew".
  • The wiki button now asks what page you want to be taken to
  • His Grace now shows up on the orbit list

Pubby updated:

  • The Curator job is now available on PubbyStation
  • Beekeeping has been added to PubbyStation's monastery
  • PubbyStation's bar has been rearranged

Xhuis updated:

  • Swarmer shells now have ghost notifications again.
  • Minebots no longer lack icons for their action buttons.

kingofkosmos updated:

  • Adds icon_states to the unused and used Eldritch whetstones. Sprites by Fury McFlurry.

06 August 2017

Anonmare updated:

  • Surgical toolarm to protolathe and exofab
  • Toolarm tools are less robust but more efficient at surgery
  • Arm augments are no longer a huge item

AnturK updated:

  • Cyborg remote control range is now limited to 7 tiles.

Ergovisavi updated:

  • Adds the "seedling" planetstation mob to the backend

Floyd updated:

  • No longer does everyone look like a sick, nauseated weirdo!

Galactic Corgi Breeding Mills, LLC updated:

  • Fixed corgis being able to wear spacesuit helmets despite lacking the proper code and sprites for them.

Joan updated:

  • Colossus's shotgun is now a static-spread blast of 6 bolts, making it more predictable.
  • Geis now mutes for 12-14 seconds and "stuns" the target, via a binding effect, for 25 seconds instead of initiating a conversion.
  • Geis's "stun" restrains the target and prevents them from taking actions, but its duration is halved if the binding is not being pulled by a Servant.
  • Using Geis on a target prevents you from taking actions other than attempting to pull the binding. If you are pulling the binding, you can dispel it at any time.
  • As should be obvious, if the binding is destroyed or dispelled, you can once again take normal actions.
  • Sigils of Submission are now permanent and have been moved from the Script tier to the Driver tier, with an according cost adjustment. They still do not penetrate mindshield implants.
  • Removed Taunting Tirade.
  • Removed Sigils of Accession.

Lexorion updated:

  • Hearty Punch has a new, fancier sprite.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • RCL and Ghetto RCLs are no longer invisible
  • RCL action button now has a sprite
  • RCLs can no longer go inside you

XDTM updated:

  • Eyes can now be properly damaged.

Xhuis updated:

  • Removed an improper period from the supermatter sliver theft objective's name.
  • Alien hunters can no longer pounce through shields.
  • Observing mobs that have no HUD will no longer cause intense lighting glare.
  • Objects on shuttles now rotate in the correct directions.
  • The speakers in the ceiling have been upgraded, and many sounds are now less tinny.

Xhuis and oranges updated:

  • Banana cream pies no longer splat when they're caught by someone.
  • Throwing a pie in someone's face now has a splat sound.

kingofkosmos updated:

  • Fixed hair sticking through headgear.

29 July 2017

Fox McCloud updated:

  • Sound should carry further, but should get quieter and quieter the further you are from it

Joan updated:

  • Sigils of Transmission can now drain power in a large area when activated by a Servant.
  • Interdiction Lenses have been removed, as they were largely only used to drain power into Sigils of Transmission.
  • Sigils can no longer directly be removed by Servants.
  • Prolonging Prisms have a higher cost to delay, but no longer increase in cost based off of CV.
  • Base delay cost changed from 2500W to 3000W, cost increase per activation changed from 750W to 1250W, cost increase per 10 CV changed from 75W to 0W.
  • Removed the Volt Blaster scripture.
  • Ratvarian spears can no longer impale.
  • Vitality Matrices now require a flat 150 Vitality to revive Servants, from 20 + the Servant's non-oxygen damage. Vitality Matrices are also no longer destroyed when reviving Servants.
  • Ratvarian spear damage changed from 18 to 20, Ratvarian spears now generate 5 Vitality when attacking living targets. Ratvarian spear armour penetration changed from 0 to 10.
  • The Judicial Visor's mark now immediately applies Belligerent and knocks down for 0.5 seconds. Mark exploding no longer mutes, mark explosion stun changed from 16 seconds to 1.5 seconds, mark explosion damage changed from 10 to 20.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Nanotrasen has begun production of the Rapid Cable Layer, a tool that helps you lay down cables faster
  • You can now craft ghetto RCLs with metal, a screwdriver, welder, and wrench. They hold less cable, and may fall apart or jam!

Xhuis updated:

  • Player-controlled medibots now receive a notice whenever they try to heal someone with too high health.
  • Syringes now properly inject targets wearing thick clothing on different slots.
  • Stun baton overlays now appear on security belts when active.

kevinz000 updated:

  • Badmins: Buildmode map generators have names in the list to select them, instead of paths.
  • Also, a new map generator has been added, repair/reload station. Use it VERY sparingly, it deletes the block of the map and reloads it to roundstart. THIS CAN CAUSE ISSUES WITH MACHINES AND ATMOSPHERICS, SO DO NOT USE IT UNLESS YOU ABSOLUTELY HAVE TO!
  • The reload station one tagged DO NOT USE shouldn't be used as it doesn't delete anything before loading, so if you use it you'll have two copies of things. That can result in a LOT of issues, so don't use it unless you're a codermin and know what you're doing/abusing!

ktccd updated:

  • Ashstorms no longer pierces the protected people to kill anyone/anything in them.

27 July 2017

Anonmare updated:

  • Informs a person about how bomb cores work

BeeSting12 updated:

  • Water bottles from the sustenance vendor are gone. Wait for the ice in the ice cups melt, criminal scum.
  • There is no longer a sink in gulag. Hygiene is for the moral members of society.
  • Janitor and service cyborgs now get pocket fire extinguishers for fire suppression and space propulsion.
  • Pubbystation's dorms now has a dresser.
  • Crafting satchels from leather now makes a leather satchel rather than a regular satchel.

Fox McCloud updated:

  • breathing plasma now causes direct tox damage
  • breathing hot/cold air now warns you when you're doing so, again
  • species heat/cold mod now impacts damage from breathing hot/cold gases

HAL 9000 updated:

  • I'm sorry Dave, I'm afraid I can't do that

JStheguy updated:

  • Resprited the tablet, including completely redone screen sprites.
  • Tablets can now come spawn in one of 5 colors; red, green, yellow, blue, and black.
  • Most alcohol bottles have been resprited, as well as a poster that used one of the current bottles as part of it's design.

Joan updated:

  • Unwrenching clockwork structures no longer damages them.
  • The Hierophant will now release a burst when melee attacking instead of actually hitting its target.
  • The Hierophant Club's blasts will now properly aggro hostile mobs.
  • The blood-drunk miner will fire its KA a bit more often.

PopNotes updated:

  • Nar-Sie now sounds like an eldritch abomination that obliterates worlds instead of a sweet maiden that gently whispers sweet nothings in your ear.

Supermichael777 updated:

  • delayed chloral hydrate actually works now.

Tacolizard updated:

  • Added cybernetic organs to RnD, they can be used to replace organic organs. Remember to administer corazone during implantation though!
  • Added the upgraded cybernetic liver. It is exceptionally robust against toxins and alcohol poisoning.

Xhuis updated:

  • Cyborgs now regenerate oxygen damage.
  • If a cyborg somehow takes toxin damage, it can be healed with cables as though it was burn damage.
  • Picking up ores by walking over them now longer spams messages, instead showing one message per tile of ore picked up.
  • You can now control-click action buttons to lock them and prevent them from being moved. Alt-clicking the "Show/Hide Actions" button will unlock all buttons.
  • There is now a preference for if buttons should be locked by default or not.
  • Pizza box stacks can now fall over
  • Pizza box inhands now stacks depending on how many you're holding.
  • Mining satchels no longer hold infinite amounts of ore.
  • Reviving Stasis now consistently regenerates organs.
  • Medibots now properly render the overlays of the medkits they are made from.
  • The latest batch of Syndicate screwdrivers fell into a vat of paint and were colored randomly. We have rinsed them off and they will no longer come in random colors.
  • Supermatter slivers can now be stolen properly.
  • Whenever you're trying to hack off your own limbs, you'll now always hit those limbs.

Xhuis & MoreRobustThanYou updated:

  • Toolbelts now have overlays for crowbars, wirecutters, screwdrivers, multitools, and wrenches.

Y0SH1_M4S73R updated:

  • Romerol zombies count as dead for assassinate and maroon objectives.

bandit updated:

  • New Cards against Spess cards are available!

ktccd updated:

  • Hijacking should now be possible again!

18 July 2017

BeeSting12 updated:

  • Deltastation's auxiliary storage in arrivals can be accessed by anyone now.
  • Deltastation's cargo bay maintenance can now be accessed by cargo techs.

Dannno/Supermichael777/InsaneHyena updated:

  • You can now pick from a few different styles when augmenting someone with robot parts by putting them in the augment manipulator. Alt+click to take parts out.

Ergovisavi updated:

  • Fixed the refresher variant of the anomalous crystal making holodeck items real

Fox McCloud updated:

  • blood and gibs on turfs can no longer infect nearby people
  • Tuberculosis bypasses species virus immunity (it's not a virus!)
  • Disease and appendicitis events no longer infect clientless mobs
  • Disease event will no longer pick virus immune mobs
  • Appendicitis event will no longer pick mobs without an appendix
  • Fixed changeling panacea curing non-harmful viruses
  • Fixes IV drips not properly injecting the right amount of blood

Joan updated:

  • Removed the Soul Vessel, Cogscarab, and Anima Fragment Scriptures.
  • The Ark of the Clockwork Justicar will still forcibly take up a 3x3 area even if it still needs components to activate.

MrStonedOne & Fox-McCloud updated:

  • Made pathfinding much quicker

NewSta updated:

  • Fixes the maid apron being invisible when in-hand or attached to the maid outfit.

XDTM updated:

  • Viruses and symptoms have been havily reworked.
  • Symptoms now have statistic thresholds, that give them new properties or improve their existing ones if the overall virus statistic is above the threshold. Check the pull request in github or the wiki (soon) for the full list.
  • Some symptoms no longer scale linearly with stats, and instead have thresholds.
  • The symptom limit is now 6.
  • Viruses can no longer be made invisible to the Pandemic
  • Symptoms no longer trigger with a 5% chance every second, but instead have a minimum and maximum number of seconds between each activation, making them more consistent.
  • The symptoms Blood Vomit and Projectile Vomit have been removed, and are now bonuses for the base Vomit symptom.
  • The Weakness symptom has been removed as it was completely useless.
  • The Sensory Destruction symptom has been reworked into Narcolepsy, which causes drowsiness and sleep.
  • Viral Aggressive Metabolism now has a timer before it starts decaying the virus. It scales with the highest between Resistance or Stage Speed.
  • You can now neuter symptoms, making them inactive. They will still affect stats. Adding formaldehyde to a virus will neuter a random symptom. A bottle of formaldehyde starts in the virus fridge.

Xhuis updated:

  • The tachyon-doppler array's rotation now has messages, sprites, and examine text.
  • Time stop is now fixed, finally!
  • Time stop's sound now plays in reverse when the effect ends.
  • Missiles can no longer ricochet off of shuttle walls, etc.
  • Winter coats now hold all flashlights properly, instead of seclites.

Xhuis & Cyberboss updated:

  • New hivebot invasion event

kevinz000 updated:

  • Personal Cabinets now have piano synthesizers for handheld piano playing.
  • Thank @nicbn for the sprites!

ninjanomnom updated:

  • Thank you for updating your ShuttlSoft product! Your last update was -ERROR- years ago. A full changelog can be found at CYG10408.SHSO.b9 along with the EULA. This update lays a foundation for new things to come and a sample in the form of new and improved docking procedures.

shizcalev updated:

  • Cerestation's emergency shuttle autopilot will no longer fly you in reverse back to Centcom!

11 July 2017

RandomMarine updated:

  • Drones can now switch between help and harm intent.

Tacolizard updated:

  • Admins can now set a message/warning when they delay the round end, to be shown to anyone who tries to reboot the world.

Tacolizard and Cyberboss updated:

  • Added two new organs, the liver and stomach. Without them, you won't metabolize chemicals.
  • The liver is responsible for processing all chemicals except nutrients. If your liver is removed, you will be unable to metabolize any drugs and will slowly die of toxin damage.
  • Drinking too much alcohol or having too many toxins in you will damage your liver, if it becomes too damaged, it will undergo liver failure and you will slowly die of toxin damage. Your liver naturally heals a small amount of its damage. However, it doesn't heal enough to offset stronger alcohols or large amounts of toxins, at least until they are metabolized out of your body.
  • to conduct a liver transplant, inject corazone into the patient. Corazone will prevent the patient from taking damage due to either not having a liver or undergoing liver failure. Corazone will metabolize out of the patient quickly, so at least 50u is recommended.
  • The stomach is responsible for metabolizing nutrients. Without a stomach, you will be unable to get fat, but you will also be unable to process any nutrients, meaning you will eventually starve to death.

Xhuis updated:

  • Mobs spawned by Necropolis curses are now immune to chasms.
  • The BoxStation warden's office now has a crew monitoring console.
  • Clockwork slabs now show icons of the components used in scripture instead of initials.

factoryman942 updated:

  • Boxstation Robotics now has 6 flashes, from 2.
  • Metastation Robotics now has 40 sheets of glass, instead of 20.

shizcalev updated:

  • The supermatter reporting system has been updated to report remaining integrity, as opposed to how unstable the SM currently is.

09 July 2017

Crexfu updated:

  • 2 plasma sheets have been added to viro break room on box

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Plasma and Reinforced plasma glass no longer merge with Normal and Reinforced Glass

Xhuis updated:

  • You can no longer catch objects that require two hands at all times with only one hand.

07 July 2017

Ergovisavi updated:

  • Added a recovery window after some variable length megafauna attacks
  • Adds a new mob to the game, the "leaper"
  • Adds another planetstation mob, the "wanderer/mook" to the backend
  • Fixes a problem with player controlled leapers where they occasionally can't fire

Joan updated:

  • Rethemes the ash walker nest to match the Necropolis.
  • Chasms, asteroid turfs, basalt, and lava can no longer be made wet.
  • A strange new Resonant Signal has appeared on lavaland.
  • Dreams while sleeping are now slightly longer on average and will contain more possibilities.
  • Bedsheets may affect what you can dream.

Lexorion updated:

  • The portable PACMAN generators now have new icons, including on and off states.

More Robust Than You updated:

  • Nanotrasen has added lids to their soda that POP! when opened. Up to 3 possible sounds!
  • brain damage should no longer attempt to emote/say things while unconcious

NanoTrasen Smithy Department updated:

  • Tasked by corporate heads to make NanoTrasen's line of captain rapiers flashier, a few brave smiths have managed to forge their steel in a way that enhances their swords' acoustic properties.

Shadowlight213 updated:

  • The majority of the tiny fans on Deltastation have been removed.
  • Airlocks going to space, and secure areas like the bridge and sec on Delta have been given the cycling system.
  • The freedom suit no longer slows you down and can withstand the FIRES OF LIBERTY!

Steelpoint (Ancient Station) updated:

  • Major changes to Ancient Station include new sounds for the prototype RIG hardsuit, the NASA Engineering Voidsuit slowing the user down properly and new insulated gloves in engineering.
  • Several minor changes, such as an extra oxygen tank, spawn in equipment and minor tile changes.

Supermichael777 updated:

  • The AI swap menu is now given to the person with the multi-tool rather than the Borg. Old behavior remains for all non multi-tool sources
  • Borgs and shells now notify when un-linked due to the wire being cut.

Tacolizard updated:

  • Nanotrasen has begun a program to inform the souls of the departed that their hearts can't beat after death.
  • heartbeat noises now loop (i can't come up with any dumb fluff for this one sorry)

That Really Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Martial arts will no longer be transferred in cloning, etc. if they are temporary (i.e. wrestling, krav maga).

Xhuis updated:

  • Recollection has been separated into categories and should be easier to read and more informative.
  • Ratvar has been reminded that he hates Nar-Sie and will now actively pursue fighting her.
  • You can now properly dig out plants from patches of soil.
  • Reskinnable guns no longer become invisible after firing a single shot.
  • The kinetic crusher and other forced two-handed objects can now correctly be stored in a bag of holding.
  • Positronic brains' icons will now properly change depending on status.
  • Positronic brains will now stop searching as soon as they're occupied.
  • Positronic brains now have error messages if activating them fails for whatever reason.
  • Unconscious Servants are now properly informed when they're deconverted.
  • The Voice of God no longer specifically targets creatures like constructs and clockwork marauders.
  • Heartbeat sounds no longer play indefinitely if your body is destroyed.

kevinz000 updated:

  • Headphones have been provided to the station in Autodrobes, mixed wardrobes, and fitness wardrobes. Please use them responsibly, and remember to focus on your job above all else!
  • Headphones fit in head, ears, OR neck slots!

ohnopigeons updated:

  • Nanotrasen Electronics have fixed a bug where issued factory-fresh PDAs did not link to their cartridges, requiring manual reinsertion.

shizcalev updated:

  • Nanotrasen has upgraded the obsolete teleporter consoles on most NT branded stations with newer ones preloaded with the newest Supermatter monitoring application!
  • The supermatter base now has a speaker and will provide audio cues as to it's current status!

somebody updated:

  • Strong plasma glass windows

28 June 2017

Cyberboss updated:

  • Cortical borers have been removed

Shadowlight213 updated:

  • There is now a new monitor program that engineers can use to monitor the supermatter status

Tacolizard updated:

  • NanoTrasen has now outfitted their employees with Extra-Loud(TM) Genetically Modified Hearts! Now you can hear your heart about to explode when the clown shoots you full of meth, or hear it slowly coming to a stop as you bleed out in critical condition after being toolboxed by an unknown gas-mask wearing assistant.

27 June 2017

Ergovisavi updated:

  • Fixed a few anomalous crystal effects
  • Fixes stacking atmos resin objects in a single tile
  • Lasers now go through atmos resin objects

Joan updated:

  • The Necropolis has been rethemed.

Kor updated:

  • Added dash weapons, which let you do a short teleport within line of sight.
  • The ninjas energy katana now lets him dash. He can no longer teleport with right click.
  • Glass shards will no longer hurt people with robotic legs.
  • Mesons work on lavaland again.

Xhuis updated:

  • The names of most glasses, like mesons, t-ray scanners, and night vision goggles, have been lowercased.
  • The thermonocle's description now changes based on the gender of the person examining it.
  • Straight jackets can now properly be put onto others.

drline updated:

  • Nanotrasen finally sent out IT personnel to plug your modular consoles back in. You're welcome.

25 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Adds the skull codpiece, which can be crafted from parts of lavaland monsters.
  • Maid Costume aprons can now be detached and reattached to any uniform.

Improvedname updated:

  • You can now export cat ears/tails for 1000 credits

JJRcop updated:

  • Fixed telekinesis remote item pick up exploit

Kor updated:

  • Robotic legs now let you use pockets without a jumpsuit, and a robot chest now lets you use the belt slot and ID slot without a jumpsuit.

RandomMarine updated:

  • Cargo can now export mechs!

Steelpoint updated:

  • Station Engineers spawn with a Industrial Welder in their toolbelt.
  • Engineering Welder Locker now only holds three standard Welders.
  • An old Nanotrasen Space Station has quietly reawoken its surviving crew one hundred years after they fell to slumber. Can the surviving crew, using old, broken and out of date equipment, overcome all odds and survive, or will the cold embrace of the stars become their new home?
  • Nanotrasens Corps of Engineers has refitted and refurbished NTSS Boxstations Engineering area into, what Centcom believes, a more efficient design.

That Really Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • Added the ability for a holiday to start on the nth weekday of a month.
  • Allahu ackbar! Added the ability to calculate Ramadan.
  • Added Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Ramadan, and Columbus Day to the possible holidays.
  • Fixed nuclear bombs being radioactive.

Xhuis updated:

  • You can now unfasten intercoms from walls and place them elsewhere on the station.
  • Intercom frames can now be created at an autolathe for 75 metal and 25 glass.
  • Nearly-full goliath hide stacks now correctly have a sprite.

23 June 2017

BeeSting12 updated:

  • The clowndagger now has the correct skin.

MrStonedOne updated:

  • Makes old chat show while goonchat loads. Should goonchat fail to load, the old chat will still be operational.

22 June 2017

Bawhoppen updated:

  • Dressers are now constructable, and unanchorable with a wrench.

ClosingBracket updated:

  • Fixes small typographical errors on flight suits and implanters.

Ergovisavi updated:

  • Nanofrost setting and metal foam synthesizer on the Atmos watertank backpack changed to "Resin", which is a solid, but transparent structure similar to metal foam that scrubs the air of toxins, regulates temperature, etc
  • Atmos holobarrier device swapped out for an Atmos holo-firelock device, which creates holographic firelocks that prevent atmospheric changes from going over them

Expletive updated:

  • Flame thrower plasma tanks can be removed with alt-click.

Lordpidey updated:

  • True and arch devils are no longer deaf.
  • Fixed some edge cases with devils getting two sets of spells.
  • True/arch devils can now instabreak cuffs.
  • The codex gigas now indicates if a devil is ascendable or not.
  • Hellfire has been buffed, it now explodes multiple times.

Nanotrasen Robotics Department updated:

  • Traitor AIs' malfunction modules have received a firmware update and are more responsive, with HUD buttons and more sensible menus.
  • Overload and Override Machines now function differently; instead of right-clicking a machine to choose a context menu option, you activate the ability, which lets you left-click on a machine to overload or override it. This also changes your cursor.

Xhuis updated:

  • Alt-clicking the Show/Hide Actions button will now reset the positions of all action buttons.
  • Hints to the two shortcuts for action buttons are now included in the Show/Hide Actions button's tooltip.
  • (As a reminder, that's shift-click to reset the clicked button, and alt-clicking the Show/Hide Actions button to reset it and all the others!)
  • The names of several objects, such as the holopad and biogenerator, have been lowercased.
  • Added some descriptions to a few objects that lacked them.
  • Tablets now have a built-in flashlight! It can even change colors, as long as they're light enough in hue.

bandit updated:

  • Nanotrasen researchers have made the breakthrough discovery that Lavaland's plants are, in fact, plants, and can be harvested with seed extractors.

ohnopigeons updated:

  • After a janitorial audit Nanotrasen has decided to further cut costs by removing the janicart's secret space propulsion functionality

20 June 2017

Bawhoppen updated:

  • Grenade belts and bandoliers will no longer obscure half the screen when they're completely filled.

LanCartwright updated:

  • Removed loot drops from Syndicate Simple mobs.

Tacolizard updated:

  • Some items now have custom force strings in their tooltips.
  • items with no force can still use a custom force string.

Xhuis updated:

  • The station's heaters and freezers have been sternly reprimanded and will now drop the correct circuit boards and cable coils.
  • The straight jacket now takes five seconds to put on.
  • The display cases in luxury shelter capsules will no longer spawn unobtainable, abstract offhand objects.
  • Disablers now have an in-hand sprite.

nicbn updated:

  • Changed cryo sprites to Bay cryopods, which show the person inside of them.

19 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Paper frames can be created using wood and paper, and can be used to create decorative structures.
  • Natural paper can now be crafted
  • KorPhaeron can now start a maid cafe, if they so desire.
  • Thanks to the invention of "Bill slots", vending machines can now accept space cash.
  • The Clown and Mime can now find their unique crayons stored inside their PDAs

LanCartwright updated:

  • 1D4 into Lavaland Mining base crate.

RandomMarine updated:

  • Bonfires now work on lavaland!

Tacolizard updated:

  • Repurposed the action button tooltip code to add tooltips with the examine details of all held and equipped items. Hover your mouse over any item equipped, held or in your inventory to examine it.
  • Examine tooltips can be toggled with the 'toggle-examine-tooltips' verb, which can be typed or accessed from the OOC menu.
  • You can change the delay before a tooltip appears with the 'set-examine-tooltip-delay' verb, also accessible via the OOC menu. The default delay is 500ms.

18 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Stacks of space cash now tell you their total value and their value per bill when you examine them.

RandomMarine updated:

  • Compressed matter cartridge production costs now reflect their material worth at basic efficiency.
  • Compressed matter cartridges can now be exported.

Xhuis updated:

  • Puny windows will no longer stop the progress of Ratvar.

17 June 2017

Cyberboss updated:

  • NT now provides education on the proper response for experiencing the excrutiating pain of varying degree burns (You scream when burning)

Expletive updated:

  • The Captain now starts with a deluxe fountain pen in their PDA.
  • The quartermaster, curator, research director, lawyer, and bartender start with normal fountain pens in their PDAs.
  • Cargo can order fountain pens via the Calligraphy Crate.
  • Nerds on the station will be pleased to know they now have pocket protectors.
  • Cryo cells work properly on mobs with varying max health values.

Joan updated:

  • Cultists must be human to run for Cult Master status.
  • The Hierophant is a little less chaotic and murdery on average.

LanCartwright updated:

  • Penguins, penguin chicks, penguin eggs.
  • Penguin family to Winter Wonderland.

MrStonedOne and Lummox JR updated:

  • Fixed icon scaling and size preferences not loading (Technically size preferences were loading because byond saves that locally, but that's not reliable because ss13 shares a hub)

QualityVan updated:

  • The botany vending machine now has a stock of onion seeds

RandomMarine updated:

  • RCDs now always use matter consistent with the material needed when building.
  • Floors now cost 3 or 1 matter to build, based on if a lattice exists on the tile.
  • Reinforced windows cost 12 matter. Normal windows cost 8 matter. (Both up/down from 10)
  • Glass airlocks cost 20 matter.
  • RCDs are faster at building grilles and plain glass windows.

Steelpoint updated:

  • Slightly reshuffles the Head of Security's, and Research Directors, locker to place fluff items below essential items.

Tacolizard updated:

  • Flashes no longer have a tech requirement

That Really Good Soda Flavor updated:

  • High luminosity eyes will have material science instead of an error research type

Thunder12345 and Improvedname updated:

  • You can now turn severed cat tails and ears into genuine kitty ears
  • Cat tails can now be used to make a cat o' nine tails, similarly to the liz o' nine tails.

Xhuis updated:

  • The names of the hand drill, jaws of life, and emitter are now lowercase.
  • The descriptions of the hand drill, jaws of life, and emitter have been changed to be more descriptive and less lengthy.
  • Tablets with IDs in them now show the ID's name when examining someone with that tablet in their ID slot, similar to a PDA would.

bandit updated:

  • Default short/medium/long brig times are now, in order, 2, 3, and 5 minutes.

14 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • The medalboxes are now fancy.
  • New sprites for opened medal boxes.

Joan updated:

  • Being converted to clockcult will briefly cause your world to turn yellow and you to hear the machines of Reebe, matching the description in the messages.
  • The messages for being converted and for failing conversion to clockcult have been updated.

Tacolizard updated:

  • Flamethrowers no longer say they're being ignited when you extinguish them

13 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Paper planes are now the same color as the paper used to make them.
  • Flashdarks can no longer be used to examine head based organs.

Fox McCloud updated:

  • Tweaked game options animal speed value to match live server

Joan updated:

  • Renamed AI liquid dispensers to foam dispensers.
  • Foam dispensers now activate immediately when clicked, rather than forcing the user to go through a menu. They also have better visual, message, and examine feedback on if they can be activated.

MrStonedOne updated:

  • Added some code to detect the byond bug causing clients to send phantom actions shortly after connection. It will attempt to fix or work around the issue.

Nanotrasen Robotics Department updated:

  • To aid in general-purpose cleaning and maintaining of station faculties, all janitor cyborgs are now outfitted with a screwdriver, crowbar, and floor tile synthesizer.

WJohnston updated:

  • Survival bunker ruin's power now works, mostly.

shizcalev updated:

  • "Radiation immune species are now incompatible with the radiation based genetics DNA scanner/modifier."

11 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Glass tables are shinier

Nanotrasen Consistency Affairs updated:

  • You no longer see yourself in place of the user when examining active Spirit Sight runes.

Shadowlight213 updated:

  • Cloning dismembered heads and brains now respects husking and other clone preventing disabilities.

WJohn updated:

  • It is now easier to wire the powernet into box's telecomms SMES cell.

Xhuis updated:

  • You can now pin papers and photos to airlocks. Anyone examining the airlock from up close can see the details. You can cut them down with wirecutters.

lordpidey updated:

  • Added F.R.A.M.E. cartridge to uplinks. This PDA cartridge contains 5 viruses, which when used will unlock the target's PDA into a syndicate uplink, in addition, you will receive the code needed to unlock the uplink again, if you so desire.
  • If you use telecrystals on a F.R.A.M.E. cartridge, the next time it is used, it will also give those crystals to the target uplink.

octareenroon91 updated:

  • Mecha tools now respond to MMI control signals as intended.

shizcalev updated:

  • "Species immune to radiation are no longer compatible targets of radiation based DNA injectors."
  • "A gun's firing pin will no longer malfunction when placed into your own mouth. Phew!"
  • "Bedsheets capes are now slightly more accurate. Be jealous of the clown and their sexy cape!"

09 June 2017

Nanotrasen Shiny Object Appreciation Club updated:

  • The RD and HoS now receive medal lockboxes in their lockers, containing science and security medals, respectively.

Tacolizard and Cyberboss, idea by RandomMarine updated:

  • You can now add a commendation message when pinning a medal on someone.
  • Medal commendations will be displayed when the round ends.
  • Refactored the outfit datum to allow accessories as part of an outfit.
  • The Captain spawns with the Medal of Captaincy again.

TrustyGun updated:

  • Some of the clown's toys have been moved into a crate in the theater. If you think you are missing something, check in there.
  • Wooden crates have been added. You can construct them with 6 wooden planks, and deconstruct them the same way as regular crates

oranges updated:

  • Security minor and major crime descriptors are now a single line input, making it easier to add them
  • Medical record descriptions are single inputs now

08 June 2017

4dplanner updated:

  • traitors show up on antagHUD

Expletive updated:

  • The detective's flask has Hearty Punch instead of whiskey.
  • The Detective's fedora no longer clips with hair.
  • Adds 91 new sprites to fix clipping issues with the Detective's fedora and hair.
  • Change the standard fedora to match the detective and treasure hunter variants.
  • Detective, Treasure Hunter, and standard fedoras now all benefit from new sprites.

Joan updated:

  • Tinkerer's Daemons are no longer totally disabled if you drop below the servant requirement.
  • Instead, Tinkerer's Daemons will disable until the number of active daemons is equal to or less than one-fifth of the living Servants.
  • Tinkerer's Daemons produce components very slightly slower.
  • Added Prolonging Prism as an application scripture.
  • Prolonging Prism will delay the arrival of an emergency shuttle by 2 minutes at the cost of 2500W of power plus 75W for every 10 CV and 750W for every previous activation. In addition to the high cost, it very obviously affects the shuttle dock and leaves an obvious trail to the prism.
  • Script scripture now requires 6 Servants to unlock, from 5, and Application scripture now requires 9 Servants to unlock, from 8.

Lzimann + Cyberboss updated:

  • Ported goonchat. Much less laggy and crashy than BYOND chat. + Frills!

NanoTrasen Public Relations Department updated:

  • A mining accident has released large amounts of space dust, which is starting to drift near our stations. Don't panic, it's probably safe.

Nanotrasen Plastic Surgery Advert updated:

  • Are you a mutant? Were you born hideously deformed? Do you have ears growing out of the top of your head? Or even a tail? Don't worry, with our patented surgical techniques, Nanotrasen's highly trained medical staff can make you normal! Schedule an appointment, and one of our surgeons can see you same day.
  • Cat ears now give you double the ear damage.

QualityVan updated:

  • Cremators now still work when there's only one thing in them
  • The ORM now uses the intended amount of resources when making alloys
  • Cyborgs can no longer alt-click their material stacks to split them

Robustin updated:

  • The blood cult can only attempt to summon Nar-Sie in one of three rooms that are randomly selected at round-start.

Shadowlight213 updated:

  • Tracking implants and chem implants have been added to rnd
  • Adrenaline and freedom implants have been removed from rnd

Xhuis updated:

  • Defibrillator paddles will no longer stick to your hands, and will snap back onto the unit if you drop them somehow.

lzimann updated:

  • Xeno queens can no longer be maids

oranges updated:

  • Added stungloves to the brain damage lines

07 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • New plasma medals have been added to the Captain's medal box. Don't get them too warm.
  • New sprites for plasma medals.
  • Icon and worn sprites for all medals and the lawyer's badge have been improved. Worn medals more closely match their icons.
  • The bone talisman is an accessory again, so it's not useless.
  • It also has a new worn sprite, based on an arm band.
  • Ties have been removed from accessories.dmi and vice versa. Same for the explorer's webbing sprites that were in there. ties.dmi is now neck.dmi, and has sprites for scarves, ties, sthetoscopes, etc.
  • Examining an accessory now tells you how to use it.

Joan updated:

  • Renamed Volt Void to Volt Blaster.
  • Volt Blaster does not consume power when firing and does not cause backlash if you don't fire.
  • Volt Blaster does 25 damage, from 20-40 depending on power, and has 5 shots, from 4, over its duration.

QualityVan updated:

  • Surplus rifles are no longer invisible while unloaded

Shadowlight213 updated:

  • The Changeling Transformation Sting is once again stealthy. However, it no longer transfers mutations.
  • The chemical cost of Transformation Sting has been increased to 50

06 June 2017

Joan updated:

  • Added a new unique Kinetic Accelerator module to necropolis chests.
  • Renames Clockwork Proselytizers to Replica Fabricators.
  • Replica Fabricators can directly consume floor tiles, rods, metal, and plasteel for power instead of needing to convert to brass first.
  • Cogscarabs can no longer use guns.
  • KA modkits in necropolis chests are now design discs with designs for those modkits, to force miners to bring back minerals.

PKPenguin321 updated:

  • The fake pits that the arcade machines can vend now vend properly, for real this time.

Robustin updated:

  • The cult master has finally acquired their 3rd spell, Eldritch Pulse. This ability allows the cult master to quickly teleport any cultist or cult structure in visual range to another tile in visual range. This spell has an obvious spell effect that will indicate where the target has gone but without explicitly revealing who the master is. This spell should assist with moving obstinate cultists off an important rune, getting wandering cultists back onto an important rune, save a cultist from an untimely arrest/summary execution, assist in getting your allies into secure areas, etc.
  • The void torch now only works on items that have been placed on surfaces, this prevents the inventory bugs associated with this item.

thefastfoodguy updated:

  • you can burn your brains out with a flashlight if you're tired of life

05 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • The Ore Redemption Machine has been ported to TGUI. New features include the addition of "Release All" and "Smelt All" buttons.
  • The Ore Redemption Machine now be loaded with sheets of material.
  • The Ore Redemption Machine can now 'smelt' Reinforced Glass.

Joan updated:

  • Only human and silicon servants can help recite multi-invoker scriptures. This means cogscarabs, clockwork marauders, and anima fragments DO NOT COUNT for scriptures that require multiple invokers.
  • Clockcult scripture tiers can no longer be lost by dipping below their requirements once they are unlocked.
  • Removes Revenant scriptures entirely.

MMMiracles updated:

  • Deepstorage ruin has been redone to be more self-sufficient and up to better mapping standards.

04 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Many stacks now update their sprite based on their amount.
  • Stacks will now weigh less if they're less than full.
  • Added new icon states for glass, reinforced glass, metal, plasteel, plastic, plasma, plastitanium, titanium, gold, silver, adamantine, brass, bruise packs, ointment, gauze, cloth, leather, wet leather, hairless hide, human hide, ash drake hide, goliath hide, bones, sandstone blocks, and snow blocks.
  • Some lavaland stacks' max amounts have been reduced.
  • Bulldog Shotguns should update their sprite properly when you remove the magazine.
  • Riot suits no longer hide jumpsuits.

Joan updated:

  • Rod Form now costs 2 points, from 3.
  • Rod Form now does 70 damage, from 160, but gains 20 damage, per upgrade, when upgraded. This means you'll need to spend 6 points on it to instantly crit people from full health.

Swindly updated:

  • Chemical grenades are no longer permanently disabled after being unlocked by wirecutters after being primed.

03 June 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Chem Dispensers now store their power in their batteries.
  • Instead of being based on battery and capacitor ratings, recharge delay for portable chem dispensers is now based on their capacitor and matter bin ratings.
  • The Seed Vault's chemical dispenser now has all the chemicals a pod person could want.
  • The crafting menu now has subcategories!
  • Food recipe categories have been combined as subcategories of the Foods category.
  • Weaponry and Ammunition have been combined as subcategories of the Weaponry category.

Improvedname updated:

  • Janitors now start with a flyswatter

Mothership Epsilon updated:

  • All your base are belong to us.

Penguaro updated:

  • [Box] Removes extra/unattached vent from Xeno Lab

Planned Spaceparenthood updated:

  • We would like to apologize for mislabeled cloning pod buttons.

WJohnston updated:

  • Deltastation's south nuke op shuttle location should no longer be possible to teleport into by moving off the map and back on, and moved the rest closer to the station.

p440 updated:

  • Fixed duping cable coils with magic APC terminals
  • Fixed invalid icon state for empty APCs

02 June 2017

Cyberboss updated:

  • New server backend!
  • Test merged PRs now show the commit of the PR at which they were merged

Expletive updated:

  • Adds the NT75 Electromagnetic Power Inducer, a tool which can be used to quickly recharge many devices! They can be found in Electrical Closets, the CE's locker, ordered by cargo, or created in RnD.

Goodstuff updated:

  • Fixes the crafting recipe for black carpet
  • Removed a random white dot on the black carpet sprite

Joan updated:

  • Goliaths, Watchers, and Legions have a small chance of dropping a kinetic crusher trophy item when killed with a kinetic crusher. Like the boss trophy items, these give various effects.
  • Kinetic crushers recharge very slightly slower.
  • Three unique Kinetic Accelerator modules will now appear in necropolis chests.

MMMiracles (Cerestation) updated:

  • CereStation's Security department has been overhauled entirely thanks to the tireless efforts of Nanotrasen's construction division.

Nanotrasen Mining Alert updated:

  • Nanotrasen's mining operations have created far more corpses than an entire galaxy of cooks could hope to deal with. To solve this, we decided to just dump them all from orbit onto the barren lava planet. Unfortunately, the creatures called "Legion" have infested a great number of them, and you can now commonly find the bodies of former Nanotrasen employees left behind. Additionally, there are reports of natives, other settlers, and even stranger things found among the corpses.

QualityVan updated:

  • The tactical rigging in op closets is more tacticool

Shadowlight213 updated:

  • The reset wire on borgs must now be cut to reset a borg's module instead of pulsed.
  • Portable pump max pressure has been lowered.

Steelpoint updated:

  • Iron Hawk Marine no longer has Centcom all access. My mistake.
  • Fixes Iron Hawk marine carbine not having a visible sprite.

Swindly updated:

  • Nitrous oxide no longer produces water as a by-product, requires 2 parts ammonia instead of 3, and produces 5 parts when made instead of 2.

kevinz000 updated:

  • Gang turrets now follow the mouse of the person using them! Yay!

octareenroon91 updated:

  • Attempts to add items to a storage container beyond its slots limit will now obtain a failure message again.

30 May 2017

Expletive updated:

  • Luxury versions of the bluespace shelter capsule are now available! Purchase them at the mining equipment vendor.
  • Cardboard cutouts have a new option: Xenomorph Maid
  • Black Carpet can now be crafted using a stack of carpet and a black crayon.
  • Black fancy tables can now be crafted using Black Carpet.
  • Shower curtains can now be recoloured with crayons, unscrewed from the floor, disassembled with wire cutters, and reassembled using cloth, plastic, and a metal rod.

kevinz000 updated:

  • Research and Development have recieved designs for new prototype Beam Marksman Rifles. These rifles require a short aiming cycle to fire, however, have extreme velocity over other weapons.
  • Aiming time is 2 seconds, hold down mouse to aim, aiming time increases if you change your aim based on angle changed, or if you move while aiming. The weapon can not be fired while unscoped.
  • However, someone tripped and pulled out the power cord while your servers were being updated with the latest revision of accelerator laser cannons. All data have been lost...

29 May 2017

Joan updated:

  • Renames hivelord and legion cores to 'regenerative core'. Their descs have also been updated to be more clear.

Nanotrasen Plasmaman Outreach Division updated:

  • plasmaman tank volume has been increased from 3 to 6.

XDTM updated:

  • Abductors have learned how to properly delete the memories of their test subjects.

bandit updated:

  • The officer's sabre standard in Nanotrasen captain rollouts can be used to remove the tails of lizard traitors, or lizards in general.

oranges updated:

  • AI's can now hang up all holocalls at a station with alt+click

28 May 2017

ClosingBracket updated:

  • Allows explorer webbings to hold marker beacons.

Expletive updated:

  • E-Cigarettes can now fit in your pocket.

Iamgoofball updated:

  • After the Syndicate realized their top chemist was both mixing a stamina destroying drug with a stimulant to avoid slowdowns entirely in their sleepypens, they fired him and replaced him with a new chemist.

Joan updated:

  • Miner borgs can now place marker beacons from a storage of 30.
  • Necropolis tendrils will once again emit light.
  • The kinetic crusher can now gain bonus effects via trophy items gained by killing bosses with it.
  • Yes, you do have to kill the boss primarily doing damage via the kinetic crusher, or you won't get the trophy item and the bonus effect it grants.

Kor updated:

  • The chaplains possessed blade, shades, and constructs, can once again speak galactic common.

QualityVan updated:

  • Bayonets can now be used for butchery
  • Cloning pods which are interrupted by a emagging will now produce a slightly lumpier smoothie
  • Cloning pods that have stopped cloning early can no longer be broken open to extract leftover parts
  • Crew monitoring consoles once again have minimaps while you're on the station level

Steelpoint updated:

  • A New Iron Hawk troop transport ruin has been added to lavaland. Can the sole surviving Marine somehow survive the horrors of lavaland? Lore fluff included.
  • Central Command has listened to complaints and, as such, has now stationed "real" Private Security Officers at centcom docks.
  • A new Nanotrasen Security Officer NPC variant is available to admins, this 'peaceful' version will only attack people who attack it first. Great for keeping order.

Swindly updated:

  • fixed not being able to attach heads without brainmobs in them

cacogen updated:

  • You can now rename dog beds by buckling a new owner to them
  • Dogs that spawn in an area with a vacant bed will take possession of and rename the bed
  • Adds AI follow links to holopad speech and PDA messages. Note that PDA messages point to the owner of the PDA and not the PDA's actual location.
  • Fixes PDA icon not showing up beside received messages for AIs

kevinz000 updated:

  • Nanotrasen's new titanium wall blueprints are smooth enough that it can reflect projectiles!

26 May 2017
